To enable controlled evaluation, each face image is synthesised across three age groups (25, 45, 65) and three BMI variations of -10%, baseline and +10%, yielding 4320 paired samples. To the best of our knowledge, this is the only X-ray-face dataset with this magnitude. Extensive experiments showed that the proposed method outperforms recent existing approaches in both generated image quality and retrieval task. Finally, to evaluate the performance of our proposed method, we have evaluated the quality of the generated image using FID, IS, SSIM, LPIPS, PSNR and ArcFace score. Additionally, retrieval performance is evaluated using recall@k, mAP@k and MRR@k. Obtained experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can be used as an alternate tool in providing aid in forensic investigations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cranio-Diff，基于扩散模型的跨模态颅面重建框架，利用2D X射线颅骨图像生成面部图像，通过ControlNet结构引导和生物特征文本条件解决跨模态结构身份对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型如CycleGAN、Pix2Pix和扩散模型在面部生成任务中表现良好，但在颅面重建中，从颅骨（X射线）到面部（光学）的跨模态转换时，由于不同模态间结构身份对齐不匹配，无法有效捕捉跨模态语义信息。因此需要一种能够更好对齐结构身份的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Cranio-Diff框架，基于扩散模型，通过ControlNet集成颅骨条件的结构引导，并结合生物特征文本条件（年龄、BMI）生成面部图像。数据集包含120名受试者的侧位和正位X射线扫描，通过合成3个年龄组（25、45、65）和3种BMI变化（-10%、基线、+10%）得到4320对样本，是当前规模最大的X射线-面部数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验采用FID、IS、SSIM、LPIPS、PSNR和ArcFace评分评估生成图像质量，使用Recall@k、mAP@k和MRR@k评估检索性能。Cranio-Diff在各项指标上均优于现有方法，表明其可作为法医调查的辅助工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cranio-Diff成功实现了从2D X射线颅骨到面部的跨模态重建，解决了结构身份对齐问题，图像质量和检索性能显著优于现有方法。该研究具有法医调查等实际应用价值，未来可扩展到更多模态或改进条件控制。

title: PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PsychoSafe框架，将LLM的拒绝行为重构为基于心理学的结构化支持性沟通，以提升高风险交互中的安全性与支持性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在高风险情境（如危机、胁迫）中常面临应拒绝的请求，简单拒绝可能无法满足用户真实需求，甚至造成二次伤害。现有方法缺乏心理学依据，未能提供有效的支持性回应。因此，需要一种既能避免直接危害又能提供恰当支持的心理知拒绝方式，以平衡帮助性与安全性。
light_analysis.method: 构建PsychoSafe框架，包含8019条提示-响应对，覆盖五个心理学风险领域（危机、胁迫等）。采用提示工程与参数高效微调（LoRA）应用于Qwen 3.5 27B模型。关键创新在于将拒绝转化为结构化支持性沟通，融入循证干预策略，如情绪安抚、资源推荐和心理基础。评估使用LLM裁判和人工评分。
light_analysis.result: 在500条提示的平衡验证集上，PsychoSafe提示相比通用基线提升拒绝质量28.1%，其中外部资源推荐提升46.8%，心理基础提升34.8%。微调实现近乎完美的拒绝与资源推荐率（>95%），但响应相关性下降。在SORRY-Bench和XSTest上表现领域内鲁棒性好，但域外泛化有限，提示未来需多样化微调数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: PsychoSafe有效改善了LLM在高风险交互中的拒绝质量，通过心理学支持减少潜在危害。学术贡献在于提出心理学知拒绝范式，实际应用价值高。局限性是域外泛化差，可能过度机械应用干预策略，未来应扩展训练数据并引入选择性应用机制。

title: AutoMegaKernel: A Statically-Checked Agent Harness for Self-Retargeting Megakernel Synthesis
abstract: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) compiles a HuggingFace Llama-family model into a single persistent cooperative CUDA kernel that runs the whole forward pass in one launch, with no per-model hand-written CUDA. The contribution is the system, not raw speed.   A frozen schedule-IR validator statically certifies deadlock-freedom and race-freedom via static graph checks (not a mechanized proof), so an unsafe agent-proposed schedule is rejected before launch: across 7,160 adversarial schedules (6,091 unsafe) it had zero false-accepts and accepted all 360 real lowerings. The same source retargets sm_80/sm_90/sm_120 from one codebase, auto-generates correct megakernels for 10 of 10 supported models, and on a real SmolLM2-135M checkpoint reproduces HuggingFace greedy decode token-for-token (perplexity match 2.5e-7). An unattended, agent-drivable autoresearch loop self-improves the megakernel over its own baseline (1.25-1.72x).   A search-found int8 (W8A16) megakernel beats CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16 at batch-1 decode across NVIDIA's datacenter inference fleet: L4 up to 1.33x, the current-gen L40S 1.25-1.27x, A10G up to 1.08x at scale, and the consumer RTX 5090 1.19-1.23x. The ordering is not a clean function of bandwidth (the 864 GB/s L40S beats the 600 GB/s A10G); the divide is inference-class vs training-class. AMK trails cuBLAS on the high-bandwidth training-class A100/H100, where the harness localizes the cross-SM-sync bottleneck; we report the gap plainly. This is a precision-asymmetric (W8A16 vs bf16) comparison at decode position 0; the largest real checkpoint is TinyLlama-1.1B. Code and the harness: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures. Open-source code, data, and agent harness: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoMegaKernel系统，能将HuggingFace Llama模型编译为单个持久协作CUDA内核，自动生成正确的megakernel，无需手工编写CUDA代码，并具备静态安全性验证和跨架构重定向能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM推理依赖手工编写的CUDA内核，难以跨GPU架构迁移且缺乏安全性保障。AMK旨在通过静态图检查自动验证调度无死锁和数据竞争，避免不安全调度导致的问题，同时实现从单一代码库自动重定向到不同架构，降低开发成本并提升推理效率。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括：一个冻结调度IR验证器，通过静态图检查在启动前拒绝不安全调度；基于Agent的自优化循环，可自动改进megakernel性能；采用W8A16精度不对称量化，在decode位置0与cuBLAS bf16对比。支持sm_80/sm_90/sm_120架构，从同一代码库生成正确内核。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，AMK在7160个对抗调度中零误接受，接受所有360个真实调度；在SmolLM2-135M上复制HuggingFace贪婪解码，困惑度匹配2.5e-7；无监督自优化实现1.25-1.72倍加速。在L4、L40S、A10G、RTX 5090上W8A16 megakernel超越CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16，但在A100/H100上落后。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMK系统实现了自动化、安全验证和跨架构重定向的megakernel生成，显著简化了LLM推理优化流程，尤其适用于低带宽推理GPU。其静态验证机制为安全调度提供了保障，但训练级高带宽GPU上的性能瓶颈需进一步优化，未来可扩展至更大模型和更优量化策略。

title: GenEyePose: Patient-Free, Knowledge-Based Saccadic Eye Movement Modeling for Digital Neurophysiologic Biomarker Development
abstract: Eye movements, including saccades, are widely regarded as highly sensitive and objective biomarkers of neurophysiologic states. Detecting saccadic signatures in neurologic diseases offers a rapid, portable alternative to brain imaging, avoiding access and cost barriers. Currently, there are no robust AI-enabled video-oculographic solutions (e.g., digital biomarkers) for screening, triaging, or localizing brain abnormalities due to privacy issues and scarce datasets. In this work, we propose the first fully synthetic, patient-free, multimodal eye movement generation pipeline for generalizable saccade analysis. Using this synthetic dataset, we trained a deep learning classifier to distinguish between normal and abnormal (hypometria and hypermetria) saccadic accuracies and evaluated its performance on real-world clinical data. The model achieved an AUROC of 0.76 and a sensitivity of 0.71, showing that the synthetic data has strong potential to generalize for clinical applications, including as a screening tool in at-home and emergency room settings or a tool for precise neuroanatomic localization.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出完全合成、无患者的多模态眼动生成管道，用于通用扫视分析，并在真实临床数据上验证其效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 眼动（如扫视）是神经生理状态的高度敏感和客观生物标志物，可快速、便携地替代脑成像。然而，由于隐私问题和数据集稀缺，目前缺乏鲁棒的AI视频眼动解决方案用于筛查、分诊或定位脑异常。现有方法受限于真实数据获取困难，无法规模化应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出首个完全合成的、无患者的多模态眼动生成管道，生成通用扫视分析所需的合成数据集。使用该数据集训练深度学习分类器，区分正常与异常（低度测量和过度测量）扫视精度。模型在真实临床数据上评估，采用AUROC和灵敏度指标。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界临床数据上，模型达到AUROC为0.76，灵敏度为0.71。结果表明合成数据具有强大的泛化潜力，可用于临床环境，如家庭和急诊室的筛查工具，或精确神经解剖定位。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次展示了完全合成数据在扫视异常检测中的可行性，为数字神经生理生物标志物开发提供了新途径。合成数据避免了隐私问题，克服了数据集稀缺瓶颈，具有重要的学术和临床应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的眼动模式和多病种扩展。

title: SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting:Retraining and Post-Processing Extensions to the FOOTPASS Baselines
abstract: We describe our system for the SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting Challenge, which requires predicting who performs which action and when, across eight classes in broadcast soccer. Building on the three FOOTPASS baselines [1] (TAAD, TAAD+GNN, and TAAD+DST), we contribute four extensions: (1) gradient check pointing to enable full-backbone fine-tuning on a single GPU; (2) fusion of GNN logits into the DST encoder, combining graph-based tactical context with per-player visual features; (3) square-root frequency class weighting to address the 213:1 pass-to-tackle imbalance in the training data; and (4) a post processing pipeline comprising per-class logit gating, temporal frame refinement, jersey re-assignment, and a two-model ensemble. Our system achieves 0.548 Macro F1 on the test set and 0.446 on the challenge set (server evaluation).
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Player Centric Ball Action Spotting Challenge, Rank 7

light_analysis.overview: 提出四个扩展改进FOOTPASS基线，实现高效全骨干微调、图上下文融合、类别不平衡处理及后处理，提升球员中心球动作检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在广播足球视频中准确预测球员动作（谁、什么动作、何时）对战术分析至关重要，但现有方法存在训练效率低、类别极度不平衡（传球与铲球比例213:1）、视觉与战术上下文融合不足等问题。Challenge要求处理八类动作，现有基线（TAAD, TAAD+GNN, TAAD+DST）受限于单GPU内存和性能瓶颈，需有效扩展以应对实际部署需求。
light_analysis.method: 基于三个FOOTPASS基线（TAAD, TAAD+GNN, TAAD+DST），提出四项扩展：1）梯度检查点技术，在单GPU上实现完整骨干网络微调；2）将GNN输出的logits融合到DST编码器，结合图结构战术上下文与每球员视觉特征；3）平方根频率类别加权，缓解213:1的传球-铲球不平衡；4）后处理流水线，包括每类logit门控、时间帧细化、球衣重分配及两模型集成。训练数据为SoccerNet 2026挑战赛提供的数据集。
light_analysis.result: 系统在测试集上达到0.548 Macro F1，在挑战集（服务器评估）上达到0.446 Macro F1。相比FOOTPASS基线，通过全骨干微调、图上下文融合和类别加权显著提升性能，后处理进一步优化预测一致性。具体性能提升幅度未在摘要中详述，但表明方法有效应对了动作定位挑战中的主要难点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出实用扩展链，解决了球员中心动作检测中的效率、上下文融合和类别不平衡问题，验证了梯度检查点、GNN-DST融合及后处理的有效性。系统在SoccerNet 2026挑战中取得竞争性表现，为足球视频分析提供可部署方案。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或自监督预训练以进一步提升。

title: (Auto)formalization is supposed to be easy: Trellis process semantics for spelling out rigorous proofs
abstract: We present Trellis: an autoformalization system that leverages LLM agents in a deterministically constrained workflow to enforce incremental progress in Lean autoformalization tasks through iterative refinement of natural language proofs. Our approach is motivated by the common mathematician's notion of what it means to have a rigorous proof in the first place: namely, that it would be routine to elaborate any part of the proof in further detail. The result is a system which aims to achieve reliable autoformalization on a modest budget and with generalist agents, with specialization to autoformalization coming not from any task-specific agent training but instead from a meaning-of-rigor inspired workflow enforced by process semantics. We link to an end-to-end Lean formalization of a recent Ramsey theory breakthrough produced by the process.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trellis自动形式化系统，通过过程语义约束LLM代理的工作流实现可靠证明形式化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动形式化方法依赖特定训练或高昂成本，未充分利用数学家对严谨证明的直观理解——即证明应能逐步细化。Trellis旨在以通用代理和适度预算实现可靠形式化，无需任务特定训练。
light_analysis.method: Trellis采用确定性约束工作流，利用LLM代理迭代细化自然语言证明，通过过程语义强制执行增量进展。该方法不依赖领域微调，而是通过反映严谨证明本质的工作流实现专业化，并成功用于Lean形式化。
light_analysis.result: 系统成功完成一个端到端Lean形式化案例：近期Ramsey理论突破的证明。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标，但表明在通用代理和有限预算下实现了可靠自动形式化。
light_analysis.conclusion: Trellis展示了基于过程语义的自动形式化可行性，强调工作流设计而非模型训练的重要性。未来可扩展至更复杂证明，并降低形式化门槛，促进数学与AI交叉。

title: Correlation Is Not Enough: Embedding Human Metadata for Individual Causal Discovery
abstract: Ask a pretrained biomedical language model whether "cortisol 28 ug/dL" and "stock-market volatility" are related, and it returns a cosine similarity of 0.83 on a scale where 1.0 means identical. The two share no mechanism. This is not a corner case: every off-the-shelf biomedical encoder we tested (BioBERT, PubMedBERT, BioM-ELECTRA) scores unrelated cross-domain pairs between 0.76 and 0.92 when the answer should be near zero. Accuracy on cross-domain discrimination is 0%.   Retrieval systems survive this, because a language model downstream filters the noise. A Large Behavioural Model (LBM), a foundation model whose subject is a person rather than a sentence, does not: it reasons over a graph of a user's life and treats embedding proximity as evidence that two events are causally linked. False proximity writes a false causal edge, and everything downstream inherits the error. Here, embedding geometry is not a tuning knob; it is correctness.   We report the fix. A contrastive pass over 72,034 pairs raises PubMedBERT BIOSSES correlation from 0.633 to 0.828 and within-vs-across-domain separation from 1.05x to 1.63x. A second pass, BODHI, mines hard negatives from edges absent in a biomedical knowledge graph and lifts separation to 2.30x and the discrimination gap to +0.392, at a 4.5% BIOSSES cost. On an Intel Xeon 6737P with AMX, OpenVINO cuts single-query latency from 1367 ms to 10 ms (133x) and reaches 555 sentences/sec. One finding contradicts standard advice: FP16 beats INT8 on this silicon at every serving batch size, and we explain why. The same model on a no-AMX Ice Lake instance runs 13-27x slower. We release the benchmark suite, training corpora, the BODHI generator, and the OpenVINO scripts.

light_analysis.overview: 针对大型行为模型因嵌入相似性导致的虚假因果关系，提出对比学习方法BODHI，显著提升因果区分能力与推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练生物医学语言模型（如BioBERT）会将无关跨域对（如“cortisol 28 ug/dL”和“stock-market volatility”）误判为高度相关（余弦相似度0.83），这对大型行为模型（LBM）构成严重问题，因为LBM基于嵌入近邻推断因果关系，虚假邻近导致错误因果边。现有方法无法解决，需要专门的技术提升因果区分能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段对比学习：第一阶段用72,034对训练集提升PubMedBERT的BIOSSES相关性；第二阶段BODHI从生物医学知识图中挖掘难负样本，提升跨域分离度。使用OpenVINO在Intel Xeon 6737P上优化推理速度，发现FP16优于INT8，并解释了原因。
light_analysis.result: 第一阶段将BIOSSES相关性从0.633提升至0.828，跨域分离度从1.05x提升至1.63x。第二阶段（BODHI）将分离度提升至2.30x，判别差距+0.392，BIOSSES仅损失4.5%。推理延迟从1367ms降至10ms（133x），达555句/秒。在无AMX的Ice Lake上慢13-27x。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文解决了LBM中嵌入相似性导致的虚假因果问题，通过对比学习和知识图谱负样本挖掘显著提升因果区分能力，并提供高效推理方案。局限性在于依赖特定硬件加速（AMX），未来可探索更通用的优化。发布基准、语料和代码。

title: Transition-Based Digital Twin Modelling for Alzheimer's Disease under Sparse Longitudinal Data
abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progression is highly heterogeneous and is typically observed through sparse and irregular longitudinal data, posing challenges for prediction and personalised monitoring. Existing machine learning approaches have improved AD prediction using multimodal data, yet often focus on static classification or cohort-level risk estimation, providing limited support for subject-specific modelling and uncertainty-aware reasoning. To address these limitations, we present a personalised digital twin framework for AD prediction and scenario-based analysis using multimodal longitudinal data. The proposed approach integrates complementary modelling strategies to capture clinical transitions and temporal dependencies across visits. Using data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), including cognitive assessments, clinical variables, and MRI-derived phenotypes, the framework predicts cognitive status and diagnostic categories while quantifying predictive uncertainty and enabling patient-specific what-if trajectory analysis. Evaluation on leak-free subject-level splits demonstrates strong performance in score forecasting and diagnosis classification. In this sparse and irregular ADNI setting, transition-based modelling of adjacent visits achieved higher predictive accuracy than the sequence-based branch, suggesting that local transition modelling may be more data-efficient. While sequence models remain valuable for uncertainty-aware trajectory forecasting, local transition modelling offers a more data-efficient and robust predictive strategy. These findings highlight the importance of aligning temporal modelling strategies with clinical data structure and suggest that transition-based digital twin formulations may provide a practical and interpretable approach for personalised disease forecasting in neurodegenerative disorders.
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Accepted as a full-length paper at the International Conference on AI in Healthcare (AIiH) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于转换的数字孪生框架，利用稀疏纵向数据实现阿尔茨海默病个性化预测和情景分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展具有高度异质性，通常通过稀疏和不规则的纵向数据观察，给预测和个性化监测带来挑战。现有机器学习方法多依赖多模态数据进行静态分类或队列级风险估计，缺乏对受试者特异性建模和不确定性推理的支持。因此需要一种能处理稀疏数据、捕捉临床转换并提供个性化轨迹预测的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出个性化数字孪生框架，整合互补建模策略以捕捉临床转换和访视间时间依赖性。利用ADNI数据，包括认知评估、临床变量和MRI表型，预测认知状态和诊断类别，同时量化预测不确定性并实现患者特定的假设分析。框架包含基于转换的邻近访视建模和基于序列的建模两种分支，其中转换模型通过局部转换更高效地利用稀疏数据。
light_analysis.result: 在ADNI数据集上的漏检主体划分评估中，该方法在分数预测和诊断分类上表现强劲。基于转换的邻近访视建模比基于序列的分支获得更高预测精度，表明局部转换建模在稀疏数据下更数据高效。序列模型在不确定性轨迹预测中仍有价值，但转换模型提供了更数据高效和鲁棒的预测策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数字孪生框架通过转换建模有效利用稀疏纵向数据，实现个性化AD预测和情景分析。强调了时间建模策略与临床数据结构对齐的重要性，转换式数字孪生为神经退行性疾病提供实用且可解释的个性化预测方法。未来可扩展到其他疾病或集成更多数据模态，但需注意数据稀疏性带来的挑战。

title: Visual Prompting Meets Feature Reconstruction-Based Anomaly Detection with Dual-Teacher Supervision
abstract: Recent Anomaly Detection methods achieve perfect detection and segmentation scores on well-established datasets, such as MVTec. However, many of these methods face challenges when foundational assumptions - such as consistent object scale, viewpoint, background, illumination, and centered placement - are violated. Those variations that occur render anomaly detection methods unusable in many real-world scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce three key contributions: (1) a visual prompting pipeline that isolates objects using foreground-background masking; (2) a mechanism for unfreezing the teacher in student-teacher models to improve domain adaptability; and (3) a data augmentation strategy leveraging diffusion-generated synthetic images to enhance anomaly detection performance. We achieve a 3.5 percentage point improvement over the previous state-of-the-art on the challenging AeBAD dataset by using the Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR) model as our backbone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉提示流水线和双教师监督机制，结合扩散生成数据增强，显著提升异常检测在复杂真实场景下的鲁棒性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有异常检测方法在MVTec等标准数据集上表现优异，但物体尺度、视角、背景、光照和居中放置等变化会严重影响其性能，导致在现实场景中不可用。为此，需要一种能适应这些变化的鲁棒检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入三项关键创新：1）视觉提示流水线，通过前景-背景掩码隔离物体；2）师生模型中解冻教师网络，提升领域适应性；3）利用扩散模型生成合成图像进行数据增强。以Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR)为骨干网络。
light_analysis.result: 在具有挑战性的AeBAD数据集上，相比先前最先进方法取得3.5个百分点的提升，证明了该方法在应对真实世界变化时的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过视觉提示、教师解冻和扩散数据增强，有效缓解了异常检测对理想假设的依赖，增强了模型在复杂场景中的泛化能力。未来可探索更精细的掩码策略和更高效的数据增强方法。

title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
abstract: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interactive spatial understanding. We introduce SpatialWorld, a unified benchmark designed specifically for evaluating the interactive spatial understanding of multimodal agents in complex real-world tasks. Integrating eight heterogeneous simulation backends under a shared, simulator-agnostic protocol, SpatialWorld features 760 human-annotated tasks across diverse domains (e.g., household routines, travel, social collaboration). Agents must solve tasks under vision-only partial observability, actively gathering egocentric visual evidence and expressing decisions via a unified, text-based action interface native to MLLMs. For reliable evaluation, each task includes a human-validated initial state, a reference trajectory, and a terminal-state verifier. Evaluating 15 advanced agents reveals that robust spatial task solving remains challenging: the strongest model, GPT-5, achieves an average task success rate (TSR) of only 17.4%, while the leading open-source model, Qwen-3.5, reaches 14.1%. Further analysis exposes a clear mismatch between task success and execution efficiency, alongside substantial domain-specific performance variations. These bottlenecks in active exploration and long-horizon planning position SpatialWorld as a rigorous testbed for future spatial agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialWorld基准，评估多模态智能体在真实世界任务中的交互式空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间推理基准多依赖被动评估（如静态VQA）或特定于模拟器的流程，无法评估通用交互式空间理解能力。SpatialWorld旨在填补这一空白，通过统一协议整合多个仿真后端，提供多样化真实任务，测试智能体在视觉部分可观测环境下主动收集证据并决策的能力。
light_analysis.method: SpatialWorld集成8种异构仿真后端，采用共享的模拟器无关协议，包含760个人工标注任务，涵盖家务、旅行、社交协作等场景。智能体在视觉部分可观测下，通过统一的基于文本的动作接口与环境交互，每个任务配有初始状态、参考轨迹和终端状态验证器。评估15个先进模型。
light_analysis.result: 最强模型GPT-5平均任务成功率仅17.4%，开源模型Qwen-3.5达14.1%。分析显示任务成功与执行效率存在明显不匹配，且各领域性能差异显著，表明主动探索和长程规划仍是瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialWorld作为严格测试基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型在交互式空间推理中的不足，特别是主动探索和长程规划能力。该工作为未来空间智能体的发展提供了评估标准和改进方向。

title: Algorithm for Contextual Queueing Bandits with Rate-Optimal Queue Length Regret
abstract: Contextual queueing bandits provide a framework for learning to schedule heterogeneous jobs under unknown context-dependent service rates. Under stochastic contexts, existing algorithms achieve $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ queue length regret, defined as the expected difference between the learner's and oracle's queue lengths at horizon $T$. In this paper, we improve this rate to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. The key observation is that random exploration is needed only up to a carefully chosen cutoff round, rather than throughout the entire horizon. We propose CQB-$η$-2, a three-phase algorithm: (i) pure random exploration to construct an initial estimator, (ii) $η$-random exploration combined with a UCB rule to continue learning while maintaining negative drift, and (iii) pure UCB after the exploration cutoff. Our proof decomposes the queue length regret at the cutoff round. Before the cutoff, negative drift suppresses queue length differences caused by suboptimal choices. After the cutoff, the first two phases provide sufficient random exploration samples, ensuring that UCB decisions incur small departure-rate gaps. Combining these two bounds yields queue length regret of order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. We further prove a minimax lower bound of order $Ω(T^{-1/2})$. The proof constructs two hard instances that are statistically indistinguishable up to the final service decision, and uses a queue-specific coupling argument to convert the resulting testing error into queue length regret. Together, our upper and lower bounds characterize the minimax dependence on the horizon $T$ up to logarithmic factors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文队列赌博机算法CQB-η-2，将队列长度遗憾从O(T^{-1/4})优化至最优速率O(T^{-1/2})，并匹配下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文队列赌博机框架用于在未知服务率下学习调度异质作业，但现有算法队列长度遗憾仅为O(T^{-1/4})，与理论下界存在差距。本文旨在实现最优速率，提升学习效率与系统稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出三阶段算法CQB-η-2：阶段一纯随机探索构建初始服务率估计；阶段二以概率η随机探索结合UCB策略，维持队列负漂移；阶段三纯UCB。通过截止回合分解，证明前期负漂移抑制次优选择导致的队列差异，后期基于充分探索的UCB决策减少服务率差距。
light_analysis.result: 算法实现队列长度遗憾为O(T^{-1/2})（对数因子内），并证明匹配的极小化下界Ω(T^{-1/2})，表明该速率关于时间T最优。通过构造两个统计不可区分的困难实例并引入队列耦合论证，严格证明了下界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次实现了上下文队列赌博机问题的最优队列长度遗憾率，填补了理论空白。方法具有一般性，可推广至其他在线学习与排队系统交叉领域。未来工作可考虑动态上下文或非平稳环境。

title: Frequency-based Constrained Sampling for Interval Patterns
abstract: Output space pattern sampling is a powerful alternative to exhaustive pattern mining for exploring large pattern spaces, as it enables users to focus on representative patterns drawn according to a chosen interestingness measure. In this paper, we address the problem of sampling interval patterns under user-defined syntactic constraints. We introduce CFips, a sampling approach that incorporates constraints directly into the sampling procedure. The approach relies on a multi-step sampling framework and supports several syntactic constraints by decomposing them into elementary predicates on interval bounds while preserving exact sampling guarantees. We formally prove that CFips samples interval patterns proportionally to their frequency within the constrained pattern space. The experimental results show that integrating constraints into the sampling procedure enables to complete mining tasks that would otherwise fail within a given time out.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CFips，一种在用户定义句法约束下按频率比例采样区间模式的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型模式空间中，穷举模式挖掘效率低下，而现有输出空间采样方法不支持用户定义的句法约束。实际应用中，用户常需在满足特定约束的前提下获取代表性模式，但缺乏有效采样手段。因此，需要一种能在约束空间内按兴趣度量（如频率）进行采样的方法，以平衡探索效率与用户需求。
light_analysis.method: CFips采用多步采样框架，将用户定义的句法约束分解为区间边界的原子谓词，并直接融入采样过程。通过保持精确的采样保证，确保在约束模式空间内按频率比例采样区间模式。该方法支持多种句法约束，无需穷举所有模式，即可生成代表性样本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CFips能完成在给定超时内穷举挖掘失败的任务，验证了约束集成采样的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标或对比数据，但强调其在大模式空间中的效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CFips解决了约束下区间模式采样问题，将句法约束无缝融入采样过程，保证了频率比例采样。该方法扩展了模式挖掘的实用性，适用于数据探索和知识发现。未来可研究更复杂的约束类型或优化采样效率。

title: In-Context Learning for Latent Space Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a central tool for sample-efficient design, and latent-space Bayesian optimization (LSBO) extends it to structured objects such as molecules and proteins. In parallel, tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL now achieve state-of-the-art regression performance and are increasingly used as BO surrogates. Because their Bayesian behavior is induced by large synthetic pretraining collections, the composition of this pretraining distribution is crucial. LSBO creates a distinctive mismatch: the induced map from latent code to objective value differs markedly from the regression tasks used to train current in-context models. We address this mismatch by complementing the pretraining stage of tabular foundation model surrogates with synthetic optimization tasks defined on the latent space of a molecular VAE. The continued-pretraining objective features a regularizer that anchors the model to the original checkpoint, preserving its broad regression prior while avoiding overspecialization to the adaptation tasks. On held-out molecular optimization benchmarks, the resulting model achieves strong performance, supporting the relevance of LSBO-specific adaptation for in-context surrogates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过继续预训练上下文学习代理以适应潜空间贝叶斯优化，解决分布不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜空间贝叶斯优化（LSBO）在分子等结构化对象设计中至关重要，但当前上下文学习模型（如TabPFN）的预训练分布与LSBO中潜码到目标值的映射存在显著不匹配，导致代理性能下降。需要调整预训练分布以提升LSBO效果。
light_analysis.method: 在分子VAE的潜空间上构造合成优化任务，对表格基础模型代理进行继续预训练，并引入正则化器将模型锚定至原始检查点，保留其广泛回归先验，避免过度适应新任务。该方法平衡了LSBO特定适应与通用回归能力。
light_analysis.result: 在留出的分子优化基准测试上，该模型取得强劲性能，验证了LSBO特定适应对上下文代理的相关性。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过针对性继续预训练，有效缓解了上下文学习代理在LSBO中的分布不匹配问题，提升了分子优化效率。该方法可推广至其他结构化对象，未来可探索更高效的预训练策略。

title: From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design
abstract: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.

light_analysis.overview: 提出递归自设计的操作性证据框架，并展示DGM系统通过自我修改在多个基准上取得显著提升，同时提供可重复的MetaAI-Mini协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 递归自设计指AI辅助修改自身机制，但缺乏统一评估标准和可重复证据。现有系统（如DGM、STOP等）零散且难以比较，需系统性框架来界定和验证此类系统的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出四标准操作证据框架：可检查目标系统、元级别修改器、反馈导向选择、递归持续。将公共系统映射至标准。DGM展示80次迭代后性能提升，消融实验表明开放探索和自我改进均贡献。提供MetaAI-Mini代码库和基于HumanEval的重复协议。
light_analysis.result: DGM在SWE-bench Verified上从20%提升至50%，在Polyglot上从14.2%提升至30.7%。消融实验确认开放探索和自我改进的有效性。MetaAI-Mini作为协议发布，暂无完整实验结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了递归自设计的评估框架和图谱，为MetaAI研究提供可重复工程证据。未来可基于MetaAI-Mini开展实验验证。局限性在于MetaAI-Mini尚未包含完整模型运行结果。

title: When Built-in Thinking Helps and Hurts: Constraint-Level Error Shifts in Instruction Following
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often improve math and coding performance, but their effect on instruction following is unclear. We study IFEval with Qwen3 models (1.7B-32B), using same-weights Thinking ON/OFF controls; four Hunyuan models provide directional cross-family support. Aggregate pass-rate changes are small (-0.55 to -3.52 pp), yet 10-20% of prompts switch between pass and fail across modes, suggesting that thinking changes the pattern of errors--some prompts improve while others worsen--rather than uniformly degrading performance. Under a post-hoc Qwen3-derived grouping, constraint types separate into Planning (global counting, structure, coordination), which improves at the class level under thinking, and Precision (exact local form), which consistently worsens; the class-level Planning/Precision sign pattern holds directionally for all four Hunyuan models despite Hunyuan's opposite aggregate direction. Thinking also changes final-answer length; matched-length analyses substantially reduce the Precision drop, but a residual penalty remains. Analyzing thinking traces with a cross-encoder relevance metric reveals three patterns: Neutral shows a positive relevance-compliance link (r approximately 0.15); Planning shows near-zero predictive correlation (r approximately 0.02) despite measurable trace engagement, consistent with an execution gap between CE-measured trace relevance and final-answer compliance; Precision shows a small negative correlation (r approximately -0.05), with failing instances having higher mean relevance than passing ones. Activation patching across four model sizes (1.7B-14B) shows that Precision flip instances are more often restored than Planning flip instances (32-58% vs. 14-40% mean layer-restoration), with the largest gap at 14B (about 30 pp).

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大推理模型在指令跟随中思考模式导致约束类型错误转移：规划类改善，精确类恶化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大推理模型（LRM）在数学和编码任务上表现优异，但其对指令跟随的影响尚不明确。现有研究通常关注聚合性能变化，忽略了思考可能改变错误模式而非均匀影响所有约束。理解这种非对称影响对于设计更可靠的指令跟随系统至关重要，尤其是当思考机制被内置到模型中时。
light_analysis.method: 使用Qwen3模型（1.7B-32B）在IFEval基准上控制思考开关，并辅以四个Hunyuan模型进行跨家族验证。后验地将指令约束分为Planning（全局计数、结构、协调）和Precision（精确局部形式）两类。通过交叉编码器相关性指标分析思考痕迹，并运用激活修补技术在不同模型规模上探究错误翻转机制。
light_analysis.result: 聚合通过率变化很小（-0.55至-3.52个百分点），但10-20%的提示在思考开启/关闭间切换通过/失败。Planning类通过率上升，Precision类下降；此模式在Hunyuan模型中也成立。思考改变答案长度，控制长度后Precision下降减少但仍有残留。相关性分析显示Planning类痕迹与合规相关性弱，Precision类有微弱负相关。激活修补发现Precision翻转实例比Planning翻转实例更易被恢复（32-58% vs 14-40%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，大推理模型的内置思考对指令跟随具有双重影响：提升全局规划能力但损害精确约束遵循。这一发现揭示了思考机制的非均匀效应，为未来优化LRM的推理过程提供了方向，例如通过针对性训练或长度控制来缓解精确度损失。局限性在于实验仅限特定模型和基准，未来需扩展至更多场景。

title: End-to-End Context Compression at Scale
abstract: Long-context language model inference is bottlenecked by memory, as the KV cache grows with context length. Recent techniques to compress the KV cache fall short: they either degrade model quality substantially or require considerable time and compute to compress a single long prompt. Furthermore, many methods require the input to fit within the target model's context window, and are generally incompatible with modern production inference engines. Encoder-decoder compressors, which map a long token sequence to a shorter sequence of latent embeddings consumed by a decoder, are an appealing alternative in principle. However, existing approaches are not competitive with KV cache compression on the accuracy-efficiency frontier. In this work, we revisit encoder-decoder compression and close this gap. We first perform an architecture search, pre-training many variants from scratch to determine how best to design and train encoder-decoder compressors. Guided by our findings, we continually pre-train a family of 0.6B-encoder, 4B-decoder models on over 350B tokens each, at compression ratios of 1:4, 1:8, and 1:16. We introduce Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs), a family of compressors that improve the Pareto frontier across general-task performance, compression speed, and peak memory usage. We demonstrate that LCLMs serve as efficient backbones for long-horizon agents, letting the agent skim through a compressed long context and adaptively expand relevant segments on demand.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs)，一种端到端上下文压缩方法，在精度-效率前沿上优于KV cache压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文语言模型推理受内存瓶颈，KV cache随上下文长度增长。现有压缩方法或降低模型质量、或需大量时间计算，且与生产推理引擎不兼容。编码器-解码器压缩器理论上可行，但现有方法在精度-效率前沿上不具竞争力。
light_analysis.method: 进行架构搜索，从头预训练多种变体以确定最佳设计。持续预训练一系列0.6B编码器、4B解码器的模型，每个模型在超过350B tokens上训练，压缩比为1:4、1:8、1:16。提出LCLMs，改进通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存使用的Pareto前沿。
light_analysis.result: LCLMs在通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存使用上改进Pareto前沿。作为长时域智能体的高效骨干，让智能体浏览压缩的长上下文并自适应扩展相关片段。
light_analysis.conclusion: LCLMs有效解决了长上下文压缩问题，具有学术和实际应用价值，尤其适用于长时域智能体。未明确提及局限性或未来工作。

title: Muon Learns More Robust and Transferable Features than Adam
abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a state-of-the-art optimizer for pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) and vision classifiers. Despite its efficiency advantage over Adam and SGD, the feature-learning advantage of Muon remains unclear. This paper investigates Muon's feature-learning advantage through the lens of robustness and transferability. First, by evaluating pretrained models on corrupted images and texts, we show that features learned by Muon are consistently more robust than those learned by Adam and SGD across different architectures, including transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Using trained layer-wise probes, we further show that this robustness advantage is reflected in larger logit margins across layers. Second, by training linear classifiers or fine-tuning full models from pretrained parameters on downstream tasks, we demonstrate that Muon-learned features transfer more effectively than those learned by Adam and SGD. This transferability advantage is further supported by the diversity of hidden states across layers, as measured by effective rank. Finally, in a representative classification problem with multi-component features, we prove that Muon attains larger margins and higher effective rank than Adam and SGD, providing theoretical support for our empirical findings.

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现Muon优化器相比Adam和SGD能学习到更鲁棒且可迁移的特征，并通过实验和理论验证。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon作为预训练大语言模型和视觉分类器的最先进优化器，其效率优势已明确，但在特征学习方面的优势尚不清晰。研究旨在探究Muon学习特征的鲁棒性和可迁移性，以理解其相对于Adam和SGD的潜在优势，为优化器选择提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 通过在损坏图像和文本上评估预训练模型（Transformer和CNN），使用层探针分析logit margins和隐藏状态多样性（有效秩）。在多个下游任务上训练线性分类器或微调全模型来评估特征迁移性。此外，在多分量特征分类问题上进行理论证明。
light_analysis.result: Muon学习的特征在损坏数据上一致更鲁棒，且具有更大的逐层logit margins。下游任务中，Muon特征迁移效果优于Adam和SGD，其隐藏状态的有效秩更高，表明特征多样性更好。理论证明Muon在多分量分类中可实现更大间隔和更高有效秩。
light_analysis.conclusion: Muon优化器在特征鲁棒性和迁移性上显著优于Adam和SGD，具有重要的实际应用价值，尤其在需要模型泛化能力和迁移学习的场景。理论分析为经验发现提供了支持，但未明确指出局限性。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Community Perspectives on Machine Translation
abstract: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation (MT), non-AI communities have raised growing concerns about MT systems, suggesting a noticeable gap between technical advancement and the needs of real-world users. For instance, while NLP researchers focus on benchmark performance, end users care about ethical concerns, trust, reliability, costs, and more. We argue that listening to various user communities is essential so that research efforts would be directed towards the problems that the communities care about. To this end, we present a large-scale analysis, for the first time, that investigates what four stakeholder communities (AI developers, professional translators, language learners, and language service providers) post about MT technology on social media. To do so, we construct a dataset of 79,286 posts and comments from Reddit, Facebook, Bluesky, and Mastodon from 2019 to 2025, and analyse where these communities disagree, and how and why. Overall, we find that communities often disagree, and even show strong conflicts due to polarised sentiments on topics such as translation quality, efficiency, and reliability. This is because these communities approach these topics differently: the AI community frames them as technical and computational problems, while non-AI (user) communities care more about quality nuances, time savings, user trust, and broader social issues.

light_analysis.overview: 首次大规模分析多社区关于机器翻译的社交媒体讨论，揭示技术社区与用户社区间的观点分歧。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器翻译技术进步显著，但非AI社区（如用户）对系统存在伦理、信任、可靠性等关切，表明技术发展与实际需求脱节。现有研究仅关注基准性能，忽视用户社区关心的问题，因此需要倾听社区声音以引导研究聚焦于真实需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建了2019-2025年间来自Reddit、Facebook、Bluesky和Mastodon的79,286条帖子/评论数据集。分析四个利益相关者社区（AI开发者、专业翻译者、语言学习者、语言服务商）的讨论，通过比较分歧和冲突主题，揭示各社区对翻译质量、效率、可靠性等话题的不同视角。
light_analysis.result: 社区间常存在分歧，甚至因极化情绪在翻译质量、效率和可靠性等话题上产生强烈冲突。AI社区将这些视为技术和计算问题，而非AI用户社区更关注质量细微差别、节省时间、用户信任及更广泛的社会问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调了倾听用户社区对机器翻译发展的重要性，有助于将研究努力导向社区真正关心的问题。学术价值在于揭示技术中心视角的局限，实际应用价值为改进人机协作。未来需深入分析子社区差异或扩展数据集。

title: A Unifying Framework for Concept-Based Representational Similarity
abstract: Learned representations across models and modalities often exhibit striking structural similarities, suggesting shared underlying concept decompositions. However, concept alignment remains poorly defined: existing approaches optimize different objectives under the same terminology, obscuring what is actually aligned.   We propose a unifying framework that decomposes alignment along two axes: what is aligned (representations vs. concepts) and at what level (instance-wise vs. distributional). This induces four corresponding properties -- instance-wise and distributional variants of translation and concept consistency -- and reveals precisely which of these guarantees existing methods provide. We further introduce \InterVenchA, an intervention-based benchmark that separately measures extraction quality, translation quality, and concept consistency. Through theory and experiments, we show that commonly assumed equivalences between alignment objectives fail in practice: optimizing one property does not reliably recover the others, and purely unsupervised objectives fail to recover meaningful instance-level alignment. We then propose the Coupled Sparse Autoencoder (CoSAE), which jointly enforces complementary alignment objectives. Strong alignment emerges only in this regime. Surprisingly, as little as 0.1\% paired data is sufficient to recover instance-level alignment when anchoring distributional objectives.   Overall, our results show that concept alignment is fundamentally multi-objective: it must be defined, measured, and optimized as such.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概念对齐的统一框架，将对齐分为表示与概念、实例与分布两个维度，并引入CoSAE模型联合优化互补目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 不同模型和模态的表示常呈现结构相似性，表明共享概念分解，但概念对齐缺乏明确定义。现有方法在同一术语下优化不同目标，混淆了实际对齐的内容。因此需要明确对齐的定义、度量与优化方式，以解决概念对齐的模糊性和多目标性。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先提出统一框架，将对齐分解为表示与概念、实例级与分布级两个轴，定义四种属性：实例级翻译和概念一致性、分布级翻译和概念一致性。然后引入InterVenchA基准，分别测量提取质量、翻译质量和概念一致性。最后提出Coupled Sparse Autoencoder (CoSAE)，联合强制执行互补的对齐目标，利用少量配对数据实现强对齐。
light_analysis.result: 通过理论和实验，证明常见假设（对齐目标等价）在实践中不成立：优化一个属性不能可靠恢复其他属性，纯无监督目标无法恢复有意义的实例级对齐。CoSAE联合优化互补目标后，强对齐仅在该机制下出现。令人惊讶的是，仅0.1%配对数据即可在锚定分布目标时恢复实例级对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 概念对齐本质上是多目标的，必须被定义、测量和优化为多目标问题。框架澄清了现有方法的保证范围，InterVenchA提供了统一评估工具，CoSAE展示了联合优化互补目标的有效性。未来工作可探索更高效的数据利用和更复杂的对齐目标组合。

title: Do Video Foundation Models Understand Intuitive Physics? A Layerwise Probing Analysis
abstract: We study whether pretrained video foundation models encode intuitive-physics information in their frozen representations, and how this information varies across model families, layers, and probe types. Using frozen-feature probing on IntPhys2 and Minimal Video Pairs (MVP), we compare predictive joint-embedding models (V-JEPA), masked reconstruction models (VideoMAE), and a diffusion-based video generator (LTX-Video). V-JEPA achieves the strongest overall results across benchmarks, especially with probes that model temporal dynamics, while VideoMAE remains competitive and LTX-Video recovers weaker but non-trivial signal. Layerwise analyses show that physics-relevant information is weakest in early layers and becomes most accessible at intermediate-to-late depth, and temporal controls show that disrupting frame order substantially reduces performance, especially on MVP. Together, these results suggest that intuitive-physics knowledge emerges reliably in pretrained video representations, but its accessibility depends strongly on pretraining paradigm, representational depth, and readout mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分层探测分析，研究视频基础模型是否在冻结表示中编码了直觉物理学知识，并比较不同模型家族、层和探测类型的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频基础模型在多种任务中表现出色，但它们是否理解物理常识（如物体交互、时空一致性）尚不清楚。现有评估主要关注语义或动作识别，缺乏对物理直觉的系统探测。理解这些模型的物理知识分布有助于改进预训练范式和下游任务设计。
light_analysis.method: 对V-JEPA（联合嵌入预测）、VideoMAE（掩码重建）和LTX-Video（扩散生成）三种视频基础模型进行冻结特征探测，使用IntPhys2和MVP两个直觉物理基准。通过线性探测和时空扰动（如打乱帧序）分析不同层级的表示，并对比多种探测类型（时空动态建模等）以评估物理知识的可访问性。
light_analysis.result: V-JEPA在所有基准上表现最强，尤其在使用建模时间动态的探针时；VideoMAE表现接近；LTX-Video信号较弱但非平凡。分层分析显示物理信息在早期层最弱，中间到后期层最强。时间控制实验表明，打乱帧序显著降低性能，尤其是在MVP上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 直觉物理知识在预训练视频表示中可靠地涌现，但其可访问性依赖于预训练范式、表示深度和读出机制。研究为理解模型内部物理表示提供了洞见，未来可探索更复杂的探测方法和不同预训练目标的影响。

title: Where Does the Answer Come From? Benchmarking View-Level Visual Evidence Identification in Multi-View MLLMs for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong results on visual reasoning benchmarks, but answer accuracy alone does not indicate whether a model relied on the correct visual evidence. This gap is particularly important in multi-view driving scenes used for autonomous driving, where a model can produce a plausible answer while grounding it in the wrong camera view. We introduce a multi-view visual question answering benchmark for evaluating evidence-source identification: given six synchronized NuScenes views and a question, the model must identify the supporting camera view and answer the question. The benchmark contains 122 conflict-centric question-answer pairs from 73 scenes, spanning causality, counterfactual reasoning, and intent prediction. View labels are proposed by an automatic conflict-mining pipeline and manually verified by annotators. We evaluate three settings: camera-view selection, oracle QA given the golden view, and joint prediction in which the model selects a view and answers in one pass. Answers are evaluated in both multiple-choice and free-form formats, using exact match for structured predictions and an LLM judge for free-form responses. By explicitly separating visual-source identification from answer correctness, the benchmark exposes grounding failures that answer-only evaluation misses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多视图视觉问答基准，评估MLLMs在自动驾驶中识别正确视角证据的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs视觉推理准确率不能反映是否依赖正确视觉证据，尤其在自动驾驶多视图场景中，模型可能从错误视角得出正确答案。现有基准忽视证据来源，导致评估不全面，影响模型可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 基于NuScenes构建122个冲突问题，涵盖因果、反事实和意图预测，通过自动冲突挖掘和人工验证生成视图标签。评估三种设置：视角选择、给定正确视角的问答、联合预测，答案采用多项选择和自由形式，分别用精确匹配和LLM评判。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确具体实验结果，但表明该基准通过分离视觉来源识别与答案正确性，揭示了仅凭答案评估无法发现的视角级grounding失败，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准强调视觉证据来源的重要性，推动多视图MLLMs在自动驾驶中的可信推理。未来可扩展至更多视图类型和复杂场景，促进模型鲁棒性和可解释性研究。

title: MAVIS: Multi-Agent Video Retrieval via Structured Video Understanding
abstract: The dominant paradigm in video retrieval relies on embedding-based full-corpus scanning, which suffers from inherent computational inefficiency and the semantic asymmetry between information-dense videos and sparse textual queries. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{MAVIS}, a novel multi-agent framework that rethinks retrieval as cooperative reasoning rather than brute-force search. MAVIS first bridges the granularity mismatch by parsing raw videos into a \textbf{Structured Semantic Library}, enabling explicit attribute-level indexing. During retrieval, a planner decomposes complex user intents into atomic sub-tasks, dispatching specialized agents to independently nominate candidates. Crucially, MAVIS employs a \textbf{Logic-aware Debate} mechanism with a strict veto protocol, where agents collaboratively prune logical mismatches to identify a compact set of ``controversial'' candidates for fine-grained verification. This agentic workflow effectively bypasses the inefficiency of full-library traversal. Extensive experiments on MSR-VTT, MSVD, and ActivityNet demonstrate that MAVIS achieves competitive performance without task-specific fine-tuning, offering a scalable and interpretable alternative to traditional dual-encoder approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体框架MAVIS，将视频检索重构为协作推理，通过结构化语义库和逻辑感知辩论机制提升效率与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统视频检索依赖嵌入的全库扫描，存在计算效率低下和语义不对称问题。视频信息密集而文本查询稀疏，导致检索结果不精准。现有方法难以处理复杂的用户意图，且缺乏可解释性。MAVIS旨在通过多智能体协作和结构化理解解决这些局限，实现高效且可解释的检索。
light_analysis.method: MAVIS首先将原始视频解析为结构化语义库，实现显式属性级索引。检索时，规划器将复杂意图分解为原子子任务，分派专门代理独立提名候选。核心创新是逻辑感知辩论机制，采用严格否决协议，代理协作修剪逻辑不匹配项，仅保留少数有争议的候选进行精细验证。该流程避免了全库扫描的低效。
light_analysis.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和ActivityNet数据集上，MAVIS无需任务特定微调即达到竞争性能。与传统的双编码器方法相比，它提供了可扩展且可解释的替代方案。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但与基线方法相比具有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAVIS通过多智能体协作和结构化视频理解，重新定义了视频检索范式，避免了计算瓶颈。其逻辑感知辩论机制提升了检索的准确性和可解释性。未来工作可扩展到更多模态，并探索更复杂的推理策略。潜在局限性包括对代理协作质量的依赖。

title: CineDance: Towards Next-Generation Multi-Shot Long-Form Cinematic Audio-Video Generation
abstract: The fidelity and structural diversity of training datasets fundamentally determine the capabilities of video generation models. While commercial systems showremarkableabilitytogeneratecinematicnarratives, the progress of open-source models remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce CineDance-1M, a large-scale, open research Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) dataset designed specifically for multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Averaging 92.8 seconds and 24.2 continuous shots per video, it provides configurable, structured annotations for both audio and video modalities. This exceptional quality is achieved through a rigorous three-stage curation pipeline: i) diverse sourcing and comprehensive cleansing, ii) film-theory-inspired narrative parsing, and iii) hierarchical dual-modal captioning. For a comprehensive assessment, we propose CineBench, featuring a diverse prompt suite and a six-dimensional, human-aligned metric system tailored for complex narrative audio-video evaluation. Furthermore, we adapt LTX-2.3 into CineDance, which demonstrates exceptional single-modality quality alongside precise audio-video alignment and robust subject and environment consistency, effectively validating our curation strategy and the high quality of CineDance-1M. We anticipate that this work will serve as a solid foundation for accelerating future research in multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Our project page is available at https://aliothchen.github.io/projects/CineDance/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模多镜头长序列音视频生成数据集CineDance-1M及评估基准CineBench，并验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开源视频生成模型因缺乏高质量训练数据而受限，商业系统虽表现优异但数据不公开。多镜头、长序列的音视频联合生成需要结构化的高质量数据以提升叙事能力，现有数据集难以满足这一需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用三级数据整理流程：多样化来源与清洗、基于电影理论的叙事分割、层次化双模态字幕生成。构建CineDance-1M数据集（平均92.8秒，24.2个连续镜头/视频），并提出CineBench评估基准（含多样化提示集和六维人类对齐指标）。将LTX-2.3适配为CineDance模型。
light_analysis.result: CineDance-1M提供高质量、结构化的多镜头长序列音视频数据。CineDance模型在视频单模态质量、听觉-视觉对齐、主题与环境一致性上表现优异，验证了数据整理策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为多镜头长序列音视频联合生成研究提供了数据基础与评估标准，有望推动该领域的开放研究。未来可进一步优化数据多样性和模型生成效率。

title: Data-driven discovery of governing differential equations across physical systems
abstract: Differential equations play a critical role in scientific discovery because they provide a mathematical framework to describe the behaviour of physical phenomena. As a promising alternative to traditional first principles, data-driven differential equation discovery has attracted increasing attention for its ability to infer governing laws directly from experimental or simulated data, especially when the underlying physics is unclear. However, the field has expanded rapidly along diverse methodological directions, particularly with the emergence of AI-based approaches, and still lacks a clear organizing perspective. In this Review, we propose a problem-oriented perspective on data-driven differential equation discovery. We first introduce a two-dimensional phase diagram of equation discoverability, where discovery problems are organized according to structural complexity and coefficient complexity. This phase diagram shows how the field has moved from the discovery of sparse equations with simple coefficients toward more complex governing laws with richer structures and more flexible parameterizations. It also clarifies why different methodological families succeed or fail in different problem settings. We then present the representation-evaluation-optimization (REO) framework as a fundamental abstraction of the discovery process. By identifying the core problems of equation discovery that persist across algorithmic variations, REO shifts the discussion from individual algorithms to the fundamental principles that determine discoverability. We connect these perspectives to applications across physics and adjacent sciences, and argue that the next challenge is not merely recovering equations, but using them to revise existing theories, distil mechanisms and form new scientific concepts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出问题导向的数据驱动微分方程发现视角，包括可发现性二维相图和REO框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 微分方程是科学发现的核心，但数据驱动方程发现领域方法多样且缺乏组织视角。现有AI方法快速发展，但尚未系统阐明不同方法适用的问题类型及成功因素，导致研究者难以选择合适方法。本文旨在通过问题导向的分类和通用抽象框架，统一理解发现过程。
light_analysis.method: 提出二维相图，按结构复杂度和系数复杂度对发现问题分类；构建表示-评估-优化(REO)框架，将发现过程抽象为三个核心环节。通过相图展示研究从稀疏简单方程向复杂结构发展，并解释不同方法家族在各类问题中的成败原因。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果或性能指标。论文主要贡献在于提供了组织视角和理论框架，帮助理解不同方法的适用场景，并指出未来挑战从方程恢复转向理论修订和概念形成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过相图和REO框架为数据驱动微分方程发现提供了系统化视角，连接了物理及应用科学。强调核心问题在算法变体中的持续性，推动领域从方法堆砌转向原理理解。未来工作需利用发现方程修正现有理论、提炼机制并形成新概念。

title: Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization for Inference-time Alignment
abstract: Ensuring the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) under distribution drift requires inference-time adaptation. While inference-time alignment methods such as Best-of-$N$ and rejection sampling are widely used, they frame the task as a sampling-intensive, reward-guided search, leading to two key limitations: their performance is bounded by the base model's generation quality, and their reliance on imperfect reward models makes them vulnerable to reward hacking. To address these challenges, we introduce Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization (GGRO), a lightweight inference-time method that performs targeted, minimal intervention during decoding via gradient guidance. Specifically, GGRO monitors token-level entropy to identify high-uncertainty regions indicative of drift or misalignment. Upon detection, it responds by injecting nudging tokens, generated using gradient signals from an off-the-shelf reward model, to steer the generation trajectory rather than merely re-ranking samples. Experiments show that GGRO consistently improves inference-time alignment across safety, helpfulness, and reasoning benchmarks. It also increases coverage of high-quality responses and robustness to reward hacking, with minimal computational overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/lhk2004/GGRO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出梯度引导奖励优化(GGRO)，一种轻量级推理时对齐方法，通过梯度引导在解码时进行最小干预，提升LLM在分布漂移下的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法如Best-of-N和拒绝采样依赖采样密集型奖励引导搜索，性能受限于基础模型生成质量且易受奖励黑客攻击。因此需要一种高效、鲁棒的推理时对齐方法，在避免大量采样的同时抵御奖励模型的缺陷。
light_analysis.method: GGRO在解码时监测token级熵以识别高不确定性区域，然后利用现成奖励模型的梯度信号生成引导token，注入生成轨迹而非仅重排序样本。该方法实现轻量级的最小干预，仅在高不确定性区域激活，避免全局扰动。
light_analysis.result: 在安全性、帮助性和推理基准上，GGRO持续提升推理时对齐效果，增加高质量响应覆盖率并增强对奖励黑客的鲁棒性，计算开销极小。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: GGRO通过梯度引导实现有针对性的推理时干预，克服了采样密集型方法的局限，提升了LLM在分布漂移下的可靠性。该方法具有实际应用价值（轻量级、易集成），但可能仍依赖奖励模型质量，未来可探索更主动的干预策略。

title: ATN3D: Density-Aware LiDAR-Radar Early 3D Object Detection Under Extreme Sparsity
abstract: 3D object detection is the backbone of perception for automated vehicles (AV) and broader intelligent transportation systems applications. Long-range detection is challenging because sensing evidence is sparse; yet this ``long-range'' scenario is routine in traffic. Although >30m is often labeled long-range in computer vision, on roadways it affords only approx. 1-2s for perception and decision-making. Under such extreme sparsity, two core challenges arise. First, early multimodal fusion tends to discard sparsity information and inject noise from empty or falsely occupied cells, degrading long-range recall. Second, context-agnostic uniform channel supervision favors dense and near-range samples, leaving far and small objects under-optimized, delaying the earliest detection of distant objects. We propose ``Ask The Neighbor'' (ATN3D), a LiDAR-Radar framework tailored for sparse-range conditions. ATN3D introduces (i) Density-aware early fusion with cross-modal gating that conditions fusion on per-voxel density/sparsity and Radar evidence, (ii) Occupancy-gated neighborhood aggregation with circular kernels to aggregate only from credible cells, (iii) Evidence-conditioned channel self-attention to adapt channel weights with weather/range, and (iv) a Range-aware loss that re-balances classification and localization by distance, aligning training with distance-stratified evaluation. On the VoD benchmark across clear and foggy conditions, ATN3D surpasses strong baselines: +3.55% mAP in clear weather and +8.41% mAP under simulated heavy fog; for >30m objects, gains are +3.33% (clear) and +2.09% (heavy fog). These results indicate earlier and more reliable long-range detections under sparse sensing in on-road traffic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATN3D框架，通过密度感知融合、邻域聚合和距离感知损失，解决极稀疏场景下长距离3D目标检测问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中长距离（>30m）3D检测因传感器数据极端稀疏而极具挑战，现有早期多模态融合方法会丢弃稀疏信息并引入空或错误占用单元的噪声，导致长距离召回率低；此外，上下文无关的统一通道监督偏向密集和近距样本，使远距离小目标欠优化，延迟最早检测时机。
light_analysis.method: ATN3D框架包含四部分：(i)密度感知早期融合，通过跨模态门控根据体素密度/稀疏性和雷达证据调节融合；(ii)占用门控邻域聚合，使用圆形核仅从可信单元聚合；(iii)证据条件通道自注意力，根据天气/距离自适应调整通道权重；(iv)距离感知损失，按距离重平衡分类和定位，与分层评估对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在VoD基准的清晰和雾天条件下，ATN3D超越强基线：清晰天气mAP提升3.55%，模拟重雾下提升8.41%；对于>30m对象，清晰和重雾下分别提升3.33%和2.09%，实现更早更可靠的长距离检测。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATN3D针对稀疏条件下长距离检测提出有效的密度感知融合和距离感知训练策略，显著提升远距离目标检测性能，尤其在实际道路的恶劣天气中表现突出。未来可进一步优化计算效率或扩展至其他传感器组合。

title: Civil Court Simulation with Large Language Models
abstract: Court simulation bridges legal education and judicial practice, yet human-based simulations are costly and difficult to scale. Large language models (LLMs) offer a scalable alternative, but existing court-simulation research mainly focuses on criminal cases. Civil litigation is more common in practice and harder to simulate because its claims, liability, and remedies are more flexible. We present a multi-agent court simulation framework for Chinese civil cases. The framework organizes role-based interaction through a five-stage civil trial procedure and integrates memory module and statute retrieval to support long-process adjudication. Experiments show that the framework produces reliable civil judgments, with clear strengths in liability allocation and multi-item adjudication. Further experiments show that memory quality substantially affects downstream simulation quality. Through a five-layer factor framework, we analyze how legal grounding, information conditions, judicial capability and role orientation, organizational pressure, and social context affect the framework's reliability and behavior. These results support the effectiveness of the proposed framework for civil court simulation. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/Civil-Court.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，模拟中国民事案件审判流程，实现可靠判决。
light_analysis.motivation: 法庭模拟对法律教育与司法实践至关重要，但基于人类角色的模拟成本高、难以扩展。现有大语言模型法庭模拟研究多集中于刑事案件，而民事案件在现实中更为常见，且其诉求、责任与救济更为灵活，模拟难度更大。因此，需要一种可扩展的民事法庭模拟方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个多智能体法庭模拟框架，面向中国民事案件。框架通过五个阶段（起诉、答辩、举证、质证、判决）组织角色交互，并集成记忆模块和法条检索以支持长流程裁判。记忆模块存储对话历史与案件事实，法条检索从中国民法典中获取相关条文。实验使用民事案件数据集进行模拟。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该框架能生成可靠的民事判决，在责任分配和多项目判决方面优势明显。进一步实验发现，记忆质量显著影响下游模拟质量。通过五层因素框架分析法律基础、信息条件、司法能力与角色定位、组织压力及社会背景对框架可靠性和行为的影响，结果验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为民事法庭模拟提供了可扩展的解决方案，有助于法律教育与实践。其多智能体交互与记忆、检索机制提升了判决可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的民事案件类型及记忆优化策略。论文开源了数据集和代码，促进后续研究。

title: Constrained user-item allocation for e-commerce marketing campaigns
abstract: When running marketing campaigns, retailers must decide which products to promote and which users to target. These decisions are inherently coupled: effective campaigns match users and items with strong mutual affinity into non-overlapping groups of predefined sizes. However, existing approaches assume predefined campaign structure or decouple item selection from user assignment, and cannot discover campaign groupings directly from joint interaction patterns. We therefore formalize this campaign problem as auto-targeting: jointly selecting users and items to construct multiple disjoint campaigns. To solve this combinatorial problem, we propose three complementary strategies: (i) constrained spectral biclustering to find dense regions in the user-item affinity matrix, (ii) greedy local search with pairwise swaps for combinatorial refinement, and (iii) a multi-armed bandit framework to escape local optima through exploration. We evaluate these methods on a synthetic dataset, the Amazon Reviews benchmarks, and large-scale proprietary commercial data, and compare the results to simulated annealing as a baseline. The results show that biclustering consistently achieves the highest campaign quality, lift, and fairness scores. While biclustering runs efficiently on smaller datasets, its runtime increases substantially on very large ones, where bandit-based methods instead offer a scalable alternative.

light_analysis.overview: 针对电商营销活动中用户-商品联合分配的组合优化问题，提出三种互补策略实现自动目标选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 零售商在营销活动中需同时决定推广哪些商品和面向哪些用户，但现有方法要么预设活动结构，要么将商品选择与用户分配解耦，无法直接从交互模式中发现最优分组。这导致活动效果受限，无法最大化用户与商品的亲和度匹配。因此需要一种联合优化方法，自动构建多个不相交的活动，同时考虑资源约束和活动效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种互补策略解决联合用户-商品选择的组合优化问题：(i) 约束谱双聚类，从用户-商品亲和度矩阵中寻找稠密区域；(ii) 结合成对交换的贪婪局部搜索，进行组合优化；(iii) 多臂老虎机框架，通过探索避免局部最优。使用合成数据、Amazon评论基准和大规模商业数据评估，与模拟退火基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，约束谱双聚类在活动质量、提升度和公平性得分上持续最优，且在小规模数据上运行高效。但在超大规模数据上，双聚类的运行时间显著增加，此时基于多臂老虎机的方法提供可扩展的替代方案。模拟退火基线整体表现较差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究形式化了电商营销中的自动目标选择问题，并提供了可扩展的解决方案。主要贡献在于将联合优化问题转化为可计算的框架，谱双聚类在中等规模场景表现最佳，而多臂老虎机方法适用于大规模应用。未来可探索混合策略或自适应切换机制，以平衡质量与效率。

title: AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving
abstract: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AGENTSERVESIM，首个硬件感知的多轮LLM agent服务模拟器，准确复现程序级动态，误差低于6%。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮LLM agent服务涉及有状态程序执行，现有模拟器仅针对无状态请求，无法捕捉轮次依赖、工具间隙和缓存复用等核心动态。直接在真实系统评估成本高昂，缺乏可扩展的模拟工具。因此需要一种能够模拟agent服务程序级行为的硬件感知模拟器。
light_analysis.method: 通过可组合模块模拟：Program Orchestrator维护程序身份和轮次顺序；Tool Simulator生成工具调用间隙；Session-Aware Router根据程序到实例的亲和性进行缓存感知路由；KV Residency Model追踪KV在HBM、DRAM/CXL及驱逐中的位置。全部在通用CPU上运行。
light_analysis.result: 在真实部署和硬件配置上，AGENTSERVESIM在关键性能指标上的平均误差低于6%，完全在通用CPU上运行。这表明它能以低成本、可重复的方式探索agent服务策略，避免在昂贵加速器上反复部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGENTSERVESIM填补了多轮LLM agent服务模拟工具的空白，提供高保真的硬件感知模拟，支持策略探索和系统优化。学术上揭示了程序级动态对服务性能的影响，实际中可大幅降低评估成本。未来可扩展更多硬件细节或集成新策略。

title: TUDSR: Twice Upsampling-Diffusion for Higher Super-Resolution
abstract: Diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). With tiled diffusion techniques, these models can produce high-resolution images that exceed their native-supported resolution. However, the quality of such high-resolution (e.g $2048^2$) outputs often remains extremely poor, primarily due to two factors we consider: the image upsampling ratio (e.g $\times8$) exceeding the model's native-supported upsampling ratio (e.g $\times4$), and the model's native-supported resolution. In practice, training a native high-resolution model requires larger architectures, which incur significant computational overhead and GPU memory costs, making it hard on limited-resource equipment. Thus, we present TUDSR, a Twice Upsampling-Diffusion framework for higher SR. The TUDSR framework mainly consists of two stages: the first involves training at $R$-resolution, and the second introduces a looped chunk-based training strategy at $NR$-resolution. Each stage adapts a one-step GAN architecture comprising a generator and a discriminator. Based on SD2.1-base, we develop TUDSR-S, which achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that TUDSR-S generates high-quality images at the resolutions of $1024^2$ and even $2048^2$, significantly outperforming existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/wuer5/TUDSR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 TUDSR 框架，通过两次上采样扩散实现更高分辨率的超分辨率，显著提升高分辨率图像质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于扩散的生成模型在真实世界图像超分辨率中取得了显著成功，但使用平铺扩散技术生成超过原生支持分辨率（如2048^2）的图像时，质量极差。原因在于上采样比率（如×8）超过模型原生支持（如×4），且原生高分辨率模型训练需要更大架构和计算开销。因此，需要一种高效方法在有限资源下实现高质量高分辨率超分辨率。
light_analysis.method: TUDSR 框架包含两阶段：第一阶段在 R 分辨率训练，第二阶段在 NR 分辨率采用循环块训练策略。每阶段使用一步 GAN 架构（生成器和判别器）。基于 SD2.1-base 开发 TUDSR-S，通过两次上采样扩散逐步提升分辨率，避免直接训练高分辨率模型的高计算成本。
light_analysis.result: TUDSR-S 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，生成 1024^2 和 2048^2 的高质量图像，显著优于现有方法。实验表明，其有效解决了高分辨率超分辨率中的质量退化问题。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: TUDSR 框架为高分辨率超分辨率提供了一种高效解决方案，通过两阶段训练和循环块策略，在有限计算资源下实现优异性能。代码开源有助于复现和推广。未来可探索更高效的架构或扩展到更高分辨率。

title: Closure-Validated Circuit Discovery in Attention Heads: Co-activation Proposes, Ablation Disposes
abstract: Interpretability increasingly treats groups of components, not individual units, as the basic object, and proposes to find them by clustering co-activation statistics. We ask whether such a cheap signal actually identifies an attention-head circuit. Adapting a sparse-autoencoder clustering recipe to attention heads -- but validating by causal ablation rather than reconstruction -- we cluster heads and then run a closure test: ablate the discovered community and compare per-example damage to matched-random controls. Across two dense 1B-scale models (Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B) and two input distributions, the communities pass closure. In a Mixture-of-Experts model (OLMoE-1B-7B), route-conditional clustering recovers a statistically real signal that nonetheless does not survive closure -- ablation improves loss, the wrong direction. Extending closure across training, attention-target selectivity and participation ratio decouple from function in both directions. We conclude that a cheap signal is a circuit proposal, not a confirmed circuit; closure is what separates them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出共激活聚类作为注意力头电路候选，并通过闭包消融验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释性研究中，将组件组视为基本单元，常用共激活聚类识别电路，但该方法是否真正识别出有因果作用的电路缺乏验证，可能导致误识别。现有方法依赖廉价信号，需要一种严格的验证机制来区分真实电路与虚假信号。
light_analysis.method: 采用稀疏自编码器聚类方法对注意力头进行聚类，然后进行闭包测试：消融发现的社区，比较每个样本的损伤与随机控制。在Pythia 1B、OLMo 1B和OLMoE-1B-7B模型上实验，并跨训练过程分析注意力目标选择性和参与比。
light_analysis.result: 在密集1B模型上，社区通过闭包测试，消融导致预期损伤。在MoE模型上，路由条件聚类得到的信号统计显著但未通过闭包——消融反而降低损失，表明未能正确识别电路。跨训练过程，注意力目标选择性和参与比与功能解耦。
light_analysis.conclusion: 共激活聚类仅提供电路提案，而非确认电路。闭包测试是区分真实电路和虚假信号的必要步骤。研究强调验证的重要性，为未来电路发现方法提供指导，并揭示MoE模型中聚类信号的局限性。

title: Next-Token Prediction Learns Generalisable Representations of Sleep Physiology
abstract: Foundation models offer a promising route to compress multi-modal physiological signals into compact representations of human health, with broad applications across sleep medicine, cardiology, neurology and other healthcare domains. Existing models have typically been trained with masked-reconstruction or contrastive objectives. However, masked reconstruction may be poorly suited to the stochastic nature of these signals, while contrastive approaches rely on positive-pair definitions despite the semantic invariances of physiological signals being poorly understood. In this work, we show that next-token prediction is a simple and scalable alternative. We develop Hypnos, a multi-modal sleep foundation model trained using eight different sensing modalities (e.g. EEG, ECG, respiratory signals) drawn from over 20,000 overnight polysomnography recordings. We tokenize each modality into streams of discrete tokens using residual vector quantization, then train a large auto-regressive RQ-Transformer to jointly predict the next token across all modalities in parallel. After training, Hypnos can be applied to continuous streams of sensor data from any subset of supported modalities, generating embeddings for downstream tasks. Across a range of benchmarks, Hypnos significantly outperforms existing foundation models. In sleep stage classification, we match the performance of strong supervised baselines on held-out test sets whilst using \(100\times\) less labelled data. Hypnos even generalises to daytime physiology, surpassing a dedicated ECG foundation model at detecting atrial fibrillation. Our results demonstrate that next-token prediction is a strong self-supervised objective for representation learning from multi-modal physiological signals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用下一标记预测作为自监督目标训练多模态睡眠基础模型Hypnos，显著优于现有掩码重建和对比学习方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生理信号基础模型多采用掩码重建或对比学习目标，但掩码重建不适合信号的随机性，对比学习需定义正对而生理信号的语义不变性尚不明确。因此需要一种更简单、可扩展的自监督方法，以有效学习多模态生理信号的通用表征。
light_analysis.method: 开发Hypnos，使用8种传感模态（EEG、ECG等）来自2万多夜多导睡眠图数据。通过残差向量量化将每个模态离散化为标记流，训练自回归RQ-Transformer并行预测所有模态的下一标记。训练后可从任意模态子集的连续传感器数据生成嵌入，用于下游任务。
light_analysis.result: 在睡眠阶段分类任务中，Hypnos仅用1%的标注数据即达到强监督基线性能；在白昼生理数据上，超越专用ECG基础模型检测房颤。在多个基准测试中显著优于现有基础模型，验证了下一标记预测的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文表明下一标记预测是多模态生理信号表示学习的强自监督目标，Hypnos模型在睡眠医学等领域具有广泛应用价值。未来可扩展至更多生理模态和下游任务，但未讨论计算开销和长序列建模的局限性。

title: Automated IEP Generation from Traditional Chinese Parent-Teacher Interviews via Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion
abstract: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语料接地特征扩散的低资源微调管道，实现繁体中文IEP自动生成，发现语法约束解码在繁体中文标记预算下适得其反。
light_analysis.motivation: 编写个别化教育计划（IEP）是劳动强度高、知识密集的文档负担；英文研究已表明生成式AI能显著减少起草时间，但繁体中文领域因数据稀缺、隐私法规严格及缺乏本地评估基准，自动化IEP生成几乎未探索，需低资源、隐私保护方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出CGFD低资源微调管道：(1)通过tau阈值与标志感知分数上限选取25个双专家高分种子；(2)提取种子特征轮廓（句长、结构、量化模板）注入LLM提示，结合多样化控制驱动扩散；(3)以15个金种子为锚点，目标585样本，获567有效样本，与种子组成582样本训练集，用QLoRA微调Breeze-7B；(4)推理时通过语法约束编码（GCD）强制执行分层SMART目标阶梯模式。
light_analysis.result: 在55样本模式压力测试中，无GCD路径实现100%模式通过率，中位延迟降低34%，可靠性与速度均优于GCD。在n=10正式保留集上，无GCD推理路径BERTScore F1=0.779，超过GPT-5.4（0.726）、DeepSeek-V3.2（0.703）等零样本基线，且保持完全本地化、气隙推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本系统填补了繁体中文特殊教育NLP的空白，提供可扩展、隐私保护的本地推理方案，并揭示GCD在繁体中文下适得其反。未来可探索其他语言和更长文本的适用性，为工业级低资源生成任务提供思路。

title: Assessing Sample Quality in Conditional Generation under Compositional Shift
abstract: Conditional generators provide a natural tool for controllable generation, including settings where the desired condition is a new composition of observed attributes or experimental factors. In many applications, especially in scientific domains, such models are attractive to explore conditions for which real samples are rare, expensive, or not yet observed. However, this creates a circularity for evaluation: standard conditional quality metrics require a reference target distribution, but in the extrapolative regime that distribution is unavailable by definition. We address this problem with a post-hoc, per-sample trust score for assessing conditional samples using only the training distribution. The score combines two estimable quantities: global realism, measuring compatibility with the real data manifold, and attribute-wise faithfulness, measuring whether a sample is closer to the requested attributes than to plausible alternatives. We show that the score can recover meaningful comparisons across extrapolated generations, under a mild coverage condition on the observed attributes. These comparisons enable effective filtering, ranking, and abstention of generations and can be used directly on off-the-shelf pretrained models. In biological imaging, selected samples preserve real morphological structure better and improve downstream predictive performance, while similar gains are observed on controlled vision benchmarks. Finally, we show how the score can be applied during generation, enabling abstention before full decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/berkerdemirel/faithful-cond-gen.

light_analysis.overview: 提出后验每样本信任分数，结合全局真实性与属性忠诚度，在无参考分布条件下评估条件生成样本质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 条件生成器用于可控生成，尤其在科学领域探索新组合条件时，标准质量指标需要参考目标分布，但外推情况下分布不可得，形成评估循环困境。本文旨在解决这一问题，使无需真实样本即可评估生成样本。
light_analysis.method: 提出后验每样本信任分数，包含两个可估计量：全局真实性（与训练数据流形兼容性）和属性忠诚度（样本更接近请求属性还是其他替代）。在训练分布上计算，覆盖条件下可恢复有意义比较，支持过滤、排序和弃权，可直接用于预训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在生物成像中，入选样本保留真实形态结构，提升下游预测性能；受控视觉基准类似增益。分数可在生成过程中应用，实现完全解码前弃权。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了条件生成在外推条件下的评估难题，提供无需参考分布的质量评估工具。具有实际应用价值，支持预训练模型筛选和弃权，未来可扩展至更多科学领域。

title: Clinically Grounded Privacy Evaluation of Medical LMs
abstract: Medical language models (LMs) can memorize and reproduce protected health information, but privacy evaluations often focus on recovery of training text rather than disclosure under realistic threat models. We introduce a clinically grounded framework that evaluates leakage along a graded axis of adversarial access, ranging from publicly inferable demographics to leaked note fragments. At each tier, we measure verbatim memorization of patient-specific text and semantic leakage of sensitive diagnoses. Applying the framework to an LM pretrained on 378k clinical notes, we find that routine encounter metadata (i.e. name, date of birth, provider, practice, visit date) elicits high rates of verbatim memorization across a patient's timeline and sensitive-diagnosis recovery (AUROC 0.91 for abortion, 0.81 for HIV). At the same time, exact-match memorization can overstate disclosure: 36% of memorized tokens reflect templated documentation. Our work highlights the risks of training on longitudinal clinical data, providing a practical framework for contextual privacy evaluation of medical LMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个临床基础的医疗语言模型隐私评估框架，沿分级威胁轴评估泄露，并揭示了纵向临床数据训练的风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗语言模型可能记忆和泄露受保护健康信息，但现有隐私评估多关注训练文本恢复，未考虑真实威胁场景。需要一种临床基础的框架来评估分级泄露，包括从公开推断信息到直接泄露片段，以更准确理解隐私风险。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个分级评估框架，沿从公开推断的人口统计信息到泄露的笔记片段等不同访问级别评估泄露。在每个层级测量患者特定文本的逐字记忆和敏感诊断的语义泄露。使用378k临床笔记预训练的语言模型进行应用。
light_analysis.result: 常规就诊元数据（姓名、生日、提供者、实践、就诊日期）引发高比率逐字记忆和敏感诊断恢复（流产AUROC 0.91，HIV 0.81）。但36%的记忆tokens反映模板化文档，表明精确匹配可能夸大泄露。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了对医疗语言模型隐私风险的更真实评估，表明纵向临床数据训练的风险，并强调了考虑上下文泄露的重要性。未来可用于指导更安全的模型部署。

title: Optical Reasoning: Rethinking Images as an Expressive Reasoning Medium Beyond Text
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) and has been extended to Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). More recent work further moves from text-based multimodal reasoning toward interleaved-modal reasoning, where intermediate steps can incorporate both textual rationales and visual evidence. In this work, we propose a bolder and more ambitious idea: could images alone serve as the reasoning medium for both language and multimodal tasks? To explore this, we propose optical reasoning, which treats images as a standalone reasoning medium. We instantiate this concept with two variants: typographic-based optical reasoning, which optimizes visual layouts for compact rationale rendering, and graphical-based optical reasoning, which composes text and graphical elements into structured visual rationales. Across mathematical, scientific, and interleaved-modal reasoning benchmarks, optical reasoning can match or even exceed traditional text reasoning while reducing reasoning tokens by an average of 28.57% on language tasks and 16% on multimodal tasks, achieving 1.96 times the token efficiency of text reasoning. These results show that images can effectively and efficiently encode rationales while providing a unified visual canvas for reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出光学推理，用图像作为独立推理媒介，匹配或超越文本推理并显著提高标记效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有链式思维推理多基于文本或交错模态，但图像能否单独作为推理媒介尚未探索。图像可能更高效地编码推理过程，减少标记数量，同时提供统一视觉画布，适合复杂推理任务。现有方法依赖文本，缺乏对纯粹图像推理的挖掘。
light_analysis.method: 提出光学推理概念，含两种变体：排印基础光学推理优化视觉布局以紧凑呈现理由；图形基础光学推理组合文本与图形元素形成结构化视觉理由。方法无需文本作为中间步骤，直接以图像编码推理链，在数学、科学和多模态任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，光学推理匹配或超越传统文本推理。语言任务推理标记减少28.57%，多模态任务减少16%，标记效率达文本推理的1.96倍。表明图像能有效编码推理过程，同时节省计算资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 光学推理验证了图像作为独立推理媒介的可行性和高效性，为多模态推理提供新范式。其统一视觉画布可整合不同模态信息，潜在提升可解释性。未来可探索更复杂视觉理由生成及扩展至更多任务。

title: On Choosing the $μ$ Parameter in Gaussian Differential Privacy
abstract: Recent work argues for using Gaussian differential privacy (GDP) to report the privacy guarantees in privacy-preserving machine learning. We provide principled mappings from pure-DP $\varepsilon$ to GDP $μ$ by matching the worst-case success of a strong-adversary membership inference attack in terms of three metrics: multiplicative advantage at fixed FPR, precision at fixed recall, and the standard privacy profile. We tabulate $μ$ values across a useful range of parameters and recommend $μ\approx \varepsilon/5$ as a conservative general-purpose conversion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从纯DP ε到GDP μ的映射方法，推荐保守转换 μ≈ε/5。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期研究主张使用高斯差分隐私（GDP）报告机器学习中的隐私保证，但缺乏从传统ε-DP到GDP参数μ的明确转换规则。该研究通过匹配强对手成员推断攻击的最坏情况成功，统一两种隐私度量，填补理论到实践的空白，便于实际应用中的隐私报告和比较。
light_analysis.method: 论文在三个指标上匹配ε-DP与GDP：固定假阳性率下的乘法优势、固定召回率下的精度以及标准隐私概况。通过强对手成员推断攻击的最坏情况分析，推导出ε到μ的解析映射，并计算大量参数组合下的μ值表，最终推荐μ≈ε/5作为保守通用转换。
light_analysis.result: 论文提供了覆盖常用参数范围的μ值表格，并给出保守映射μ≈ε/5。该方法使得实际应用中可以简单将ε-DP转换为GDP参数，同时保持了成员推断攻击风险的匹配。未报告具体实验数据，但基于理论推导验证了映射的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作系统性地建立了纯DP到GDP的参数映射，为采用GDP报告隐私提供实用指南。学术上统一了不同差分隐私度量，应用上简化了隐私参数选择。未来可扩展到更复杂的攻击模型或自适应隐私损失分析。

title: TABVERSE: Benchmarking Cross-Format Table Understanding in LLMs and VLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly evaluated on table reasoning tasks, but the role of table representation remains under-explored. In practice, the same table content may appear in different structural formats, such as HTML, Markdown, and LaTeX, or as rendered images. However, existing evaluations often let content, format, layout, and modality vary together, making it difficult to isolate representation effects. We introduce TABVERSE, a controlled multimodal table benchmark that aligns the same table content across multiple structural formats and rendered images, with question category and difficulty tags. This design enables systematic evaluation of representation effects while holding table content fixed. We evaluate LLMs and VLMs across three tasks: Question Answering (QA), Structural Understanding Capability (SUC), and Structure Reconstruction (SR). Our results show that representation choice substantially affects table understanding. Models generally perform better with structured text than with rendered images, but the size of this gap depends on the task, model, and format. HTML is often the most robust text format, while row-sensitive structural tasks and syntactically usable LaTeX reconstruction remain challenging. These findings show that table representation is a key factor in reliable table evaluation.
comment: 24 pages, 18 tables, 16 figures, Submitted to ARR May 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TABVERSE基准，系统评估表格表示格式对LLM和VLM表格理解的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM和VLM表格理解评估中，表格内容的格式、布局、模态常混合变化，难以单独分析表示格式的影响。实际中同一表格内容可能以不同结构格式（如HTML、Markdown、LaTeX）或渲染图像出现，但现有基准未控制内容因素。因此需要一种可控的跨格式基准来系统评估表示效应。
light_analysis.method: 构建TABVERSE，一个多模态表格基准，将相同表格内容对齐到多种结构格式（HTML、Markdown、LaTeX）和渲染图像，并标注问题类别和难度。设计三个任务：问答（QA）、结构理解能力（SUC）和结构重建（SR）。评估多个LLM和VLM，在固定表格内容下比较不同表示的性能。
