The results show that current provers remain strongly biased toward easy subtheorems and often solve theorems through long and inefficient tactic traces rather than compact proof plans. TheoremBench therefore provides a more fine-grained view of formal reasoning ability and highlights the importance of structural benchmark design for evaluating Lean4 theorem provers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TheoremBench基准，评估LLM在非竞赛形式的Lean4定理证明中的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在形式化证明基准上表现强劲，但评估局限于竞赛类问题，无法反映模型处理更长、依赖关系更复杂的数学开发的能力。由于实际数学证明往往涉及多个子定理和深层结构，缺乏针对此类场景的评估标准限制了模型在真实数学研究中的应用。因此，需要设计能衡量模型在结构丰富、依赖密集的定理证明上表现的新型基准。
light_analysis.method: TheoremBench基于近百个经典定理构建Lean4基准，包含两种版本：plain main版本每个实例只有一个目标定理；premised版本将每个定理扩展为结构化家族，包括主定理及自动提取的支持性子定理。该设计不仅评估从头证明最终定理的能力，还评估通过内部证明结构取得的进展。实验采用专门的覆盖率和平令牌效率指标，量化证明行为差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，显式前提显著提升了Lean4证明模型的性能。当前证明器倾向于解决简单子定理，并通过冗长低效的tactic序列而非紧凑证明计划来证明定理。定理级别覆盖率和令牌效率指标揭示了证明行为的定性差异。例如，使用前提后，部分模型的成功证明率提升超过30%，但效率指标显示平均证明长度增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: TheoremBench提供了对形式推理能力的更细致评估，强调了结构基准设计对评估Lean4定理证明器的重要性。该基准暴露了当前模型在应对复杂数学证明时的偏向和效率问题，为未来改进证明策略和模型架构提供了方向。未来的工作可能包括扩展定理范围以及优化子定理自动提取方法。

title: Reasoning without Gold Standards: A Proxy-Judge Theory of Autoformalization
abstract: Complex reasoning tasks increasingly require systems to produce outputs whose correctness cannot be judged by exact match against a single reference. Autoformalization (AF) is a representative example; it asks a model to translate informal mathematical or logical reasoning into a formally checkable object, yet expert-validated formalizations do not scale beyond toy cases and a single informal argument can admit many valid formal renderings. Progress therefore depends on whether partial, structured proxies can substitute for exact references.   We introduce a reference-free proxy-judge framework for AF that replaces gold-standard matching with a vector of per-axis property checks. The framework organizes the proxy along three structural scopes that cover global properties of the elicited object, per-module properties internal to its sub-components, and cross-domain properties that re-align it to the informal source, and aggregates each axis into a verdict vector. The vector drives a reflective refinement loop in which a violated coordinate routes the controller to a matching repair target, so each iteration changes only what is judged wrong.   Under bounded judge noise, the expected intrinsic gap contracts geometrically to a noise-dependent plateau. Across seven formalization backbones on miniF2F, ProofNet, e-SNLI, and ProntoQA, refinement consistently lifts Pass Rate over the single-shot ICL baseline, and the per-axis proxy outperforms a matched scalar proxy on benchmarks where the baseline has room to improve. Structured proxy judgments therefore provide both a practical refinement signal and a theoretical handle on convergence when exact references are unavailable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无金标准的代理-评委框架，通过多轴属性检查替代精确匹配，实现自动形式化。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂推理任务中，输出正确性无法通过精确匹配单一参考判断。自动形式化需将非正式推理翻译为可形式化对象，但专家形式化难以规模化，且同一非正式论证可对应多种有效形式。因此需要部分结构化代理替代精确参考。
light_analysis.method: 提出无参考的代理-评委框架，以多轴属性检查向量替代金标准匹配。框架沿全局、模块内和跨域三个范围组织代理，汇聚成判定向量。该向量驱动反思性改进循环，仅修正错误部分。在有限评委噪声下，期望内在差距几何收敛到噪声依赖平台。
light_analysis.result: 在miniF2F、ProofNet、e-SNLI、ProntoQA上使用七个形式化骨干，改进循环持续提升Pass Rate超过单次ICL基线，多轴代理在基线有改进空间的基准上优于匹配的标量代理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构化代理判断提供了实际改进信号和理论收敛保证，无需精确参考。未来可探索复杂代理设计或应用于其他缺乏金标准的推理任务。

title: AliyunConsoleAgent: Training Web Agents in Real-World Cloud Environments via Distillation and Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We present AliyunConsoleAgent, a web agent framework for automated documentation verification in real-world cloud consoles. Major cloud platforms encompass hundreds of products with rapid feature iteration, causing console UIs to frequently diverge from their corresponding documentation. Verifying that documented procedures accurately reflect the current console and can be executed end-to-end demands an estimated 4 million recurring inspections annually, yet manual coverage remains below 1%. While agent systems built on frontier proprietary models achieve high success rates, their prohibitive cost and data privacy constraints preclude large-scale deployment. We propose a two-stage training paradigm: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on distilled frontier-model trajectories, followed by reinforcement learning using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and a dual-channel outcome reward model in real cloud environments. To support large-scale RL training, we construct a high-determinism rollout system featuring Terraform-based resource pre-provisioning and LLM-driven on-demand provisioning, which effectively isolates environment noise from the training signal. We further introduce a rule-based reward evaluation protocol grounded in backend audit logs, providing objective, reward-hacking-resistant outcome judgment. Our model evolves from mechanical instruction following to autonomous decision-making with cloud console and product-specific understanding. Experiments on a challenging 278-task benchmark where the best frontier model achieves only 65.34% demonstrate that AliyunConsoleAgent-32B achieves a 63.52% mean success rate -- a 20.24 percentage-point improvement over the base model, narrowing the gap to the best frontier proprietary model to 1.82 pp (bootstrap 95% CI [-1.27, 7.39]) -- at 92% lower inference cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AliyunConsoleAgent框架，通过蒸馏和强化学习训练网页代理，实现低成本、高可靠性的云端文档自动化验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型云平台拥有数百种产品且快速迭代，导致控制台UI与文档频繁不一致。每年需约400万次人工检查，但覆盖率不足1%。现有基于前沿专有模型的代理系统虽成功率高，但成本高昂且存在数据隐私约束，无法大规模部署。因此需要一种低成本、高安全性且能适应真实云环境的自动化方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段训练范式：先通过蒸馏前沿模型轨迹进行监督微调（SFT），再在真实云环境中使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）和双通道结果奖励模型进行强化学习。构建高确定性rollout系统，利用Terraform预置资源和LLM驱动的按需置备，隔离环境噪声。引入基于后端审计日志的规则奖励评估协议，抵抗奖励破解，确保训练信号的客观性。
light_analysis.result: 在包含278个任务的挑战性基准上，最佳前沿模型成功率仅65.34%。所提模型AliyunConsoleAgent-32B达到63.52%的平均成功率，较基础模型提升20.24个百分点，与最佳前沿专有模型差距缩小至1.82个百分点（95%置信区间[-1.27,7.39]），同时推理成本降低92%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过蒸馏和强化学习在真实云环境中训练高效网页代理的可行性，显著降低部署成本并保持与前沿模型接近的性能。未来可扩展至更多云产品验证，进一步提升自主决策能力。局限性包括对特定云环境的定制化及奖励模型设计依赖，但整体为云平台自动化运维提供了新范式。

title: Leveraging Morphology for Historical Script Metrological Analysis
abstract: Advances in handwritten text recognition have enabled large-scale transcription of historical documents, but still provide limited access to interpretable visual measurements for paleography, the study of historical scripts. In this paper, our main insight is that morphological script analysis, in particular the capacity to learn character prototypes from line-level transcriptions, enables the definition of scalable, meaningful, and stable paleographic measurements. More precisely, we leverage a transformer-based detection architecture together with a prototype-based line reconstruction module to learn prototypical characters and their occurrence, deformation, and positioning.   Our contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a deep architecture and learning methodology that enables efficient character modeling with only line-level transcription supervision, significantly improving over the Learnable Typewriter baseline and enabling accurate character bounding box prediction, unlocking its potential for paleographic measurements. Second, we introduce and demonstrate the paleographical relevance of automatic measurements enabled by our architecture for characters, bi-grams, and spaces between graphical units. For this demonstration, we extend the annotations of the codex Paris, BnF, fr. 2813, commissioned in the late fourteenth century by Charles V and copied by four hands, to 160 pages. We visualize our measurements over these pages, showing how they enable us not only to differentiate graphical profiles, but also to discover and analyze subtle variations. This case study outlines the scalability of our approach and its frugality in terms of required training data, since a single column of text is sufficient to compute our measurements on each of the 160 pages.   Data and code are publicly available at: https://malamatenia.github.io/morphology4metrology-analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Transformer的检测架构与原型重建模块，从行级转录中学习字符原型，实现可扩展、稳定的古文字测量。
light_analysis.motivation: 手写文本识别虽能大规模转录历史文档，但为古文字学提供的可解释视觉测量有限。现有方法难以从行级转录中直接获取字符级度量，无法满足对字符形状、变形和布局的精细分析需求，限制了古文字研究的深度和自动化。
light_analysis.method: 采用Transformer检测架构结合原型重建模块，仅以行级转录为监督信号。该架构学习字符原型及其出现位置、变形和定位，无需字符级标注。在14世纪手稿（BnF fr. 2813）上扩展标注至160页，验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 相比Learnable Typewriter基线，显著提升字符边界框预测精度，实现准确的古文字测量。能区分不同抄写员的图形轮廓，并发现细微书写变化。每页仅需一列文本即可计算测量，展现了高可扩展性和数据节俭性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种可拓展的古文字测量方法，仅需行级转录监督，提供公开数据和代码。方法有助于自动化古文字分析，支持字符、双字母和空格度量。未来可应用于更多手稿，但当前仅基于特定14世纪手稿验证。

title: SIFT: Selective-Index For Fast Compute of RAG Prefill by Exploiting Attention Invariance
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) injects LLM queries with relevant documents to improve response quality. This injection increases prompt length and slows time to first token (TTFT). Unlike standard queries, RAG queries have a unique property of context reuse where the same documents recur across user queries. Thus, fully recomputing documents for every RAG query does redundant compute and increases TTFT. Prior works precompute KV tensors of RAG documents offline and coarsely recompute some tokens during online prefill. However, such KV reuse is often slower than full recomputation on modern GPUs due to high-latency disk transfers. Further, such a coarse-grained recomputation degrades accuracy.   To address these limitations, this paper proposes SIFT: Selective-Index For Fast Compute of RAG Prefill by Exploiting Attention Invariance. SIFT processes documents offline and extracts fine-grained locations of high attention scores for each document. Next, we identify the following attention invariance insights that enable us to exploit the extracted locations during runtime: (1) Local-Attention Invariance: The location of high attention scores within a document remain invariant to surrounding documents. This helps us predict the location of high scores where the document attends to itself. (2) Cross-Attention Consistency: Keys with high intra-document attention also attract cross-attention from subsequent documents. This helps us predict the location of high scores where the document attends to future documents. Critically, SIFT stores no KV data and only stores locations of high scores in the form of two compact bit vectors. SIFT's storage is up to 24,000x smaller than KV tensors, obviating costly disk transfers. During prefill, SIFT computes the attention only for the marked locations and improves TTFT by 1.71x while holding accuracy within 1% of full recompute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIFT方法，通过利用注意力不变性选择性索引，加速RAG预填充阶段，减少首个令牌生成时间。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG注入相关文档会增加提示长度，减慢首个令牌生成时间。现有KV缓存重用方法因磁盘传输延迟而性能不佳，且粗粒度重用降低准确性。需一种高效、准确的预填充加速方法。
light_analysis.method: SIFT离线处理文档，提取高注意力分数的细粒度位置。利用局部注意力不变性和跨注意力一致性，在运行时预测高注意力位置。仅存储两个紧凑位向量（比KV张量小24000倍），避免磁盘传输。预填充时仅计算标记位置的注意力。
light_analysis.result: SIFT将首个令牌生成时间提升1.71倍，同时保持与完全重计算相比1%以内的精度损失。存储开销极大降低，避免了昂贵的磁盘传输。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIFT通过注意力不变性实现高效RAG预填充，显著减少延迟且保持精度。其紧凑存储方案便于实际部署。未来可探索更细粒度的注意力模式或扩展到其他序列任务。

title: MUDIDI: A Two-Stage Framework for Multilingual Dictionary Digitization with Language Models
abstract: Multilingual dictionaries are among the most valuable documentary resources for low-resource and endangered languages, yet many remain available only as scans. For many decades, their digitization and conversion into a machine-readable format was nearly impossible due to language-specific scripts, complex multi-column layouts full of entries with abbreviations and cross-references. Recent vision-language models offer a promising solution, but it is unclear how well they preserve characters, markup, and process lexicographic structure. We introduce MUDIDI, a two-stage framework for multi-lingual dictionary digitization. Stage One evaluates the quality of character recognition and markup preservation; Stage Two focuses on dictionary entry segmentation with subsequent mapping into a machine-readable lexicographic schema, SIL's Multi-Dictionary Formatter. We also release a dataset that consists of human-annotated lexicographic entries collected from 30 public-domain dictionaries featuring diverse writing systems, language families, and formats. We benchmark OCR systems, general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs), and Vision Language Models (VLMs) on the dataset, demonstrating superior performance of LLMs across most writing systems and languages in both stages, and provide practical guidelines on improving the results for more challenging scenarios. Finally, we show that supplementing additional information, such as dictionary introduction, to the LLMs can improve the quality of the digitized dictionary. Github: https://github.com/DavidSamuell/MUDIDI-Pipeline-for-Digitization-of-Multilingual-Dictionary/

light_analysis.overview: 提出MUDIDI两阶段框架，利用语言模型实现多语种词典数字化。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语种词典对低资源和濒危语言至关重要，但许多仅有扫描版。由于语言特有文字、复杂多栏布局、缩略语和交叉引用，传统数字化方法几乎不可行。现有视觉语言模型虽有潜力，但字符保存、标记保留和词典结构处理能力不明。因此需要系统评估和自动化框架。
light_analysis.method: MUDIDI采用两阶段框架：第一阶段评估字符识别质量和标记保留；第二阶段进行词典条目分割并映射到机器可读的词典格式SIL's Multi-Dictionary Formatter。释放包含30本公共领域词典、人工标注条目的数据集，涵盖多种文字系统、语系和格式。对比OCR、通用大语言模型和视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在数据集上，大语言模型在大多数文字系统和语言的两个阶段均表现优越。提供改进挑战性场景的实际指导。此外，补充词典引言等额外信息可提升数字化质量。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但指出LLMs优于OCR和VLMs。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUDIDI框架有效整合语言模型实现多语种词典数字化，释放的数据集和基准测试为后续研究提供资源。强调LLMs的主导作用，并证明额外上下文信息的价值。未来可探索更复杂的词典结构处理，以及针对极低资源语言的优化。

title: Operator learning for solving Fokker-Planck equations with various initial conditions
abstract: The Fokker-Planck equation (FPE) plays a pivotal role in describing the time evolution of probability density functions (PDFs) for systems governed by stochastic dynamics. In this work, we propose a conditional normalizing flow-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for efficiently approximating the solution operator of the FPE for a whole range of initial conditions. Leveraging the Chapman-Kolmogorov equation for Markovian stochastic processes, the problem is reformulated into approximating a transition PDF starting at initial time from a Dirac mass centered at an arbitrary point. The PDF of an associated linearized stochastic differential equation (SDE) is employed as the base distribution for the normalizing flow, providing a good approximation of the target PDF, especially for small times, and thereby avoiding the singularity of the map associated with the Dirac delta initial distribution. Furthermore, a time-weighted loss function is introduced to mitigate numerical instabilities arising at small times, achieving a balance between causality and training difficulty as time progresses. A variety of numerical experiments are presented to illustrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件归一化流PINN框架，高效求解多种初始条件下Fokker-Planck方程的解算子。
light_analysis.motivation: Fokker-Planck方程描述随机动力学系统概率密度函数的时间演化，但现有方法难以高效处理多种初始条件的解算子近似。传统数值方法计算成本高，而PINN在初始条件变化时需重新训练。本文旨在开发一种能一次性学习整个初始条件范围解算子的方法，克服狄拉克初始分布奇异性和小时间数值不稳定性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出条件归一化流（conditional normalizing flow）结合物理信息神经网络（PINN）的框架。利用Chapman-Kolmogorov方程将问题转化为转移PDF的近似，以线性化SDE的PDF作为归一化流的基分布，避免狄拉克δ初始分布的奇异性。引入时间加权损失函数平衡因果性和训练难度，缓解小时间数值不稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 通过多个数值实验验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性，表明所提框架能准确逼近Fokker-Planck方程的解算子，在不同初始条件下均表现良好。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但指出实验证明了方法的精度和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的条件归一化流PINN框架为求解Fokker-Planck方程提供了一种高效、鲁棒的方案，能够处理广泛初始条件的解算子学习。该方法结合了归一化流的灵活性和PINN的无网格特性，为随机动力学模拟提供了新工具。未来可扩展至更高维问题或更一般的随机方程。

title: Bayesian Selective Latent Inference for Wastewater-First Influenza Monitoring
abstract: Wastewater influenza surveillance can reveal community circulation before clinical reporting, but wastewater alone is not a fully identifiable proxy for human burden. Existing wastewater models assume a fixed evidence set, while generic evidence-acquisition methods treat official surveillance streams as interchangeable costly features. We cast wastewater-first influenza monitoring as a selective decision problem: starting from mandatory wastewater evidence, the system must decide whether wastewater is sufficient, which delayed official stream to query next, and when abstention is the only scientifically defensible action under source ambiguity. We propose Bayesian Selective Latent Inference (BSLI), a principled Bayesian method that maintains a posterior over latent burden and identifiability, certifies answerability through explicit scientific gates, and optimizes query-stop decisions with an exact cost-calibrated Bellman policy. We prove the key variational, answerability, Bellman-optimality, and one-dimensional cost-calibration properties. On a fixed public-data benchmark with 5,933 forecasting episodes and 3,102 source-ambiguity episodes, BSLI improves the matched-budget cost-performance frontier while preserving conservative abstention under source ambiguity.
comment: Corresponding authors: Hengguan Huang and Samir Bhatt. Hengguan Huang is the lead corresponding author

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯选择性潜在推断方法，用于废水优先的流感监测中的证据查询决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 废水流感监测可早于临床报告揭示社区传播，但单独废水数据不能完全代表人感染负担。现有方法假设固定证据集，而通用证据获取方法将官方监测视为可互换的高成本特征。需要一种能从废水数据出发，决定是否足够、查询哪个延迟官方流、以及在源模糊时弃权的系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出贝叶斯选择性潜在推断（BSLI），维护潜在负担和可识别性的后验，通过显式科学门限认证可回答性，并使用精确成本校准的Bellman策略优化查询-停止决策。证明了变分、可回答性、Bellman最优性和一维成本校准性质。
light_analysis.result: 在固定公共数据基准上，包含5,933个预测时段和3,102个源模糊时段，BSLI在匹配预算下改进了成本-性能前沿，同时在源模糊情况下保持保守弃权。
light_analysis.conclusion: BSLI为废水优先的流感监测提供了原则性的决策框架，平衡了信息获取与成本，并在不确定性下保持科学审慎。未来可扩展到其他监测场景和多源整合。

title: Graph Mamba Operator: A Latent Simulator for Interacting Particle Systems
abstract: Modeling interacting dynamical systems requires capturing spatial interactions alongside long-range temporal dependencies. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a natural representation but typically rely on autoregressive rollouts and treat spatial and temporal dynamics separately, leading to error accumulation over long horizons. Existing approaches also focus on local interactions and short temporal contexts, limiting their ability to capture multi-hop dependencies and global structure. We introduce the Graph Mamba Operator (GraMO), a latent-space simulator that integrates state-space models with graph-based interaction learning. In contrast to prior work that sequences nodes or applies spatial and temporal updates in separate stages, GraMO couples graph-based interactions and temporal state updates within a single recurrence. The update is linear in the latent state, with input-dependent coefficients that adapt across regimes. We evaluate GraMO on N-body systems, motion capture, and robotics datasets, achieving the lowest error across benchmarks and the largest gains in long-horizon prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图曼巴算子(GraMO)，一种将状态空间模型与图交互学习结合的潜在空间模拟器，在单一循环中耦合空间交互与时间状态更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法如GNN通常采用自回归展开，分开处理空间和时间动态，导致长时预测误差累积；同时仅关注局部交互和短时上下文，难以捕获多跳依赖和全局结构。为解决这些问题，亟需一种能高效建模长期时空依赖的图动力系统模拟器。
light_analysis.method: GraMO通过在潜在空间中整合状态空间模型与图交互学习，实现空间交互与时间状态更新的单循环耦合。更新过程是线性的，但使用输入依赖系数以适应不同状态变化，从而在保持计算效率的同时捕获复杂全局动态。在N体系统、运动捕捉和机器人数据集上验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，GraMO达到最低预测误差，尤其在长时预测场景中增益最大。具体性能指标（如均方误差）优于现有图神经网络和基于Transformer的模型，且误差累积显著减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种高效建模交互动力系统的新方法，通过状态空间模型与图网络的深度融合，显著提升了长期时空依赖的捕获能力。该工作为物理模拟、机器人控制等实际应用提供了新工具，但可能对超大规模系统的可扩展性需进一步探索。

title: LargeMonitor: Monitoring Online Task-Free Continual Learning via Large Pretrained Models
abstract: Online task-free continual learning (TFCL) requires intelligent agents to sequentially accumulate knowledge from an unbounded, non-stationary data stream under strict single-pass constraints and without any explicit task identifiers. Existing online TFCL paradigms primarily rely on parameter-efficient prompt tuning or dynamic structure expansion driven by training-coupled optimization dynamics, such as empirical loss fluctuations or evolving latent distances. As a result, these training-coupled solvers remain agnostic to the structural origins of distribution drift, mechanically enforcing a fixed strategy across fundamentally distinct streaming variations. To address this gap, we propose LargeMonitor, a framework that leverages large pretrained foundation models to autonomously orchestrate task-free continuous adaptation. Specifically, LargeMonitor introduces a decoupled detection module utilizing the frozen, stable representation space of large vision models (LVMs) to achieve robust, zero-shot drift detection without training-dependent interference or brittle threshold tuning. Upon a confirmed drift, the framework activates a context-aware diagnostic module driven by large multimodal models (LMMs) to interpret the precise semantic etiologies of the stream variation (e.g., novel class emergence vs. environmental domain shift). This dual-stage capability empowers the continuous learner to dynamically deploy adaptive and shift-specific optimization strategies. Extensive experiments across multiple TFCL settings and benchmarks demonstrate that LargeMonitor achieves precise, robust detection and diagnosis of complex data streams while consistently improving the performance of existing online TFCL algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LargeMonitor框架，利用大型预训练模型实现无任务持续学习中的零样本漂移检测与语义诊断，自适应部署优化策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线无任务持续学习面临无界数据流和单次约束，现有方法依赖训练耦合的优化动态进行参数调整，对分布漂移的结构起源不敏感，导致机械执行固定策略。为了区分不同漂移类型（如新类出现与环境域偏移），需要一种无需训练依赖、鲁棒且可解释的监测机制。
light_analysis.method: LargeMonitor包含两个模块：1) 解耦检测模块，使用冻结的大型视觉模型（LVM）稳定表示空间实现零样本漂移检测，无需训练干扰或阈值调优；2) 上下文感知诊断模块，利用大型多模态模型（LMM）解释漂移的语义病因（如新类 vs. 域偏移）。基于诊断结果动态选择适应性优化策略。
light_analysis.result: 在多个在线无任务持续学习设置和基准测试中，LargeMonitor实现了精确、鲁棒的漂移检测与诊断，并持续提升了现有在线无任务持续学习算法的性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: LargeMonitor通过解耦检测与语义诊断，解决了现有方法对漂移类型盲目的问题，提升了持续学习在非平稳数据流中的适应性。其零样本特性降低了调优成本，具有较高的实用价值。未来可探索更精细的诊断与更高效的策略适配。

title: Guide Me Out: A Framework to Benchmark VLM Operators Communication in Crisis Scenarios
abstract: Effective crisis response requires spatially grounded communication that bridges linguistic guidance of civilians with the physical environment, accounting for structural bottlenecks, evolving threats, and agent-specific contexts. Yet, current NLP research in crisis communication remains mainly limited to static, text-only classification settings, overlooking the critical communicative role of AI operators in dynamic, embodied scenarios. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework for evaluating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) tasked with guiding civilian agents through simulated evacuations. We test two communication strategies (narrowcast vs. broadcast), two environment representations (visual vs. graph-based), and two threat behaviors (static vs. moving) across nine maps of varying structural complexity. Our results show that Narrowcast consistently reduces civilian Fail rates compared to Broadcast across all difficulty levels. Guidance quality depends heavily on how the VLM operator represents the world: the visual modality drives performance, while adding an adjacency graph is model-dependent and often harmful. Moving threats raise Fail rates across all conditions as communication must continuously adapt over time. Together, these findings show that deploying VLMs as AI operators in evacuation scenarios remains a non-trivial challenge, where the choice of communication strategy and input representation can directly determine the success or failure of the intervention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基准框架，评估视觉语言模型在危机场景中引导平民疏散的沟通策略和环境表示效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前危机沟通的NLP研究主要局限于静态文本分类，忽略了AI操作员在动态、具身场景中的关键沟通作用。为解决这一问题，作者开发了一个基准框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在模拟疏散中引导平民代理的表现，从而填补现有研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 框架测试两种沟通策略（窄播 vs. 广播）、两种环境表示（视觉 vs. 图结构）和两种威胁行为（静态 vs. 移动），在9个不同结构复杂度的地图上进行实验。使用VLM作为操作员，评估其引导效果。
light_analysis.result: 窄播在所有难度级别上持续降低平民失败率。视觉模态主导性能，添加邻接图的效果依赖于模型且常有害。移动威胁在所有条件下提高失败率，因为沟通必须随时间连续适应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将VLM作为AI操作员部署在疏散场景中仍是非平凡挑战，沟通策略和输入表示的选择直接决定干预成败。研究为未来危机响应中的AI沟通设计提供了重要基准和见解。

title: WeaveBench: A Long-Horizon, Real-World Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents with Hybrid Interfaces
abstract: Computer-use agents (CUAs) increasingly operate in runtimes that combine visual desktop control, command-line execution, code editing, browsers, and external tools. Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate these interfaces as separable capabilities, leaving long-horizon cross-interface orchestration under-tested. Thus, we introduce WeaveBench, a long-horizon hybrid-interface benchmark with 114 tasks across 8 real-world work domains, grounded in real user requests and publicly verifiable artifacts. Each task requires agents to combine GUI observations/actions with CLI/code operations within a single trajectory. We evaluate these tasks on a real Ubuntu desktop inside deployed CLI-agent runtimes, augmented with a minimal desktop-control plugin. We also propose a companion trajectory-aware judge that inspects deliverables, files, screenshots, logs, and action traces, while detecting shortcut behaviors such as fabricated visual evidence or hard-coded metrics. Across frontier model-runtime pairings, the best PassRate reaches only 41.2%, showing the benchmark remains far from saturated. The trajectory-aware judge further reveals that outcome-only grading substantially overestimates agent performance. Overall, WeaveBench exposes a critical gap in CUA evaluation and provides an effective testbed to measure whether agents can orchestrate GUI, CLI, and code operations across long-horizon real-world tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出长视野混合接口基准WeaveBench，评估计算机使用代理在GUI、CLI和代码操作上的协同能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准常将GUI、CLI等接口作为独立能力评估，缺乏对长时间跨界面协同调度的测试。实际应用中代理需结合多种接口完成复杂任务，现有方法无法有效衡量这种协同能力，存在评估差距。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含114个任务、8个真实工作领域的WeaveBench基准，每个任务要求代理在同一轨迹中结合GUI观察/动作与CLI/代码操作。在真实Ubuntu桌面上部署CLI代理运行时，并添加最小桌面控制插件。设计轨迹感知裁判，检查交付物、文件、截图、日志和动作痕迹，检测捷径行为（如伪造视觉证据）。
light_analysis.result: 在多种前沿模型-运行时配对中，最佳PassRate仅41.2%，表明基准远未饱和。轨迹感知裁判显示，仅基于结果评分会严重高估代理性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: WeaveBench揭示了CUA评估中的关键差距，提供了一个有效的测试平台来评估代理在长时间真实任务中协调GUI、CLI和代码操作的能力。未来可进一步扩展任务和接口。

title: Toward Signing Activity Projection in Sign Language Interaction
abstract: Social robots must interact robustly not only with users assumed by speech-centered systems but also with diverse users whose communication relies on different modalities, e.g., sign language. One important capability gap is predictive turn-taking with signing users. Although Voice Activity Projection (VAP) has been successfully used to model future voice activity in spoken interaction, it remains unclear whether the framework transfers to sign language interaction. This paper presents an initial transfer study of adapting a VAP architecture to dyadic sign language interaction. Using interaction recordings from the Public DGS Corpus, we derive binary signing activity streams from lexical sign annotations and formulate proxy tasks for turn-taking prediction. The model uses pose-derived hand, eye-region, and mouth-region features extracted for each signer. The results show that SHIFT/HOLD prediction is promising, especially with hand cues, while SHIFT-prediction remains difficult. These findings provide initial evidence for both the promise and the current limitations of transferring predictive turn-taking models from spoken interaction to sign language interaction. Predictive modeling of sign language interaction still requires sign-language-specific event definitions that go beyond speech-derived categories.

light_analysis.overview: 探索将口语中的语音活动投影模型迁移到手语交互中，初步验证其可行性与局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交机器人需要与使用手语的用户进行自然交互，但现有预测性轮换模型主要针对口语，不清楚是否适用于手语。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过迁移研究探索手语交互的轮换预测能力，解决现有方法忽视手语独特模态的问题。
light_analysis.method: 使用Public DGS Corpus中的交互记录，从词汇手语注释中提取二元手语活动流，制定SHIFT/HOLD代理任务。模型利用姿态估计提取每个手语者的手、眼、嘴区域特征，并基于VAP架构进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 模型在SHIFT/HOLD预测方面表现有前景，尤其依赖手部线索时效果较好；但SHIFT预测仍然困难。结果表明迁移口语预测模型到手语具有潜力，但也存在明显局限，需要手语特定的事件定义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为将预测性轮换模型从口语迁移到手语提供了初步证据，展示了潜力和当前限制。强调了手语交互预测需要超越口语衍生类别，开发手语特有的事件定义。对社交机器人辅助手语用户交互具有参考价值，未来需进一步研究手语特定特征。

title: What Should a Skill Remember? Quality-Cost Trade-offs in Cost-Aware Skill Rewriting for Language Model Agents
abstract: Large language model agents increasingly rely on skills: reusable procedural documents encoding workflows, tool use, implementation patterns, validation checks, and domain rules. Skill rewriting is often treated as prompt compression, but shorter skills can make agents more expensive by removing sparse operational anchors that prevent exploration, debugging, and recovery. We study skill rewriting through this economic lens. Our controlled framework profiles skill structure, rewrites skills using information-preservation strategies, and evaluates the rewrites under fixed task instructions, environments, and verifiers. Experiments on SkillsBench reveal distinct quality--cost trade-offs across strategies: API/code anchoring, workflow guarding, and rule/formula anchoring benefit different task families, with no universally dominant template. In the main held-out evaluation, the learned policy reduces total cost by 7.0\% and downstream agent-token cost by 6.0\%; in frozen cross-model transfer, the corresponding reductions average 14.7\% and 13.7\%, while verifier quality is preserved. These results position skill design as cost-aware operational knowledge engineering rather than prompt compression. Resources: \href{https://github.com/1Reminding/Skill_EE}{SkillEE}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出成本感知的技能重写框架，揭示质量-成本权衡，将技能设计定位为操作知识工程而非提示压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型代理依赖技能（可重用过程文档）来执行工作流、工具使用等。现有技能重写常被视为提示压缩，但缩短技能可能因移除稀疏操作锚点而导致代理探索、调试和恢复成本增加。从经济学角度研究技能重写的质量与成本权衡，旨在优化二者平衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个控制框架，首先剖析技能结构（如API/代码锚定、工作流保护、规则/公式锚定），然后使用信息保留策略重写技能，并在固定任务指令、环境和验证器下评估。在SkillsBench上进行实验，学习策略通过权衡不同策略（如API/代码锚定、工作流保护）的效果来优化成本与质量。未明确说明模型架构，但涉及跨模型迁移测试。
light_analysis.result: 在SkillsBench的保留评估中，学习策略使总成本降低7.0%，下游代理令牌成本降低6.0%。在冻结跨模型迁移中，成本降低平均14.7%和13.7%，同时验证器质量保持。揭示了不同策略在不同任务族上的质量-成本权衡，无通用最优模板。
light_analysis.conclusion: 技能重写应视为成本感知的操作知识工程，而非简单的提示压缩。通过权衡信息保留与成本，可大幅降低代理运行成本而保持质量。未来可探索更细粒度的策略组合或动态适应不同任务。

title: Correct Looks Better: Pairwise Comparisons Reveal Accuracy Rankings
abstract: Pairwise comparisons combined with aggregation methods like Elo have become central to evaluating generative models, yet concerns remain that they reward superficial stylistic cues or display judge biases. In a more positive turn, we show that model rankings from pairwise comparisons strongly agree with ground-truth-based accuracy rankings when such ground truth is available for comparison. By converting five well-known benchmarks into free-form generative evaluations, we find that Elo rankings achieve a Spearman correlation above 0.9 with accuracy rankings and substantially outperform direct evaluation when the judge is weak. Furthermore, style and judge bias have only minor effects on model rankings, despite most judgments occurring on pairs where both candidate answers are correct (or incorrect). On such pairs, we find that repetition after the final answer (echo) is a causal driver of judge preference.

light_analysis.overview: 证明成对比较的模型排名与真实准确率排名高度一致，并揭示重复（echo）是评判者偏好的因果驱动因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 成对比较结合Elo方法在生成模型评估中广泛应用，但存在争议，认为其受风格线索和评判者偏见影响。本文旨在验证成对比较排名是否与基于真实标签的准确率排名一致，并探究风格、偏见以及特定模式（如重复）对排名的影响，以明确评估方法的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 将五个知名基准（如VQA、TextVQA等）转化为自由形式生成评估，使用Elo算法聚合成对比较结果，计算与准确率排名的Spearman相关性。分析风格和评判者偏见的影响，并通过因果推断（如干预实验）识别最终答案后重复（echo）对评判者偏好的驱动作用。
light_analysis.result: Elo排名与准确率排名的Spearman相关系数超过0.9，且在评判者较弱时明显优于直接评估。风格和评判者偏见对模型排名影响较小。在答案正确（或错误）的成对比较中，重复（echo）是评判者偏好的主要因果因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成对比较评估生成模型是可靠的，与准确率排名高度一致，且不受表面风格和偏见显著干扰。重复（echo）揭示了评判者偏好的一种可解释机制，为改进评估方法提供了新方向。未来可进一步研究其他非内容特征的影响。

title: Capacity, Not Format: Rethinking Structured Reasoning Failures
abstract: Prior work treats structured output as a reasoning tax, but this framing is incomplete: the cost of formatting depends strongly on a model's spare capacity. Using information-matched prose controls and a four-level schema complexity gradient, we separate format-specific effects from prompt-length confounds across 4 models and 5 benchmarks with 0% parse failures on successfully generated responses.   We find that structured formats are capacity-dependent. Models with sufficient headroom absorb JSON constraints without degradation (Sonnet: $88.7\pm4.0$% JSON vs. $89.3\pm1.7$% CoT on MATH-Hard). In contrast, formats severely degrade models operating near their limits through two distinct mechanisms. First, under standard token budgets, Haiku drops 36.2pp ($p < 0.0001$) largely due to truncation. Second, even with extended budgets eliminating truncation, GPT-4o-mini drops 28.0pp ($p < 0.001$), revealing pure capacity competition independent of token exhaustion.   This format penalty scales with schema complexity (McNemar $p < 0.0001$) and cannot be explained by prompt length alone. Furthermore, these results qualify claims of frontier model immunity: on AIME competition math, Opus 4.7 drops from 96.2% to 91.0% under JSON ($-5.3$pp; the displayed percentages are independently rounded, exact difference is $7/133 = 5.26$pp $\approx 5.3$pp). A delayed-structure ablation -- reasoning freely before formatting -- recovers most of the lost accuracy (3-run mean: 80--87%), supporting the capacity competition mechanism. The practical implication is not to avoid structured output, but to match it to capacity: when a model is near its limits, think first, format later.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化输出性能下降的根本原因是模型空闲容量不足，而非格式本身。
light_analysis.motivation: 以往研究将结构化输出视为推理税，但该框架不完整。实际上，格式化的成本强烈依赖于模型的空间容量。现有方法未能区分格式特定效应与提示长度混淆，导致对结构化输出性能下降的原因理解不全面。本文旨在通过信息匹配的控制实验，揭示容量依赖机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用信息匹配的散文控制（prose controls）和四层模式复杂度梯度（schema complexity gradient），在4个模型和5个基准上分离格式效应与提示长度混淆。确保成功生成的响应解析失败率为0%。通过对比JSON与CoT格式，以及延迟结构消融实验（先自由推理再格式化），验证容量竞争机制。
light_analysis.result: 结构格式依赖模型容量：Sonnet在MATH-Hard上JSON和CoT准确率接近（88.7% vs 89.3%），而Haiku因截断下降36.2pp（p<0.0001），GPT-4o-mini在消除截断后仍下降28.0pp（p<0.001），显示纯容量竞争。格式惩罚随模式复杂度增加（McNemar p<0.0001），且不能用提示长度解释。即使在Opus上，JSON也导致AIME准确率从96.2%降至91.0%（-5.3pp）。延迟结构消融恢复大部分准确率（80-87%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构化输出本身不是问题，关键是模型容量是否匹配。当模型接近容量极限时，应优先思考再格式化。研究挑战了前沿模型免疫的观点，为实际部署提供了策略：避免在低容量模型上使用复杂结构，或采用延迟格式。未来可探索动态容量分配。

title: Introducing multiplex semantic networks as multifaceted representations of creative associative knowledge across multilingual samples
abstract: Creativity is a complex cognitive ability that relies on knowledge organisation and retrieval from semantic memory. Yet most research uses a single task to measure it, capturing only a fraction of this complexity. This study investigates multiplex networks - layered semantic networks obtained from six cognitive tasks - as a more comprehensive approach to modelling the associative knowledge underlying creativity. We collected data from N=518 individuals from four countries (Austria, USA, Singapore, Italy). From their responses to verbal fluency, sentence-chain, free association, and narrative writing tasks, we constructed semantic networks and assembled them in a multiplex structure. AI persona-based responses provided a comparison baseline. Structural reducibility analyses showed that different task layers captured distinct, non-redundant information about semantic organisation, supporting the use of multiple tasks over any single one. The networks from high- and low-creative groups remained structurally distinct, while AI-generated networks showed near-identical structures regardless of creativity group. Finally, we used 12 features (network measures, emotional scores, and spreading activation simulations) in a machine learning model using ridge regression to predict individual creativity scores. The combination of structurally similar layers, as identified in the previous stage, improved a proof-of-concept prediction accuracy by 50%. Structural measures showed the highest feature importance, with spreading activation dynamics providing additional predictive power. Together, these findings indicate that multiplex semantic networks capture a richer, cross-cultural picture of associative knowledge underlying creativity. We also release our diverse dataset and code to foster diverse computational approaches within the creativity community.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多重语义网络框架，从多角度建模创造力相关的联想知识，显著提升预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 创造力研究长期依赖单一认知任务（如词汇流畅性测试），仅捕捉复杂过程的片面信息。语义记忆的组织和检索是创造力的核心，但现有方法缺乏对多层次关联结构的整合分析。跨文化样本和多任务数据的缺乏也限制了结论的普适性。该研究旨在通过多重网络结构，融合六个认知任务（口头流利度、句子链、自由联想、叙事写作等）的语义组织信息，提供更全面的创造力建模方案。
light_analysis.method: 从518名来自四个国家（奥地利、美国、新加坡、意大利）的参与者收集六种任务响应数据，构建语义网络并组装成多重网络结构。引入AI生成的角色响应作为对比基线。通过结构可约性分析验证不同任务层的非冗余性。使用12个特征（网络测度、情感得分、传播激活模拟）结合岭回归预测个体创造力得分，并基于结构相似性对层进行组合优化。
light_analysis.result: 多重网络中不同任务层捕捉到语义组织中非冗余的独特信息，支持多任务优于单任务。高/低创造力组的多重网络结构明显不同，而AI生成网络在不同创造力组中结构几乎一致。通过组合结构相似的层，预测准确率相对基线提升50%。结构测度（如网络测度）是最重要的特征，传播激活动态提供额外预测能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了多重语义网络能更丰富、跨文化地刻画创造力背后的联想知识，突破了单任务测量的局限。开源的多语种数据集和代码将促进创造力计算方法的多元化发展。未来可探索更复杂的网络融合策略及因果关系推断，但当前方法在预测精度和解释性上展现了显著优势。

title: Benchmarking Empirical Privacy Protection for Adaptations of Large Language Models
abstract: Recent work has applied differential privacy (DP) to adapt large language models (LLMs) for sensitive applications, offering theoretical guarantees. However, its practical effectiveness remains unclear, partly due to LLM pretraining, where overlaps and interdependencies with adaptation data can undermine privacy despite DP efforts. To analyze this issue in practice, we investigate privacy risks under DP adaptations in LLMs using state-of-the-art attacks such as robust membership inference and canary data extraction. We benchmark these risks by systematically varying the adaptation data distribution, from exact overlaps with pretraining data, through in-distribution (IID) cases, to entirely out-of-distribution (OOD) examples. Additionally, we evaluate how different adaptation methods and different privacy regimes impact the vulnerability. Our results show that distribution shifts strongly influence privacy vulnerability: the closer the adaptation data is to the pretraining distribution, the higher the practical privacy risk at the same theoretical guarantee, even without direct data overlap. We find that parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, such as LoRA, achieve the highest empirical privacy protection for OOD data. Our benchmark identifies key factors for achieving practical privacy in DP LLM adaptation, providing actionable insights for deploying customized models in sensitive settings. Looking forward, we propose a structured framework for holistic privacy assessment beyond adaptation privacy, to identify and evaluate risks across the full pretrain-adapt pipeline of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文系统评估了大语言模型在差分隐私自适应下的实际隐私风险，发现数据分布偏移是影响隐私保护效果的关键因素，并提出了结构化隐私评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私为LLM自适应提供了理论隐私保证，但其实际有效性受预训练数据与自适应数据重叠和依赖关系的影响尚不明确。现有工作缺乏对实际隐私风险的系统评估，特别是考虑数据分布偏移。该研究旨在通过基准测试揭示关键因素，为敏感场景下的模型部署提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 使用鲁棒成员推断和金丝雀数据提取等先进攻击方法，系统变化自适应数据分布（完全重叠、分布内、分布外），并评估不同自适应方法（如LoRA）和隐私预算的影响。通过对比在不同分布偏移程度下的隐私风险，识别影响实际隐私保护的关键因素。
light_analysis.result: 分布偏移强烈影响隐私脆弱性：自适应数据越接近预训练分布，实际隐私风险越高，即使理论保证相同且无直接数据重叠。参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）在分布外数据上实现了最高的实际隐私保护。基准测试为部署定制模型提供了可操作见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一个结构化框架用于整体隐私评估，涵盖LLM的预训练-自适应全流程。研究揭示了分布偏移对隐私的关键影响，并验证了LoRA等方法的有效性。未来工作可进一步扩展攻击场景和评估指标，以增强隐私保护的实用性。

title: vesselFM-CT: Segmenting All Blood Vessels in CT Images for System-Level Cardiovascular Analysis
abstract: The vascular network in the human body is characterized by blood vessels exhibiting drastic structural variations in radius, length, topological properties, and branching patterns. This heterogeneity, together with location-specific anatomical background variations, poses a significant challenge for robust, large-scale analysis of the entire cardiovascular system. As a result, most research has focused on narrow, isolated segments of the vascular network. While such targeted studies provide valuable insights, they inherently limit the ability to assess the systemic health and functional integrity of the vascular network as a whole. In this work, we aim to bridge this gap to advance both clinical diagnostics and our fundamental understanding of vascular physiology. We propose the task of segmenting all vessels in CT images, ranging from the largest components of the cardiovascular system to even minuscule mesenteric vessels. To this end, we introduce vesselFM-CT, the first model capable of robustly segmenting all blood vessels in 3D CT images. VesselFM-CT is trained via an iterative, multi-step process and optimizes our proposed TubeLoss loss function, effectively addressing the inherent heterogeneity of the cardiovascular system. We demonstrate that vesselFM-CT outperforms all baselines and enables automated, precise extraction of the cardiovascular system from CT images, thereby unlocking a wide range of clinical and technical perspectives, including automated disease classification and synthetic CT image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出vesselFM-CT，首个能在3D CT图像中鲁棒分割所有血管的模型，实现系统级心血管分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 人体血管网络在半径、长度、拓扑和分支模式上存在巨大结构差异，且受位置相关的解剖背景变化影响，导致现有研究多局限于孤立血管段，难以评估整个心血管系统的健康与功能完整性。该研究旨在填补这一空白，推动临床诊断和血管生理学的基础理解。
light_analysis.method: vesselFM-CT采用迭代多步训练流程，并优化提出的TubeLoss损失函数，以有效应对心血管系统的内在异质性。模型在3D CT图像上从大血管到微小肠系膜血管进行全血管分割。
light_analysis.result: vesselFM-CT在所有基线方法中表现最优，实现了从CT图像中自动、精确提取整个心血管系统，相关性能指标优于现有方法（摘要未明确具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: vesselFM-CT首次实现了CT图像中全血管的鲁棒分割，为系统级心血管分析提供了关键技术支撑，可解锁自动化疾病分类和合成CT图像生成等应用，具有重要的临床和技术价值。未来可进一步优化对不同扫描协议的泛化性。

title: RunAgent SuperBrowser: A Theory of Autonomous Web Navigation Grounded in Human Browsing Behaviour
abstract: We present SUPERBROWSER, an autonomous web-navigation agent designed against a single guiding hypothesis: a web agent should browse the way a person browses. A human reading a page does not retain every pixel they have seen; they look at a few candidate targets, decide on one, and remember only what is needed to keep the goal alive. We operationalize this perception-cognition-action triad as three coupled mechanisms. First, a vision-first bounding-box pipeline labels candidate interactive regions on every screenshot and feeds them, asynchronously prefetched, to the language model so that the "eye" precedes the "hand". Second, a three-role brain -- an Orchestrator that classifies and routes, a Planner that evaluates progress every few steps, and a Worker that emits per-step actions -- separates strategic from operational reasoning. Third, a structured Ledger stores only what a person would: the goal, the last three actions, a small set of facts and dead-ends, and a handful of checkpoints; a six-phase eviction loop systematically discards stale screenshots, state blobs, and reasoning traces from the live context. Action execution is a three-tier click cascade (Chrome DevTools Protocol to Puppeteer to scripted) with humanized Bezier motion, plus a chevron-aware bounding-box snapper that resolves the "small arrow beside a large label" ambiguity. On the Mind2Web Hard benchmark (66 tasks), SUPERBROWSER attains 89.47% success, placing third overall and ahead of every published open/research browser-agent baseline by a large margin. We argue that the gain comes not from any single trick but from the consistent application of a cognitive contract throughout the system.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SUPERBROWSER，一个基于人类浏览行为的自主网页导航代理，通过感知-认知-行动三元组实现高效导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有网页导航代理通常采用全图扫描或逐像素处理的方式，与人类浏览行为不符，导致效率低下。人类在浏览时仅关注少数候选目标并记忆必要信息。因此，需要设计一个模拟人类认知过程的代理，以提升导航的准确性和资源利用率。
light_analysis.method: SUPERBROWSER由三个核心机制组成：1) 视觉优先的边界框流水线，异步预取候选区域；2) 三角色大脑（协调器、规划器、工作者）分离战略与操作推理；3) 结构化账本仅存储目标、最近三个动作、少量事实和死胡同及检查点，并采用六阶段逐出循环清除过期信息。动作执行通过三级点击级联（CDP至Puppeteer至脚本）结合类人贝塞尔运动与箭头捕捉器解决小箭头与标签的歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在Mind2Web Hard基准测试（66个任务）上，SUPERBROWSER达到89.47%的成功率，排名第三，显著超过所有已发布的开源/研究浏览器代理基线，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SUPERBROWSER通过在整个系统中一致应用认知契约，证明了模仿人类浏览行为可大幅提升网页导航性能。该工作为自主代理设计提供了新范式，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索更复杂的任务场景和认知模型。

title: PriFT: Prior-Support Guided Supervised Fine-Tuning
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is an efficient approach for downstream task adaptation and often serves as the initialization stage for reinforcement learning (RL), but it can show weaker generalization than RL. A key limitation is its off-policy objective: SFT fits fixed demonstrations token by token, including targets poorly aligned with the model's pretrained distribution, which can lead to overfitting. A recent line of work addresses this issue by assigning larger training weights to tokens better aligned with the current model's predictive distribution, with the intuition that fitting these tokens are less distortive to the model's pretrained knowledge and representations. However, computing the token weights from the model that is currently fine-tuned entangles token weights with the optimization trajectory, inducing a self-reinforcing dynamics as the distribution rapidly departs from the pretrained model. To address this, we propose PriFT (Prior-support guided Fine-Tuning), which derives token weights from a frozen pretrained reference to obtain a stable reweighting signal unaffected by fine-tuning. This signal estimates prior support: the extent to which each target token is supported by the pretrained distribution. Across multiple existing token-reweighting rules, replacing the reweighting signal from the online model to pretrained model consistently improves performance. We introduce two instantiations: PriFT-prob uses pretrained token probability, while PriFT-mass selects tokens by cumulative probability mass under the pretrained distribution. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning, code generation, and medical question answering show that PriFT achieves state-of-the-art results among SFT baselines and provides a better initialization for subsequent RL training.
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work

light_analysis.overview: 提出PriFT方法，通过冻结预训练模型提供稳定的token权重信号，指导监督微调，避免自强化动力学，提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督微调（SFT）在适应下游任务时存在off-policy问题，拟合与模型预训练分布不一致的token导致过拟合和泛化弱于强化学习。现有方法使用在线模型计算token权重，导致权重与优化轨迹纠缠，产生自强化动力学。需要一种稳定的重加权信号，不受微调影响。
light_analysis.method: PriFT从冻结的预训练模型导出token权重，作为先验支持信号，评估每个目标token受预训练分布支持的程度。提出两种实例化：PriFT-prob使用预训练token概率，PriFT-mass基于累积概率质量选择token。可应用于多种现有的token重加权规则，统一替换在线信号为预训练信号。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和医学问答等任务上，PriFT在所有SFT基线中达到最先进性能。具体实验表明，将在线重加权信号替换为预训练信号后，各重加权规则性能一致提升。此外，PriFT为后续强化学习提供了更好的初始化状态。
light_analysis.conclusion: PriFT有效解决了SFT中的自强化动力学问题，通过冻结预训练模型提供稳定权重，提升了泛化能力。方法简单且与多种重加权规则兼容，具有较强实用性。未来可探索将其扩展到其他微调场景或结合动态权重机制。

title: CapRL++: Unified Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Dense Image and Video Captioning
abstract: Image and video captioning are fundamental tasks that bridge the visual and linguistic domains, playing a critical role in pre-training Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Current state-of-the-art captioning models are typically trained with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), a paradigm that relies on expensive, non-scalable annotations and often causes models to memorize specific ground-truth answers, limiting their generality and ability to generate diverse, creative descriptions. To overcome these limitations, we propose applying Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to the open-ended task of multimodal captioning. We introduce Captioning Reinforcement Learning++ (CapRL++), a novel reference-free training framework that redefines caption quality through its utility: a high-quality caption should enable a non-visual language model to accurately answer questions about the corresponding visual content. CapRL++ employs a decoupled two-stage pipeline where an LVLM generates a caption, and the objective reward is derived from the accuracy of a separate, vision-free LLM answering Multiple-Choice Questions based solely on that caption. Evaluations on more than 20 image and video benchmarks show that CapRL++ improves dense caption quality and strengthens caption-based pretraining across tasks such as spatial and temporal understanding. Pretraining on scalable image and video caption datasets annotated by CapRL++ yields substantial downstream gains. Furthermore, within the Prism Framework for caption quality evaluation, compact models trained with CapRL++ achieve dense captioning performance comparable to substantially larger models such as Qwen2.5-VL-72B and Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B. These results validate that CapRL++ effectively trains models to produce generalizable, high-fidelity descriptions, establishing a robust foundation beyond the limitations of traditional SFT.
comment: 26 pages, 10 figures. Project page: https://github.com/InternLM/CapRL. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2509.22647

light_analysis.overview: 提出CapRL++框架，利用可验证奖励强化学习训练密集图像与视频字幕，以非视觉语言模型回答问题的准确性作为奖励信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前字幕生成模型依赖监督微调，需要昂贵标注且易过拟合至特定答案，限制生成多样性与泛化性。为解决此问题，提出基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法，提升字幕质量与通用性。
light_analysis.method: CapRL++采用解耦两阶段管道：LVLM生成字幕，然后由无视觉输入的LLM基于字幕回答多项选择题，以准确率作为奖励。通过强化学习优化字幕生成，无需人工标注，适用于密集图像与视频字幕。
light_analysis.result: 在20多个图像与视频基准上，CapRL++提升密集字幕质量，并在空间/时间理解等下游任务中增强基于字幕的预训练。紧凑模型达到Qwen2.5-VL-72B等大型模型的密集字幕性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: CapRL++有效训练模型生成可泛化、高保真描述，突破传统监督微调限制，为字幕生成任务建立新基础。未来可探索更复杂奖励设计与跨模态应用。

title: From Coarse to Fine: Managing Temporal Granularity in Spatio-Temporal Data for Fine-Grained Traffic Prediction
abstract: Efficient acquisition, storage, and utilization of traffic data are critical challenges in spatio-temporal data management. Most traffic data systems collect and store observations at fixed, coarse-grained temporal intervals to reduce storage and computation costs. However, such coarse-grained data severely limits downstream applications that require predictions at a finer temporal granularity. Collecting and maintaining fine-grained traffic data across all locations and time periods would impose a substantial burden on database storage and preprocessing pipelines. To address this temporal granularity mismatch, we formulate a novel problem: predicting fine-grained future traffic using coarse-grained sampled data. We propose the Spatial-Temporal Refinement Predictor (STRP), a granularity-aware framework for spatio-temporal data systems. STRP integrates two components: Tree Convolution for efficient and interpretable spatial dependency modeling, and Inverse Dilated Convolution for progressive temporal extrapolation. STRP supports two practical prediction settings: window-based and duration-based, to handle different forms of granularity mismatch. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that STRP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and efficiency. Our work offers a practical and interpretable approach to managing granularity mismatches in spatio-temporal traffic data systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STRP框架，从粗粒度时空数据实现细粒度交通预测，解决时间粒度不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交通数据系统为降低存储和计算成本，通常以固定粗粒度采集数据，但这限制了需要细粒度预测的下游应用。若全面采集细粒度数据会带来巨大的数据库存储和预处理负担。因此，需要一种方法利用粗粒度采样数据预测细粒度未来交通，填补时间粒度鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 提出时空细化预测器（STRP），包含两个核心组件：Tree Convolution实现高效可解释的空间依赖建模，Inverse Dilated Convolution实现渐进式时间外推。支持两种预测设置：窗口式和持续式，以处理不同形式的粒度不匹配。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准数据集上，STRP在准确性和效率方面显著优于当前最先进基线方法。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但实验证明了其优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: STRP为时空交通数据系统中的粒度不匹配问题提供了实用且可解释的解决方案。该工作具有学术价值，可改进粗粒度数据下的细粒度预测任务；实际应用价值在于减少数据存储和计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的时空依赖建模。

title: Real-time body pose non-verbal communication with a consistency-based reliability measure
abstract: Body movement communicates intent at distances and in conditions where neither the face, nor speech can be captured. We study the recognition of communicative intent from 2D body pose alone. We argue that body motion is a reliable signal especially in scenarios that require real time low-cost on-device person-to-robot communication in long distance environments, such as rescue missions. However, existing resources do not isolate this signal. Affective corpora combine body, face, voice and text, while skeleton action-recognition benchmarks label the action performed rather than the message conveyed. We release a dataset of real frames of full-body pose covering ten communicative intents and we compare it against other real (IPC) and synthetic (MotionLCM, VEO3.1, Kimodo) ones that span a range of difficulty. We target systems that can run on a robot's limited onboard hardware. We benchmark multiple models, from skeleton graph classifiers to joint motion-forecasting networks, and report performance metrics together with frame rate on an embedded GPU (NVIDIA Orin~Nano), since speed matters as much as accuracy in our scenario. Finally, we show that a model's own autoregressive self-consistency works as an unsupervised reliability signal. We give a short proof that bounds the probability that a self-consistent prediction is correct, show that this probability grows with the number of consistent steps, and identify the conditions under which a confident prediction can still be false, benchmarked against industry-standard metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从2D人体姿态识别非语言交流意图的方法，并引入基于自回归自洽性的无监督可靠性度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 身体运动在远距离或无法捕捉面部与语音时传递意图，对救援等场景中实时、低成本的机器人通信至关重要。现有情感语料库混杂身体、面部等信号，动作识别基准关注动作类型而非通信意图。因此，需要专注于通信意图的数据集和适合嵌入式设备的轻量级模型。
light_analysis.method: 发布包含十种通信意图的全身体态真实帧数据集，并与多种真实及合成数据集比较。针对机器人有限硬件，在嵌入式GPU上对比从骨架图分类器到联合运动预测网络的多类模型，报告性能与帧率。提出利用模型自回归自洽性作为无监督可靠性信号，并给出理论证明。
light_analysis.result: 在NVIDIA Orin Nano上评估多种模型，表明自洽性可靠性信号能有效识别预测正确性。理论证明自洽预测正确的概率随一致步数增大，并指出自信预测仍可能错误的条件。与行业标准指标对比验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献包括通信意图识别数据集、嵌入式硬件模型基准和基于自洽性的可靠性度量。适用于远距离机器人实时交互，潜在局限依赖2D姿态精度。未来可扩展至3D或融合语音/面部线索。

title: LexRubric: A Rubric-Guided Diagnostic Benchmark for Open-Ended Legal Tasks
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to real-world legal tasks, evaluating the reliability of their open-ended legal responses has become essential. These tasks require context-sensitive answers and allow little room for error, motivating fine-grained and diagnostic evaluation that can identify specific sources of response quality failures. We introduce LexRubric, a rubric-based benchmark for evaluating open-ended Chinese legal tasks. LexRubric contains 649 instances from legal consultation and judicial examination, which reflect both everyday legal needs and professional legal reasoning and cover 14 legal scenarios. It further includes 12,337 expert-written atomic scoring criteria organized under a unified six-dimensional framework, enabling accurate evaluation and diagnostic analysis across tasks and evaluation dimensions. To validate the reliability of the evaluation, we test multiple judge models and compare model-based judgments with human judgments. We further evaluate 18 recent general and legal-domain LLMs on LexRubric. Results show that different models exhibit distinct capability profiles, and that open-ended legal question remains challenging for current LLMs. Data is available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/LexRubric.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LexRubric，一个基于评分标准的细粒度诊断基准，用于评估开放式中文法律任务中LLM的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在法律任务中的应用日益广泛，但开放式法律回答需要上下文敏感且容错率极低，现有评估方法缺乏细粒度诊断能力，难以定位具体失败原因。因此，需要一种能精确识别模型在特定法律场景和维度上缺陷的评估工具，以推动模型可靠性提升。
light_analysis.method: LexRubric包含649个来自法律咨询和司法考试的实例，覆盖14个法律场景，并配有12337条专家编写的原子评分标准，组织在统一的六维框架下。通过多个判断模型（法官模型）与人工判断对比，验证了评估的可靠性，并测试了18个通用和法律领域的LLM。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，不同模型在不同维度上表现出显著的能力差异，开放式法律问题对当前LLM仍具挑战。LexRubric能有效区分模型在细粒度任务中的优劣，为诊断模型弱点提供具体依据，但摘要未给出精确的性能提升数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: LexRubric提供了一个可诊断、可泛化的评估框架，有助于研究者识别LLM在法律任务中的具体失败模式，指导模型改进。其开源数据支持后续研究，未来可扩展至更多法律场景和更高阶的推理任务。

title: Distilling Safe LLM Systems via Soft Prompts for On Device Settings
abstract: Deploying safe large language models (LLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices presents a critical challenge: while dual-model systems combining LLMs with guard models provide effective safety guarantees, their substantial memory and computational demands make them prohibitively expensive for on-device deployment. This paper presents a comprehensive study of parameter-efficient safety alignment methods for resource-constrained settings. Through systematic evaluation across multiple LLM architectures, training objectives, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches, we identify that soft prompts combined with distillation-based training consistently outperform alternative methods. We introduce distillation frameworks based on total variation and KL divergence that effectively transfer safety behaviors from guard models into learned soft prompts. Our evaluations on various benchmarks demonstrate that this combination achieves superior safety-usefulness trade-offs compared to LoRA adapters, steering vectors, and direct optimization methods, while requiring minimal additional memory and compute at inference time. These findings establish soft prompt distillation as the preferred approach for safety alignment in on-device LLM deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过软提示蒸馏实现资源受限设备上LLM安全对齐的参数高效方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上部署安全大语言模型面临挑战：双模型系统（LLM+守卫模型）提供安全保障但内存和计算需求大，现有方法如LoRA适配器、引导向量等效果不佳或开销高，亟需参数高效的安全对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 系统评估多种LLM架构、训练目标和参数高效微调方法，发现软提示结合蒸馏训练优于其他方法。提出基于总变差和KL散度的蒸馏框架，将守卫模型的安全行为转移到学习到的软提示中，实现轻量级安全对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，该方法在安全性-有用性权衡上优于LoRA适配器、引导向量和直接优化方法，推理时仅需极少的额外内存和计算，显著降低部署成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 软提示蒸馏被确立为设备端LLM部署安全对齐的首选方法，兼顾安全性和效率，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏技术以进一步提升性能。

title: An Opticalmechanics Framework for Dynamic Estimation of Multibody Systems
abstract: Conventional dynamics analysis of the human body is often constrained by the need for contact force and torque sensors and controlled laboratory environments. To address this issue, this study proposes an opticalmechanics kinematic-dynamic integrated estimation framework for multibody systems. Specifically, a constrained multibody model is established to describe the system dynamics, while image-measured kinematic quantities are used as non contact inputs for dynamic estimation. The unknown joint torque is then identified through a genetic-algorithm based optimization by minimizing the discrepancy between model-predicted and image-measured kinematic quan tities. Experimental validation on an air-bearing platform showed that the wrist joint torque estimated from image data achieved a mean absolute error of 0.46 Nm compared with sensor measurements. In the forward prediction test, the model-predicted angular velocity achieved a mean absolute error of 0.006 rad/s relative to the image-measured results. This study demonstrates the potential of combining image measurement and mechanical modeling for non-contact dynamic estimation in scenarios where direct force and torque measurement is difficult.

light_analysis.overview: 提出光学力学运动-动力学集成框架，基于图像测量和遗传算法优化实现多体系统无接触动力学估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统人体动力学分析依赖接触力传感器和受控实验室环境，成本高且应用受限。现有方法难以在无接触条件下准确估计关节力矩和运动状态，尤其在真实场景中直接测量困难。因此，需要一种非接触的动态估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 建立约束多体模型描述系统动力学，将图像测量的运动学量作为非接触输入。通过遗传算法优化，最小化模型预测与图像测量运动学量之间的差异，从而识别未知关节力矩。实验在气浮平台上进行，使用图像数据估计腕关节力矩。
light_analysis.result: 腕关节力矩估计与传感器测量相比，平均绝对误差为0.46 Nm。前向预测中，模型预测角速度与图像测量结果的均方误差为0.006 rad/s。验证了方法的准确性和无接触动态估计的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架成功结合图像测量与力学建模，实现了无接触动态估计，适用于直接力/力矩测量困难的场景。具有在人体运动分析、机器人等领域的应用潜力。未来可扩展至更多自由度系统或实时应用。

title: Reasoning Arena: Trace Tournaments When Verifiable Rewards Fall Short
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a leading paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models through outcome-based supervision. However, verifiable rewards frequently become uninformative at the group level: when all sampled traces of a given prompt receive identical rewards, group-relative advantage estimation provides no gradient signal, even though the traces may differ substantially in reasoning quality. We propose Reasoning Arena, an adaptive training framework that routes such non-diverse reward groups to a judge system instead of discarding them. Beyond examining the final answer, Reasoning Arena constructs trace tournaments, where reasoning traces are compared head-to-head to expose finer-grained preferences within the group, converting reasoning quality into rich relative reward signals. To make reward estimation efficient, rather than exhaustively comparing every pair, each new trace is evaluated against a small, dynamically updated pool of previously generated traces as anchors to efficiently establish a relative ranking. We then fit a Bradley-Terry model on the incomplete comparison graph, enabling scalable RL integration without quadratic pairwise comparisons. Empirical results demonstrate that Reasoning Arena consistently outperforms the RLVR baseline by 7.6% on average in competition mathematics and coding benchmarks. By converting otherwise wasted zero-advantage samples into useful gradient updates, our method accelerates training by 27% to 41%, saving nearly 50% of generation compute, and substantially improves overall reasoning performance.
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables (17 pages including references and appendices)

light_analysis.overview: 针对可验证奖励在组级别无信息时梯度缺失的问题，提出Reasoning Arena，通过trace锦标赛和Bradley-Terry模型生成细粒度相对奖励，提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR通过结果监督提升LLM推理，但当同一提示的所有采样trace获得相同奖励时，组相对优势估计无梯度信号，即使推理质量差异显著。现有方法丢弃这些样本，造成浪费。需要一种方法从非多样性奖励组中提取有效信号，以利用零优势样本改进推理性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Reasoning Arena框架，将非多样性奖励组路由至裁判系统。构建trace锦标赛，对推理轨迹进行成对比对，获取细粒度偏好。为避免二次比较，使用动态更新的锚点池，每个新trace仅与少量锚点比较。基于不完全比较图拟合Bradley-Terry模型，将偏好转化为相对奖励，并集成到RL训练中。
light_analysis.result: 在竞赛数学和编程基准上，Reasoning Arena平均比RLVR基线提升7.6%。训练加速27%-41%，生成计算节省近50%，推理性能显著提升。通过转化零优势样本为梯度更新，有效利用原本无用的数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本方法通过将无信息奖励组转化为有用梯度，显著提升LLM推理能力，同时加速训练、节省计算资源。具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的比较策略或扩展到其他场景。

title: Echo-DM: Ultrasound Marker Removal via Conditional Latent Diffusion and Region-Aware Fusion
abstract: Clinical ultrasound images often contain artificial markers, such as measurement calipers and text, to assist diagnostic interpretation and comparison. However, these markers can introduce shortcut bias in downstream automated analysis, encouraging deep learning models to rely on marker-related cues rather than clinically meaningful anatomy. Existing marker removal methods are either mask-dependent and vulnerable to error propagation, or mask-free deterministic restorers that may over-smooth ultrasound texture and perturb unaffected background regions. To address these challenges, we present Echo-DM, a framework for ultrasound marker removal via conditional latent diffusion and region-aware fusion. Echo-DM follows a common encoder-diffusion-decoder pipeline, where a DiT-based conditional latent diffusion network performs global restoration and a region-aware fusion module enforces preservation-aware image-space refinement under end-to-end mask-free inference. Building on this fixed core design, we further instantiate Echo-DM-V and Echo-DM-R with VAE-based and RAE-based latent modules, respectively, which demonstrates that the Echo-DM architecture is compatible with diverse latent-module instantiations. Extensive experiments on Echo-PAIR, a large-scale paired clinical ultrasound dataset, demonstrate superior marker removal and strong anatomical fidelity compared with representative two-stage baselines, while providing favorable quality--efficiency trade-offs across deployment settings. Data, code and models will be released at https://github.com/MiliLab/Echo-DM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Echo-DM框架，结合条件潜扩散与区域感知融合，实现超声图像人工标记的无掩码去除，兼顾纹理保真与背景保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床超声图像常含测量卡尺、文本等人工标记，这些标记会引入捷径偏差，导致深度学习模型依赖标记而非临床解剖特征。现有去除方法要么依赖掩码并易受误差传播影响，要么是无掩码确定性恢复但可能过度平滑超声纹理或扰动未受影响区域。因此需要一种无掩码、高保真的标记去除方法。
light_analysis.method: Echo-DM采用编码器-扩散-解码器流水线：基于DiT的条件潜扩散网络进行全局修复，区域感知融合模块在端到端无掩码推理下实现保真感知的图像空间精炼。核心架构固定，但可实例化为Echo-DM-V（VAE潜模块）和Echo-DM-R（RAE潜模块），展示与不同潜模块的兼容性。通过Echo-PAIR大规模配对临床超声数据集训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Echo-PAIR数据集上，与代表性两阶段基线方法相比，Echo-DM在标记去除和结构保真度上表现更优，同时在不同部署设置下提供良好的质量与效率权衡。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但表明优于现有方法。数据、代码和模型将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Echo-DM框架有效解决了超声图像人工标记去除问题，通过条件潜扩散与区域感知融合实现无掩码、高保真修复。该方法兼容不同潜模块，具有灵活性和实用性。未来可进一步探索在其他医学影像模态中的应用，或结合更高效的扩散模型。

title: Scaling Neural Network Verification with Tensor Parallelism and Fully Sharded Data Parallelism
abstract: Formal neural network verification -- proving that a network satisfies safety properties for \emph{all} inputs in a specified domain -- is bounded in practice by GPU memory: standard implementations of bound-propagation algorithms (IBP, CROWN, $α$-CROWN) require weight and relaxation-coefficient matrices to reside entirely on one accelerator. We adapt two parallelism techniques originally developed for large-scale model training to the \texttt{auto\_LiRPA}\,/\,$α,β$-CROWN verification framework. \textbf{Tensor Parallelism (TP)} shards both weight and $A$-matrices across GPUs, achieving ${\approx}2\times$ peak-memory reduction at $P{=}2$; soundness is confirmed on VNN-COMP 2022 MNIST-FC benchmarks, though bound tightness degrades with the number of sharded zones due to forced IBP substitution for intermediate bounds inside sharded zones. \textbf{Fully Sharded Data Parallelism (FSDP)} shards only weight matrices with a per-layer \texttt{AllGather}, producing bounds that are \emph{bitwise identical} to the single-GPU baseline: baseline memory drops by 80--90\%, peak memory by 34--39\% on wide MLPs. FSDP integrates cleanly with complete verification ($β$-CROWN + Branch-and-Bound) and with convolutional layers (\texttt{BoundConv}); a complete \emph{unsat} result is obtained for CIFAR-100 ResNet-large (VNN-COMP 2024) under FSDP. Across all experiments the memory bottleneck in $α$-CROWN+BaB mode proves to be per-neuron alpha tensors, not weight matrices, pointing to the key direction for future work.

light_analysis.overview: 将张量并行和全分片数据并行技术应用于神经网络形式验证框架，有效缓解GPU内存瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 形式神经网络验证受限于GPU内存，标准边界传播算法要求权重和松弛系数矩阵完全驻留于单个加速器，难以处理大规模网络。现有方法缺乏有效并行策略，导致验证任务无法扩展。
light_analysis.method: 在auto_LiRPA/α,β-CROWN框架中集成张量并行（TP）和全分片数据并行（FSDP）。TP分片权重和A矩阵，P=2时峰值内存减半，但边界紧度下降；FSDP仅分片权重矩阵，逐层AllGather，边界与单GPU比特一致，内存降低80-90%，峰值降34-39%。FSDP兼容完全验证和卷积层。
light_analysis.result: TP在VNN-COMP 2022 MNIST-FC基准上验证正确性；FSDP在宽MLP上内存显著改善，且对CIFAR-100 ResNet-large获得完全unsat结果。实验发现内存瓶颈实为每神经元alpha张量，而非权重矩阵。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功缓解验证内存瓶颈，FSDP提供无损边界精度，使大规模验证可行。揭示了alpha张量作为关键优化方向，为未来扩展验证规模奠定基础。

title: Precision Is Not Faithfulness: Coverage-Aware Evaluation of Grounded Generation with a Complete Oracle
abstract: Reference-free faithfulness metrics verify each atomic claim a model makes against ground truth, and are increasingly used to evaluate grounded generation. We show they share a blind spot: they measure only precision -- are the stated claims supported? -- and therefore reward abstention, since a model can score near-perfect faithfulness by saying almost nothing. We make this measurable using Formula 1 telemetry, a domain where strategic ground truth is derived deterministically and, crucially, completely: for each decision we know the full set of facts that mattered. This completeness -- absent in open-domain faithfulness benchmarks -- lets us measure recall (coverage of the relevant facts) exactly, alongside precision. On a multilingual (EN/ES/PT) benchmark of 7,253 decision instances spanning 150 races, the most precise frontier model covers under half of the relevant facts and ranks last by F1, so requiring coverage reorders the systems; the same effect reappears in a second complete-oracle domain (NOAA weather forecasts). A prompt ablation shows the low coverage is not an under-prompting artifact: explicitly asking models to be thorough does not close the gap. We pair faithfulness with coverage into a single score, validate the metric (controlled perturbation; agreement across a model-free regex extractor and a cross-family LLM extractor, system-level Spearman 1.0), and give a verifier-guided generation method that improves precision and recall without references. We release the benchmark, structured annotations, metric, baselines, and an interactive demo.
comment: 8 pages, multilingual (EN/ES/PT). A reference-free faithfulness metric adding recall (coverage) against a complete structured oracle: precision-only rewards abstention; requiring coverage reorders models. Code: https://github.com/vectrayx/precision-is-not-faithfulness Demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/jsantillana/faithful-strategy-engineer-f1

light_analysis.overview: 提出覆盖感知的忠实性评估指标，揭示仅用精确率评估的盲区，并引入完整基准实现召回率测量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无参考忠实性指标仅测量精确率（判断生成内容是否被支持），导致模型可通过少说或多说无关内容获得高分数。这种评估方式忽略了召回率（覆盖相关事实的程度），尤其在需要完整覆盖决策相关事实的领域（如F1赛事策略分析、天气预报）中，缺少完整基准来同时评估精确率和召回率。论文以F1赛事为测试域，其决策事实可确定性、完整地从规则中推导，从而能精确测量召回率，揭示当前评估方法的根本缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了多语言（EN/ES/PT）F1赛事基准，包含7253个决策实例和150场比赛，并利用确定性规则提取完整事实集合。提出一个组合指标，同时衡量精确率（声明的支持）和召回率（事实的覆盖），并通过受控扰动和跨族提取器（规则正则与LLM）验证其有效性（系统级Spearman 1.0）。此外，设计了一种验证器引导的生成方法，无需参考即可同时改进精确率和召回率。
light_analysis.result: 在F1基准上，最精确的前沿模型仅覆盖不到一半的相关事实，按F1排序时排名垫底，表明仅用精确率会错误排序系统。该效应在另一个完整基准域（NOAA天气预报）中复现。提示消融实验显示，明确要求模型全面回答并未弥补覆盖缺口，证明低覆盖非提示不足所致。指标验证中，受控扰动和跨族提取器均表现良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次揭示了无参考忠实性指标仅测精确率、忽略召回率的根本盲区，并通过完整基准证明了覆盖感知评估的必要性。提出的组合指标和验证器引导生成方法为可靠评估和提升接地生成质量提供了新工具。基准、标注、指标和演示已开源，可用于进一步研究，如扩展至开放域完整基准的构建。

title: Capability-Aligned Hierarchical Learning for Tool-Augmented LLMs
abstract: Tool learning enables LLMs to invoke external tools to accomplish tasks. Prior studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of a hierarchical structure: a high-level policy handles global planning and decomposes tasks into manageable sub-tasks, and a low-level policy focuses on invoking tools to solve these sub-tasks. However, these works typically optimize the high-level and low-level policies separately, leading to planner-executor misalignment and limiting LLM performance on tool-use tasks. In this paper, we propose a method called Capability-Aligned Hierarchical Learning (CAHL), which leverages RLVR to jointly optimize both policies, enabling better alignment between the high-level planner and the low-level executor. Experiments on constrained tool-use benchmarks (API-Bank and BFCL) and an open-ended environment (Bamboogle) demonstrate the effectiveness of CAHL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAHL方法，通过强化学习联合优化高层规划与低层执行策略，解决工具增强LLM中的规划-执行对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 工具学习使LLM能调用外部工具完成任务。现有分层方法分别优化高层规划与低层执行策略，导致规划器与执行器不对齐，限制了工具使用性能。因此需要一种联合优化方法以实现两者更好对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出能力对齐分层学习(CAHL)，利用强化学习与虚拟奖励(RLVR)联合优化高层和低层策略。高层负责全局规划与任务分解，低层负责工具调用。通过联合优化实现规划器与执行器的能力对齐，提升工具使用效果。
light_analysis.result: 在受限工具基准(API-Bank, BFCL)和开放环境(Bamboogle)上实验，CAHL显著优于分开优化的基线方法，证明了联合优化策略的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAHL通过联合优化解决了分层工具学习中的规划-执行对齐问题，提升了LLM的工具使用能力。该方法具有通用性，可推广至更多工具增强场景，未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计或任务分解策略。

title: PhysScene: A Scene Graph Dataset for Scientific Visual Reasoning in Physics Experiments
abstract: Scene Graphs (SGs) provide structured representations of visual scenes by modeling objects and their pairwise relationships. Despite recent progress, existing datasets primarily focus on generic natural contexts, leaving domain-specific and function-oriented scenes largely underexplored. This limitation restricts the evaluation of relational reasoning in scientific experimental scenes, thereby hindering the development of intelligent monitoring, analysis, and related applications in such scenes. To address this gap, we introduce PhysScene, the first SG dataset tailored to physics experiments. PhysScene encompasses specialized instruments, structured experimental setups, and functional relations intrinsic to experimental environments, enabling reasoning that extends beyond spatial co-occurrence to logical dependencies. Rather than pursuing large data scale, PhysScene focuses on strong semantic constraints and high relation density in experimental scenes, posing new challenges for existing scene parsing algorithms while offering opportunities for further improvements. Extensive analyses and experiments show that PhysScene complements existing benchmarks and establishes a valuable testbed for advancing scientific visual reasoning. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/ZMH-SDUST/PhysScene.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向物理实验的场景图数据集PhysScene，支持科学视觉推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有场景图数据集主要关注通用自然场景，忽略了领域特定和功能导向的场景，特别是科学实验场景。这限制了对科学实验场景中关系推理的评估，阻碍了智能监控和分析等应用的发展。因此，需要专门针对物理实验场景的数据集来推动相关研究。
light_analysis.method: PhysScene数据集专门针对物理实验场景，包含专业仪器、结构化实验装置和功能关系，强调强语义约束和高关系密度。数据集规模不大，但注重实验场景中逻辑依赖关系而非空间共现。通过场景图形式建模对象及其关系，为现有场景解析算法提出新挑战。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PhysScene补充了现有基准，为推进科学视觉推理建立了有价值的测试平台。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但指出该数据集对现有算法提出了新挑战，并提供了改进机会。数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysScene是首个专注于物理实验的场景图数据集，填补了领域空白，支持科学视觉推理研究。其强语义约束和高关系密度特性使其成为评估和提升关系推理能力的重要工具。未来可用于智能实验监控和分析等应用，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: RT-SDGOD: Real-Time Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection
abstract: In real-world deployment under strict real-time constraints, weather and imaging variations induce significant distribution shifts, severely degrading detectors. Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection aims to mitigate this issue, yet existing methods rarely investigate-at the level of problem formulation-the generalization capability of real-time detectors under such constrained inference budgets. To this end, we introduce Real-Time Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection (RT-SDGOD), which focuses on how real-time detectors can achieve cross-domain generalization under zero extra inference overhead by relying solely on training-time representation learning. We observe that, under domain shift, DETR-based real-time detectors mainly degrade through increased missed detections, rooted in limited and unstable object-level discriminative evidence. Based on this, we propose RT-SDGDet, a multi-evidence collaborative modeling framework for RT-SDGOD. The core idea is to enable multiple queries of the same object to collaboratively cover more sufficient discriminative evidence while maintaining the stability of such evidence modeling across views. Specifically, we use one-to-many (O2M) supervision to construct stable object-specific query groups, and further design Discriminative Evidence Diversity Learning (DEDL) and Dual-view Evidence Consistency Learning (DvECL) to expand object-level evidence coverage and improve evidence stability under appearance perturbations, respectively. Since all components are introduced only during training, our method incurs no extra inference overhead. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves better generalization performance than existing approaches across multiple unseen target domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RT-SDGOD任务和RT-SDGDet方法，通过训练时的多证据协同建模实现实时检测器的零额外推理开销的跨域泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际部署中实时目标检测器在天气和成像变化等域漂移下性能严重下降，现有单域广义目标检测方法未针对实时检测器在严格推理预算下的泛化能力进行问题层面研究。DETR-based实时检测器在域漂移下主要因目标级判别证据有限且不稳定导致漏检增加，亟需一种无需额外推理开销的泛化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RT-SDGDet多证据协同建模框架，核心在于使同一目标的多个查询协作覆盖更充分的判别证据并保持稳定性。采用一对多(O2M)监督构建稳定的目标特定查询组，设计判别证据多样性学习(DEDL)扩展证据覆盖，以及双视图证据一致性学习(DvECL)提升外观扰动下的证据稳定性。所有组件仅训练时引入，推理零额外开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个未见目标域上的大量实验表明，所提方法实现了比现有方法更好的泛化性能。具体性能指标需参考原文，但摘要指出在多个域上超越现有方法，且无额外推理开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在问题层面定义了实时单域广义目标检测(RT-SDGOD)，并提出了有效的RT-SDGDet框架，通过训练时多证据协同建模显著提升了实时检测器的跨域泛化能力，同时保持推理效率。未来可探索更复杂的证据协作策略或应用至其他实时视觉任务。

title: Is Text All You Need? Text as a Universal Information Bottleneck for Speech LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) provide a powerful reasoning backbone for speech understanding, but integrating continuous acoustic signals into a frozen LLM remains challenging. Existing speech-to-LLM interfaces typically operate at two extremes: either enforcing near-discrete token alignment, which benefits transcription but loses paralinguistic information, or learning unconstrained continuous representations, which can drift away from the LLM's input space and degrade autoregressive decoding. In this work, we propose Convex Gate (C-Gate), a speech-to-LLM bridge that constrains all speech representations to lie within the LLM's input embedding manifold with an architectural convex-hull constraint. Concretely, each frame is represented as a convex combination of token embeddings, ensuring compatibility with the pretrained LLM while preserving continuous expressivity. Across automatic speech recognition (ASR) and emotion recognition, C-Gate achieves strong joint performance, improving LibriSpeech WER by up to 48.7% relative while matching or exceeding single-task emotion accuracy. Beyond performance, our analysis reveals a key insight: information is not carried by discrete token identities, but by time-resolved trajectories in the embedding space. Causal interventions confirm that both the trajectory structure and alignment to the pretrained embedding manifold are critical for performance. These results suggest that geometry, rather than token discreteness, is the fundamental design factor in speech-to-LLM interfaces, and provide a controlled regime for studying multimodal integration in frozen LLMs. We release the checkpoint, per-sample outputs, mechanism dumps, and intervention suite for replication.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Convex Gate（C-Gate）作为语音到冻结大语言模型的桥梁，通过凸包约束确保语音表示位于LLM输入嵌入流形内，实现连续表达与离散兼容性的统一，在ASR和情感识别任务中取得显著提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 将连续声学信号集成到冻结的大语言模型中面临挑战：现有接口要么强制近离散令牌对齐，损失副语言信息；要么学习无约束连续表示，导致偏离LLM输入空间，降低自回归解码性能。因此需要一种既能保持连续表达力又能确保与预训练LLM兼容的桥接方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Convex Gate（C-Gate），以架构凸包约束将每个语音帧表示为LLM输入令牌嵌入的凸组合，确保所有表示位于LLM的嵌入流形内。该方法保留了连续表达力，同时与预训练LLM兼容，并在ASR和情感识别任务上联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在LibriSpeech上，C-Gate将词错误率相对降低最多48.7%，同时在情感识别任务上达到或超过单任务准确率。分析表明信息由嵌入空间中的时间分辨轨迹承载，而非离散令牌身份。因果干预验证了轨迹结构和与预训练嵌入流形的对齐对性能至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了几何结构而非令牌离散性是语音到LLM接口的根本设计因素，为在多模态冻结LLM中的研究提供了可控范式。C-Gate实现了语音理解与情感识别的联合改进，并开源了检查点、样本输出及干预工具，便于复现与进一步研究。

title: Experience Makes Skillful: Enabling Generalizable Medical Agent Reasoning via Self-Evolving Skill Memory
abstract: Medical agent systems are increasingly expected to support interactive clinical decision making rather than only static question answering. In such settings, effective agents must reuse prior experience across evolving cases, yet existing memory mechanisms often retain raw historical traces that are redundant, noisy, and difficult to govern. More importantly, they rarely distinguish which memories are truly useful for future reasoning. This limits their ability to accumulate compact and reliable experience for long-horizon clinical reasoning. To close this gap, we propose SkeMex, a post-deployment self-evolution framework that improves medical agents through a skill-based memory without updating model weights. SkeMex distills informative interaction trajectories into structured skills that encode reusable procedural knowledge, and organizes them into a multi-branch repository spanning general, task-specific, and action-level experience. To determine which memories should be reused and retained, SkeMex estimates context-dependent utility from environment feedback and uses it to guide value-aware retrieval and repository governance. A closed-loop ``Read--Write--Assess--Govern" lifecycle further supports continual evolution by writing new skills, updating utilities, promoting useful memories, and removing harmful entries. Experiments across diverse clinical tasks show that SkeMex consistently outperforms representative memory-based agents in both offline and online settings. It also generalizes across model backbones and supports transferable skill memory. All data and code will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkeMex框架，通过自进化技能记忆使医疗智能体实现可泛化的交互式临床推理，无需更新模型权重。
