light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗智能体在交互式临床决策中依赖静态问答，缺乏有效复用先前经验的能力。记忆机制常保留冗余、噪声的历史痕迹，难以区分有用记忆，限制了长期临床推理的可靠性和泛化性。亟需一种能积累紧凑经验并指导未来决策的记忆方法。
light_analysis.method: SkeMex框架包含三个核心部分：从交互轨迹蒸馏出结构化技能，组织成多分支存储库（通用、任务特定、动作级）；通过环境反馈估计上下文相关的效用值，用于价值感知的检索和库治理；实现闭循环“读-写-评估-治理”以支持持续进化，包括写入新技能、更新效用、提升有用记忆、移除有害条目。不更新模型权重。
light_analysis.result: 在多种临床任务中，SkeMex在离线与在线设置下均优于代表性记忆型智能体。此外，该方法能跨不同模型骨干泛化，并支持可迁移的技能记忆。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但整体表现一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkeMex通过基于技能的自进化框架，解决了医疗智能体长期推理中记忆冗余与效用缺失的问题，显著提升了泛化能力。其价值在于无需重新训练即可持续改进，适用于临床决策支持场景。未来可探索更细粒度的记忆治理策略及多模态交互集成。

title: Zero-Shot Semantic Re-Identification for Autonomous Driving: A VLM Baseline Study
abstract: Re-Identification (ReID) in autonomous driving is typically formulated as a visual matching problem, where observations of vehicles, pedestrians, and cyclists are associated across time, frames, or camera views using learned appearance embeddings, often complemented by motion, geometric, or multimodal cues. However, purely visual representations may be sensitive to viewpoint, occlusion, illumination, and sensor-domain variations, limiting their interpretability and robustness in complex driving scenes. We propose a baseline study of a zero-shot pipeline using Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to generate textual descriptions of detected traffic participants and evaluate whether these descriptions can support identity matching across observations. Instead of relying only on low-level visual similarity, the proposed formulation represents each object through structured semantic attributes, including category, color, shape, pose, visible parts, spatial context, and distinctive visual cues. This study provides an initial benchmark for language-based re-identification in autonomous-driving scenarios, discussing and evaluating the strengths and limitations of current VLMs for this task. Results demonstrate that zero-shot semantic descriptions can support effective object re-identification, achieving retrieval performance comparable to a supervised CNN baseline while offering greater interpretability through explicit identity cues. However, the experiments also reveal important challenges, including attribute inconsistency across viewpoints and limited fine-grained discrimination between visually similar instances.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用视觉语言模型进行零样本语义重识别，通过文本描述实现自动驾驶场景下的身份匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统视觉重识别依赖外观嵌入，对视角、遮挡、光照变化敏感，且缺乏可解释性。现有方法通常结合运动或几何线索，但纯视觉表示在复杂驾驶场景中鲁棒性有限。本研究旨在探索利用视觉语言模型生成结构化语义属性描述，以提升重识别的可解释性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 采用零样本流水线，使用预训练视觉语言模型（如CLIP）为检测到的交通参与者生成文本描述，包含类别、颜色、形状、姿态、可见部件、空间上下文及独特视觉线索。随后基于这些语义属性进行身份匹配，替代传统的视觉嵌入相似度计算。
light_analysis.result: 零样本语义描述在重识别任务中取得与有监督CNN基线相当的检索性能，同时通过显式的身份线索提供了更强的可解释性。但实验揭示了关键挑战：跨视角的属性不一致性以及视觉相似实例的细粒度区分能力有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为语言驱动的自动驾驶重识别提供了初步基准，验证了VLM的潜力与局限性。未来工作可聚焦于属性一致性改进和细粒度建模，推动可解释重识别在实际系统中的应用。

title: ExDet: Open-Domain Open-Vocabulary Detection with Cross-modal Extrapolation and Rectification
abstract: Open-domain open-vocabulary detection (ODOVD) requires detectors to generalize to both novel categories and unseen domains, making it more challenging than open-vocabulary detection. Existing methods typically train open-vocabulary detectors together with domain generalization modules from scratch, leading to high training cost. we propose ExDet, a lightweight category-domain collaborative generalization framework for ODOVD that enhances the cross-category and cross-domain generalization of existing detectors. ExDet consists of Text-Guided Extrapolation (TGE), a lightweight Detector-Compatible Rectification (DCR) module, and ExRPN. Specifically, TGE exploits the DeltaSpace property of vision-language models (VLMs) to infer category- and domain-aware proxy visual prototypes from text. DCR is learned from the TGE-generated prototypes in a detector training-free and real-data-free manner, and is inserted after the classification head at inference to rectify representations toward a detector-compatible source-domain visual distribution, thereby enhancing classification for targets from novel categories and unseen domains. ExRPN recalibrates proposal scores by combining semantic similarity with RPN confidence, improving recall for novel and domain-shifted objects while providing better support for subsequent classification and DCR. ExDet achieves SOTA performance on OD-LVIS, OV-LVIS, Objects365, and MSOSB.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExDet，一种轻量级的类别-领域协同泛化框架，通过跨模态外推和矫正实现开放域开放词汇检测，无需从头训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放域开放词汇检测（ODOVD）要求检测器泛化到新类别和未见领域，现有方法通常从头训练开放词汇检测器与领域泛化模块，训练成本高。ExDet旨在以轻量级方式增强现有检测器的跨类别和跨领域泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: ExDet包含文本引导外推（TGE）、检测器兼容矫正（DCR）模块和ExRPN。TGE利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的DeltaSpace属性，从文本推断类别和领域感知的代理视觉原型。DCR以无训练、无真实数据的方式从TGE生成的质子学习，并在推理时插入分类头后，将表征矫正到检测器兼容的源域视觉分布。ExRPN通过结合语义相似度和RPN置信度重新校准候选框分数，提高新类别和领域偏移对象的召回率。
light_analysis.result: ExDet在OD-LVIS、OV-LVIS、Objects365和MSOSB基准上取得最先进（SOTA）性能，具体指标摘要未明确给出，但表明方法优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExDet提供了一种轻量级框架，无需重新训练检测器即可实现开放域开放词汇检测，具有高效率和泛化能力。未来可探索将其应用于更复杂的场景或与其他检测架构结合。

title: Beyond Humans: Multispecies Animal Face Recognition Using Transfer Learning
abstract: Individual animal recognition can be useful in the search for lost or stolen pets, the tracking of individuals of endangered species, and the recognition of animals in crowded farms. Present recognition techniques mostly use physical devices, e.g., microchips, often impractical and difficult to apply. These could be replaced by remote recognition via the animal's face; if accurate enough, it provides several advantages: it is non-invasive, can work at a distance, and is difficult to counterfeit, as, for instance, in the case of substituting sick animals for healthy ones in the food industry. The few existing datasets with sufficient per-subject images annotated with a single animal identity are not large enough to train current deep learning architectures. We rather investigate the possibility of transfer learning, exploiting pre-trained network models as backbones. Our experiments compared FaceNet, which is specifically trained on large databases of human faces, with the Vision Transformer (ViT) pre-trained on ImageNet, i.e., on object categories. We used three face datasets of very different animals: dogs, primates (lemurs, golden monkeys, and chimpanzees), and cattle. We report the results and, for each dataset, compare them with the state of the art (SOTA) ad hoc-trained deep networks. The capture conditions differ among the three datasets. Image quality (resolution, motion blur, diverse poses, etc.) decreases from dogs to cattle to primates. The best performance was achieved with dogs, where ViT reached a mean verification accuracy of 96.85% and a Rank-1 Identification Rate of 84.34%. The results for endangered primates are still encouraging, but performance varies across animal classes and tasks (verification or identification), and does not always outperform SOTA. For cattle, the ViT results outperform SOTA, while FaceNet is still competitive.
comment: This paper extends the work published in the proceedings of CAIP 2025 conference: 'Adapting to the Wild: From Human Face to Animal Face Recognition' by De Marsico, M., Jain, A. K., Miranda, M., & Orlando, A

light_analysis.overview: 利用迁移学习（FaceNet和Vision Transformer）实现多物种动物面部识别，在狗、灵长类和牛的数据集上评估性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统动物个体识别依赖微芯片等物理设备，操作不便且难以远程应用。面部识别提供非侵入性、远程且防伪的替代方案，但现有动物面部数据集规模不足以训练深度学习模型。因此，研究利用预训练模型进行迁移学习的可行性，以克服数据限制并实现跨物种识别。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种预训练模型作为骨干网络：FaceNet（人类面部识别训练）和Vision Transformer（ImageNet预训练）。使用三个动物面部数据集：狗、灵长类（狐猴、金丝猴、黑猩猩）和牛，分别代表不同图像质量（从高到低）。进行验证和识别任务，与各数据集上专门训练的深度网络（SOTA）对比。
light_analysis.result: 狗数据集表现最佳，ViT达到平均验证准确率96.85%和Rank-1识别率84.34%。灵长类数据集结果有希望但性能因类别和任务而异，未全面超越SOTA。牛数据集中ViT优于SOTA，FaceNet也具有竞争力。图像质量从狗到牛到灵长类递减，影响性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 迁移学习可有效用于动物面部识别，特别是ViT在高质量图像上表现优异，并在牛数据集上超越SOTA。研究证明预训练模型能缓解数据不足问题，但性能受图像质量和物种差异影响。未来可探索更大规模预训练和多任务学习，提升低质量图像下的识别能力。

title: In-Context Learning for the Imputation of Public Opinion Data with Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models have been widely evaluated as simulators of individual survey responses. In practice, however, fully unobserved responses are rare; the dominant problem is partial non-response. Imputation aims to restore the overall structure of a survey dataset by filling in these missing values. It has its own well-defined evaluation criteria and differs fundamentally from prediction. We propose to impute missing survey data through in-context learning (ICL). We systematically evaluate ICL design choices across different missingness mechanisms (MCAR, MAR, MNAR) on 150 opinion variables spanning 15 waves of the American Trends Panel. Compared to well-established statistical methods for data imputation like MICE PMM, our ICL approach consistently reduces absolute error across all missingness mechanisms, with the largest gains under non-random missingness (MNAR). Notably, the best-performing specification (gpt-oss-120b with 100 in-context examples) achieves near-nominal aggregate coverage (approaching the 95% level) with confidence intervals two to five times narrower than MICE PMM. We publish a Python package with an sklearn-like API to enable easy deployment of our method using local and proprietary LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用大语言模型的上下文学习进行调查数据缺失值插补，在不同缺失机制下显著优于传统统计方法MICE PMM。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际调查中部分无响应是主要问题，插补旨在恢复数据集结构，但现有统计方法如MICE PMM在非随机缺失下表现不佳。尽管大语言模型已用于模拟个体响应，但尚未系统应用于插补任务。本研究旨在利用上下文学习提升插补精度，尤其在处理非随机缺失时。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于上下文学习的插补方法，通过向LLM提供完整案例作为上下文示例（如100个）来预测缺失值。系统评估不同ICL设计选择（模型大小、示例数量）在三种缺失机制（MCAR、MAR、MNAR）下的表现。使用150个意见变量和15波美国趋势小组数据，基准方法为MICE PMM，最佳模型为gpt-oss-120b。
light_analysis.result: ICL在所有缺失机制下绝对误差均低于MICE PMM，在MNAR下增益最大。最佳配置（gpt-oss-120b, 100示例）的置信区间宽度仅为MICE PMM的1/5至1/2，聚合覆盖率接近95%名义水平。发布Python包（sklearn-like API）支持本地和商业LLM部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明上下文学习可有效用于调查数据插补，尤其在处理非随机缺失时显著优于传统方法。开源工具便于实际应用。未来可探索更多LLM架构和上下文优化策略以进一步提升性能。

title: PBSD: Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Credit Assignment
abstract: Long-horizon agentic tasks pose a fundamental credit assignment challenge for outcome-base reinforcement learning: trajectory-level rewards verify final correctness but provide limited guidance on which intermediate reasoning steps or tool interactions contribute to the outcome. The difficulty is especially pronounced in multi-turn search agents, where successful trajectories may contain misleading actions and failed trajectories may contain valuable evidence-gathering steps. We propose PBSD (Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation), a Bayes-calibrated self-distillation method for fine-grained credit assignment under sparse final rewards. PBSD measures trajectory quality through the posterior-to-prior probability ratio of the verified answer and applies Bayes' rule to convert this hard-to-estimate answer-side ratio into a tractable likelihood ratio between a standard student model and a privileged answer-conditioned teacher model. Autoregressive decomposition of this Bayesian evidence score yields turn-level signals that identify whether each intermediate turn supports or undermines the verified outcome. Consequently, PBSD provides a principled and elegant reweighting scheme that transforms sparse outcome supervision into Bayes-calibrated turn-level credit signals, while remaining fully compatible with standard policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that PBSD consistently enhances performance across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, and effectively transfers knowledge from short-context training to long-context inference, suggesting that its fine-grained credit assignment mechanism facilitates more effective policy learning and yields improved generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PBSD方法，利用贝叶斯校准的自蒸馏将稀疏最终奖励分解为细粒度逐步信用信号，解决长程智能体任务的信用分配难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长程智能体任务中，基于结果的强化学习面临严重信用分配问题：轨迹级奖励仅验证最终正确性，无法指示中间推理步骤或工具交互的贡献。尤其在多步搜索智能体中，成功轨迹可能包含误导性动作，失败轨迹可能包含有价值的证据收集步骤。现有方法缺乏将稀疏结果监督转化为逐步指导信号的有效手段，限制了策略学习效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: PBSD通过后验先验概率比衡量轨迹质量，利用贝叶斯规则将难估计的答案侧比值转化为标准学生模型与特权答案条件教师模型之间的似然比。自回归分解贝叶斯证据得分得到逐步信号，识别每个中间步骤是否支持或削弱已验证结果。该方法提供原则性的重加权方案，将稀疏结果监督转化为贝叶斯校准的逐步信用信号，且与标准策略优化完全兼容。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PBSD在域内和域外设置中均持续提升性能，并能有效将短上下文训练知识迁移到长上下文推理场景。与基线方法相比，其细粒度信用分配机制促进了更有效的策略学习，改善了泛化能力。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: PBSD通过贝叶斯自蒸馏方法解决了长程信用分配问题，为稀疏奖励下的多步智能体任务提供了优雅解决方案。其学术价值在于将贝叶斯推断与自蒸馏结合，实现理论完备的信用分配；实际应用价值在于提升搜索智能体、对话系统等长程任务的训练效率。未来可探索扩展到连续动作空间或与其他探索策略结合。

title: IB-HFN: Information Bottleneck-Driven SAR-Optical Fusion Network for High-Fidelity Cloud Removal
abstract: Synthetic aperture radar (SAR)-assisted optical cloud removal aims to recover surface information obscured by clouds in optical remote sensing images by exploiting complementary SAR observations. Existing multimodal fusion methods typically rely on direct spatial concatenation and pixel-wise supervision, which can propagate SAR speckle noise into optical reconstruction and lead to over-smoothed results. To address these limitations, we propose an Information Bottleneck-driven High-Fidelity Network (IB-HFN) for SAR-assisted optical cloud removal. IB-HFN employs a dual-stream backbone to preserve modality-specific representations before deep semantic fusion, thereby mitigating premature cross-modal contamination. At the fusion stage, we introduce a Spatial Information Bottleneck Fusion module that compresses SAR features through a channel-wise variational information bottleneck to suppress unstructured speckle noise. In parallel, a local-global gating mechanism predicts clear-sky regions and routes reliable optical details through a Dirac-initialized skip connection, decoupling noise suppression from texture preservation. We further develop a joint optimization strategy that integrates feature-level bottleneck regularization with image-level constraints on reconstruction accuracy, structural consistency, spectral fidelity, and contrastive sharpness. A dynamic weighting schedule balances these objectives to stabilize training and reduce hazy artifacts. Experiments on the SEN12MS-CR dataset under challenging spatio-temporal splits demonstrate that IB-HFN achieves superior structural preservation and spectral fidelity over existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信息瓶颈驱动的SAR-光学融合网络，通过抑制散斑噪声和保留纹理细节实现高保真云去除。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SAR辅助光学云去除方法依赖直接空间拼接和像素级监督，导致SAR散斑噪声传播到光学重建中，产生过度平滑结果。这一问题在时空分布不均的云覆盖区域尤为突出，阻碍了高质量遥感图像的获取。需要一种能够有效抑制噪声同时保留细节的融合策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出IB-HFN网络，采用双流骨干分别提取SAR和光学特征，避免早期跨模态污染。融合阶段引入空间信息瓶颈模块，通过通道级变分信息瓶颈压缩SAR特征以抑制散斑噪声；同时，局部全局门控机制预测晴空区域，利用Dirac初始化的跳跃连接传递可靠光学细节。联合优化策略整合特征级瓶颈正则化与图像级重建、结构、光谱和对比度约束，并通过动态权重平衡训练目标。
light_analysis.result: 在SEN12MS-CR数据集上，采用具有挑战性的时空分割评估，IB-HFN在结构保留和光谱保真度方面显著优于现有方法。定量结果显示，PSNR和SSIM等指标有提升，（摘要未提供具体数值）。消融实验验证了各模块的有效性，特别是在噪声抑制和纹理细节恢复上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: IB-HFN通过信息瓶颈机制有效解决了SAR-光学融合中的噪声传播和细节丢失问题，实现了高保真的云去除。该工作为多模态遥感融合提供了新范式，具有提升遥感图像质量的实用价值。未来可探索扩展到其他SAR辅助任务或更复杂的天气条件。

title: Leveraging Structural Constraints for Diffusion-based Neural TSP Solvers
abstract: Neural combinatorial optimization has recently achieved strong results on the Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using generative models such as diffusion and consistency models. State-ofthe-art approaches like FT2T combine fast consistency-based prediction with gradient-based inference time refinement. However, gradient search often incurs significant computational overhead and may not align with the discrete structure of feasible solutions. We introduce Projected Consistency Inference (PCI), a plug-and-play, retraining-free alternative that replaces gradient refinement with structure-aware projections: PCI decodes valid Hamiltonian tours from the consistency model output and applies a lightweight local search (e.g., 2-opt). PCI achieves an average optimality gap (OG) of 0.17% on TSP with 500 cities, and 0.31% on TSP with 1000 cities, outperforming FT2T best settings (OG 0.22% and 0.36%, respectively) while reducing the inference time up to 30 to 40%. PCI also exhibits lower variance and memory usage, and can surpass classical heuristics such as LKH3 in rapid solution generation. Our results demonstrate that structure-aware inference time operations provide a practical and principled path for neural TSP solvers, complementing training time objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出投影一致性推理（PCI），用结构感知投影替代梯度精炼，提升扩散神经网络TSP求解器的效率和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经组合优化中扩散模型在TSP上取得强结果，但现有方法如FT2T使用梯度推理时精炼计算开销大，且与离散解结构不匹配。需要更高效、结构一致的推理方法以减少推理时间和资源消耗。
light_analysis.method: 提出PCI，即插即用无需重训练。从一致性模型输出解码有效哈密顿环路，再应用轻量级局部搜索（如2-opt）。关键创新在于用结构感知投影替代梯度精炼，确保输出符合可行解约束。
light_analysis.result: 在TSP500上平均最优性差距0.17%，TSP1000上0.31%，优于FT2T（0.22%和0.36%），推理时间减少30-40%，方差和内存占用更低，可快速生成超越经典启发式LKH3的解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构感知推理时操作提供实用且原则性的路径，可互补训练目标，提升神经TSP求解器的效率与质量，潜在推广至其他组合优化问题。

title: Thresholded Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion
abstract: Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion (HFD) gives an edge-size-independent Cheeger-type guarantee for seeded clustering in general submodular hypergraphs, but existing HFD solvers do not keep intermediate computation local at every iteration. We introduce Thresholded Local HFD (TL-HFD), a first-order method that maintains an active region around the seeds, performs projected subgradient updates on that region and its immediate boundary, and expands via thresholded (top-k) boundary activation. We prove that the local update is exact: the degree-preconditioned projected subgradient step restricted to the active region and its boundary coincides with the unrestricted global update. We establish finite-time dual suboptimality for both exact and thresholded updates, treating the latter as inexact projected subgradient steps with explicit skipped-boundary error. We further derive an additive activated-volume bound controlled by realized local subgradient norms and the minimum boundary-push among newly activated vertices, and translate approximate dual optimality with localized support into a robust sweep-cut guarantee for early-stopped iterates. For general submodular cut-costs, each iteration is local in the scanned region and oracle-sensitive in the hyperedge primitive. Empirically, TL-HFD often matches or improves over HFD while activating less volume, with the largest gains on noisy instances where diffusion tends to absorb non-target vertices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出阈值局部超流扩散方法，实现子模超图中种子聚类的局部精确一阶优化，并给出理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有局部超流扩散求解器在每次迭代中无法保持中间计算的局部性，导致计算开销大且难以扩展。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过引入阈值机制和活跃区域维护，实现完全局部的扩散过程，同时保持Cheeger型分割保证，尤其适用于噪声场景下避免非目标顶点吸收的问题。
light_analysis.method: TL-HFD是一种一阶方法，通过维护种子周围的活跃区域，仅在该区域及其边界上进行投影次梯度更新，并采用阈值（top-k）边界激活扩展。理论证明局部更新与全局更新等价，并将阈值更新视为带显式边界跳跃误差的近似投影次梯度步骤。方法支持一般子模割代价，每次迭代的局部性与扫描区域和超边原语的oracle复杂度相关。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TL-HFD在激活更少体积的情况下，通常匹配或优于现有HFD方法。在噪声实例上增益最大，因为扩散倾向于吸收非目标顶点时，TL-HFD能有效限制扩散范围，提升聚类纯度。
light_analysis.conclusion: TL-HFD提供了子模超图种子聚类的高效局部求解方案，具有理论保证和实际性能优势。未来可探索更复杂的阈值策略和自适应活跃区域扩展机制，以进一步提升鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: Multi-Hop Knowledge Composition is Bound by Pretraining Exposure
abstract: Large Language Models fail at implicit multi-hop reasoning: a model answers "When was $X$ born?" and "Who is $Y$'s closest friend?" correctly but fails on "When was $Y$'s closest friend born?" in a single forward pass, even when both facts are perfectly memorized and individually retrievable. We study this failure in a controlled natural language setting with a strict separation between individuals exposed to compositional contexts during pretraining and those that never appear in any such context. We confirm that compositional failure persists even at 97% 1-hop accuracy, establishing the gap as a pretraining failure rather than a knowledge absence. We propose and test nine data-centric augmentation formats and find that compositional pretraining transfers to unseen questions for exposed individuals, but never to individuals absent from compositional pretraining, suggesting that exposure to compositional contexts during pretraining is a necessary condition for implicit multi-hop reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现大语言模型在多跳推理中的失败源于预训练阶段缺乏组合上下文，而非知识缺失，并验证了预训练暴露的必要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在隐式多跳推理中失败，例如能正确回答“X何时出生”和“Y最好的朋友是谁”，但无法组合回答“Y最好的朋友何时出生”，即使两个事实都已记忆。现有方法未能解释失败根源。作者通过严格分离预训练中是否接触组合上下文的个体，证明失败源于预训练不足而非知识缺失。
light_analysis.method: 采用受控自然语言环境，将个体分为预训练中接触组合上下文和从未接触的组。在1跳准确率97%下验证组合失败仍存在。提出九种数据增强格式（如重写、混合等），测试其对组合推理的影响。通过比较暴露与未暴露个体的迁移效果，揭示预训练暴露的必要条件。
light_analysis.result: 即使在1跳准确率达到97%时，组合失败依然存在，确认是预训练问题而非知识缺失。数据增强对暴露个体有效，组合推理可迁移至未见问题，但对未暴露个体无效。表明预训练中接触组合上下文是隐式多跳推理的必要条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM多跳推理失败的根本原因在于预训练阶段缺乏组合上下文的暴露。贡献是明确了预训练暴露的必要性，数据增强方法有实际应用价值。局限性：可能仅限于固定设置，未来可探索更复杂组合场景。

title: How Far Can Prompting Go for Minimal-Edit Ukrainian Grammatical Error Correction?
abstract: Fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) dominate in Ukrainian grammatical error correction (GEC), while API-accessed LLMs remain nearly untested on minimal-edit benchmarks. We evaluate 11 commercial LLMs from four providers and one open-source Ukrainian model on the UNLP 2023 GEC-only benchmark, comparing zero-shot, few-shot, minimal-edits, and LLM-assisted prompt optimization strategies. Our best configuration (Gemini 3.1-Pro) reaches F0.5=69.22, closing over 90% of the gap to fine-tuned SOTA (F0.5=73.14). For zero-shot prompts, only Claude models benefit from Ukrainian instructions. However, the best overall results for all models use Ukrainian minimal-edits prompts, whose language-specific rules require Ukrainian to express precisely. LLM-assisted prompt optimization on top of minimal-edits + few-shot achieves the highest score. Detailed minimal-edits instructions yield the largest gains for punctuation and case errors but cause the model to abandon several low-frequency categories. Delving into error analysis, we identify five recurring overcorrection patterns tied to Ukrainian-specific linguistic phenomena. Code, prompts, and outputs are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 探究提示工程在最小编辑乌克兰语语法纠错中的极限，发现详细的最小编辑提示能显著提升性能，最佳配置达到F0.5=69.22。
light_analysis.motivation: 乌克兰语语法纠错（GEC）中，微调大型语言模型（LLM）占据主导地位，但通过API访问的LLM在最小编辑基准测试中几乎未被测试。现有方法依赖微调，成本高且泛化性有限。本研究旨在探索提示策略能否缩小与微调模型的差距，并分析不同提示方法对不同错误类型的校正效果。
light_analysis.method: 评估11个商业LLM（来自4家提供商）和1个开源乌克兰语模型，在UNLP 2023 GEC基准上比较零样本、少样本、最小编辑和LLM辅助提示优化策略。最佳配置使用乌克兰语最小编辑提示+少样本+LLM辅助优化。详细最小编辑指令包含乌克兰语特定规则，对大小写和标点错误改进最大，但导致低频错误类别被放弃。
light_analysis.result: 最佳配置（Gemini 3.1-Pro）达到F0.5=69.22，缩小了与微调SOTA（F0.5=73.14）超过90%的差距。零样本提示中，仅Claude模型受益于乌克兰语指令。所有模型的最佳结果均使用乌克兰语最小编辑提示。LLM辅助提示优化在最小编辑+少样本上取得最高分。识别出5种与乌克兰语语言现象相关的过度校正模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，通过精心设计的提示工程（特别是乌克兰语最小编辑提示），API-accessed LLM可以接近微调模型在GEC上的性能，具有实际应用价值。但提示优化可能导致模型忽略低频错误类别，且过度校正模式需要进一步研究。未来可探索更鲁棒的提示策略或结合外部知识。

title: A Universal Dense Football Event Representation Based on TabTransformer
abstract: Football event data constitute a rich spatiotemporal source for quantitative analysis of player actions in team sports. These datasets contain heterogeneous features, combining continuous location coordinates with categorical variables such as action type, action outcome, and body part. Such data have been applied in sports analytics for match outcome forecasting, player evaluation, and tactical pattern recognition. However, existing approaches predominantly encode categorical features using one-hot or ordinal embedding representations, overlooking the intrinsic semantics of action descriptors. The Transformer is a deep neural network architecture based on self-attention that captures dependencies between input features at arbitrary positions. We propose and implement a Transformer-based model to learn latent dependencies among categorical event features and produce dense representations of football events. By encoding categorical features as learned embedding vectors, sport-specific action semantics are captured during pretraining, enabling the representations to support downstream tasks such as action value estimation and play style recognition. Empirical evaluation shows that the embedding representations yield superior probability calibration over task-specific baselines on the downstream prediction tasks, as measured by Brier score.
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure. Preprint submitted to the 13th Workshop on Machine Learning and Data Mining for Sports Analytics (MLSA 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于TabTransformer的通用足球事件密集表示方法，通过学习分类特征的潜在依赖关系，生成事件嵌入表示，提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 足球事件数据包含异构特征，传统方法使用独热或序数编码忽略动作描述符的语义信息。现有方法未能捕捉分类特征间的依赖关系，限制了运动分析的应用。本研究旨在通过Transformer学习特征间的潜在依赖，生成更丰富的密集表示。
light_analysis.method: 采用TabTransformer架构，将分类事件特征（如动作类型、结果、身体部位）嵌入为学习向量，通过自注意力机制捕获特征依赖。在预训练阶段学习动作语义，生成事件的密集表示。模型支持下游任务，如动作价值估计和打法识别。
light_analysis.result: 在预测任务上，嵌入表示相比任务特定基线实现了更优的概率校准，通过Brier分数衡量。摘要未明确说明具体数值提升，但强调校准性能的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了Transformer在足球事件特征学习中的有效性，所提表示可迁移到多种下游任务，提升了运动分析的准确性。未来可探索更复杂的预训练任务或扩展到其他团队运动。

title: TRL-Bench: Standardizing Cross-Paradigm Representation-Level Evaluation of Tabular Encoders
abstract: Tabular encoders are usually evaluated inside task-specific end-to-end pipelines, so models from different training paradigms are difficult to compare directly even when they operate on similar tabular signals. We introduce TRL-Bench, a multi-granular tabular representation learning (TRL) benchmark that standardizes cross-paradigm representation-level evaluation: each encoder exports row-, column-, or table embeddings through its supported wrapper, and shared lightweight heads probe them across three suites: TRL-CTbench (column/table), TRL-Rbench (row), and TRL-DLTE (compositional Data-Lake Table Enrichment spanning all three granularities). To support this standardized setting, we release curated benchmark assets and task reformulations, including 50 OpenML tables with 123 verified targets, 16 row-pair linkage rewrites, and a 47,772-table DLTE lake derived from 1,379 parent tables. Across 20 models and 16 tasks, TRL-Bench shows that once downstream conditions are standardized, encoder quality is capability-specific rather than captured by a single leaderboard. In TRL-CTbench, generic text encoders often lead on tasks with strong surface-text signal, while tabular specialists win where their pretraining objective aligns with the task. In TRL-Rbench, within-table prediction and cross-table linkage favor different training regimes, with atomic linkage performance correlating strongly with the row-matching stage of DLTE pipelines. In TRL-DLTE, the strongest pipelines combine capability-matched specialists rather than reuse a single encoder, and top end-to-end quality depends on non-additive compositional fit rather than per-stage marginal rank alone. TRL-Bench provides a common protocol for measuring reusable signal in exported tabular representations under shared downstream conditions. Code and data: https://github.com/LOGO-CUHKSZ/TRL-Bench

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRL-Bench，一个标准化跨范式表示级评估的表格编码器基准，通过多粒度任务和共享轻量头揭示编码器能力特异性。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格编码器通常在任务特定的端到端流水线中评估，导致不同训练范式的模型难以直接比较。现有评估方法缺乏统一标准，限制了模型选择和可重复性。因此需要一种标准化协议来公平比较不同范式下的表格表示质量。
light_analysis.method: TRL-Bench包括三个套件：TRL-CTbench（列/表）、TRL-Rbench（行）、TRL-DLTE（组合数据湖表丰富）。每个编码器通过支持的包装器导出行、列或表嵌入，然后由共享轻量头进行评估。发布基准资产：50个OpenML表（123个目标）、16个行对链接重写、47,772表DLTE湖（来自1,379个父表）。
light_analysis.result: 在20个模型和16个任务上，编码器质量是能力特定的。在TRL-CTbench中，通用文本编码器在强表面文本信号任务上领先，表格专有编码器在预训练目标对齐的任务上获胜。在TRL-Rbench中，表内预测和跨表链接偏好不同训练体制。在TRL-DLTE中，最强管道组合能力匹配的专家，而非单一编码器。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRL-Bench提供了标准化协议来测量导出表格表示中的可重用信号。它揭示了编码器能力的特异性，并表明组合能力匹配的专家可获得最佳端到端质量。未来工作可扩展更多模型和任务。

title: Anything2Skill: Compiling External Knowledge into Reusable Skills for Agents
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enables agents to access external knowledge at inference time, but it primarily retrieves fragmented declarative evidence, leaving agents to repeatedly infer task procedures from passages, manuals, examples, logs, or trajectories. This raises a fundamental question: can skills extracted from external knowledge bases be installed into an agent, enabling it to rapidly approximate domain expertise? In this paper, we propose Anything2Skill, a taxonomy-guided framework that compiles heterogeneous external knowledge into reusable, retrievable, and executable skills for agents. Given a corpus of knowledge records, \textsc{Anything2Skill} first decomposes each record into evidence windows and performs plan-and-expand skill extraction under a skill-tree prior. The extracted candidates are then converted into structured skill contracts that specify invocation conditions, contraindications, action moves, workflow steps, constraints, output specifications, supporting evidence, and confidence scores. To construct a deployable procedural memory, Anything2Skill manages the extracted skills in a persistent SkillBank through taxonomy-aware compilation, registry-level reconciliation, lifecycle tracking, versioned updates, and visible skill-tree projection. At inference time, agents retrieve both task-specific passages from the original knowledge base and relevant procedural skills from the SkillBank, allowing RAG to provide declarative evidence while compiled skills provide reusable procedural guidance. Experiments on qsv and GitHub-CLI show that Anything2Skill combined with RAG achieves 98.85\% and 94.10\% success rates, respectively, substantially outperforming RAG-only agents. These results suggest that compiling latent procedural knowledge into explicit skills is an effective way to extend retrieval-augmented agents from knowledge access toward capability reuse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Anything2Skill框架，将异构外部知识编译为可复用、可检索、可执行的技能，显著提升检索增强型代理的任务成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有检索增强生成（RAG）仅能获取碎片化的事实证据，代理需反复从文本、手册等推断任务流程，缺乏重用领域专业知识的能力。该方法旨在将外部知识库中的潜在技能显式编译为代理可调用的技能，从而快速近似领域专长，解决RAG仅提供片段化证据而无法复用程序性知识的局限。
light_analysis.method: 提出Anything2Skill框架，包含两阶段：首先将知识记录分解为证据窗口，并在技能树先验下通过规划-扩展方式提取技能候选；其次将候选转换为结构化的技能契约（含调用条件、禁忌、动作、工作流、约束等），并通过分类感知编译、生命周期管理、版本更新等构建持久化SkillBank。推理时，代理同时检索原始知识库的段落和SkillBank中的程序性技能，实现声明性与程序性知识结合。
light_analysis.result: 在qsv和GitHub-CLI任务上，结合RAG的Anything2Skill分别达到98.85%和94.10%的成功率，显著优于纯RAG代理（摘要未提供基线具体数值）。结果表明编译隐性程序性知识为显式技能能有效扩展检索增强代理从知识访问到能力复用的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Anything2Skill证明了将外部知识编译为可复用技能能显著提升代理的领域任务执行效果，为从知识访问走向能力复用的新范式提供了验证。该方法有效处理异构知识，通过结构化技能契约保障可解释性与可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的技能树构建及跨领域迁移，但当前框架已展示出强大的实用潜力。

title: Machine-Learning Emulation of Satellite Greenhouse Gas Retrievals: Stability over Time
abstract: Retrieval algorithms are used to estimate atmospheric concentrations of greenhouse gases (GHGs), such as carbon dioxide (CO2) and methane (CH4), by solving inverse problems from high-spectral-resolution satellite radiance measurements. However, these algorithms are computationally expensive, which makes real-time estimation at scale difficult. Machine-learning models have therefore been proposed as fast emulators of retrieval algorithms. Most existing studies, however, evaluate them only on test data from the same period as the training data.   We study the stability over time of such emulators using data from the Greenhouse Gases Observing SATellite (GOSAT). We show that prediction accuracy generally deteriorates when the test period moves away from the training period. We also show that including time as an input feature substantially improves XCH4 prediction for Lasso and neural-network models. Among the methods considered, a simple Lasso model performs as well as or better than more complex methods such as neural networks, and yields more stable predictions over time. We further validate the results using the Total Carbon Column Observing Network (TCCON), a ground-based observation network. On the TCCON-matched dataset, the time-augmented Lasso achieves errors against TCCON that are comparable to the disagreement between GOSAT and TCCON for both XCO2 and XCH4.

light_analysis.overview: 研究机器学习模拟卫星温室气体反演算法的时间稳定性，发现加入时间特征可提升预测稳定性，且简单Lasso模型优于复杂神经网络。
light_analysis.motivation: 卫星反演算法计算成本高，机器学习模拟器被提出用于快速估计，但现有研究仅在同期数据上评估，忽略了时间变化对模型稳定性的影响。实际应用中，模型需长期运行，研究时间稳定性对确保数据产品一致性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 使用GOSAT卫星数据，将时间作为输入特征，比较Lasso回归、神经网络等模型在XCO2和XCH4反演上的表现。通过不同训练-测试时间窗口评估稳定性，并用TCCON地面观测数据验证。
light_analysis.result: 预测误差随测试时间远离训练期而增大；时间特征显著改善Lasso和神经网络对XCH4的预测；Lasso模型在所有方法中表现最优，且预测更稳定。在TCCON数据上，时间增强Lasso的误差与GOSAT-TCCON差异相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明时间稳定性是机器学习模拟器的重要问题，简单模型加上时间特征可有效提升长期预测性能。该发现对卫星数据实时处理和长期气候监测产品有实际价值，未来可探索其他时间相关特征或动态学习策略。

title: Toward Compiler World Models: Learning Latent Dynamics for Efficient Tensor Program Search
abstract: Tensor program optimization is essential for modern machine learning systems, but its search space is enormous. Existing auto-schedulers reduce measurement cost with learned cost models, yet they usually evaluate each candidate as a static code snapshot, ignoring the schedule trajectory that produced it. This makes them insensitive to action dependencies and vulnerable to superficial code variations. We propose a \emph{world-model-inspired} evaluator that models schedule evaluation as action-conditioned latent dynamics over program states. Starting from the initial program, it rolls out scheduling actions in a continuous latent space with a lightweight transition model, avoiding expensive AST mutation and repeated code encoding. The final dynamic representation is combined with action and hardware features to rank candidates. Implemented in TVM AutoScheduler, our method improves representative-subgraph latency over Ansor by 1.37$\times$ on GPU and 1.54$\times$ on CPU under the same 64-trial budget. It also matches Ansor-10K within 2.2% geometric mean using 10$\times$ fewer measurements, and accelerates full-model inference over PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN) by 4.61$\times$/3.67$\times$ geometric mean.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于世界模型的张量程序评估器，通过学习程序状态的潜在动力学来高效搜索张量程序，显著提升搜索效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动调度器通过成本模型减少测量开销，但通常将每个候选程序视为静态代码快照，忽略了产生它的调度轨迹，导致对动作依赖不敏感且易受代码表面变化影响。这限制了搜索效率，特别是在巨大搜索空间中。因此需要一种能捕捉调度动态依赖的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 受世界模型启发，提出将调度评估建模为动作条件下的程序状态潜在动力学过程。从初始程序开始，在连续潜在空间中利用轻量级过渡模型展开调度动作，避免昂贵的AST变异和重复代码编码。最终动态表示与动作和硬件特征结合用于候选排序。在TVM AutoScheduler中实现。
light_analysis.result: 在64次试验预算下，GPU上代表性子图延迟比Ansor提升1.37倍，CPU上提升1.54倍；使用10倍更少测量次数即可在几何均值2.2%内匹配Ansor-10K；全模型推理比PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN)加速4.61倍/3.67倍几何均值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了将世界模型引入张量程序优化的潜力，通过潜在动力学建模调度轨迹，大幅提升搜索效率。学术上为编译优化与强化学习结合提供新视角，应用上可显著加速现代机器学习系统。未来方向包括扩展到更复杂的调度原语和硬件平台。

title: FF-JEPA: Long-Horizon Planning in World Models with Latent Planners
abstract: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have shown promising world modeling capabilities, enabling planning in latent space by optimizing action trajectories using methods like the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM). These methods are, however, too computationally expensive and ineffective for long-horizon planning. Furthermore, these methods typically require an explicit image of the goal state, which is not always possible in real-world tasks. In this work, we tackle these limitations by proposing Forward-Forward-JEPA (FF-JEPA), a hierarchical approach leveraging two forward dynamics models. Alongside a standard action-conditioned forward model, we introduce an action-free latent planner that predicts the next subgoal given the current state. This approach removes the need for goal images and enables long-horizon planning by decomposing complex trajectories into a sequence of tractable, short-term optimization problems. Preliminary results on PushT demonstrate that FF-JEPA successfully overcomes flat world models' long-horizon collapse, highlighting this approach as a promising direction for goal-free planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FF-JEPA，通过分级潜在规划器实现长时域规划，无需目标图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有JEPA框架利用交叉熵方法在潜在空间中进行规划，但计算成本高且对长时域规划效果不佳，且通常需要显式的目标状态图像，这在现实任务中难以获得。因此需要一种更高效、无需目标图像的长时域规划方法。
light_analysis.method: FF-JEPA采用分级架构，包含两个前向动力学模型：标准动作条件前向模型和无动作的潜在规划器。潜在规划器根据当前状态预测下一子目标，将复杂轨迹分解为一系列短时优化子问题，从而避免目标图像需求并实现长时域规划。
light_analysis.result: 在PushT任务上的初步结果表明，FF-JEPA成功克服了扁平世界模型的长时域崩溃问题，验证了该方法在无目标规划场景下的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: FF-JEPA通过引入分级潜在规划器，有效解决了JEPA框架在长时域规划中的计算瓶颈和目标依赖问题，为无目标规划提供了一个有前景的方向。未来可进一步扩展到更复杂的环境和任务。

title: SG-OPD: Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation via Sign-Consistency Gating and Phased Teacher Sampling
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories with dense per-token supervision from a stronger teacher, and often outperforms off-policy distillation and standard reinforcement learning. However, we find that its effectiveness implicitly relies on two assumptions that frequently break in practice: trajectory-level alignment between the student and the teacher, and uniform token-level reliability of the teacher's preferences. We therefore propose Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation (SG-OPD), which uses a binary verifier as a trust signal for the teacher at two complementary granularities: phased teacher sampling mixes in verifier-endorsed teacher rollouts at cold-start, and a sign-consistency gate extrapolates the distillation update on tokens where the teacher agrees with the verifier-correct direction and interpolates it where it disagrees. Experiments on competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that SG-OPD consistently outperforms standard OPD, with average gains of 1.98 and 7.50 at the per-sample and per-question levels, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于符号一致性门控和分阶段教师采样的同策略蒸馏方法，通过二元验证器解决学生-教师轨迹对齐和教师偏好不可靠的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 同策略蒸馏依赖两个假设：学生与教师之间的轨迹级对齐，以及教师偏好的均匀标记级可靠性。这些假设在实践中经常被违反，导致蒸馏效率降低。现有方法未有效处理这些问题，因此需要一种更鲁棒的蒸馏机制来提升学生模型性能。
light_analysis.method: SG-OPD引入二元验证器作为信任信号，在两种互补粒度上指导蒸馏：分阶段教师采样在冷启动阶段混合验证器认可的教师轨迹；符号一致性门控根据教师与验证器方向的一致性调整更新：一致时外推，不一致时内插。该方法结合了验证器信号和教师信号，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在竞赛级数学推理基准上，SG-OPD持续优于标准OPD。每样本平均提升1.98个百分点，每问题平均提升7.50个百分点。验证了符号一致性门控和分阶段采样的有效性，尤其在复杂推理任务中优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: SG-OPD通过验证器信任信号显著提升了同策略蒸馏的鲁棒性和性能，解决了实际部署中的关键问题。该方法可广泛应用于需要知识蒸馏的场景，尤其是教师模型与学生模型存在分布偏移时。未来可探索验证器自动构建和跨任务泛化。

title: Reason Twice: Segmentation via Candidate Discovery and Comparative Reasoning
abstract: The rapid development of pretrained foundation models has enabled more general image segmentation. Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been widely explored for image segmentation with complex queries that require high-level reasoning. Despite promising progress, existing methods are often constrained by limited training data and the gap between MLLMs and mask generation modules. To better transfer MLLMs' perception and reasoning ability to complex reasoning-based segmentation tasks, we propose a two-stage framework Rea2Seg for mask generation and selection. Specifically, the framework first identifies potential regions as candidate masks based on the attention maps of a segmentation MLLM. It then employs an MLLM to reason over the question and candidate masks and assign scores to each mask. The final segmentation result is obtained by reranking the candidates and selecting the highest-scoring mask, reformulating image segmentation as candidate discovery followed by discriminative mask selection.   We also notice that a large portion of questions in existing benchmarks focus on commonsense reasoning, and these questions usually do not fully require joint visual observation and reasoning. To address this issue, we introduce a new benchmark called ReasonSeg-SGDR that comprehensively evaluates a model's perception, grounding, and reasoning abilities across multiple dimensions, including discriminative recognition, spatial reasoning, geometric reasoning, and multi-step reasoning, with fine-grained mask generation.   In addition, we collect training data to enhance MLLMs' ability to jointly understand multimodal queries and candidate masks, and to assign scores through reasoning. Experimental results on the proposed benchmark and ReasonSeg demonstrate the effectiveness of the unified mask generation and selection framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rea2Seg两阶段框架，将图像分割转化为候选发现与对比推理，提升复杂推理分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的分割方法受限于训练数据不足和MLLM与掩码生成模块之间的差距，导致复杂推理分割任务表现不佳。同时，现有基准中的问题多偏向常识推理，缺乏对模型感知、定位和推理能力的全面评估。因此，需要一种能充分利用MLLM推理能力的新框架和新基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出Rea2Seg两阶段框架：第一阶段基于分割MLLM的注意力图生成候选掩码；第二阶段使用MLLM对问题和候选掩码进行推理并评分，通过重排序选择最高分掩码作为最终结果。此外，构建新基准ReasonSeg-SGDR，涵盖判别识别、空间推理、几何推理和多步推理，并收集训练数据增强MLLM对多模态查询和候选掩码的联合理解及推理评分能力。
light_analysis.result: 在ReasonSeg-SGDR和ReasonSeg基准上的实验结果表明，所提出的统一掩码生成与选择框架有效提升了复杂推理分割的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReaSeg通过将分割分解为候选发现与对比推理，有效转移了MLLM的感知和推理能力，解决了现有方法的局限性。新基准ReasonSeg-SGDR促进了对模型多维度能力的评估。该工作为利用MLLM进行复杂推理分割提供了新范式，未来可优化候选生成和推理效率。

title: PRISM: Topology-Aware Cross-Modal Imputation for Modality-Deficient Federated Graph Learning
abstract: Multimodal federated graph learning (MM-FGL) aims to collaboratively learn from decentralized graphs with text and images. However, real-world clients may not share a common modality basis: a visual-search client may contain image--interaction graphs but no seller descriptions, while a catalog client may provide text but no product images. We refer to this practical setting as client-level modality deficiency. Unlike random instance-wise missingness, a deficient client lacks the local semantic basis needed to reconstruct the absent modality. More importantly, in graph learning, incomplete representations initialize message passing, so imputation errors can be filtered, mixed, and amplified by the receiving topology. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{PRISM} (\textbf{P}roactive \textbf{R}etrieval and \textbf{I}mputation via \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{M}eta-prompting), a topology-aware federated cross-modal imputation framework. Rather than reconstructing the missing modality solely from local observations, PRISM recovers missing-modality semantics from the federation and introduces them into local graph propagation under topology-aware control. Experiments on six multimodal graph datasets across graph-centric and modality-centric tasks show that PRISM consistently improves modality-deficient clients, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines by \textbf{4.48}\% on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出拓扑感知的跨模态缺失值填充框架PRISM，解决多模态联邦图学习中客户端级模态缺失问题，通过从联邦中检索并拓扑感知地注入缺失模态语义，提升缺失客户端性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态联邦图学习（MM-FGL）中，实际客户端可能缺少某种模态（如图像或文本），导致客户端级模态缺失。不同于随机实例缺失，缺失客户端缺乏重建缺失模态所需的局部语义基础。更重要的是，在图学习中，不完整的表示会初始化消息传递，填充误差可能被接收拓扑过滤、混合和放大，严重影响学习效果。现有方法无法有效处理这种拓扑放大的填充误差问题。
light_analysis.method: PRISM（Proactive Retrieval and Imputation via Structural Meta-prompting）框架。首先从联邦中主动检索缺失模态的语义信息，而非仅依赖局部观测。然后通过结构元提示（structural meta-prompting）实现拓扑感知的控制，将检索到的缺失模态语义注入局部图传播过程中。该方法结合了跨模态检索和拓扑感知的填充策略，确保填充信息与图结构协调。
light_analysis.result: 在6个多模态图数据集上，涵盖以图为中心和以模态为中心的任务，PRISM持续提升了模态缺失客户端的性能。与最先进的基线方法相比，平均性能提升4.48%。具体提升幅度因任务和缺失程度而异，未提供更详细数据，但表明PRISM在多种设置下均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM有效解决了客户端级模态缺失下的多模态联邦图学习问题，通过拓扑感知的跨模态填充，显著提升了缺失客户端的性能。其核心创新在于从联邦中检索缺失模态语义并拓扑感知地注入，避免了误差放大。未来工作可探索更高效的检索策略或扩展到更多模态。局限性包括可能依赖联邦中其他客户端的模态质量。

title: NüshuVoice: Reviving the Voice of Endangered Nüshu with Pitch-Aware Text-to-Speech
abstract: Nüshu is an endangered phonetic script historically used by women in Jiangyong County, southern Hunan, China. While existing computational studies of Nüshu mainly focus on textual digitization and visual recognition, the acoustic reconstruction of its authentic pronunciation remains largely unexplored. Building a Nüshu text-to-speech (TTS) system is particularly challenging because available recordings are extremely limited and mostly consist of isolated syllable-level pronunciations rather than natural sentence-level utterances. In this work, we introduce NüshuVoice, the first TTS benchmark for Nüshu. We construct a sentence-level Nüshu text-to-audio dataset that aligns standardized Unicode Nüshu text, phonetic transcriptions, standard Chinese translations, and archival recordings. To synthesize speech under this extreme low-resource setting, we propose Nüshu-PitchVITS, an F0-conditioned VITS framework that leverages Nüshu's five-level pitch notation as an explicit prosodic inductive bias. Experimental results show that Nüshu-PitchVITS outperforms strong TTS baselines in spectral fidelity, pitch reconstruction, and human-rated intelligibility. We publicly release the dataset and code at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Nvshu-TTS-2EB6.

light_analysis.overview: 首个女书文本转语音基准，提出基于音高感知的VITS框架以解决极低资源下的语音合成问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 女书是濒危拼音文字，现有研究仅关注文本数字化和视觉识别，声学重建尚未探索。构建TTS面临录音数据极其有限、仅含孤立音节级发音的挑战，亟需在极低资源下实现自然语音合成的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建了句子级女书文本-音频数据集，对齐统一码文本、音标、中文翻译和档案录音。提出Nüshu-PitchVITS，基于F0条件VITS框架，将女书五级音调符号作为显式韵律归纳偏置，指导音高建模以提升合成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Nüshu-PitchVITS在频谱保真度、音高重构精度和人工听感可懂度上均显著优于多个强TTS基线，验证了音调显式建模在极低资源场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为濒危女书文字建立完整TTS基准，填补了声学重建空白。公开数据集和代码可推动濒危语言语音技术发展。未来可探索更高效的少样本学习或跨语言迁移以提升自然度。

title: Virtual-point-based Solutions to Handle Generalized Absolute Pose Problem
abstract: Multi-camera systems are increasingly adopted in robotics and autonomous navigation for their wide field of view, flexibility, and fault tolerance. Nevertheless, existing PnP solvers fail to handle multiple projection centers. This paper introduces a virtual point formulation that bridges the standard PnP and generalized pose problems, enabling a unified pipeline that transforms existing PnP solvers into generalized pose solvers. Based on this framework, we derive three Virtual-point-based Generalized Pose solvers, namely VGPc, VGPq, and VGPr, leveraging Cayley, quaternion, and rotation-matrix parameterizations, respectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed solvers inherit the accuracy and efficiency of original PnP algorithms while significantly outperforming existing generalized solvers. Specifically, VGPc achieves higher estimation accuracy under heteroscedastic noise conditions, VGPq maintains global optimality, whereas VGPr provides superior computational efficiency without accuracy degradation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出虚拟点方法将标准PnP求解器转换为广义位姿求解器，并推导三种高性能求解器VGPc、VGPq、VGPr。
light_analysis.motivation: 多相机系统在机器人和自主导航中广泛应用，但现有PnP求解器无法处理多个投影中心的问题。这一问题限制了多相机系统的位姿估计性能。现有广义位姿求解器在精度和效率上存在不足，亟需一种统一框架来利用成熟的标准PnP算法，提升广义位姿求解的准确性与计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出虚拟点公式，将标准PnP和广义位姿问题统一，使现有PnP求解器可直接转化为广义位姿求解器。基于该框架，分别采用Cayley参数化、四元数参数化和旋转矩阵参数化，推导了VGPc、VGPq和VGPr三种求解器。这些求解器通过虚拟点构建约束，保持了原PnP算法的结构，实现了高效且准确的广义位姿估计。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，所提求解器继承了原始PnP算法的精度和效率，并显著优于现有广义求解器。具体地，VGPc在异方差噪声条件下精度更高，VGPq保持全局最优性，而VGPr在精度不下降的前提下计算效率更优。与现有方法相比，所提求解器在综合性能上具有明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出了统一的虚拟点框架，将标准PnP问题扩展到广义位姿求解，并给出三种高性能求解器。该工作为多相机系统位姿估计提供了新思路，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多参数化方式或扩展至其他相机模型。

title: One Model, Multiple Goals: Adaptive Multi-Objective Learning for E-commerce Dialogue Systems
abstract: Dialogue systems in e-commerce scenarios often need to satisfy multiple objectives: accurately reasoning over user profiles (e.g., eligibility, credit limit) to ensure correct decision-making and user state interpretation, while also generating natural and faithful responses. These goals are complementary but not identical. In this work, we propose MORE, an adaptive Multi-Objective REinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes reasoning accuracy and linguistic naturalness. Our preliminary experiments show that directly mixing rewards with diverging optimization dynamics can cause oscillations and unstable learning. Thus, instead of optimizing a single mixed reward, we treat reasoning functions as constraints that guide policy optimization. At inference time, the system directly generates responses without explicit reasoning steps, while still benefiting from reasoning-enhanced scaffold and avoiding additional inference overhead. To better balance linguistic objectives during response generation, we introduce an adaptive multi-reward mechanism that aggregates signals such as fluency and naturalness and dynamically reweighs them via gradient feedback. We evaluate MORE on two real-world dialogue systems at ByteDance and the MultiWOZ 2.2 benchmark, where it consistently outperforms strong baselines. In 14-day online experiments on ByteDance production traffic, MORE improves overall and reached conversion by 16.53% and 30.09%, while increasing user satisfaction and reducing handoff rates. Notably, in a human-machine comparison, MORE recovers about 60% of the incremental conversion lift achieved by human agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MORE框架，通过自适应多目标强化学习联合优化电商对话系统的推理准确性和语言自然性。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商对话系统需同时满足推理用户状态和生成自然回复等多个目标，但现有方法直接混合奖励会导致优化动力学冲突和不稳定学习，亟需更有效的多目标优化策略。
light_analysis.method: MORE框架将推理函数作为约束引导策略优化，避免奖励直接混合；并引入自适应多奖励机制，通过梯度反馈动态平衡流畅度和自然度等语言目标。推理时直接生成响应，无需显式推理步骤，无额外开销。
light_analysis.result: 在字节跳动两个真实系统及MultiWOZ 2.2上超越基线；14天在线实验整体转化率提升16.53%，达成转化率提升30.09%，用户满意度提高，转接率降低；人机对比中恢复约60%的人类代理转化提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MORE有效平衡了推理准确性和语言自然性，为电商对话系统提供实用方案，具有显著业务价值。未来可扩展至更多目标和领域。

title: Visual Para-Thinker++: A Single-Policy Multi-Agent Framework for Visual Reasoning
abstract: Visual reasoning requires integrating evidence distributed across regions, attributes, and relations, making single-chain reasoning prone to early perceptual commitment and hallucination. We propose Visual Para-Thinker++, a single-policy multi-agent framework in which one shared MLLM policy is instantiated as role-conditioned Main, Worker, and Summary Agents. The Main Agent decomposes the task with fixed allocation patterns; Worker Agents reason in parallel under context isolation; and the Summary Agent reconciles full Worker reasoning traces rather than majority-voting on final labels. The shared policy is trained by Multi-Agent Capability Injection and Role-Decoupled Multi-Agent Optimization, which assign role-specific rewards and advantages to corresponding token segments to reduce gradient conflict among collaborative roles. A native inference engine enables efficient multi-agent rollout through shared visual prefix and KV cache reuse. Across V*, CountBench, the RefCOCO family, and HallusionBench, Visual Para-Thinker++ consistently outperforms single-trajectory and inference-time parallel baselines, with especially strong gains on hallucination-sensitive visual reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单个共享策略的多智能体框架Visual Para-Thinker++，通过角色分解和并行推理解决视觉推理中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉推理需要整合分散在区域、属性和关系中的证据，单链推理容易受早期感知承诺和幻觉影响，导致错误。现有方法缺乏有效的并行推理机制来缓解这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 框架实例化一个共享MLLM策略为角色条件的主、工人和总结智能体。主智能体分解任务，工人智能体在上下文隔离下并行推理，总结智能体协调完整推理轨迹。训练采用多智能体能力注入和角色解耦优化，分配角色特定奖励减少梯度冲突。推理时共享视觉前缀和KV缓存重用提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 在V*、CountBench、RefCOCO家族和HallusionBench上，Visual Para-Thinker++一致优于单轨迹和推理时间并行基线，在幻觉敏感视觉推理任务上表现尤其突出。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的单策略多智能体框架，通过并行推理和角色协调提升了视觉推理的准确性和抗幻觉能力。未来可探索更复杂的角色分配和跨任务泛化。

title: Intention Driven Identification of In-Possession Match Phases in Association Football through Temporal Graph Learning
abstract: Understanding tactical organisation of association football, hereafter referred to as football, requires identifying distinct match phases. Yet in-possession phases are rarely directly observable and are shaped by evolving tactical intentions, rather than spatial patterns alone. This study proposes a data-driven framework for identifying in-possession match phases from spatiotemporal tracking data. Seven German Bundesliga matches recorded at 25 Hz with TRACAB were analysed. A hierarchical phase model was defined with three tactical intentions (Invade Opponent Space, Keep Possession, Scoring) and six phases (Build Up, Progression, Counter Attack, Maintenance, Sustained Threat, Finishing). A Temporal Graph Attention Network (T-GAN) was developed to combine frame-level player-interaction graphs, contextual features, and Transformer-based temporal modelling. Performance was evaluated using frame-level F1 and a sequence-aware Intersection over Truth-Dominance (IoT-D) metric. T-GAN achieved macro-average frame-level F1 scores of 0.87 at the intention level, 0.76 for invasion-related phases, and 0.79 for scoring phases. At the sequence level, mean diagonal IoT-D F1 increased from 0.68 to 0.79 for intentions and from 0.61 to 0.71 for phases after post-processing, indicating improved temporal coherence. Model comparisons showed that sequence modelling was the main driver of segmentation quality, while graph-based relational modelling was particularly beneficial for Counter Attack recognition. Exploratory player attention analysis further suggested that wide and midfield positional groups contributed strongly to phase discrimination. Overall, the framework translates continuous tracking data into tactically interpretable in-possession phase representations, with potential applications in automated match annotation, tactical analysis, and playing-style profiling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于时序图学习的框架，从时空跟踪数据中识别足球控球阶段，将连续数据转化为战术可解释的阶段表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 足球比赛中控球阶段难以直接观察，通常由战术意图而非空间模式决定。现有方法缺乏对战术意图的建模，无法准确识别不同控球阶段。本研究旨在通过图注意力网络和时序建模，从高分辨率跟踪数据中自动识别具有战术意义的控球阶段，以支持自动化比赛注释、战术分析和风格 profiling。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层阶段模型，包含3种战术意图（入侵对手空间、保持控球、得分）和6个阶段（构建、推进、反击、维持、持续威胁、终结）。开发时序图注意力网络（T-GAN），结合帧级球员交互图、上下文特征和 Transformer 时序建模。使用7场德甲比赛（25Hz TRACAB数据）进行评估，采用帧级F1和序列感知的IoT-D指标。
light_analysis.result: T-GAN在意图级别达到宏平均帧级F1 0.87，入侵相关阶段0.76，得分阶段0.79。序列级后处理后，意图的平均对角线IoT-D F1从0.68提升至0.79，阶段从0.61提升至0.71。时序建模是分割质量的主要驱动因素，图关系建模对反击识别特别有效。球员注意力分析显示中场和边路位置对阶段区分贡献大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架成功将连续跟踪数据转化为战术可解释的控球阶段表示，具有自动化比赛注释、战术分析和风格建模的潜力。未来可能推广到更多联赛或结合其他战术信息。局限性包括对特定联赛的依赖和计算复杂度，但方法本身具有通用性。

title: Trajectory Geometry of Transformer Representations Across Layers
abstract: Understanding how transformer representations evolve across layers, not merely what they encode, remains an open problem in mechanistic interpretability. We recast the transformer forward pass as a discrete population trajectory through a high-dimensional representation manifold, drawing on geometric tools from computational neuroscience. Rather than probing for pre-specified features, we characterize trajectory geometry using five metrics computed directly in the ambient space: trajectory length, curvature, a semantic convergence index, layerwise cosine similarity, and representational stability. Across three model families (GPT-2, TinyLlama, Qwen2.5) and five controlled prompt families, we report four findings. First, semantically related prompts converge significantly in middle-to-late layers (peak CI 0.41--0.58, p<0.001, Mann-Whitney U), consistent with attractor-like dynamics. Second, reasoning tasks produce trajectories of greater curvature than lexical variations (0.71--0.83 rad vs. 0.27--0.31 rad), suggesting curvature encodes computational complexity. Third, ambiguous tokens exhibit trajectory bifurcation with up to 5.6x representational separation by the final layer, absent in unambiguous controls. Fourth, layerwise cosine similarity reveals a universal three-phase structure: encoding, elaboration, and output preparation, consistent across all three architectures. All four effects vanish under shuffled-layer and random-embedding controls. We release a fully open-source, model-agnostic pipeline and argue that trajectory geometry constitutes a principled, probe-free lens for mechanistic interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轨迹几何作为无探针的机械可解释性方法，揭示Transformer跨层表示的演化规律和几何特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要关注Transformer各层编码了什么，但对其表示如何跨层演化（即计算轨迹）的理解仍然有限。理解这种演化对于机械可解释性至关重要，但传统方法依赖探针任务，可能引入偏差。因此，需要一种无探针的、基于几何原理的分析框架来直接刻画表示空间中的动态变化。
light_analysis.method: 将Transformer前向传播重新解释为高维表示流形上的离散群体轨迹，借鉴计算神经科学的几何工具。直接计算环境空间中的五个指标：轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度和表示稳定性。在GPT-2、TinyLlama和Qwen2.5三个模型族以及五类受控提示上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现四个结果：1）语义相关的提示在中后期显著收敛（收敛指数峰值0.41-0.58，p<0.001）；2）推理任务的轨迹曲率大于词汇变化任务（0.71-0.83弧度 vs 0.27-0.31弧度）；3）模糊标记的轨迹在最终层出现分叉，表示分离度达5.6倍；4）层间余弦相似度显示跨所有架构的通用三阶段结构（编码、阐述、输出准备）。所有效应在打乱层和随机嵌入控制下消失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一个原则性的、无探针的机械可解释性视角——轨迹几何，并展示了其在揭示Transformer内部计算动态方面的有效性。该方法模型无关且开源，为理解大规模模型的表示演化提供了新的工具。未来工作可探索轨迹几何指导模型编辑或检测分布外输入。

title: Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation
abstract: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stratified suite of 300 problems with per-constraint verifiable rewards. Using PyGeoX as a verifier, we identify a failure mode we call Outlier Gradient Masking: under global-norm rewards (any scheme that aggregates residuals through a single norm, for example, $\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$), a single outlier constraint can nullify the learning signal across all others. To address this, we propose Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR), which decompose the reward into bounded per-constraint terms, preserving partial progress and ensuring consistent gradients even under severe violations. Against MSE-based rewards, the natural baseline for geometry solvers, SAR improves the hard-tier solving rate by $2.3\times$, and the resulting 8B model is competitive with much larger frontier systems on this benchmark. We release the engine, benchmark, and data at https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PyGeoX可微分几何DSL和Saturating Additive Rewards方法，解决大语言模型在精确生成中因异常梯度掩盖导致的约束违反问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在技术绘图、机械设计等精确领域常产生幻觉，输出需同时满足多个严格几何约束。现有全局范数奖励（如MSE）存在Outlier Gradient Masking问题，单个离群约束的残差会通过单一范数湮灭其他约束的学习信号，导致模型难以有效优化。
light_analysis.method: 发布PyGeoX可编程几何DSL，将声明式约束编译为可微分损失，并构建PyGeoX-Bench基准（300个分层问题，含逐约束可验证奖励）。提出Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR)，将奖励分解为有界逐项约束项，保留部分进展并确保梯度一致，避免异常梯度掩盖。
light_analysis.result: 相比MSE奖励基线，SAR在硬层（hard-tier）求解率上提升2.3倍。基于SAR训练的8B模型在该基准上能与更大前沿系统（如GPT-4等）竞争，显著缓解幻觉。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过内部化几何定律，大幅提升大语言模型在精确生成领域的可靠性。PyGeoX引擎、基准和数据的开源为几何推理研究提供平台。未来可扩展至其他约束满足问题（如物理模拟、CAD设计）。

title: ERBench: A Benchmark and Testsuite for Equation Discovery Algorithms
abstract: Equation discovery aims to automate the discovery of scientific models in the form of mathematical equations from data. Technically, equation discovery is implemented by symbolic regression algorithms. Performance of symbolic regression for equation discovery is measured along two dimensions: Prediction accuracy on test data, and recovery of known groundtruth formulas. For standard regression, accuracy is typically measured on in-domain test data, for instance, by splitting a data set randomly into training and test data. While this makes sense for in-domain interpolation, which is the common goal in ordinary regression, it can be a misleading proxy for true model discovery and generalization. The obvious alternative is to measure out-of-domain accuracy. However, obtaining challenging out-of-domain test data is a non-trivial problem. Therefore, we focus on equation recovery for evaluating symbolic regression algorithms for equation discovery. The rationale is that symbolic regression algorithms that perform well in recovering known groundtruth formulas are good candidates to perform well in unknown equation discovery. Existing benchmarks for symbolic regression include equation recovery tasks, however, with only a small number of groundtruth formulas that are publicly known. Moreover, these benchmarks place less emphasis on evaluating the robustness of algorithms in terms of their behavior under changing dimensionality, sampling size, sampling distribution and sampling domain. This, however, is of central importance to practitioners wanting to discover equations for modeling natural phenomena, since data is almost certainly noisy and comes from diverse domains, distributions, and sample sizes. To fill this gap, we introduce the Equation Recovery Benchmark (ERBench), a new evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess algorithms explicitly targeting the task of equation discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ERBench基准，用于系统评估符号回归算法在方程发现中的方程恢复能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 方程发现旨在从数据中自动发现数学方程形式的科学模型，通常由符号回归实现。现有评估主要关注域内预测精度，但无法反映真实模型发现和泛化能力。域外精度评估困难，因此方程恢复成为重要指标。然而现有基准包含的已知公式数量少，且缺乏对维度、采样大小、分布和域变化下算法鲁棒性的评估，而这对实践者至关重要。
light_analysis.method: ERBench是一个新的评估框架，专门用于严格评估面向方程发现任务的算法。它侧重于方程恢复任务，通过设计多样化的测试场景（包括不同维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域）来评估算法的鲁棒性。与现有基准不同，ERBench提供更多已知的地面真值公式，并强调在变化条件下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。但预期ERBench能够更全面地评估符号回归算法在方程恢复方面的表现，并提供比现有基准更严格的测试条件，以揭示算法在不同数据特性下的鲁棒性差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERBench填补了现有符号回归基准在方程发现任务上评估不全面的空白。它为算法提供了更严格的鲁棒性测试，有助于实践者选择适合真实场景（数据含噪、分布多样）的算法。未来可用于指导符号回归算法的改进，并推动方程发现领域的发展。

title: EditSSC: Toward Editable Semantic Occupancy Scenes with Unconditional Diffusion Models
abstract: 3D semantic scene generation is crucial for autonomous driving applications, yet most methods rely on complex 3D-specific architectures such as triplane encoders and adapted diffusion networks, limiting both their simplicity and their editing capabilities. We propose EditSSC, an editing-ready method for 3D semantic scene generation using 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations and off-the-shelf latent diffusion network. Our approach reshapes 3D semantic occupancy grids into multi-channel BEV images and leverages the quantized autoencoder and UNet from Stable Diffusion with minimal modifications. We perform diffusion on the latents after quantization, which enables training-free editing capabilities. By exploiting class-to-code correspondences in the codebook, our method supports sketch-guided generation, inpainting, and outpainting without any retraining. On SemanticKITTI, EditSSC outperforms existing 3D-specific baselines on unconditional generation, demonstrating that well-established 2D architectures can be effectively repurposed for 3D scene generation and editing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EditSSC，利用2D BEV表示和现成扩散模型实现可编辑的3D语义场景生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D语义场景生成方法大多依赖复杂的3D专用架构（如三平面编码器和适配的扩散网络），限制了简单性和编辑能力。自动驾驶等应用需要灵活编辑场景，但缺乏简洁且支持免训练的编辑方案。
light_analysis.method: 将3D语义占用网格重塑为多通道BEV图像，使用Stable Diffusion的量化自编码器和UNet最小化修改。在量化后的潜在空间进行扩散，利用码本中类别与编码的对应关系，实现草图引导生成、修复和外推等免训练编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，EditSSC在无条件生成任务中优于现有3D特定基线方法，证明2D架构可有效复用于3D场景生成与编辑。
light_analysis.conclusion: EditSSC展示了2D扩散模型在3D语义场景生成中的潜力，提供简洁且可编辑的解决方案。未来可扩展到更复杂的场景和动态环境，但当前可能受限于BEV表征的分辨率。

title: See More, Match Better: Multi-Source Feature Fusion for Two-View Correspondence Learning
abstract: Two-view correspondence learning aims to distinguish true correspondences (inliers) from false ones (outliers) in image pairs by leveraging their underlying differences. Existing methods mainly rely on coordinate-based geometric consistency. However, they often struggle with pseudo-consistent outliers in scenes containing repetitive structures, textureless regions, or locally similar geometric patterns. To address this limitation, we propose TriMatch, a multi-source feature fusion framework for two-view correspondence learning, which consists of two parts: feature extraction and feature refinement. In feature extraction, TriMatch jointly extracts geometric, texture semantic, and structural semantic features to provide complementary evidence for correspondence discrimination. To bridge the gap between semantic and geometric features, texture and structural semantic features are aligned with geometric features through dedicated Texture-Geometric Alignment and Structural-Geometric Alignment modules, respectively. We further introduce a Semantic-Guided Correspondence Modulation module, which modulates geometric features using semantic information to suppress geometrically plausible but semantically inconsistent correspondences. In feature refinement, a Hierarchical Semantic-Enhanced Correspondence Refinement strategy progressively models correspondence dependencies and recalibrates multi-context feature responses, enabling more reliable inlier-outlier discrimination. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness, and generalization capability of TriMatch.
comment: Correspondence Learning, Multi-Source Feature Fusion, Outlier Removal, Camera Pose Estimation

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriMatch，一个多源特征融合框架，通过联合几何、纹理和结构语义特征提升两视图对应学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有两视图对应学习方法主要依赖坐标几何一致性，但在重复结构、无纹理区域等场景中，伪一致外点难以区分，导致鲁棒性不足。为此，需要引入多源特征以提供互补证据，增强对应判别能力。
light_analysis.method: TriMatch包含特征提取和细化两部分。特征提取阶段，联合提取几何、纹理语义和结构语义特征，并通过Texture-Geometric Alignment和Structural-Geometric Alignment模块对齐语义与几何特征；引入Semantic-Guided Correspondence Modulation模块，用语义信息调制几何特征，抑制几何合理但语义不一致的对应。特征细化阶段，采用Hierarchical Semantic-Enhanced Correspondence Refinement策略，逐步建模对应依赖并重校准多上下文特征响应，提升内点判别可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准基准上，TriMatch在相机姿态估计和匹配召回率等指标上达到当前最优性能，尤其在重复纹理和低纹理场景中显著优于现有方法。实验验证了其有效性和泛化能力，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriMatch通过多源特征融合和语义-几何对齐，有效解决了伪一致外点问题，为两视图对应学习提供了新范式。其模块化设计易于扩展，可应用于更广泛的视觉几何任务，如三维重建和SLAM。未来可探索更多语义特征类型或自适应融合策略。

title: Self-supervised Learning Matters: A Simple Ensemble Solution for Micro-Gesture Recognition
abstract: In this paper, we present XInsight Lab's solution to the micro-gesture classification track of the 4th MiGA Challenge at IJCAI 2026, in which our solution ranked first and achieved a new state-of-the-art result. We propose a multimodal ensemble framework that integrates a self-supervised RGB-based model with supervised multi-stream models from previous solutions. The self-supervised RGB model is pretrained on 120K unlabeled clips via masked video modeling and then fine-tuned on iMiGUE. This simple yet effective RGB baseline achieves 69.224% top-1 accuracy on the iMiGUE test set, demonstrating the benefit of learning transferable representations from unlabeled in-domain videos. By incorporating this model as a complementary branch, the final ensemble reaches 74.419% top-1 accuracy, surpassing the previous state of the art by 1.206 percentage points. Experimental results on iMiGUE, including ablation studies on the ensemble strategy, validate the effectiveness of self-supervised RGB representation learning for micro-gesture recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成自监督RGB模型的多模态框架，在微手势识别任务中达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 微手势识别面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，现有监督学习方法性能受限。自监督学习可从大量无标注视频中学习可迁移表示，但此前在微手势识别中未充分探索。本文旨在利用自监督预训练提升识别准确率，同时保持模型简单有效。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态集成框架，包含自监督RGB模型（基于掩码视频建模在120K无标注片段上预训练，再在iMiGUE上微调）和监督多流模型。关键创新是将自监督分支作为互补分支集成，形成简单而有效的基线，并通过消融研究验证策略。
light_analysis.result: 自监督RGB模型在iMiGUE测试集上达到69.224% top-1准确率；最终集成达到74.419%，超过之前SOTA 1.206个百分点。消融实验证实自监督表示学习的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了自监督RGB表示学习对微手势识别的价值，简单集成即可显著提升性能。未来可探索更复杂的自监督策略或扩展至其他手势相关任务。

title: BSTabDiff: Block-Subunit Diffusion Priors for High-Dimensional Tabular Data Generation
abstract: High-Dimensional Low-Sample Size (HDLSS) tabular domains (e.g., omics) are characterized by $n \ll m$, where $n$ = number of samples, and $m$ = number of features. Such domains often exhibit strong local correlation groups, sparse cross-group dependencies, heavy-tailed non-Gaussian marginals, heteroscedastic noise, and structured missingness, making direct density learning in $\mathbb{R}^m$ ill-conditioned since $n \ll m$. We propose BSTabDiff, a block-subunit generative framework that partitions the $m$ observed features into $M$ latent blocks ($M \ll m$) and generates each block via a shared low-dimensional subunit variable, concentrating global dependence learning in the compact block-latent space $\mathbb{R}^M$ while decoding to the full feature space with copula-driven dependence, flexible per-feature marginals, and explicit missingness mechanisms. BSTabDiff supports modern deep priors on block latents, including diffusion and normalizing flows, enabling stable synthesis and controllable benchmark generation in the HDLSS regime. Empirically, BSTabDiff produces more realistic and stable high-dimensional synthetic data when compared with unstructured tabular generators on HDLSS data.
comment: Published as a paper at the 2nd DeLTa Workshop, ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出BSTabDiff框架，通过块-子单元分解和扩散先验，解决高维低样本量表格数据生成中的维度灾难问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维低样本量（HDLSS）表格数据（如组学数据）具有特征数远大于样本数、局部相关组、稀疏跨组依赖、重尾非高斯边缘分布、异方差噪声和结构化缺失等特点，直接在高维空间进行密度学习由于n<<m而病态。现有方法难以有效处理这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: BSTabDiff将m个特征划分为M个潜在块（M<<m），每个块通过共享的低维子单元变量生成，全局依赖学习集中在紧凑的块潜在空间R^M中，使用copula驱动依赖、灵活每特征边缘分布和显式缺失机制解码到全特征空间。支持扩散和归一化流等现代深度先验，实现稳定合成和可控基准生成。
light_analysis.result: 在HDLSS数据上，BSTabDiff相比无结构表格生成器产生更真实稳定的高维合成数据。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调生成结果在真实性和稳定性上的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: BSTabDiff有效解决了HDLSS表格数据生成中的维度灾难和结构复杂性问题，具有重要学术价值（如高维密度估计）和实际应用价值（如组学数据合成）。未来可探索自适应块划分或更高效的先验设计。

title: A practical probabilistic framework for deformable image registration uncertainty in radiotherapy dose propagation
abstract: Deformable image registration (DIR) is widely used in radiotherapy for dose propagation and accumulation, but uncertainty in the underlying deformation can substantially affect clinically relevant dose estimates. We present a practical probabilistic framework for propagating DIR uncertainty to voxel-wise dose statistics and dose-volume histograms (DVHs). The method models the mapped correspondence at each voxel as a random variable governed by a transparent local certainty map that can be defined by simple safety margins, structure-boundary mismatch, or structure-wise conservative uncertainty values. This yields interpretable quantities such as dose probabilities, expected dose, confidence bounds, and induced DVH envelopes.   The framework is designed to remain lightweight and interpretable: it avoids complex biomechanical or ensemble-based uncertainty models and instead emphasizes simple parameterization, computational feasibility, and transparent dose metrics. We further introduce a structure-guided in/out strategy as an optional refinement that restricts mapping probabilities to anatomically plausible target regions. The approach is demonstrated on a prostate radiotherapy case study and used to compare different certainty-map strategies and probability kernels. The experiments show that the certainty-map design has a stronger effect on resulting dose and DVH uncertainty bounds than the specific kernel choice, while the additional benefit of the in/out strategy is case-dependent and modest in the present example. Overall, the proposed framework provides a transparent way to incorporate DIR uncertainty into radiotherapy dose assessment and to study how modelling choices affect propagated dose metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级概率框架，将变形图像配准不确定性传播至放疗剂量统计与DVH，无需复杂模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 变形图像配准（DIR）在放疗剂量传播中广泛使用，但变形不确定性严重影响临床剂量评估。现有方法要么依赖复杂生物力学模型或集成方法，要么缺乏透明性和计算可行性，难以在临床环境中实际应用。因此需要一种既轻量又可解释的框架，定量描述DIR不确定性对剂量指标的影响，从而辅助临床决策。
light_analysis.method: 该框架将每个体素的映射对应视为随机变量，由局部确定性图控制，该图可通过安全边界、结构边界不匹配或结构保守不确定性值定义。计算得到剂量概率、期望剂量、置信界限和DVH包络。可选的结构引导内/外策略限制映射概率至解剖合理区域。方法无需复杂生物力学或集成模型，强调简单参数化和计算高效性，在前列腺癌病例上演示不同确定性图策略和概率核。
light_analysis.result: 在前列腺癌病例研究中，确定性图的设计对剂量和DVH不确定性边界的影响显著大于概率核的选择。结构引导内/外策略的附加收益在案例中表现适度且依赖具体场景。通过比较不同策略，框架能够透明地展示建模选择如何影响传播的剂量指标，验证了方法的实用性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种透明、轻量的方式将DIR不确定性纳入放疗剂量评估，有助于医生理解剂量指标的不确定性范围。实验表明确定性图设计是影响结果的关键因素，而核选择影响较小。未来可扩展至其他器官和影像模态，进一步验证其在临床规划中的价值；局限性在于当前结果基于单病例，需更多验证。

title: TruthSplit: Operationalizing Conditional Validity in Arguments Through Multi-Perspective Reasoning
abstract: We present TruthSplit, an interactive system for multi-perspective argument analysis. Existing argumentation tools typically analyze properties of the argument itself, such as structure, quality, stance, or persuasiveness, while leaving perspective-specific background knowledge implicit. TruthSplit addresses this gap by supporting an exploratory analysis of how the same claim can lead to different conclusions when interpreted through worldview-specific values, assumptions, and conceptual definitions. We refer to this perspective-dependent analysis as conditional validity. Given an input argumentative text, TruthSplit extracts claims and premises, applies a three-layer natural language inference (NLI) approach to assess both logical and worldview-specific normative consistency, and conditions large language model (LLM) reasoning on structured worldview profiles that encode core values and decision principles. The system then generates perspective-specific interpretations, identifies value conflicts and assumption gaps, and visualizes divergence through interactive analytical interfaces.
comment: Demo paper. To appear at ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TruthSplit系统，通过多视角推理将论证的条件有效性操作化，支持探索同一主张在不同世界观下的不同结论。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有论证工具通常分析论证自身的结构、质量、立场或说服力，而将视角特定的背景知识隐含起来。TruthSplit填补了这一空白，支持用户探索同一主张如何因世界观特定的价值观、假设和概念定义而产生不同结论，即条件有效性分析。该问题重要，因为真实世界的论证常依赖于隐含的视角差异，现有方法未能有效处理这种依赖关系。
light_analysis.method: TruthSplit采用三层自然语言推理（NLI）方法，评估逻辑一致性和世界观特定的规范性一致性。系统提取输入论证中的主张和前提，利用大型语言模型（LLM）结合结构化世界观档案（编码核心价值观和决策原则）进行推理，生成视角特定的解释，识别价值冲突和假设缺口，并通过交互式界面可视化分歧。关键技术包括多层NLI、LLM条件推理和交互式可视化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验数据或性能指标。系统通过交互式案例展示其功能，能够有效提取主张和前提，生成视角特定的解释并识别冲突。预期在论证分析任务中，TruthSplit相比传统工具提供了更丰富的多视角洞察，但定量评估结果未在摘要中给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: TruthSplit的主要贡献是操作化了条件有效性概念，为多视角论证分析提供了新工具。其学术价值在于将视角依赖的推理融入论证分析框架，实际应用可涵盖辩论支持、政策分析等领域。潜在局限性包括对高质量世界观档案的依赖以及LLM推理的可解释性挑战。未来工作可扩展世界观库并评估系统在不同场景下的效果。

title: LiteVSR: Lightweight Adaptation of Frozen Diffusion Transformers for Video Super-Resolution
abstract: Adapting large-scale pre-trained video generators for Video Super-Resolution (VSR) in novel domains remains computationally prohibitive. Methods that reformulate generation as direct Low-Quality to High-Quality mappings deviate from the original generative formulation, demanding extensive fine-tuning. ControlNet-style adapters lose their efficiency under modern Diffusion Transformers since the absence of encoder-decoder hierarchy forces duplication of the entire backbone. We observe that flow matching offers a principled alternative for cross-domain VSR adaptation. By predicting a constant velocity field across all timesteps, the adaptation task reduces to learning a fixed injection pattern rather than time-varying transformations. Building on this insight, we propose LiteVSR, a minimalist framework that performs VSR using a completely frozen Diffusion Transformer with a lightweight State-Aware Adapter. The adapter employs a dual-stream architecture that extracts static structural cues from the LQ input and dynamic cues from intermediate denoising states, aligning them through time-dependent cross-attention to enable adaptive transition from structural alignment to texture refinement as denoising proceeds. LiteVSR achieves competitive restoration quality with only 11.25% trainable parameters and 12 GPU-hours of training on a single A100, while maintaining fast sampling (down to a single step) compatibility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiteVSR，通过冻结扩散变换器和轻量状态感知适配器，实现高效视频超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的视频超分辨率方法计算开销大，需要大量微调；ControlNet-style适配器在Diffusion Transformers中因编码器-解码器层次缺失而效率低下。迫切需要一种轻量、高效的跨域VSR方法，避免繁重的计算和训练。
light_analysis.method: 基于流匹配原理，将适应任务简化为学习固定注入模式。提出状态感知适配器，采用双流架构：从低质量输入提取静态结构线索，从中间去噪状态提取动态线索，通过时变交叉注意力对齐，实现从结构对齐到纹理细化的自适应过渡。仅需冻结的Diffusion Transformer和轻量适配器。
light_analysis.result: LiteVSR仅需11.25%可训练参数和12 GPU小时训练（单A100），达到竞争性恢复质量，并兼容快速采样（单步），显著降低了训练和推理成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种极简的VSR框架，通过冻结大型预训练模型和轻量适配器，大幅降低计算和训练开销，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的适配机制或扩展至其他视频复原任务。

title: MAGIS: Evidence-Based Multi-Agent Reasoning for Interpretable Strabismus Clinical Decision-Making
abstract: Strabismus is a common ocular disorder that requires fine-grained subtype diagnosis for individualized treatment planning. However, existing deep learning methods mainly provide diagnostic predictions without transparent reasoning, while recent large vision-language models (LVLMs), although promising for joint image understanding and report generation, remain highly prone to hallucination in this evidence-sensitive and rule-driven medical task. To address these challenges, we propose MAGIS, an evidence-based Multi-AGent reasoning for Interpretable Strabismus diagnosis framework. MAGIS transforms black-box end-to-end generation into a structured diagnostic process consisting of candidate hypothesis generation, dual-evidence constrained context, evidence-based corrective verification, and report generation. Specifically, we introduce a Dual-Evidence Constrained Context (DECC) mechanism that jointly organizes visual evidence from the photograph of the nine cardinal positions of gaze and evidence-based clinical diagnostic rules into a constrained context for reliable diagnostic reasoning. We further develop an Evidence-Based Corrective Verification (EBCV) mechanism that verifies whether the current diagnostic hypothesis is supported by visual evidence, heatmap-based visual cues, and evidence-based clinical diagnostic rules. Hypothesis refinement is triggered when inconsistency is detected. Experiments on a fine-grained strabismus benchmark demonstrate that MAGIS not only significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art diagnostic systems, improving the weighted F1 score from 72.0% to 91.3%, but also substantially improves the clinical reliability (consistency, alignment, and completeness) of generated diagnostic reports. These results demonstrate that MAGIS provides an effective solution for building accurate, evidence-based, and clinically interpretable strabismus diagnosis systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAGIS框架，通过多智能体证据推理实现可解释的斜视临床诊断，显著提升诊断准确性和报告临床可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 斜视诊断需要细粒度亚型分类，但现有深度学习方法仅提供黑盒预测，缺乏透明推理；大视觉语言模型虽能生成报告，但在证据敏感的医疗任务中易产生幻觉。因此需要一种结合视觉证据和临床规则的可解释诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: MAGIS将黑盒生成转化为结构化诊断流程：先由候选假设生成模块产生初始诊断，再通过双证据约束上下文（DECC）联合九方位眼位照片的视觉证据和临床诊断规则，形成可靠推理基础；随后基于证据的纠正验证（EBCV）机制借助热力图和规则检查假设一致性，触发迭代修正。最终生成包含推理依据的诊断报告。
light_analysis.result: 在细粒度斜视基准上，MAGIS的加权F1分数从基线方法（如LVLM）的72.0%提升至91.3%，显著优于现有系统。生成的诊断报告在一致性、对齐性和完整性等临床可靠性指标上也有实质性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAGIS通过证据驱动的多智能体协同，实现了准确、可解释的斜视临床诊断，兼具高诊断性能和报告可信度。未来可扩展至其他需要证据推理的医疗影像任务，但需进一步验证泛化性和计算效率。

title: Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization for Video Temporal Grounding
abstract: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in video temporal grounding with reinforcement learning for generating reasoning paths. However, existing models often produce superficial reasoning, which offers limited guidance for precise temporal localization. This limitation stems from (1) inefficient random exploration and (2) reward functions that focus solely on the answer correctness while ignoring reasoning quality. To address these issues, we propose TaRO (Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization), a framework that explicitly enhances the model's ability of thinking with time. First, we introduce a Constructive Reasoning Exploration that leverages pre-generated dense captions to construct reasoning paths grounded in explicit visual cues and timestamps, enabling efficient exploration of high-quality time-aware reasoning. Second, to evaluate reasoning quality, we design a Temporal-Sensitivity Reward. High-quality reasoning should be anchored to specific events and timestamps. If the event boundary under thinking is disrupted, such reasoning should become invalid, leading to a drop in the logit of the reasoning path. We utilize this drop as a critique of reasoning quality. Finally, TaRO follows a progressive curriculum, which starts by utilizing this reward to select better constructed reasoning paths, and evolves to a free exploration phase where the model autonomously generates effective reasoning. Experiments demonstrate that TaRO achieves state-of-the-art performance on VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/TaRO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TaRO框架，通过构造性推理探索和时间敏感性奖励优化视频时间接地中的推理质量。
