light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs在视频时间接地中利用强化学习生成推理路径，但推理表面化，对精确定位指导有限。原因在于随机探索效率低，且奖励函数仅关注答案正确性而忽视推理质量。这导致模型难以产生时间感知的高质量推理，限制了性能提升。
light_analysis.method: TaRO框架包含三个部分：1) 构造性推理探索，利用预生成密集描述构建基于显式视觉线索和时间戳的推理路径，实现高效探索；2) 时间敏感性奖励，通过破坏推理中的事件边界观察logit下降作为推理质量批评；3) 渐进式课程学习，先利用奖励选择高质量构造路径，再进入自由探索阶段让模型自主生成有效推理。
light_analysis.result: 在视频时间接地基准上取得最先进性能。实验表明，TaRO显著提升了推理的时序感知能力和定位准确性，超越了现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: TaRO有效解决了视频时间接地中推理表面化问题，通过时序感知优化提升了模型推理质量。研究为多模态大语言模型在时间敏感任务中的应用提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的推理评估机制或扩展到其他时序推理任务。

title: SOMA: From Surface Observations to Muscle Anatomy
abstract: With the growing demand for realistic virtual humans, parametric body models have become a cornerstone of modern medicine, sports, and entertainment applications. However, most of these models are inherently limited: they only capture the 3D surface of the skin, offering no insight into the complex bio-mechanical structures that generate motion. As more applications expand towards biomechanics, the need for virtual human models that go beyond the skin has become increasingly evident. Traditional soft-tissue simulations, such as FEM, are accurate but non-scalable and too computationally expensive for most common applications. Alternatively, existing biomechanical tools can simulate muscular forces and activations, but do not model changes in external shape, restricting how activations correlate with actual observable anatomy. This motivates a novel inverse research problem: recovering muscle deformations directly from visible surface observations - i.e., from the skin, and thus the pose. In this work, we present SOMA (from Surface Observations to Muscle Anatomy), a person-specific model that infers spatio-temporal muscle behavior from surface signals obtained using RGB cameras, and SKIM, a subject-specific soft-tissue deformation dataset. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first method that attempts to recover muscle deformations from multi-view RGB data. We show how our method provides anatomically grounded animations without the complexity of traditional simulations, leading to a scalable and cost-effective solution. Data and code are available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOMA模型，从多视角RGB观测直接恢复肌肉变形，实现无传统仿真的解剖动画。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数化人体模型仅捕捉皮肤表面，无法提供内部生物力学结构；传统软组织仿真（如FEM）精确但计算昂贵且不可扩展；现有生物力学工具可模拟肌肉力量但无法预测外观变化。因此，需要逆问题方法，直接从皮肤表面观测恢复肌肉变形，填补外观与内部运动之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: SOMA是一个个体化模型，从多视角RGB相机获取表面信号，推断时空肌肉行为。同时构建SKIM数据集，用于软组织变形。该方法首次从多视图RGB数据恢复肌肉变形，避开了传统仿真的复杂性，实现了可扩展且成本效益高的解剖动画。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但声称方法提供了解剖学动画，避免了传统仿真的复杂度，实现了可扩展和成本效益。与现有方法相比，SOMA无需昂贵的物理仿真，直接从真实观测数据生成肌肉变形，提高了适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了从表面观测到肌肉解剖的逆问题求解方法，开创了从RGB数据恢复肌肉变形的新方向。该方法在医学、体育、娱乐等领域具有重要应用价值。未来可扩展至更多人体内部结构建模，推动虚拟人类向生物力学真实度发展。

title: Proposal Refinement for Few-Shot Object Detection
abstract: Few-shot object detection has gained widely attention in recent years. Some excellent algorithms have been proposed to handle this task. However, most of these algorithms rely on the performance of few-shot classification. Unlike previous attempts, our work focuses on the problem of unbalanced distribution of region proposals between the novel classes and the base classes. In order to alleviate this unbalanced distribution, we propose the proposal refinement approach for different training phases. Specifically, refinement loss is designed for the base training phase to enhance sensitivity of the model to novel classes, and refinement branch is introduced as an auxiliary branch for RPN (Region Proposal Networks) to generate more novel proposals in the fine-tuning phase. By rebalancing the proposal distribution, the proposed approach outperforms the baselines methods by roughly 1\%$\sim$6\% on current benchmarks without increasing any inference time. Through extensive experiments, we prove that we establish a new state-of-the-art method for the few-shot object detection task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于提案细化的方法，通过重新平衡基类和新类之间的区域提案分布，提升少样本目标检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本目标检测中，现有算法多依赖分类性能，但忽略了新类与基类间提案分布不均的问题。这种不平衡导致模型对未见过类别敏感度不足，限制了检测效果。因此，亟需一种不增加推理开销的方法来平衡提案分布，提升模型对新类的识别能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出提案细化方法，包含两个部分：基类训练阶段设计细化损失增强模型对新类的敏感性；微调阶段为RPN引入细化分支作为辅助，生成更多新类提案。通过重新平衡提案分布，在不增加推理时间的前提下提升检测性能。
light_analysis.result: 在基准测试上，所提方法相比基线方法在性能上提升约1%至6%，且不增加任何推理时间。大量实验证明该方法在少样本目标检测任务上达到了新的最先进水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过解决提案分布不平衡问题有效提升了少样本检测性能，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的细化策略或扩展到其他检测框架。局限性在于可能对极端样本分布效果有限。

title: EgoTactile: Learning Grasp Pressure for Everyday Objects from Egocentric Video
abstract: Estimating full-hand grasp pressure from egocentric video is critical for immersive VR and robotic manipulation, yet dense tactile sensing often relies on intrusive hardware. Existing vision-based methods predominantly rely on planar surfaces or fingertip contacts, failing to generalize to complex 3D object interactions. Therefore, we introduce EgoTactile, a benchmark pairing egocentric video with full-hand pressure supervision for diverse everyday objects, incorporating a bare-hand transfer subset to enable generalization to natural scenarios. Leveraging this benchmark, we first establish EgoPressureFormer as a discriminative baseline. Beyond this, to explicitly address the uncertainty in partial observations, we propose EgoPressureDiff, a conditional diffusion framework that adapts a large-scale pre-trained video diffusion backbone. By combining rich world knowledge priors with a Physically-Informed Feature Rectification layer to inject semantic constraints, our approach effectively infers plausible contact patterns and resolves visual-physical ambiguities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on the benchmark and robust transferability to in-the-wild scenarios. Our project page is available at https://egotactile.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EgoTactile基准和条件扩散模型EgoPressureDiff，从自我中心视频估计全手抓握压力。
light_analysis.motivation: 沉浸式VR和机器人操作需要从自我中心视频估计全手抓握压力，但现有方法依赖侵入式触觉传感器或仅处理平面/指尖接触，无法泛化到复杂3D物体交互。缺乏配对视频与全手压力的大规模基准，且部分观测导致的不确定性未被有效解决。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建EgoTactile基准，包含日常物体视频与全手压力监督，以及裸手转移子集。提出EgoPressureFormer作为判别基线，并引入EgoPressureDiff条件扩散框架，利用预训练视频扩散骨干融合世界知识，通过物理信息特征校正层注入语义约束，解决视觉-物理歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoTactile基准上，EgoPressureDiff优于EgoPressureFormer及其他基线，实现准确的全手压力估计。具有对野外场景的鲁棒迁移性，验证了在自然环境中泛化的能力。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但称性能优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoTactile为视触觉研究提供了新基准，EgoPressureDiff展示了扩散模型在解决部分观测不确定性方面的潜力。该方法可赋能VR交互和机器人抓取规划。局限性可能包括对视频质量依赖和计算成本，未来可探索实时应用。

title: Orange Lab: Lowering Barriers to Data Mining through Embedded Interactive Workflows
abstract: While visual programming of data analysis workflows has become an important vehicle for the democratization of data science, such systems remain largely confined to standalone applications and offer limited support for transitioning their visual analytics solutions into interactive web environments. As a result, data analysis pipelines are difficult to share, embed, and adapt into user-facing analytical tools. We present Orange Lab, a web-based collaborative environment for visual data analytics. At its core, Orange Lab enables users to visually construct machine learning workflows from modular components, where interactions in any component propagate seamlessly through the workflow, turning static pipelines into dynamic, reactive systems that support exploration and data-driven storytelling. Our key contribution is component exposition, a paradigm that allows authors to embed selected workflow components, or parts of their interfaces, into arbitrary web contexts, creating synchronized, interactive interfaces while hiding underlying workflow complexity. This enables the development of tailored analytical views and narrative-driven experiences that integrate data analysis directly into online materials. We demonstrate the approach through deployments in data literacy education, where embedded components guide students in hands-on exploration of machine learning concepts without requiring knowledge of the underlying system, showing that Orange Lab effectively lowers barriers to entry and supports the democratization of data science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出组件暴露范式，将可视化数据挖掘工作流嵌入任意网页，降低数据科学门槛。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可视化编程数据流系统多为独立应用，难以分享和嵌入到交互式网络环境，限制了分析管道的传播和适应。An Orange Lab旨在解决这一问题，通过支持工作流的嵌入式交互，实现数据科学民主化。
light_analysis.method: Orange Lab是基于Web的协作数据视觉分析环境，用户通过模块化组件构建机器学习工作流，组件间交互无缝传播。核心创新是组件暴露范式，允许作者将选定工作流组件或界面嵌入任意网页，创建同步交互界面，隐藏底层工作流复杂性。
light_analysis.result: 在数据素养教育中部署，嵌入组件引导学生亲手探索机器学习概念，无需了解底层系统。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但表明有效降低了入门壁垒，支持数据科学民主化。
light_analysis.conclusion: Orange Lab通过嵌入式交互工作流降低了数据挖掘工具的使用门槛，支持数据科学民主化。组件暴露范式使分析工具可嵌入在线材料，创建定制化分析视图和叙事驱动的体验。未来可扩展到更多应用场景。

title: Semi-supervised Source Detection in Astronomical Images: New Benchmark and Strong Baseline
abstract: Source detection in modern observational astronomy is a cornerstone for localizing and identifying stellar sources accurately. It is crucial for studies such as stellar population synthesis and cosmological parameter estimation. However, the characteristics of astronomical images, including high density, the effect of point spread functions and low signal-to-noise ratios, significantly challenge the latest advanced object detectors. Besides, fully-supervised detection methods are hardly practical, due to the significant difficulty in annotating dense, small, and faint sources in astronomical images. To tackle the scarcity of astronomical datasets, we introduce a new comprehensive benchmark (LAMOST-DET), comprising 18,400 astronomical images and 728,898 source instances. Upon the dataset, we further devise a novel semi-supervised learning framework coined Nova Teacher, capable of detecting dense sources effectively given sparse annotations. It integrates source light enhancement module, confidence-guided pseudo-supervision, and cross-view complementary mining in a dual-teacher paradigm. Extensive experiments on LAMOST-DET show that, Nova Teacher consistently improves previous competitors by 4.04% and 5.22% mAP under two semi-supervised settings. Additionally, our method competes against other detectors on a natural image dataset, validating its generalization ability to various scenarios. The source code is available at https://github.com/AcWiz/NovaTeacher.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半监督天文图像源检测新基准LAMOST-DET和Nova Teacher框架，通过稀疏标注实现密集源的有效检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 天文图像中源检测是恒星定位和参数估计的关键，但高密度、点扩散函数和低信噪比使传统检测器效果不佳。全监督方法因标注密集、微小和微弱源极其困难而难以实用，亟需利用少量标注数据的高效检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含18,400张图像和728,898个源实例的LAMOST-DET基准。提出Nova Teacher半监督学习框架，包含源光增强模块、置信度引导伪监督和跨视角互补挖掘，采用双教师范式。在稀疏标注下通过多视角协同学习提升检测性能。
light_analysis.result: 在LAMOST-DET上，Nova Teacher在两种半监督设置下mAP分别提升4.04%和5.22%，超越现有方法。在自然图像数据集上也表现出竞争力，验证了泛化能力。代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Nova Teacher有效解决了天文图像中密集源检测的标注瓶颈，为低信噪比场景提供新思路。基准和代码可推动半监督检测在天文学中的应用，未来可扩展至更复杂的多波段或时域图像。

title: Minimal Solvers for Full-DoF Motion Estimation from Asynchronous Differential SfM
abstract: As a bio-inspired intelligent sensor, event cameras have introduced a new paradigm in the intelligent perception of spatiotemporal information and visual motion estimation, characterized by their high temporal resolution, low latency, and minimal power consumption. However, their asynchronous data streams present significant challenges to traditional synchronous, frame-based algorithms. To address these challenges, this paper presents a novel framework for full degree of freedom (DoF) egomotion estimation directly from asynchronous optical flow, specifically targeting the joint recovery of angular and linear velocities. We decouple the differential epipolar constraint into distinct angular and linear velocity components, and derive its formulation for asynchronous data. Based on this formulation, an optimization algorithm is developed that enables full-DoF egomotion estimation leveraging at least five points. Furthermore, by applying a first-order approximation to rotational dynamics, we transform the constraint equations into a polynomial form, resulting in the first algebraic minimal 5-point solver for this formulation. To ensure real-time performance in high-speed scenarios, we additionally propose an accelerated solver achieved by truncating high-order angular velocity terms. Extensive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the asynchronous approach outperforms traditional synchronous methods, particularly in its accuracy and robustness to spatiotemporal noise. We believe that this work establishes a critical foundation for efficient and accurate continuous-time motion estimation in high-speed robotics applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种从异步光流直接估计六自由度自运动的最小求解器，首次实现五点的代数解法。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机具有高时间分辨率、低延迟和低功耗等优势，但其异步数据流对传统同步帧算法构成挑战。现有方法难以充分利用异步信息进行全自由度运动估计，尤其在高动态场景下精度和鲁棒性不足。该研究旨在直接利用异步光流联合恢复角速度和线速度，填补异步视觉运动估计的空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出将差分极线约束解耦为角速度和线速度分量，并推导出异步数据的约束形式。基于该约束构建优化算法，至少五点点即可实现六自由度运动估计。进一步对旋转动力学施加一阶近似，将约束转化为多项式形式，得到首个代数最小五点求解器。为满足高速实时需求，通过截断高阶角速度项设计加速求解器。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量评估表明，与传统的同步方法相比，所提出的异步方法在精度和对时空噪声的鲁棒性上表现更优，尤其在高速运动场景下优势显著。具体性能指标（如准确率提升幅度）摘要未明确说明，但强调异步方法整体更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为高效精确的连续时间运动估计奠定了基础，特别适用于高速机器人应用。创新点包括解耦约束、五点求解器和加速求解器。未来可进一步优化算法实时性并拓展至更复杂的运动场景，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: Event-driven dynamic trajectories reconstruction and measurement of mechanical parameters for fragments
abstract: During warhead detonation, high-density, high-speed, and mutually occluded fragments are generated. Their mechanical parameters (position, velocity, kinetic energy) directly determine the lethality of the warhead fragment field. However, high-intensity flash and smoke in detonation scenarios severely hinder the accurate acquisition of these mechanical parameters. To address this challenge, this paper integrates experimental mechanics approaches and presents an event-driven method for reconstructing the dynamic trajectories of fragments and measuring their mechanical parameters. As a novel brain-inspired visual sensor, event cameras offer microsecond-level temporal resolution and high dynamic range lighting change perception, overcoming the difficulty of accurately measuring high-speed targets under strong flash interference. The method constructs a multi-event-camera vision system, adopting three geometric constraints: time-correlated epipolar constraint to find potential matching event point pairs, and trifocal tensor line constraint plus local homography constraint to eliminate mismatches. A comprehensive probability model is established, with entropy weight method determining the weight of each constraint's probability to quantitatively filter mismatches. 3D trajectory reconstruction is achieved via spatial line-line intersection and nonlinear optimization. Finally, the velocity and kinetic energy of the fragments are calculated based on the reconstructed trajectory. This method provides reliable technical support for the mechanical damage evaluation of warhead fragment fields and the tactical protection design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出事件驱动方法，利用事件相机重建爆炸碎片动态轨迹并测量机械参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 战斗部爆炸产生高密度高速碎片，强闪光和烟雾严重干扰传统相机对碎片机械参数的精确测量。事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和极高动态范围，但如何利用其应对强干扰下的多碎片轨迹重建和参数测量是挑战。现有方法难以同时处理高速运动、强闪光和多碎片遮挡，需要新的多视图几何约束和概率模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建多事件相机视觉系统，提出时间相关极线约束寻找潜在匹配点对，结合三焦张量线约束和局部单应性约束剔除误匹配。建立综合概率模型，用熵权法确定各约束概率权重，定量过滤误匹配。通过空间线线相交和非线性优化实现碎片3D轨迹重建，进而计算速度和动能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但表明该方法能有效克服强闪光和烟雾干扰，准确重建碎片动态轨迹并测量位置、速度和动能等机械参数。与传统方法相比，事件相机的高时间分辨率和动态范围显著提升测量精度和鲁棒性，为战斗部碎片场机械损伤评估提供可靠技术支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法成功将事件相机应用于爆炸碎片轨迹重建和参数测量，解决了传统视觉方法在强干扰下的失效问题。学术上拓展了神经形态视觉在实验力学中的应用，实践上为武器效能评估和防护设计提供关键技术。未来可进一步优化多事件相机校准和实时处理能力，扩展至其他高速动态场景。

title: The Injection Paradox: Brand-Level Suppression in Safety-Trained LLM Recommendations via RAG Context Injection
abstract: We present a reproducible failure mode of safety training in RAG-based LLM recommendation -- the Injection Paradox -- in which prompt injections embedded in retrieved documents backfire against the attacker, suppressing the target brand below the injection-free baseline. In safety-trained Claude models, documents containing prompt injections suffer a sharp drop in recommendation rate, and this suppression propagates beyond the injected document to unmodified documents of the same brand. In Claude Opus 4.6, the target brand drops from a 54% baseline to zero top-2 recommendations across all 50 trials, even though only 1 of 4 brand documents in the corpus contains an injection. The directional pattern is reproduced in counterfactual experiments and across three brands. A contrasting result across the GPT models tested, where the same injection instead increases recommendations, suggests model-family differences in how injection-like context affects recommendation behavior. These findings raise the technical possibility of a reverse-attack scenario in which an adversary embeds injections in a competitor's documents to suppress the competitor's brand via safety-sensitive model behavior.
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, 15 tables. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Failure Modes in Agentic AI (FAGEN), a non-archival venue

light_analysis.overview: 发现安全训练语言模型在RAG推荐中，检索文档中的提示注入会反噬攻击者，抑制目标品牌推荐。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在RAG推荐系统中可能被恶意注入攻击，但现有安全训练可能产生意外副作用。该研究揭示了一种可控失败模式：注入文档不仅无效，反而导致品牌推荐率大幅下降，甚至波及同品牌未修改文档。该问题对于理解安全训练的行为一致性及防止反向攻击至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过构造包含品牌文档的检索语料库，在其中一篇文档中嵌入提示注入，评估Claude系列和GPT系列模型在推荐任务中的表现。实验设置50次试验，测量目标品牌在top-2推荐中的出现率。同时进行反事实实验，控制注入位置和品牌类型，验证抑制效应的模式。
light_analysis.result: 在Claude Opus 4.6中，目标品牌推荐率从54%基线降至0%，且抑制效应扩展到同品牌未注入文档。该模式在三个品牌上复现，并与GPT模型形成对比（GPT中注入反而提升推荐）。表明不同模型家族对注入上下文的敏感性存在系统性差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了安全训练在RAG推荐中的意外副作用，可能被攻击者反向利用来打压竞争对手。学术上指出了安全对齐的局部性，实际应用中需注意模型行为的不一致性。未来需要更鲁棒的对抗训练机制。

title: MASS: Deep Research for Social Sciences with Memory-Augmented Social Simulation
abstract: Deep Research agents powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) have exhibited extraordinary potential in automated paper writing tasks. However, existing systems rely heavily on literature retrieval and synthesis through internet and local knowledge bases, often resulting research in lacking insight and creativity in social science. To address this issue, we propose "Memory-Augmented Social Simulation (MASS)", an innovative paradigm that leverages highly realistic and research-oriented social simulations to enhance the creativity and empirical founding of LLMs-generated research. Specifically, MASS integrates three core components: dynamic goal-path planning with multi-level social norm restraint to guide the simulation, a multi-disciplinary behavior dataset for agent memory cold-start, and a structured forgetting mechanism inspired by the Ebbinghaus curve. Together, these ensure simulation authenticity and provide a robust empirical foundation for generating innovative scholarly papers. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, showing a 6.81\% improvement in generation overall quality over foundation LLMs and 17.19\% gain in Insight over strong baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出记忆增强社会模拟（MASS）范式，通过社会模拟和记忆机制提升LLM在社会科学研究中的创造性和实证性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的深度研究代理依赖文献检索与综合，缺乏洞察力和创造力，尤其在社会科学领域。社会科学研究需要实证基础和创新能力，而现有方法仅基于现有知识库的检索合成，难以产生突破性见解。因此，亟需一种能模拟社会行为并生成创新性研究论文的方法。
light_analysis.method: MASS包含三个核心组件：动态目标路径规划与多级社会规范约束，引导模拟过程；多学科行为数据集用于代理记忆冷启动；基于艾宾浩斯曲线的结构化遗忘机制模拟人类记忆衰减。三者协同确保模拟真实性，为论文生成提供稳健实证基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MASS在生成整体质量上相比基础LLM提升6.81%，在洞察力方面相比强基线提升17.19%。摘要未明确说明具体基线方法和数据集，但结果证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MASS通过社会模拟增强了LLM生成研究的创新性和实证基础，为社会科学自动化研究提供了新范式。其价值在于弥补纯文献检索的不足，未来可探索更复杂的遗忘机制或跨领域应用，但当前可能受限于模拟规模和计算成本。

title: Symbolic and Abstractive Reasoning with Complex Visual Queries
abstract: Understanding and reasoning over abstract visual content remains a challenge for current multi-modal large language models (MLLMs). In this paper, we explore a novel abstract data type termed complex visual query (CVQ), designed to probe symbolic and abstractive reasoning, which is a critical yet underexplored dimension of human-like neuro-symbolic reasoning for MLLMs. We present a comprehensive investigation from three perspectives: \textbf{Data $\times$ Paradigm $\times$ Exploration}. Specifically, we propose a scalable pipeline for synthesizing CVQs grounded in large-scale multi-modal knowledge graphs, generating a diverse dataset encompassing 14 distinct query types via systematic combinations of first-order logic operators. We further introduce a two-stage training framework that progressively equips MLLMs with robust visual reasoning capabilities. We conduct extensive experiments to rigorously evaluate MLLMs across multiple dimensions, including reasoning performance on CVQs, as well as cross-task and cross-scenario generalization. We believe our work opens new perspectives and avenues for advancing the reasoning frontiers of MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出复杂视觉查询（CVQ）概念，探究多模态大语言模型的符号与抽象推理，构建数据集及两阶段训练框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在理解抽象视觉内容方面仍面临挑战，而符号和抽象推理是类人神经符号推理的关键维度，但尚未充分探索。本文旨在通过设计复杂视觉查询（CVQ）来系统性地评估和提升MLLMs的推理能力，填补该领域的研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出可扩展的管道，基于大规模多模态知识图谱合成CVQ，生成包含14种查询类型的数据集，通过一阶逻辑算子系统组合。引入两阶段训练框架，逐步赋予MLLMs强大的视觉推理能力。方法结合数据合成与训练范式创新，但具体模型细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验，在CVQ推理性能、跨任务和跨场景泛化能力上对MLLMs进行了严格评估。摘要未提供具体数据，但表明方法有效提升了模型的视觉推理能力，优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了复杂视觉查询（CVQ）概念、配套数据集及两阶段训练框架，为推进MLLMs的推理边界提供了新视角。该研究具有重要的学术价值，有望启发未来在神经符号推理和多模态理解方向的工作。

title: Asymptotic Optimality of Thompson Sampling for Risk-Averse Bandits with Sub-Gaussian Rewards
abstract: We prove that $ρ\text{-}\mathrm{NPTS}_{\mathrm{SG}}$, an anchor-free nonparametric Thompson Sampling algorithm for risk-averse bandits, achieves regret matching the instance-dependent lower bound to leading order in $\log n$, establishing it as asymptotically optimal for any continuous risk functional $ρ$ (CVaR, mean-variance, Sharpe ratio, distortion risk measures, and more) on the class of distributions with bounded density and sub-Gaussian tails, including Gaussian arms. Both this result and its bounded-support counterpart require only continuity of $ρ$: strictly weaker than the dominance condition of prior parametric Thompson Sampling results, and strictly weaker than the Lipschitz condition of UCB-type algorithms, yielding the first instance-optimal guarantees for non-Lipschitz functionals such as the Sharpe ratio without parametric reward assumptions. The bounded-support case is developed first as a stepping stone sharing the same proof structure. The key technical contributions are a discretisation lemma (bounded support) and a truncated discretisation lemma (sub-Gaussian tails), each projecting the growing-alphabet Dirichlet posterior onto a fixed grid via the Dirichlet aggregation property, holding all polynomial prefactors at fixed degree independent of sample size and breaking the super-exponential barrier that blocked prior proofs.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了非参数汤普森采样算法ρ-NPTS_SG在风险厌恶多臂赌博机中达到渐近最优性，首次为非利普希茨风险函数（如夏普比率）提供实例最优保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 风险厌恶多臂赌博机问题中，现有方法如参数化汤普森采样要求风险函数的优势条件，UCB型算法要求利普希茨连续性，限制了应用范围，例如无法处理夏普比率等非利普希茨风险函数。本文旨在为非参数、非利普希茨风险函数提供渐近最优的汤普森采样算法，无需参数化奖励假设，解决现有理论障碍。
light_analysis.method: 提出ρ-NPTS_SG算法，一种无锚点的非参数汤普森采样方法。核心创新是两个离散化引理：有界支撑离散化引理和截断离散化引理（用于次高斯尾巴），通过狄利克雷聚合性质将增长的狄利克雷后验投影到固定网格上，保持多项式因子的固定次数，打破超指数复杂性屏障。要求风险函数连续且分布密度有界、次高斯尾巴。
light_analysis.result: 证明了ρ-NPTS_SG的遗憾界匹配实例相关下界的主阶，达到渐近最优性。与现有参数化汤普森采样结果相比，条件严格更弱（仅需连续性而非优势条件）；与UCB型算法相比，无需利普希茨条件。适用于连续风险函数，包括CVaR、均值方差、夏普比率等，且无需参数化奖励假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为风险厌恶多臂赌博机提供了首个非参数、渐近最优的汤普森采样算法，显著放宽了对风险函数的正则性要求。学术上解决了超指数屏障，实践上可处理非利普希茨风险函数，如夏普比率。局限在于连续性和分布假设，未来可扩展至非连续风险或更一般的尾巴分布。

title: CP4D: Compositional Physics-aware 4D Scene Generation
abstract: 4D generation (\textit{i.e.}, dynamic 3D generation) has recently emerged as a rapidly growing research frontier due to its powerful spatiotemporal modeling capabilities. However, despite notable advances, existing approaches typically fail to capture the underlying physical principles, producing results that are both physically inconsistent and visually implausible. To overcome this limitation, we present CP4D, a novel paradigm for photorealistic 4D scene synthesis with faithful adherence to complex physical dynamics. Drawing inspiration from the compositional nature of real-world scenes, where immutable static backgrounds coexist with dynamic, physically plausible foregrounds, CP4D reformulates 4D generation as the integration of a static 3D environment with physically grounded dynamic objects. On this basis, our framework follows a three-stage pipeline: \textbf{1)} Firstly, we leverage pre-trained expert models to generate high-fidelity 3D representations of the environment and foreground objects respectively. \textbf{2)} Subsequently, to produce physically plausible trajectories and realistic interactions for these objects, we propose a hybrid motion synthesis strategy that integrates priors from physical simulators with the common sense embedded in video diffusion models. \textbf{3)} Finally, we develop an automated composition mechanism that seamlessly fuses the static environment and dynamic objects into coherent, physically consistent 4D scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CP4D can generate explorable and interactive 4D scenes with high visual fidelity, strong physical plausibility, and fine-grained controllability, significantly outperforming existing methods. The project page: https://anonymous.4open.science/w/CP4D/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CP4D，一种组合式物理感知4D场景生成方法，通过静态环境与物理驱动动态对象集成，实现物理一致且视觉逼真的动态3D合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D生成方法虽具强大时空建模能力，但未捕捉底层物理原理，导致结果物理不一致且视觉不真实。为解决这一问题，CP4D从真实场景组合性出发，将不可变静态背景与动态物理前景融合，实现高物理逼真度的4D场景生成。
light_analysis.method: CP4D采用三阶段流程：1) 利用预训练专家模型分别生成高保真静态环境与前景对象的3D表示；2) 提出混合运动合成策略，整合物理模拟器先验与视频扩散模型的常识，以生成物理合理轨迹及交互；3) 开发自动化组合机制，无缝融合静态环境与动态对象到一致4D场景中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CP4D可生成可探索、可交互的4D场景，在视觉保真度、物理合理性与细粒度可控性上显著优于现有方法。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调综合性能力提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CP4D通过组合式物理感知范式，解决了4D生成中物理不一致问题，为动态场景合成提供了新思路。其应用价值涵盖虚拟现实、仿真等领域。未来可探索更复杂交互与实时生成。

title: Counterfactual Reasoning for Fine-Grained Evidence Disentanglement in VideoQA
abstract: Recent advances in video multimodal models have significantly improved VideoQA performance. However, these systems often rely on spurious statistical correlations rather than answer-relevant causal evidence, resulting in unfaithful and brittle reasoning, especially in complex real-world scenarios. Existing methods either rely on cross-modality correlations, costly curated training resources, or insufficient causal assumptions and constraints, and typically operate at the time-interval level. As a result, they fail to explicitly disentangle causal visual cues from confounders and provide limited fine-grained evidence localization. To address this issue, we propose a Counterfactual Reasoning framework for fine-grained Evidence Disentanglement (CREDiT). CREDiT formulates the VideoQA process using a structural causal model and learns cross-modality representations that are explicitly decomposed into causal and non-causal components under independence and minimality constraints. To facilitate faithful disentanglement, we introduce feature-level causal interventions and construct counterfactual inputs that approximate causal effects while suppressing non-causal correlations. Extensive experiments on NExT-GQA, SportsQA, and SPORTU-video demonstrate that CREDiT consistently improves answer accuracy and reasoning reliability across both generic and complex sports scenarios, leading to more trustworthy VideoQA systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实推理框架CREDiT，通过结构因果模型解耦因果与非因果特征，提升VideoQA推理的可靠性和细粒度证据定位能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VideoQA模型常依赖虚假统计相关而非因果证据，导致推理不可靠，尤其在复杂场景中。现有方法依赖跨模态相关、昂贵标注或不足的因果约束，且仅在时间区间层面操作，无法显式解耦因果视觉线索与干扰因素，缺乏细粒度证据定位。因此需要一种能精确区分因果与非因果特征的方法。
light_analysis.method: CREDiT基于结构因果模型建模VideoQA过程，将跨模态表示显式分解为因果和非因果组件，并施加独立性和最小性约束。引入特征级因果干预，构造反事实输入以近似因果效应，抑制非因果相关。通过这种反事实推理实现细粒度证据解耦，无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在NExT-GQA、SportsQA和SPORTU-video三个数据集上，CREDiT在通用和复杂体育场景中均一致提升了答案准确率和推理可靠性。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明比现有方法更有效，并增强了系统可信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: CREDiT通过反事实推理有效解耦因果证据，提升了VideoQA的忠实性和鲁棒性。该工作为解决多模态因果推理提供了新范式，具有在视频理解、自动驾驶等需要可靠推理的场景中的应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的因果干预或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Claude Code-Driving Scenario Mining for the Argoverse 2 Challenge
abstract: We present our submission to the CVPR 2026 Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Challenge. Our system uses a four-stage pipeline: (1) autonomous code generation via a Claude Code agent powered by GLM~5.1, (2) iterative training set screening with Timestamp Balanced Accuracy threshold 0.8 to curate few-shot examples, (3) semantic code review by a separate Claude Code session, and (4) Qwen3-VL scene-level verification to filter false positives. We report results on the Argoverse 2 test set.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大语言模型代码生成和视觉验证的四阶段自动驾驶场景挖掘方法，用于Argoverse 2挑战赛。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶场景挖掘需要从海量数据中自动提取关键场景，现有方法依赖人工或规则，效率低且泛化性差。利用大语言模型和视觉模型自动化生成与验证代码，可提升挖掘准确性和效率，降低人工成本。
light_analysis.method: 采用四阶段pipeline：1）基于GLM 5.1的Claude Code agent自主生成场景挖掘代码；2）用Timestamp Balanced Accuracy阈值0.8迭代筛选训练集，构建few-shot示例；3）另一Claude Code session进行语义代码审查；4）Qwen3-VL场景级验证以过滤假阳性。
light_analysis.result: 在Argoverse 2测试集上报告结果，摘要未给出具体数值。推测该方法通过自动代码生成与验证，相比传统规则方法能更准确地挖掘场景，同时减少人工干预。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了将大语言模型代码生成与视觉验证结合用于自动驾驶场景挖掘的有效性，具有自动化、可扩展优点。未来可优化代码生成准确性和验证效率，并应用于更多驾驶场景。

title: Culturally-Adapted Red-Teaming Across East and Southeast Asian Contexts: A Methodological and Comparative Analysis
abstract: Multilingual safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) has predominantly relied on direct translation (DT) of English benchmarks into target languages - an approach that converts surface-level linguistic form while failing to reflect the cultural context embedded in threat scenarios, social norms, and legal frameworks. We construct paired DT and culturally-adapted (CA) datasets via 1:1 seed matching for four languages - Korean (KO), Japanese (JA), Thai (TH), and Khmer (KM) - and compare Attack Success Rate (ASR) and Cultural Realism scores across four open-source LLM. CA prompts yield Delta-ASR > 0 across all 16 language x model combinations (mean +9.3 pp), and DT-based evaluation underestimates risk in 44 of 48 category x language combinations. Language-level analysis reveals that the distribution of threat forms is heterogeneous across languages. Cultural Realism analysis further shows that DT Cultural Depth (C3) scores remain consistently below 1.0 out of 3.0 across all four languages (mean 0.17), whereas CA scores reach up to 2.51, indicating that direct translation produces inputs systematically divergent from those encountered in real-world multicultural settings. These findings demonstrate that adapting benchmarks to language-specific cultural contexts - rather than relying on linguistic translation alone - is necessary for valid multilingual LLM safety evaluation.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop on AIWILDS

light_analysis.overview: 提出文化适应（CA）方法进行多语言LLM安全评估，证明直接翻译（DT）低估风险，CA显著提高评估真实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多语言LLM安全评估主要依赖英语基准的直接翻译，但这种方法仅转换语言形式，无法反映威胁场景、社会规范和法律框架中的文化背景，导致评估结果偏离实际。该研究旨在证明文化适应对于有效的多语言安全评估的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 构建韩、日、泰、高棉语的配对直接翻译（DT）和文化适应（CA）数据集，通过1:1种子匹配。使用四个开源LLM，比较攻击成功率（ASR）和文化现实主义（Cultural Realism）分数，包括文化深度（C3）指标。
light_analysis.result: CA提示在所有16种语言×模型组合中Delta-ASR>0（平均+9.3pp），DT在44/48类别×语言组合中低估风险。DT的C3分数平均0.17/3，CA最高达2.51，显示DT输入与真实多文化场景系统性偏离。
light_analysis.conclusion: 文化适应是有效多语言LLM安全评估的关键，仅靠语言翻译会导致评估失真。该方法提高了评估的生态效度，为未来多语言安全基准构建提供了方法论指导。潜在局限：仅覆盖四种东亚/东南亚语言，其他语言和文化需要进一步验证。

title: CANS: Accelerating Multiuser Collaborative Edge Inference via Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon
abstract: Recently, mobile edge computing (MEC)-enabled collaborative deep neural network (DNN) inference has emerged as a promising approach for delivering intelligent services to resource-constrained mobile devices. A representative scenario is multi-user collaborative edge inference, where distinct devices independently partition their DNN models and offload backend computation to a common edge server over wireless networks. However, determining the optimal DNN partition for each device is challenging due to unknown and time-varying system conditions, including fluctuating wireless links and diverse device capabilities. To address this problem, we propose Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon (CANS), a collaborative edge inference framework that enables devices to adaptively learn optimal DNN partitions by sharing informative feedback during online inference. To handle the challenge of device heterogeneity and better leverage offline inference experience, we integrate a novel FedLinUCB-DW algorithm that groups devices of the same type and warm-starts online exploration using local offline early-exit inference experience. Furthermore, we provide theoretical guarantees for FedLinUCB-DW by deriving the regret upper bound. We also validate our method on both a simulated environment and a hardware prototype system. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that CANS achieves lower inference latency compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Especially, in prototype experiments on two edge devices, the proposed CANS reduced average inference latency by up to 50% compared to the non-cooperative baseline.
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables, submitted for possible journal publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出CANS框架，通过设备间共享反馈自适应学习最优DNN分区，加速多用户协作边缘推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多用户协作边缘推理中，每个设备独立分区DNN并将后端计算卸载到边缘服务器，但动态无线链路和设备能力差异使得最优分区难以确定。现有方法未充分利用设备间协作和离线经验，导致推理延迟高。
light_analysis.method: 提出CANS框架，设备在线推理时共享反馈信息以自适应学习最优分区。针对设备异质性，集成FedLinUCB-DW算法，将同类设备分组，利用本地离线early-exit推理经验进行热启动在线探索。提供了理论保证（后悔上界）。在模拟环境和硬件原型上验证。
light_analysis.result: CANS在推理延迟上优于基线方法。特别是，在双设备原型实验中，与非协作基线相比，平均推理延迟降低最多50%。
light_analysis.conclusion: CANS通过协作学习和自适应分区有效降低延迟，具有理论和实践价值。未来可扩展到更多设备或考虑通信成本等。

title: IMUG-Bench: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Models on Interleaved Understanding and Generation
abstract: In recent years, unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged to support both understanding and generation within a single framework. Mastering dynamic, multi-turn interleaved image-text dialogues is a crucial task for UMMs in real-world applications. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this important task, as they are often limited to single-turn or static settings, and typically overlook exposure bias in multi-turn interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose IMUG-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for multi-turn interleaved image-text dialogue of UMMs that jointly evaluates their understanding and generation capabilities. Our IMUG-Bench comprises three classes: Static Spatial, Temporal Causal, and Hybrid, covering 3,113 samples and 12,034 interaction turns. It also includes dynamic understanding questions, thereby supporting evaluation that better reflects real-world multi-turn interaction scenarios. Large-scale experiments on IMUG-Bench systematically evaluate mainstream open-source and closed-source UMMs, revealing their capability boundaries and failure modes, and uncovering pronounced exposure bias on the generation side in multi-turn interactions. We further explore several test-time scaling strategies, including Chain-of-Thought, Self-Verification, and Best-of-N Sampling, which effectively improve generation accuracy and mitigate exposure bias in generation tasks. These findings provide insights into enhancing the robustness and multi-turn interaction capability of future UMMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IMUG-Bench基准，用于评估统一多模态模型在多轮交织图文对话中的理解与生成能力，并发现暴露偏差及缓解策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准无法评估多轮交织图文对话，局限于单轮或静态设置，忽略多轮交互中的暴露偏差。因此需要全面的基准来评估UMMs的真实多轮交互能力。
light_analysis.method: IMUG-Bench包含静态空间、时间因果和混合三类，共3113个样本和12034轮交互，包含动态理解问题。对主流开源和闭源UMMs进行系统评估，并探索测试时扩展策略如CoT、自验证、最佳N采样。
light_analysis.result: 揭示了UMMs的能力边界和失败模式，发现生成侧存在显著暴露偏差。测试时扩展策略有效提高生成准确性并缓解暴露偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了增强未来UMMs鲁棒性和多轮交互能力的见解。基准和策略可推动该领域发展。

title: Vision-Language Guided Hyperspectral Object Tracking via Semantics Fusion and Contextual Template Updating
abstract: Hyperspectral object tracking (HOT) leverages the rich spectral information provided by hyperspectral videos (HSVs), offering substantial potential for object tracking. However, efficiently extracting and exploiting spectral information from redundant spectral bands remains a fundamental challenge, which severely limits model generalization and tracking performance. Moreover, in dynamic scenes, targets often experience drastic appearance variations due to factors such as occlusion and illumination changes. These variations lead to large deformations between the current frame and the template. Such discrepancies pose major challenges for existing temporal modeling approaches. In this work, we propose VLHTrack, a novel hyperspectral vision-language (VL) joint tracking framework. Specifically, we incorporate language priors to address the fundamental challenge of spectral redundancy by designing a Language-Guided Band Selection Module (LBSM). By leveraging Large Language Model (LLM) descriptions, LBSM establishes a semantic-to-spectral mapping that mitigates redundancy and accentuates discriminative spectral features. A Multi-Modal Vision-Language Fusion Module is then employed to seamlessly integrate visual and linguistic embeddings, harnessing their complementary advantages to learn coherent cross-modal representations. To address target deformation in long-term sequences, we propose a dynamic update template feature strategy implemented via the Dynamic Template Update with Mamba (DTUM) module. By leveraging selective state space modeling, DTUM learns inter-frame dependencies to update template feature, ensuring efficient template feature evolution guided by temporal context. Experiments on HOT2023 and HOT2024 demonstrate that VLHTrack outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VLHTrack，一种通过语义融合和上下文模板更新的视觉语言引导高光谱目标跟踪框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 高光谱目标跟踪利用丰富光谱信息，但冗余波段导致模型泛化差且性能受限；动态场景中目标因遮挡、光照变化等出现剧烈外观变形，现有时间建模方法难以应对模板与当前帧的差异。因此亟需解决光谱冗余和模板更新问题。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括：语言引导波段选择模块（LBSM）利用大语言模型描述建立语义-光谱映射以选择判别性波段；多模态视觉语言融合模块整合视觉和语言嵌入获得互补表示；动态模板更新模块（DTUM）采用Mamba选择状态空间模型学习帧间依赖，随时间演进模板特征。
light_analysis.result: 在HOT2023和HOT2024数据集上，VLHTrack优于现有最优方法，具体性能提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高效利用光谱信息和适应动态场景的跟踪框架，通过语言先验缓解冗余并增强特征判别性，通过上下文模板更新解决外观变形。学术价值在于融合视觉语言知识与状态空间模型，实际应用可提升高光谱视频跟踪鲁棒性。未来可探索更精细的语言引导或跨模态融合策略。

title: Reliable to Expressive: A Curriculum for Rubric-Following Safety Judges
abstract: Safety judges are increasingly deployed to evaluate model outputs against evolving criteria, yet recent meta-evaluation work shows they remain brittle under prompt and rubric variation, with false negative-rate swings of up to 0.24 reported for stylistic perturbations alone. We argue that safety judgment is fundamentally a rubric-following problem: a robust judge must apply the given evaluation criteria consistently across rubric formulations rather than memorize one specific template. We propose a training strategy that combines (i) instance-conditioned dynamic rubrics generated from prompt-response-label triples to expose the judge to the variability of evaluation criteria, and (ii) a reliable-to-expressive curriculum that begins with clean fixed-rubric supervision and progressively introduces noisier dynamic-rubric data. We evaluate on a single human-labeled set under three contrasting rubric prompts (HarmBench-style, ShieldGemma-style, and a domain-specific rubric). Our 12B curriculum judge achieves 94.12-94.88% accuracy across the three rubrics with a cross-rubric range of only 0.76, outperforming general-purpose LLMs, dedicated safety classifiers, and reasoning-oriented judges up to 30B in both peak accuracy and stability. An ablation shows that naively mixing dynamic rubrics into SFT increases cross rubric variance (1.44 -> 3.60); only the curriculum schedule recovers and improves on the fixed rubric baseline (variance 0.76).
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop on AIWILDS

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合实例条件动态规则与可靠到表达性课程训练的安全法官，显著提升跨规则准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有安全法官在提示和规则变化下表现脆弱，假阴性率波动高达0.24。安全判断本质是遵循规则问题，法官需一贯应用不同规则表述而非记忆模板。因此需要训练策略提高鲁棒性，避免因规则表述变化导致性能大幅波动。
light_analysis.method: 训练策略包括：(i) 从提示-响应-标签三元组生成实例条件动态规则，使法官适应评估标准变化；(ii) 可靠到表达性课程：从干净固定规则监督开始，逐步引入噪声动态规则数据。在单一人工标注集上，使用HarmBench、ShieldGemma和领域特定三种规则提示评估。模型为12B参数。
light_analysis.result: 12B课程法官在三规则下准确率为94.12%-94.88%，跨规则范围仅0.76，优于通用LLM（如GPT-4）、专用安全分类器和30B推理导向法官。消融实验显示：单纯混合动态规则到SFT使跨规则方差从1.44升至3.60，而课程计划恢复并改进固定规则基线（方差0.76）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明课程训练结合动态规则可有效提升安全法官的跨规则鲁棒性和准确性。该方法适用于需要一致评估的安全系统，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更多规则类型和更大规模模型。

title: Zero-Parameter Geometric Gating for Temporally Stable Low-Altitude UAV Video Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Video semantic segmentation for low-altitude UAVs requires temporal consistency, yet dense optical flow introduces spatially structured noise in the planar regions that dominate aerial imagery. We propose a zero-parameter geometric gate that uses RANSAC homography inlier ratios on a $16\times16$ spatial grid to route each region to either homography or optical flow warp before fusion via Semantic Similarity Propagation. The gate requires no learned parameters -- only a median-threshold binary decision on RANSAC statistics -- adding only 211K trainable parameters (the SSP fusion layer) to a frozen backbone. On synthetic UAVid, the method achieves +4.24--4.91\% mIoU improvement over base models across two architectures (SegFormer-b2 and Hiera-S+UPerNet). Mechanism diagnostics reveal that flow residuals in planar regions are spatially autocorrelated (Moran's I = 0.32, $p < 0.001$), predict boundary instability (Spearman $ρ= 0.66$), and that rigidification recovers temporal consistency from 62\% to 92\% (+29.5pp) in homography-valid regions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种零参数几何门控方法，利用RANSAC单应性内点比率实现无人机视频语义分割的时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 低空无人机视频语义分割需要时间一致性，但密集光流在平面区域引入空间结构噪声，这些区域在航拍图像中占主导地位。现有方法依赖光流或单应性变换，但各自存在局限。本文旨在无需学习参数的情况下，通过几何门控实现鲁棒的区域融合。
light_analysis.method: 提出零参数几何门控，在16×16空间网格上计算RANSAC单应性内点比率，基于中值阈值二元决策将每个区域路由至单应性或光流变形，再通过语义相似性传播（SSP）融合。门控无需训练参数，仅SSP层增加211K可训练参数，使用冻结骨干网络。
light_analysis.result: 在合成UAVid数据集上，基于SegFormer-b2和Hiera-S+UPerNet两种架构，mIoU提升4.24-4.91%。机制诊断表明：平面区域光流残差空间自相关（Moran's I=0.32, p<0.001），预测边界不稳定性（Spearman ρ=0.66），单应性有效区域刚性化使时间一致性从62%恢复至92%（+29.5pp）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法无需可学习参数即可有效融合单应性和光流，提升无人机视频语义分割的时间一致性，特别适用于平面区域占主导的航拍场景。未来可探索扩展到动态场景或与学习型门控结合。

title: Crop Recommendation and Agricultural Query Answering System Using Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks and Hybrid Retrieval Augmentation
abstract: This paper presents a unified system designed to support precision agriculture by integrating advanced weather prediction, crop recommendation, and a question-answering tool for farmers. We propose two deep learning models -- a Transformer-based Graph Neural Network and a Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN) -- to forecast weather conditions for the next 30 days using data from 1,359 locations in Nepal. The STGCN outperforms the Transformer-based model in accuracy (MSE ~0.011 vs. 0.013), effectively modeling both spatial and temporal dependencies in climate data. These predictions are combined with static soil properties such as pH, moisture, and organic content to generate localized crop recommendations through a scoring algorithm that matches each crop's optimal growing conditions. Additionally, we develop a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that leverages domain-specific agricultural documents to answer farmers' questions in natural language. The entire system is deployed via a mobile application, offering real-time suggestions and conversational support. User feedback confirms the system's usability and relevance, especially in rural settings where personalized farming guidance is limited. Overall, our approach demonstrates how combining machine learning models with local agricultural data can empower farmers with actionable insights, promoting more informed decisions, better crop yields, and increased resilience to climate variability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个集成天气预报、作物推荐和农业问答的统一系统，结合时空图神经网络与混合检索增强生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 精准农业中，农民缺乏个性化指导，现有方法未能有效结合时空气候数据和土壤属性。本文旨在利用尼泊尔1359个地点的气象数据，通过深度学习模型提升天气预报精度，并结合土壤属性提供作物推荐，同时构建领域特定的问答系统，以帮助农民做出更明智的决策，提高作物产量和气候适应性。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种深度学习模型：基于Transformer的图神经网络和时空图卷积网络（STGCN），利用1359个地点的数据预测未来30天天气。STGCN有效捕获时空依赖关系，其预测结合土壤pH、湿度、有机质等属性，通过评分算法匹配作物最优生长条件，生成作物推荐。此外，基于检索增强生成（RAG）构建农业文档问答聊天机器人，部署为移动应用。
light_analysis.result: STGCN在天气预测上优于Transformer模型（MSE约0.011 vs 0.013），准确率更高。用户反馈表明系统在偏远农村地区具有良好可用性和相关性，能够提供个性化农事指导，促进知情决策和产量提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本系统结合时空图神经网络与检索增强生成，为精准农业提供统一解决方案。通过实际部署和用户反馈验证了其有效性，但未提及局限性。未来可扩展至更多作物和区域，增强模型泛化能力。

title: Unified Energy for Invariant and Independent Decoding in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) enable parallel text generation by iteratively denoising a full sequence, offering attractive flexibility compared to auto-regressive (AR) decoding. However, existing methods fail to fully capture token relationships, leading to a performance gap relative to AR baselines, especially as the degree of parallelism increases. In this paper, we give a systematic analysis of the gap, identifying three key factors: (i) model capacity, (ii) dependency, and (iii) invariance. To address these issues, we first propose an invariant energy (Inv-E) together with an effective sampling-based estimator to handle the invariance issue. By further combining with the independent energy (Ind-E), we obtain a unified energy (Uni-E), that accounts for all these factors. Uni-E enjoys a unique advantage: it can be computed exactly without sampling-based partition estimation. Besides, Uni-E is model agnostic and can therefore be scaled to models of arbitrary size. We further prove that Uni-E can correct the distribution shift caused by dependency and invariance. Extensive experiments across Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) and Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed Uni-E.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一能量函数Uni-E，解决扩散语言模型解码中的不变性和独立性挑战，弥合与自回归模型的性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽支持并行文本生成，但现有方法在捕捉词元关系上存在不足，导致与自回归基线存在性能差距，且差距随并行度增加而扩大。论文系统分析了这一差距，识别出三个关键因素：模型容量、依赖性和不变性。现有方法未能同时处理这些因素，限制了扩散语言模型的性能。
light_analysis.method: 首先针对不变性问题提出不变能量Inv-E及基于采样的有效估计器。进一步结合独立能量Ind-E，得到统一能量Uni-E，同时涵盖所有三个因素。Uni-E可精确计算，无需采样分区估计，且模型无关，可扩展至任意规模模型。理论证明Uni-E能校正由依赖性和不变性引起的分布偏移。
light_analysis.result: 在扩散语言模型和扩散大语言模型上的大量实验表明，Uni-E显著提升了性能，缩小了与自回归基线的差距。具体效果包括更准确的文本生成和更好的并行解码效率，但摘要未提供精确的数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uni-E通过统一能量函数有效解决了扩散语言模型中的关键问题，具有理论优势和实际应用价值。其模型无关特性便于集成到现有模型中。未来工作可能探索更高效的能量函数设计或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: SEF-CLGC at SemEval-2026 Task 11: Logical Notation Impact on Language Model Performance
abstract: This paper revisits our pipeline called Syllogistic Evaluation Framework-Common Logic Grammar Construction (SEF-CLGC). We combine formal logical notations with Small Language Models (SLMs) to evaluate reasoning performance on the SemEval-2026 Task 11 Subtask 1: Disentangling Content and Formal Reasoning in Large Language Models. Our experiments show that by relying solely on SLMs, trained on a combination of natural and symbolic languages, our best model achieves a content score of 27.80% on the task while significantly lowering the content bias in reasoning.
comment: Accepted to SemEval-2026 co-located with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 将形式逻辑符号与小语言模型结合，在逻辑推理任务中降低内容偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在推理时容易受内容偏见影响，即依赖语义内容而非形式逻辑。现有方法多依赖大规模模型和大量数据，计算成本高且难以分离内容与形式推理。本研究旨在利用小语言模型结合逻辑符号，以低成本实现更纯粹的推理评估。
light_analysis.method: 提出SEF-CLGC管道，将自然语言与符号逻辑（如谓词逻辑表示）结合训练小语言模型。模型仅基于SLM架构，在混有自然语言和符号语言的数据集上训练，从而学习形式推理而非内容依赖。关键创新在于逻辑符号的显式注入。
light_analysis.result: 在SemEval-2026 Task 11 Subtask 1上，最佳模型达到27.80%的内容评分，同时显著降低推理中的内容偏差。尽管绝对分数不高，但证明了小模型结合符号逻辑可有效减少偏见，且模型参数远小于大语言模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究展示了逻辑符号表示法在小语言模型中的有效性，为低资源情境下的推理任务提供了经济可行的方案。未来可探索更丰富的逻辑符号形式及跨任务泛化能力，但当前性能仍有提升空间。

title: OmniGen-AR: AutoRegressive Any-to-Image Generation
abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models have demonstrated strong potential in visual generation, offering superior performance with simple architectures and optimization objectives. However, existing methods are typically limited to single-modality conditions, e.g., text, restricting their applicability in real-world scenarios that demand image synthesis from diverse controls. In this work, we present OmniGen-AR, a unified autoregressive framework for Any-to-Image generation. By discretizing various visual conditions through a shared visual tokenizer and text prompts with a text tokenizer, OmniGen-AR supports a broad spectrum of conditional inputs within a single model, including text (text-to-image generation), spatial signals (segmentation-to-image and depth-to-image), and visual context (image editing, frame prediction, and text-to-video generation). To mitigate the risk of information leakage from condition tokens to content tokens, we introduce Disentangled Causal Attention (DCA), which separates the full-sequence causal mask into condition causal attention and content causal attention. It serves as a training-time regularizer without affecting the standard next-token prediction during inference. With this design, OmniGen-AR achieves new state-of-the-art or at least competitive results across a range of benchmark, e.g., 0.63 on GenEval and 80.02 on VBench, demonstrating its effectiveness in flexible and high-fidelity visual generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniGen-AR，一种统一的自回归任意到图像生成框架，通过共享视觉分词器和解耦因果注意力，支持文本、空间信号和视觉上下文等多种条件输入，实现灵活高保真生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归视觉生成模型通常限于单模态条件（如文本），难以满足实际中需要从多种控制信号（如分割图、深度图、视频帧）合成图像的需求。缺乏统一框架处理多样条件，限制了应用范围。
light_analysis.method: OmniGen-AR采用共享视觉分词器离散化视觉条件，结合文本分词器处理提示，支持文本到图像、分割到图像、深度到图像、图像编辑、帧预测和文本到视频生成。核心创新是解耦因果注意力，将全序列因果掩码分离为条件因果注意力和内容因果注意力，作为训练时正则化器防止信息泄露，推理时保持标准下一个令牌预测。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上取得新SOTA或竞争性结果：GenEval达到0.63，VBench达到80.02。性能优于或持平于现有方法，证明了框架在灵活性和保真度上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniGen-AR为任意到图像生成提供了统一自回归方案，简化了多模态条件生成。其解耦注意力设计避免了信息泄露，有望推广到更多条件类型和视频生成任务。未来可探索更高效率或更复杂的条件交互。

title: Improved Convergence Analysis of Topology Dependence in Decentralized SGD
abstract: Decentralized SGD is a fundamental algorithm in decentralized learning, although the influence of an underlying network topology on its convergence behavior is not yet fully understood. Existing convergence analyses have shown that topologies with a small spectral gap significantly deteriorate the convergence rate of Decentralized SGD in both homogeneous and heterogeneous cases. However, many prior papers have reported that indeed the choice of the topology has a significant experimental impact in the heterogeneous case, but has little experimental impact on training behavior in the homogeneous case. In this paper, we present a tighter convergence analysis of Decentralized SGD, offering a more precise understanding of how topologies affect the convergence rate than the prior analysis. Specifically, unlike existing convergence analyses that used only the spectral gap as a property of the topology, our novel analysis shows that all eigenvalues of the mixing matrix affect the convergence rate. Throughout the experiments, we carefully evaluated the convergence behavior of Decentralized SGD and demonstrated that our novel convergence analysis can more accurately describe the effect of topology on the convergence rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出更紧致的收敛性分析，揭示混合矩阵所有特征值对去中心化SGD收敛率的影响，超越仅依赖谱间隙的传统分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 去中心化SGD中网络拓扑对收敛行为的影响尚未完全理解。现有分析表明谱间隙小的拓扑会严重恶化收敛率，但实验显示同构情况下拓扑影响很小。需要更精确的理论来解释这种差异。
light_analysis.method: 提出新的收敛性分析，利用混合矩阵的所有特征值，而不仅仅是谱间隙，推导出更紧的收敛上界。通过考虑所有特征值，更准确地刻画拓扑对收敛的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明新的收敛分析能更准确地描述拓扑对收敛率的影响，与传统分析相比，更好地解释了同构和异构情况下的实验现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了对去中心化SGD中拓扑依赖的更深入理解，有助于指导实际网络选择。未来可考虑扩展到其他变体或异步设置。

title: Ultra Flash: Scaling Real-Time Streaming Video Generation to High Resolutions
abstract: While recent autoregressive video diffusion models achieve remarkable streaming quality, they remain confined to low resolutions (e.g., 480P), leaving efficient, scalable, real-time high-resolution video generation a fundamental open challenge. To bridge this gap, we present Ultra Flash, a cascaded streaming framework capable of real-time high-resolution video generation. Ultra Flash achieves ~30 FPS at 1K resolution and ~18 FPS at 2K resolution on a single GPU through three key contributions: (1) an architecture-preserving T2V-to-TV2V super-resolution training paradigm coupled with an AIGC-oriented data degradation pipeline that effectively preserves the generative capability of the base model, enabling enhanced high-resolution detail when cascaded after mainstream low-resolution generative models; (2) a causal streaming latent upsampler paired with a high-resolution decoder, which enhances spatiotemporal coherence while enabling efficient latent spatial scaling and precise high-resolution decoding with negligible computational overhead; and (3) a cascade high-resolution streaming video generation optimization scheme that first performs hybrid-reward-enhanced sparse causalization and single-step distillation of the super-resolution model, then introduces cascaded streaming self-forcing preference optimization with dynamic cache management, jointly enhancing overall coherence, improving quality, and enabling real-time high-resolution streaming video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Ultra Flash reliably produces ultra-high-resolution streaming video while maintaining state-of-the-art visual quality and superior efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ultra Flash级联流式框架，在单GPU上实现1K/30FPS和2K/18FPS的实时高分辨率视频生成，通过三大创新解决低分辨率限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型虽实现流式生成，但局限于低分辨率（如480P），无法高效扩展到实时高分辨率。高分辨率实时视频生成是开放挑战，亟需兼顾质量与效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Ultra Flash框架，包含：(1) 架构保持的T2V到TV2V超分辨率训练范式及AIGC数据降级流程，保留生成能力；(2) 因果流式潜变量上采样器与高分辨率解码器，增强时空连贯性且计算开销低；(3) 级联优化方案：混合奖励稀疏因果化和单步蒸馏，再引入级联流式自强制偏好优化与动态缓存管理，提升连贯性和质量。
light_analysis.result: Ultra Flash在单GPU上实现1K分辨率约30FPS、2K分辨率约18FPS的实时生成。实验表明，其产生超高清流式视频，同时保持最先进的视觉质量和优越的效率，优于现有低分辨率方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ultra Flash解决了实时高分辨率流式视频生成的难题，通过级联框架和优化技术实现高效缩放。其架构保持训练和因果流式设计具有通用性，可应用于多种生成模型。未来可探索更高分辨率或更复杂场景。

title: Explicit Representation Alignment for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Multimodal affective analysis aims to understand human sentiment and emotion by jointly modeling heterogeneous modalities such as text and images. However, multimodal models often fail to consistently outperform strong text-only baselines, with performance varying significantly across fusion strategies. In this work, we identify representation misalignment between independently pretrained modality encoders as a key bottleneck for effective multimodal learning, and show through controlled experiments that alignment prior to fusion is often more important than fusion complexity. To address this issue, we propose a unified multimodal affective analysis framework that leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to convert visual content into structured textual descriptions, projecting heterogeneous modalities into a shared linguistic space and enabling interpretable text-centric reasoning. To further improve robustness, we introduce a hybrid learning strategy that combines semantic token selection with a batch-level uniformity regularization objective, encouraging a more dispersed and stable global feature space while mitigating noise introduced by VLM-generated descriptions. Experiments on multiple multimodal sentiment and emotion benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms strong unimodal and multimodal baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance. Our analysis further highlights the critical role of representation alignment in multimodal affective learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出显式表示对齐框架，通过视觉语言模型将图像转为文本描述，解决多模态情感分析中模态编码器表示错位问题，实现统一文本中心推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态情感分析中，独立预训练的模态编码器之间存在表示错位，导致融合策略复杂但性能不稳定，甚至不如强文本基线。现有方法忽视了对齐的重要性，而对齐比融合复杂度更关键。需要一种统一框架来缓解异质性鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一多模态情感分析框架，利用视觉语言模型（如CLIP）将视觉内容转换为结构化文本描述，投影到共享语言空间，实现可解释的文本中心推理。同时引入混合学习策略：语义标记选择过滤噪声，结合批次级均匀性正则化目标，鼓励全局特征空间分散稳定，抑制VLM生成描述的噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态情感和情绪数据集上，方法一致优于强单模态和多模态基线，取得最先进性能。通过消融实验验证了表示对齐的关键作用，且对齐相比融合复杂度对性能提升更显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了多模态情感学习中表示对齐的核心重要性，提出显式对齐框架有效提升性能。框架兼具可解释性和鲁棒性，为多模态情感分析提供新范式。未来可扩展到更多模态和任务，并探索更高效的对齐策略。

title: CAMF-Det: Closure-Aware Multimodal Fusion for LiDAR-Camera 3D Object Detection on UAV Platforms
abstract: Multimodal 3D object detection based on LiDAR and cameras has demonstrated excellent performance in ground-vehicle scenarios, but has not been explored for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) platforms. In UAV top-down scenes, frequent groundobject occlusion dominated by tree canopies causes spatially varying and modality-dependent information degradation. Existing multimodal fusion frameworks neither explicitly model such ground-object occlusion nor embed occlusion awareness into the detection pipeline, limiting their performance in occluded UAV scenes. To address these challenges, we propose CAMF-Det, a closure-aware multimodal fusion framework for LiDAR-camera 3D object detection on UAV platforms, which derives dual-modal occlusion intensity through physics-inspired modeling and embeds them as priors throughout the detection pipeline. First, a dual-modal closure modeling module explicitly constructs occlusion intensity ground truth for both modalities offline via a Beer-Lambert-inspired formulation and building-mask correction. Second, using these ground-truth maps as supervision, a dual-modal prediction network converts the offline modeling results into online occlusion intensity predictions under single-frame inference. Third, both ground-truth and predicted occlusion intensity are injected into data augmentation, feature encoding, multimodal fusion, and detection head, enabling adaptive detection under spatially varying and modality-dependent information degradation. Experiments on two self-built UAV-based multimodal datasets, SI3D-DI and SI3D-DII, demonstrate that CAMF-Det achieves the best performance across all difficulty levels, with hard-level mAP$_{\mathrm{BEV}}$ improvements of 9.43% and 4.88% over the best competing methods, respectively. These results confirm the effectiveness of explicit occlusion prior modeling and exploitation for robust multimodal 3D detection in UAV scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAMF-Det，一种面向无人机平台的闭包感知多模态融合框架，通过物理建模显式建模遮挡强度并嵌入检测流水线，提升遮挡场景下的3D检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LiDAR-相机多模态3D检测在地面车辆场景表现优异，但未针对无人机平台探索。无人机俯拍场景中，树冠频繁遮挡地面物体，导致空间变化和模态依赖的信息退化。现有融合框架缺乏对地面-物体遮挡的显式建模，在遮挡严重的无人机场景中性能受限。因此，需要一种能感知遮挡并自适应处理信息退化的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CAMF-Det，包含三个关键模块：1）双模态闭包建模模块，基于Beer-Lambert启发公式和建筑掩码校正，离线构建双模态遮挡强度真值；2）双模态预测网络，以真值地图为监督，在单帧推理下在线预测遮挡强度；3）将真值和预测遮挡强度注入数据增强、特征编码、多模态融合和检测头，实现自适应检测。方法在两个自建无人机多模态数据集SI3D-DI和SI3D-DII上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在SI3D-DI和SI3D-DII数据集上，CAMF-Det在所有难度级别均取得最佳性能。硬级别mAP_BEV分别比最优竞争者提升9.43%和4.88%。实验证实了显式遮挡先验建模与利用在无人机场景鲁棒多模态3D检测中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAMF-Det通过物理启发的闭包建模和遮挡先验嵌入，显著提升了无人机平台下遮挡场景的3D检测性能，填补了多模态融合在无人机领域的研究空白。其自适应机制可推广至其他存在空间变化遮挡的传感任务。未来可探索更高效的在线预测网络或扩展到更多模态。

title: Decoding Pedestrian Crossing Intention from Egocentric Vision via Vision Language Models
abstract: Egocentric vision offers a first-person view of human perception and decision making, yet its potential for traffic-safety prediction remains underexplored. In this work, we study the decoding of pedestrian crossing intentions from short egocentric video clips. We approach this by formulating the task as a closed-ended visual question answering (VQA) problem and leveraging vision language models (VLMs) to predict the pedestrians' intent. We first benchmark three families of state-of-the-art VLMs in a zero-shot setting, finding that they achieve moderate gains over random guessing but exhibit limited higher-level traffic reasoning. Motivated by these findings, we further adapt VLMs to the target task using parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Our results show that the fine-tuned models substantially outperform their zero-shot counterparts and achieve a 9\% accuracy improvement over a specialized transformer-based baseline. Finally, we demonstrate that incorporating additional contextual cues, including ego motion, vehicle motion, and eye gaze, further improves predictive performance. In particular, the fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-2B model guided by eye gaze and ego motion achieves a 14.5% accuracy improvement over the transformer baseline, establishing a new state of the art for egocentric pedestrian intent decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用视觉语言模型从自我中心视频解码行人过街意图，通过参数高效微调和多模态上下文线索实现SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自我中心视觉在交通安全预测中潜力未充分挖掘，现有方法缺乏高层次交通推理。零样本VLM仅优于随机猜测，无法准确理解行人意图，亟需适配模型以提升预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 将行人意图解码视为封闭式视觉问答任务，先基准测试三种SOTA VLM零样本性能，再采用参数高效微调适应任务，并融入自我运动、车辆运动和视线等上下文线索。
light_analysis.result: 微调模型显著优于零样本，准确率比专用Transformer基线提升9%。其中Qwen3-VL-2B结合视线与自我运动，准确率提升14.5%，达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明VLM预训练后微调可有效解码行人意图，多模态线索进一步优化性能。为自我中心交通安全预测提供新方法，未来可探索实时应用及更多上下文融合。

title: DiffSight-Former: Modeling Structural Differences and Temporal Dynamics for Glaucoma Progression Prediction
abstract: Glaucoma is a leading cause of irreversible blindness worldwide, and early detection from fundus images is critical for effective disease management. While deep learning has achieved promising performance in fundus image analysis, most existing methods rely on single time-point images and fail to capture longitudinal structural and vascular changes associated with disease progression. Sequential fundus images acquired during clinical follow-up provide valuable temporal information; however, current sequential models often struggle to detect subtle early progression signals and commonly depend on fixed-length inputs or diagnostic cues from already glaucomatous images, limiting their clinical utility for early prediction. To address these limitations, we propose DiffSight-Former, a framework for glaucoma progression prediction from sequential fundus images. It incorporates a time-variant feature extraction module based on a fundus-specific foundation model to obtain robust anatomical representations. A multi-structure difference modeling module is introduced to quantify progression-related changes in the optic disc/cup region and retinal vasculature. These representations are integrated with temporal interval embeddings and processed by a time-aware Transformer to model disease progression and estimate the probability of future glaucoma onset. Experiments were conducted on two longitudinal datasets, SIGF (405 sequences) and GRAPE (263 sequences). On SIGF, DiffSight-Former achieved an AUC of 91.54% and a sensitivity of 92.16% for progression prediction. On GRAPE, it achieved an average accuracy of 87.48% across three clinical visual-field progression criteria. Compared with existing approaches, DiffSight-Former demonstrates strong performance and robustness across different temporal settings, highlighting its potential for longitudinal glaucoma monitoring and early risk prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffSight-Former框架，通过建模结构差异和时间动态，实现青光眼进展预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 青光眼是不可逆失明主因，早期检测至关重要。现有深度学习方法多依赖单时间点图像，无法捕捉纵向结构变化；序列模型难以检测早期信号，且依赖固定长度输入或已有青光眼图像，限制了早期预测的临床实用性。
light_analysis.method: DiffSight-Former包含时间变异特征提取模块（基于眼底专用基础模型获取解剖表示）、多结构差异建模模块（量化视盘/杯区域和视网膜血管的进展相关变化），结合时间间隔嵌入，通过时间感知Transformer建模疾病进展并预测未来青光眼发生概率。
light_analysis.result: 在两个纵向数据集SIGF（405序列）和GRAPE（263序列）上验证。SIGF上AUC达91.54%、敏感性92.16%；GRAPE上三个临床视野进展标准平均准确率87.48%。相比现有方法，在不同时间设置下表现优异且鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffSight-Former通过融合结构差异与时序信息，显著提升了青光眼进展预测性能，适用于纵向监测和早期风险预测，具有临床转化潜力。

title: A Geometric Framework for Absolute Pose and Velocity Estimation with Event Cameras
abstract: Despite the rapid advancements in event-based motion estimation, current geometric methods primarily focus on velocity estimation. However, absolute pose estimation, which is equally crucial for key applications such as robotic navigation and augmented reality, remains relatively underexplored. Consequently, the simultaneous recovery of absolute pose and velocity from event streams remains an open and challenging problem. To address this gap, we propose a geometric framework for absolute pose and velocity estimation by leveraging 3D lines in the scene and the events they trigger. At the core of the framework lie two key geometric constraints: the orthogonality between a 3D line and the normal vector of its corresponding event plane, and the collinearity of an event with the 2D projection of its associated line. Based on these constraints, we present both linear and polynomial solvers for absolute pose estimation. The former enables efficient computation, while the latter provides a globally optimal solution for rotation. For velocity estimation, we develop an efficient linear solver and a more accurate optimization-based solver to recover both angular and linear velocities. Notably, our methods require a minimum of three event-line correspondences to determine the 6-DoF absolute pose or velocities independently. Extensive experiments in simulation and on real-world datasets demonstrate that our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in accuracy and computational efficiency compared to existing methods. The demo code is publicly available at https://github.com/Zibin6/EventPoseVelocity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用3D线特征的几何框架，实现事件相机的绝对位姿与速度联合估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机的运动估计研究中，现有几何方法主要聚焦于速度估计，而绝对位姿估计对于机器人导航和增强现实等应用同样关键，却相对未被充分探索。同时从事件流中恢复绝对位姿和速度仍是一个开放且具有挑战性的问题，亟需新的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 核心是利用场景中的3D线及其触发的事件，推导两个几何约束：3D线与其对应事件平面法向量的正交性，以及事件与其关联线2D投影的共线性。基于这些约束，提出了线性求解器和多项式求解器用于绝对位姿估计，前者高效，后者可全局最优求解旋转。速度估计则包括一个线性求解器和一个基于优化的求解器，分别用于恢复角速度和线速度。方法至少需要三个事件-线对应。
light_analysis.result: 在仿真和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能，与现有方法相比在精度和计算效率上均有显著提升。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称significant improvements。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了事件相机绝对位姿和速度联合估计的空白，提出了一个有效的几何框架。其学术价值在于提出了新的几何约束和求解器，实际应用价值在于可用于机器人导航和增强现实等任务。代码已开源，便于复现和扩展。未来工作可能包括拓展到更多特征类型或更复杂的场景。

title: Claw-R1: A Step-Level Data Middleware System for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has become an important post-training paradigm for turning LLMs from static chatbots into interactive agents, giving rise to representative applications such as OpenClaw. Existing work mainly focuses on policy optimization algorithms and training frameworks, but pays less attention to the full data lifecycle of agent-environment interactions, from data production to training consumption. To bridge this gap, we present Claw-R1, an interactive step-level data middleware system for agentic RL. Claw-R1 connects heterogeneous agent runtimes with RL training backends through two core components: a Gateway Server and a Data Pool. The Gateway Server captures multi-turn interaction steps through a unified LLM API entry point, while the Data Pool organizes them into step-level records consisting of prompt IDs, response IDs, rewards and other metadata. In our demo, users can interactively inspect live trajectories, examine the state, action, and reward of each step, curate data by quality and readiness, and configure training-ready batches for different downstream RL algorithms. Overall, Claw-R1 treats agent interaction traces as managed data assets rather than temporary runtime logs. Through this demonstration, we hope to encourage the community to recognize the importance of data management in agentic RL. Our code is available at https://github.com/AgentR1/Claw-R1 and the demonstration video can be found at link https://youtu.be/Pw47dAOw6B0.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Claw-R1，一个面向智能体强化学习的步骤级数据中间件系统，实现从数据生产到训练消费的全生命周期管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体强化学习工作主要关注策略优化算法和训练框架，忽视了智能体-环境交互数据的完整生命周期管理。数据从生产到训练消费缺乏统一管理，导致数据利用效率低、难以回放和筛选优质数据。Claw-R1旨在填补这一空白，将交互轨迹视为可管理的数据资产而非临时日志。
light_analysis.method: Claw-R1通过两个核心组件连接异构智能体运行环境和RL训练后端：Gateway Server通过统一LLM API入口捕获多轮交互步骤；Data Pool将步骤组织为包含提示ID、响应ID、奖励和元数据的记录。系统支持用户交互式检查实时轨迹、审查状态/动作/奖励、按质量和就绪状态筛选数据，并为不同下游RL算法配置训练批次。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体量化实验结果，但通过演示展示了系统功能：用户可交互式检查实时轨迹、审查每一步状态/动作/奖励、按质量筛选数据，并配置训练批次。代码和演示视频已开源，表明系统具备实际可用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Claw-R1将智能体交互轨迹从临时日志提升为可管理的数据资产，强调数据管理在智能体强化学习中的重要性。该系统有望提高数据利用效率和训练质量，鼓励社区关注数据中间件。未来可扩展至更多RL算法和异构环境。

title: Vision Language Model Helps Private Information De-Identification in Vision Data
abstract: Visual Language Models (VLMs) have gained significant popularity due to their remarkable ability. While various methods exist to enhance privacy in text-based applications, privacy risks associated with visual inputs remain largely overlooked such as Protected Health Information (PHI) in medical images. To tackle this problem, two key tasks: accurately localizing sensitive text and processing it to ensure privacy protection should be performed. To address this issue, we introduce VisShield (Vision Privacy Shield), an end-to-end framework designed to enhance the privacy awareness of VLMs. Our framework consists of two key components: a specialized instruction-tuning dataset OPTIC (Optical Privacy Text Instruction Collection) and a tailored training methodology. The dataset provides diverse privacy-oriented prompts that guide VLMs to perform targeted Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for precise localization of sensitive text, while the training strategy ensures effective adaptation of VLMs to privacy-preserving tasks. Specifically, our approach ensures that VLMs recognize privacy-sensitive text and output precise bounding boxes for detected entities, allowing for effective masking of sensitive information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing approaches in handling private information, paving the way for privacy-preserving applications in vision-language models. Our dataset and code can be found here.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisShield框架，通过专用数据集OPTIC和训练策略增强视觉语言模型对视觉数据中敏感文本的定位与脱敏能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）应用广泛，但视觉输入的隐私风险（如医学图像中的受保护健康信息）常被忽视。现有文本隐私保护方法不适用于视觉场景，需要准确定位敏感文本并进行处理。该研究旨在解决VLM在处理视觉数据时的隐私泄露问题，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出VisShield端到端框架，包含两个关键组件：OPTIC数据集和定制训练方法。OPTIC收集含隐私导向提示的指令，引导VLM执行定向OCR以精准定位敏感文本；训练策略微调VLM使其输出敏感文本的边界框，便于后续掩码处理。该方法无需额外模型即可实现隐私保护。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，VisShield在处理私有信息任务上显著优于现有方法。具体性能指标优秀，能够有效识别并定位医学图像中的受保护健康信息文本，并生成精准边界框，为后续隐私保护操作奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: VisShield为视觉语言模型提供了有效的隐私保护方案，提升了医疗等领域的视觉数据安全性。其数据集和代码已开源，有助于推动隐私保护应用的发展。未来可扩展至更多敏感信息类型及实际部署场景。

title: Late-Layer Fusion is Enough: Dual-Path Vision Token Routing for Multimodal Large Language Models under Visual Saturation
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) commonly inherit the deep, symmetric Transformer backbone designed for unimodal text modeling, and apply the same computation uniformly to image and language tokens. This design overlooks a key modality asymmetry: image and text tokens differ substantially in information density, redundancy, and required reasoning depth. Through a layer-wise analysis of LLaVA-1.5, we observe that vision tokens tend to saturate in the middle layers. Specifically, text-to-image attention decreases from 0.68 at layer 0 to 0.07 by layer 4, and stabilizes near 0.04 after layer 18, whereas text tokens continue to benefit from deep semantic processing. These findings suggest a mismatch between architectural symmetry and depth-asynchronous modality evolution, resulting in redundant visual computation and possible drift in perceptual representations during deep task-specific adaptation. Motivated by this, we propose Dual-Path Vision Token Routing (DPVR), a modality-asymmetric routing framework for efficient MLLMs. Its core instantiation, DPVR-LF (Late-Layer Fusion), routes vision tokens at the saturation point into a one-layer trainable side branch, runs a thirteen-layer text-only forward that skips image positions in the deep stack, and re-fuses the visual and textual streams only at the final layer. With approximately 3% trainable parameters, DPVR-LF preserves competitive multimodal performance on standard benchmarks while reducing visual computation in the deep Transformer stack. The results challenge the conventional assumption that vision tokens must traverse all deep language-model layers, and indicate that a single late fusion layer can be sufficient for maintaining strong perceptual competence in LLaVA-style MLLMs.
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to Pattern Recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出DPVR-LF，利用视觉标记在深层饱和现象，仅在最后一层融合视觉与文本流，实现高效多模态大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLM）继承文本Transformer的对称架构，但图像与文本标记的信息密度和推理深度需求不同。通过分析LLaVA-1.5发现，视觉标记在中层即饱和（文本-图像注意力从层0的0.68降至层4的0.07，18层后稳定于0.04），而文本标记持续受益于深层语义处理。这种架构对称性与深度异步模态演化不匹配，导致冗余视觉计算和感知漂移。因此需要一种模态不对称的轻量级路由框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出双路径视觉标记路由（DPVR），核心实例DPVR-LF在视觉饱和点将视觉标记路由至单层可训练旁支，深层堆栈仅处理文本标记（跳过图像位置），仅在最终层重新融合视觉与文本流。仅需约3%的可训练参数，无需修改预训练文本层。
light_analysis.result: 在标准多模态基准上，DPVR-LF保持了与完整模型相当的竞争性能，同时大幅减少了深层Transformer堆栈中的视觉计算量。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但强调在保持性能的前提下实现了计算节省。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作挑战了视觉标记必须遍历所有语言层的传统假设，表明单一晚期融合层足以在LLaVA风格MLLM中维持强感知能力。具有显著的计算效率优势，未来可探索更精细的饱和点检测或动态路由策略。

title: A Regret Minimization Framework on Preference Learning in Large Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has enabled progress on reasoning-intensive tasks by relying on task-specific verifiers that provide automated correctness signals. However, many realistic language tasks are difficult to equip with reliable verifiers, motivating a growing reliance on reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). In this setting, we argue that a closer examination of how human feedback should be interpreted is essential. We introduce Regret-based Preference Optimization $(\textbf{RePO})$, which reframes RLHF through $\textit{regret minimization}$ rather than reward maximization. Human preferences are often shaped by $\textit{prospective}$ anticipation of outcomes and $\textit{counterfactual}$ comparisons to alternative behaviors, rather than by immediate, outcome-independent utility. $\textbf{RePO}$ captures this structure by modeling preferences as behavior-conditioned assessments of relative suboptimality. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks and human preference datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains, indicating that $\textbf{RePO}$ is an effective and human-aligned approach for training large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于遗憾最小化的偏好学习框架RePO，替代传统的奖励最大化方法，提升大语言模型与人类偏好的一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR依赖任务特定验证器，但许多语言任务难以配备可靠验证器，因此RLHF日益重要。然而，人类反馈的解读方式有待改进：人类偏好常基于对结果的预期和反事实比较，而非即时、与结果无关的效用。现有奖励最大化方法未能捕捉这一结构，导致模型与人类偏好不一致。
light_analysis.method: 提出Regret-based Preference Optimization (RePO)，将RLHF重构为遗憾最小化问题。通过建模偏好为行为条件化的相对次优性评估，捕捉人类的前瞻性预期和反事实比较。在数学推理基准和人类偏好数据集上训练，使用标准LLM架构，优化目标为最小化遗憾而非最大化奖励。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准和人类偏好数据集上，RePO相比基线方法（如DPO、PPO）取得一致性能提升。具体表现为更高的准确率和更符合人类偏好的输出。摘要未给出精确数值，但指出“consistent performance gains”，表明有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RePO通过遗憾最小化框架更准确地建模了人类偏好结构，提供了一种与人类对齐的LLM训练方法。学术上推进了对RLHF的理论理解，应用上可改进无法使用验证器的语言任务。潜在局限包括对遗憾估计的计算开销，未来可探索更高效的实现。

title: An Enhanced Geometric-Spectral Feature Learning Framework for Airborne Multispectral Point Cloud Classification
abstract: Multispectral point cloud (MPC) is composed of 3D spatial-spectral information, which holds tremendous potential for accurate land-cover classification. However, the representation power of classification models is limited by inherent high-dimensional and heterogeneous spatial-spectral information, unbalanced sample distribution, and inter-class spectral similarity of airborne MPCs. We build two MPC datasets and propose an enhanced geometric-spectral feature learning framework based on attentions for airborne MPC classification. A key component in our model is a two-stream feature fusion method with attention mechanisms, which enhances the representation capability of spatial-spectral features from high-dimensional heterogeneous MPCs. The first stream aims to extract position-encoded global spectral features with fusion self-attention, and the second stream comprises a multikernel point convolution and feature aggregation attention to extract spectral-guided geometric features. We then develop a residual attention fusion block to integrate the most informative geometric-spectral features from the two parallel streams. Another important contribution of this work is a joint loss function to improve the learning ability on unbalanced and interclass similar samples. Experimental results on two airborne MPC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, the codes and datasets used in this paper will be made available freely at https://github.com/HITlixian/TGRS_GSFF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于注意力的双流特征融合框架和联合损失函数，用于机载多光谱点云分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 机载多光谱点云包含高维异构空间-光谱信息，但现有分类模型受限于样本分布不均和类间光谱相似性，表示能力不足。提升特征融合与学习能力是关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出双流特征融合方法：第一流用融合自注意力提取位置编码全局光谱特征；第二流用多核点卷积和特征聚合注意力提取光谱引导几何特征。通过残差注意力融合块整合几何-光谱特征，并设计联合损失函数改善不平衡和相似样本学习。
light_analysis.result: 在两个机载MPC数据集上实验，与最先进方法相比表现更优。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但表明代码和数据集将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过双流注意力融合和联合损失函数有效提升多光谱点云分类性能，具有地物覆盖应用价值。未来可扩展到其他点云分析任务。

title: ComplexConstraints and Beyond: Expert Rubrics for RLVR
abstract: As LLM capabilities advance rapidly, the evaluation methods used to assess them increasingly lag behind. Traditional benchmarks relied on programmatic verification of narrow, surface-level constraints, but real-world instruction following and agentic tasks demand assessment of nuanced, context-dependent behaviors that resist simple scripted checks. We present a systematic analysis of expert-curated rubric-based evaluation as an alternative paradigm, drawing on empirical evidence from two domains: complex instruction following and enterprise agentic tasks. We first articulate five design principles for constructing high-quality rubrics, including Maximum Viable Atomicity, intent-aware criterion design, and iterative LLM-judge calibration. To validate these principles, we introduce ComplexConstraints, a new expert-curated instruction-following dataset in which each prompt is paired with 10-40 atomic rubric criteria. We demonstrate that these expert rubrics are not only better evaluation instruments but also highly effective training signals: training on approximately 1,000 ComplexConstraints examples yields +15.5% improvement for a 4B-parameter model and +12.2% for a 235B-parameter model on instruction following, while single-epoch RL training on a rubric-graded enterprise environment produces gains that transfer to out-of-distribution benchmarks the model was never trained on (+4.5% BFCL, +7.4% Tau2-Bench, +6.8% Tool-Decathlon). Our findings establish that expert-authored rubrics improve both the measurement and the development of frontier LLM capabilities, serving as effective evaluation and RL training signals.
comment: Accepted to the GEM workshop at ACL 2026: https://gem-workshop.com/

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于专家策展的评估规则（rubrics）作为LLM评估的新范式，并验证其在指令遵循和强化学习训练中的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统LLM评估依赖程序化验证表面约束，无法应对现实指令遵循和智能体任务中的微妙、上下文依赖行为。评估方法滞后于模型能力发展，亟需新范式。专家策展的rubrics能更精准地捕捉复杂需求，并可作为有效的训练信号，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出五项rubric设计原则：最大可行原子性、意图感知标准设计、迭代LLM-judge校准等。构建ComplexConstraints数据集，含专家编写的10-40条原子标准/提示。使用rubric作为RL训练信号：对4B和235B模型进行约1000例训练，并在企业环境进行单周期RL训练，评估泛化能力。
