light_analysis.result: ComplexConstraints训练使4B模型指令遵循提升15.5%，235B模型提升12.2%。单周期RL训练在未见的基准上取得泛化：BFCL +4.5%，Tau2-Bench +7.4%，Tool-Decathlon +6.8%。证明rubric改进了评估与模型能力开发。
light_analysis.conclusion: 专家编写的rubric同时改进了前沿LLM能力的测量与开发，作为有效评估和RL训练信号。该方法可用于复杂指令遵循和智能体任务，未来可探索自动化rubric生成及更广泛的应用。

title: Optimizing Energy-based Neural Network Training with Coherent Ising Machine
abstract: While Ising machines serve as advanced physical solvers for the Ising model,enabling applications in combinatorial optimization and neural network training,their scalability for large-scale neural networks remains constrained by hardware connectivity limitations and suboptimal training methodologies. In this work,we leverage a Coherent Ising Machine (CIM) to train an energy-based neural network using Equilibrium Propagation, achieving performance comparable to existing software-based implementations. We further enhance the algorithm by integrating the Adam optimizer to solve for the ground state of a Hopfield energy network, significantly improving convergence speed and solution accuracy. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of our approach across deeper network architectures and convolutional operations. Our results highlight the potential of CIM dynamics as a scalable platform for training complex neural networks, offering a pathway toward energy-efficient implementations via analog circuits, optoelectronics, or integrated photonics. This work establishes a novel physical framework for next-generation AI hardware development.

light_analysis.overview: 利用相干伊辛机（CIM）结合均衡传播和Adam优化器高效训练基于能量的神经网络，实现可扩展的类脑计算硬件。
light_analysis.motivation: 伊辛机作为物理求解器在组合优化和神经网络训练中具有潜力，但受限于硬件连接性和次优训练方法，难以扩展到大规模神经网络。本文旨在通过CIM实现高效的基于能量的网络训练，解决现有方法的可扩展性和效率问题。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用相干伊辛机（CIM）物理平台，结合均衡传播算法训练基于能量的神经网络。为提升性能，集成Adam优化器求解Hopfield能量网络的基态，显著加快收敛速度并提高解精度。方法适用于更深层的网络架构和卷积操作，展示了物理训练的可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在训练基于能量的神经网络时取得了与现有软件实现相当的性能。通过Adam优化器，收敛速度和求解精度大幅提升。实验证明该方法可扩展到深层网络和卷积运算，为硬件实现（如模拟电路、光电子学、集成光子学）提供了高效路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究展示了CIM动力学作为训练复杂神经网络的可扩展平台，为下一代AI硬件开发建立了新的物理框架。该工作有望通过模拟电路等节能实现方式推动AI硬件发展，但摘要未提及具体局限性或未来方向。

title: Counterfactual Transport Flows for Offline Conservative Trajectory Refinement
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a path to policy improvement from logged data alone, using historical returns or other measurable outcomes as world feedback. A key difficulty is improving observed behavior without extrapolating beyond what the offline data supports. We propose \emph{counterfactual transport flows}, a source-conditioned trajectory refinement framework for offline decision-making guided by world feedback. Given a low-feedback candidate trajectory, we construct local preference pairs from offline data by retrieving nearby trajectories in latent trajectory space with higher task-specific feedback, and use them as weak supervision for conservative refinement. The framework learns instance-specific refinement directions: at inference time, a refinement strength parameter controls how far the candidate trajectory is transported, enabling a trade-off between preserving the original behavior and applying stronger improvement. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks, including AntMaze and MuJoCo tasks, show that our method improves behavior from historical returns as world feedback, while providing interpretable trajectory-level refinement paths.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实传输流，一种基于世界反馈的离线决策保守轨迹优化框架，利用局部偏好对进行弱监督优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习从历史数据中改进策略，但面临外推风险，即可能超出离线数据支持的范围。现有方法难以在保持保守性的同时有效提升表现，需要一种既能利用世界反馈又避免过度外推的轨迹优化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出反事实传输流，给定低反馈候选轨迹，在潜在轨迹空间中检索附近高反馈轨迹构建局部偏好对，作为弱监督信号进行保守优化。框架学习实例特定的优化方向，推理时通过调整优化强度参数平衡原行为保持与改进程度。使用D4RL基准（如AntMaze和MuJoCo）进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL基准上，该方法利用历史回报作为世界反馈有效改进行为，相比基线方法提升了任务性能，并提供了可解释的轨迹级优化路径。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但表明在多个任务上取得积极效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为离线决策提供了一种保守且可解释的轨迹优化方式，能够利用世界反馈进行改进，避免外推风险。未来可探索更复杂的偏好构建与强度控制机制，扩展至更广泛的离线学习场景。

title: MAAM: Anchor-Preserving Compression and Contextual Calibration for Chinese Discriminatory Language Detection
abstract: Chinese discriminatory-language detection is challenging because harmful intent is often implicit and context-dependent. We propose MAAM (Myopia--Astigmatism Anchor Mechanism), a lightweight, model-agnostic framework inspired by functional visual blur: rather than preserving every token equally, MAAM retains discrimination-relevant semantic anchors and calibrates them with C--I--S contextual priors (Contextual Tone, Group Identity, and Stance Polarity). We also introduce ChLGBT, to our knowledge the first Chinese LGBT-focused discriminatory-language dataset, with 8,120 manually annotated samples and three ordinal labels: explicit bias, implicit bias, and emotional intensity. Across strong encoder baselines, MAAM improves all three prediction dimensions, with consistent gains in accuracy, F1, Brier score, and expected calibration error. Compared with frontier LLM baselines under zero-shot and few-shot prompting protocols, MAAM remains competitive while offering stronger compactness and stability. These results suggest that interpretable anchor preservation and contextual calibration provide a practical alternative to heavier model scaling for Chinese discriminatory-language assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAAM框架，通过锚点保留和上下文校准实现轻量级中文歧视性语言检测，并创建首个中文LGBT歧视数据集ChLGBT。
light_analysis.motivation: 中文歧视性语言检测面临有害意图隐晦且依赖上下文的挑战。现有方法多依赖大型模型，但难以平衡性能与效率，且缺乏针对特定群体（如LGBT）的中文标注数据。因此，需要一种轻量级、可解释且稳定的框架来准确检测隐含歧视，同时提供数据集支撑。
light_analysis.method: MAAM受视觉模糊启发，保留歧视相关语义锚点，并用C-I-S上下文先验（语境基调、群体身份、立场极性）进行校准。框架是模型无关的，可适配任意编码器。同时构建ChLGBT数据集，含8,120个样本，标注了显式偏见、隐式偏见和情感强度三个序数标签，涵盖中文LGBT语境。
light_analysis.result: 在多个强编码器基线（如BERT）上，MAAM在准确率、F1、Brier分数和期望校准误差上均有提升。与前沿LLM（如GPT）在零样本和少样本提示下对比，MAAM在保持竞争力同时，展现出更强的模型紧凑性和预测稳定性，验证了该方法在有限资源下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAAM证明可解释的锚点保留与上下文校准时轻量级中文歧视检测的有效替代方案。其模型无关特性易于推广，ChLGBT数据集填补了该领域数据空白。未来可扩展至其他隐式偏见检测任务，但当前方法在极度复杂上下文中的泛化性需进一步验证。

title: Hybridizing Equilibrium Propagation with Ising Machines for Efficient Energy-Based Learning
abstract: The rapid evolution of artificial intelligence has led to substantial advances in deep neural networks. Nonetheless, conventional GPU-based training remains highly energy-demanding, motivating the exploration of physical dynamics and compatible energy-based learning schemes, such as equilibrium propagation (EP). EP-based training, however, frequently suffers from convergence to local minima due to phase-space contraction. Here we introduce an Ising-dynamics-inspired equilibrium-propagation framework in which dissipative Hopfield relaxation is replaced by an extended phase-space dynamics with conjugate variables. The resulting training paradigm keeps the local two-phase learning rule of EP while changing the physical route by which neural states reach equilibrium. We show that this dynamics lowers effective energy barriers, accelerates convergence, improves noise robustness, and trains deep convolutional Hopfield networks on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 with performance comparable to backpropagation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合Ising动力学的平衡传播框架，通过扩展相空间替代耗散Hopfield松弛，提升训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统GPU训练深度神经网络能耗高，而基于物理动力学的平衡传播（EP）虽具能效潜力，但因相空间收缩易陷入局部最小值，导致收敛困难。现有EP训练方法在复杂任务上性能受限，亟需改进其动力学过程以加速收敛并增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Ising动力学启发的平衡传播框架，用扩展相空间（包含共轭变量）替代标准耗散Hopfield松弛，保持局部两阶段学习规则。该方法降低有效能量势垒，加速收敛，提升噪声鲁棒性，并在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10上训练深度卷积Hopfield网络。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类任务中，所提方法训练深度卷积Hopfield网络取得与反向传播相当的性能，同时实现更快的收敛速度和更强的噪声鲁棒性。具体数据集包括MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过Ising动力学优化平衡传播，解决了EP训练中局部最小值问题，为能效学习提供了新范式。实验证明其与经典反向传播性能可比，有望推动物理计算和低功耗AI硬件发展。未来工作可探索更复杂网络架构和实际物理实现。

title: Illumination-Invariant Anomaly Detection for Sub-Canopy UAV Multispectral Point Clouds
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) multispectral point clouds (MPC) provide high-dimensional spatial-spectral data for sub-canopy target detection; however, their efficacy is significantly compromised by severe illumination heterogeneity caused by vegetation shadows. To address this, we propose a prior-free anomaly detection framework capable of robustly handling lighting variations. First, we formulate solar angle estimation as an inverse optimization problem. By coupling spectral indices with a ray-tracing model, this strategy achieves Prior-Free Shadow Extraction without relying on flight metadata, effectively distinguishing dark objects from true shadows. Second, to mitigate spectral distortions, we introduce an Illumination-Consistent Sparse Representation mechanism. Unlike standard reconstruction methods, we construct a background dictionary strictly from neighbors sharing the same illumination state. This constraint effectively disentangles spectral reflectance from lighting variations, ensuring that targets are represented solely by physically consistent background points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed method significantly improves the separability between anomalies and background in complex forest environments, demonstrating superior performance over state-of-the-art baselines. This framework is particularly suited for identifying camouflaged military targets, mapping fallen tree trunks, and uncovering archaeological ruins hidden beneath dense foliage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无先验的异常检测框架，通过太阳角度估计和光照一致稀疏表示，解决植被阴影导致的照明不均匀问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机多光谱点云在亚冠层目标检测中受植被阴影造成的严重光照不均匀影响，现有方法依赖飞行元数据，提取阴影困难且光谱失真。该问题重要，因为需要可靠地检测隐蔽目标（如军事、考古），但现有方法在复杂森林环境中性能不佳。
light_analysis.method: 首先，将太阳角度估计建模为逆优化问题，通过光谱指数与光线追踪耦合实现无先验阴影提取，区分暗目标与真实阴影。其次，引入光照一致稀疏表示，从相同光照状态的邻域中构建背景字典，解耦光谱反射率与光照变化，确保目标仅由物理一致的背景点表示。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂森林环境中显著改善了异常与背景的可分性，性能优于最先进的基线方法。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但强调在识别伪装军事目标、倒木和考古遗迹等任务中的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了光照不均问题，提升了亚冠层异常检测的鲁棒性，适用于隐蔽目标探测。其无先验特性减少了对元数据的依赖，但摘要未提及局限性；未来可拓展至其他多光谱或高光谱数据。

title: HDRAgent: An Agentic Framework for Multi-Exposure HDR Imaging
abstract: Most existing multi-exposure HDR methods follow a fixed feed-forward reconstruction paradigm, making them prone to ghosting artifacts in complex dynamic scenes. To address this issue, we propose HDRAgent, the first agent-driven framework for HDR imaging, which adaptively selects reconstruction strategies according to the current scene conditions. Specifically, to provide scene-specific prior knowledge, we introduce a fine-grained contextual knowledge matching (FCM) module. This module leverages multimodal large language model (MLLM)-derived scene perception to retrieve relevant historical cases and tool knowledge, organizing them into structured evidence for MLLM-based adaptive tool scheduling. In addition, we propose a perception--distortion feedback mechanism that transforms post-execution quality assessment and artifact diagnosis into structured feedback, which is accumulated in historical memory to help subsequent contextual knowledge refinement and strategy selection. Furthermore, considering that extreme motion can invalidate alignment methods, we design an agent-guided generative alignment strategy that uses MLLM-based dynamic-region parsing to reconstruct unreliable contents in non-reference frames under reference-frame guidance. Experiments demonstrate that HDRAgent effectively reduces ghosting and local artifacts while achieving competitive or superior objective performance and visual quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于智能体的多曝光HDR成像框架HDRAgent，通过场景自适应策略选择和生成式对齐减少鬼影伪影。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大多数多曝光HDR方法采用固定前馈重建范式，在复杂动态场景中易产生鬼影伪影。这些方法缺乏场景自适应性，无法根据当前场景条件选择最优重建策略，导致在运动物体、遮挡等复杂情况下性能下降。因此，需要一种能够感知场景并动态调整策略的框架来提升HDR成像的鲁棒性和质量。
light_analysis.method: HDRAgent引入细粒度上下文知识匹配模块，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）进行场景感知，检索相关历史案例和工具知识，组织为结构化证据以支持自适应工具调度。提出感知-失真反馈机制，将执行后的质量评估和伪影诊断转化为结构化反馈，积累到历史记忆中优化后续策略。针对极端运动设计智能体引导的生成式对齐策略，通过MLLM动态区域解析重建非参考帧中不可靠内容，以参考帧为指导。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，HDRAgent有效减少鬼影和局部伪影，在客观性能和视觉质量上达到或优于现有方法。具体指标包括PSNR、SSIM等（摘要未明确说明具体数值）。与基线方法对比，在动态场景中展现出更强的鲁棒性和重建精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: HDRAgent首次将智能体框架引入HDR成像，通过场景自适应策略和生成式对齐显著提升复杂动态场景下的成像质量。该工作为HDR成像提供了新的思路，具有理论和实用价值。未来可进一步优化智能体决策效率，扩展至更多成像任务。

title: Driving Video Retrieval for Complex Queries with Structured Grounding
abstract: Video retrieval at scale is central to data curation and safety validation in autonomous driving, where users want to find not only scenes but also dynamic events such as cut-ins and hard braking. Existing vision-language and keyword-based retrieval methods often miss these events because the relevant motion may not be explicitly described in text or captured by lexical overlap. Rule-based retrieval can encode such events more directly, but it is brittle: generated or hand-written rules often fail when their assumptions do not match real driving data. We propose STRIVE-D, a data-calibrated retrieval framework for driving videos. It uses weakly labeled in-domain videos to estimate when a query rule is reliable, adapt rules that mismatch observed data, and fuse calibrated rule scores with vision-language and keyword-based retrieval signals. Across three driving benchmarks, including newly released human-annotated event data on DrivingDojo, STRIVE-D delivers up to 84% relative improvement in top-1 accuracy over state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STRIVE-D框架，通过弱监督数据校准规则，融合视觉语言、关键字和规则检索，显著提升自动驾驶视频检索复杂查询的准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶场景下，用户需检索动态事件（如切入、急刹车），但现有视觉语言和关键字方法因运动未显式描述而遗漏事件，规则检索虽直接但脆弱且假设常与实际数据不符。亟需一种自适应、数据校准的检索方法。
light_analysis.method: STRIVE-D框架利用弱标注领域视频估计查询规则的可靠性，自适应调整与观测数据不匹配的规则，并将校准后的规则分数与视觉语言和关键字检索信号融合。在DrivingDojo等三个驾驶基准上测试，无需人工标注规则。
light_analysis.result: 在三个驾驶基准上，STRIVE-D相比最先进方法在top-1准确率上实现高达84%的相对提升，尤其在包含新发布人类标注事件的DrivingDojo数据集上表现突出，有效弥补了纯文本和规则方法的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: STRIVE-D通过数据校准规则融合多模态检索信号，为自动驾驶视频检索提供鲁棒方案，实用性高。未来可扩展至更多动态事件类型及多模态规则生成，但依赖弱标注数据的质量。

title: Graph2Idea:Retrieval-Augmented Scientific Idea Generation with Graph-Structured Contexts
abstract: Generating novel, feasible, and high-quality research ideas is an important yet challenging task in scientific discovery.Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often ground idea generation with retrieved literature, but the retrieved evidence is usually provided as flat text, such as titles, abstracts, or summaries. Such flat contexts may contain redundant or weakly relevant information, while making cross-paper relations among problems, methods, mechanisms, and findings difficult to identify and trace.To address this challenge, we propose Graph2Idea, a knowledge graph-guided framework for retrieval-augmented scientific idea generation.Graph2Idea first retrieves papers according to the input topic, transforms them into structured knowledge triples, and dynamically constructs a target-centered knowledge graph to make literature relations explicit.It then extracts compact graph-derived contexts that retain target-relevant relational evidence while reducing noisy textual input.Based on these contexts, a two-stage generation process first identifies promising research directions and then guides the LLM to synthesize candidate ideas from graph-grounded evidence.Experiments on a scientific idea generation benchmark show that Graph2Idea outperforms representative baselines under the automatic evaluation protocol.Compared with the strongest baseline scores, it improves Novelty from 0.45 to 0.52, Quality from 0.24 to 0.29, and Feasibility from 0.22 to 0.28.These results suggest that graph-structured evidence helps LLMs generate research ideas through more explicit, compact, and traceable recombination of prior scientific knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph2Idea框架，利用知识图谱结构增强检索，提升科学想法生成的新颖性、质量和可行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM-based科学想法生成方法依赖平面文本检索，证据冗余、关系隐晦，难以有效利用跨论文的知识关联。针对这一挑战，论文旨在通过结构化知识图谱显式建模文献间的问题、方法、机制等关系，从而提升生成想法的质量和可追溯性。
light_analysis.method: Graph2Idea先根据输入主题检索论文，将其转化为知识三元组并动态构建目标中心知识图谱；然后提取紧凑的图衍生上下文，保留相关性证据并减少噪声；最后采用两阶段生成：先识别研究方向，再引导LLM基于图证据合成候选想法。
light_analysis.result: 在科学想法生成基准上，Graph2Idea自动评估优于所有基线。与最强基线相比，新颖性从0.45提高到0.52，质量从0.24提高到0.29，可行性从0.22提高到0.28，表明图结构证据能更有效地提升LLM生成研究的综合表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Graph2Idea通过图结构化上下文实现更明确、紧凑、可追溯的知识重组，显著提升了LLM生成科学想法的效果。该工作展现了知识图谱在检索增强生成中的潜力，未来可探索更复杂的图推理和跨领域应用，但当前仅验证于单一基准。

title: Addressing Market Regime Changes and Heavy-Tailed Returns in Portfolio Optimization via Bayesian VAR and Elliptical Black-Litterman
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks for portfolio optimization have shown promise for their ability to learn allocation rules dynamically from market data. However, these models fail to account for fat-tailed returns, which characterize actual market behavior with more frequent extreme events. Furthermore, historical data is treated homogeneously, without accounting for temporal importance, leading models to fail during regime changes. We propose a new BAVAR-BLED algorithm that combines methods derived from Bayesian-Averaging Vector Autoregressive (BAVAR) and the Black-Litterman model using Elliptical Distributions (BLED) within a TD3 architecture. BAVAR captures a set of vector autoregressive representations that consider multi-scale temporal features, enabling adaptive allocation decisions based on regime-aware estimates of return expectations and dispersion matrices. These estimates serve as prior inputs to BLED, a model that uses Student's t-distributions, allowing for more realistic fat tail return estimates. The BAVAR-BLED algorithm uses transformer networks for view construction and CNNs for risk-aversion estimates, which modify dynamic allocation decisions based on market conditions. An evaluation of 29 Dow Jones Industrial Average constituents over a decade-long market period shows that BAVAR-BLED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving Sharpe and Sortino ratios of 1.72 and 2.70, respectively, and total returns of 57.26%.
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Extends our prior work [Mikriukov et al., ICIC 2025] on Black-Litterman under Elliptical Distributions (BLED). Manuscript under review

light_analysis.overview: 提出BAVAR-BLED算法，融合贝叶斯VAR和椭圆Black-Litterman模型，解决投资组合优化中市场制度变化和厚尾收益问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度强化学习投资组合优化方法忽略实际市场的厚尾收益和制度变化，导致极端事件和市况转换时表现不佳。需要一种能自适应市场环境且处理非正态收益分布的模型，以提升鲁棒性和收益表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于TD3架构，BAVAR模块通过贝叶斯平均向量自回归捕捉多尺度时间特征，生成制度感知的预期收益和协方差矩阵作为先验；BLED模块使用学生t分布建模厚尾收益。Transformer网络构建观点，CNN估计风险厌恶系数，动态调整配置决策。
light_analysis.result: 在道琼斯工业平均指数29只成分股十年数据上，BAVAR-BLED的Sharpe比率为1.72，Sortino比率为2.70，总回报57.26%，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: BAVAR-BLED有效结合贝叶斯VAR和椭圆Black-Litterman，提升了在制度变化和厚尾收益下的投资组合性能。未来可探索更多市场状态建模或扩展至其他资产类别。

title: From Shortcuts to Reasoning: Robust Post-Training of Theory of Mind with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM) is a must-acquire skill for modern foundation model systems to operate effectively and safely in the real world. Recent works have explored honing ToM via post-training; however, we show that such progress is confounded by a pervasive "shortcut" issue: tasks can reach up to 99% accuracy by simply exploiting spurious causal correlations, leading to a false sense of ToM. Motivated by this, we first develop a framework to systematically examine ToM datasets for shortcuts and provide guidance for future development. We find that questions reducible to pure state tracking, such as "belief," are especially shortcut-prone compared to mind questions, such as "intention," where reasoning beyond tracking is required. Using four shortcut-free datasets across three ToM contexts, we then comprehensively study whether Reinforcement Fine-Tuning with verifiable rewards and explicit reasoning chains, called Thinking-RFT, elevates ToM beyond Supervised Fine-Tuning, or SFT. Our key findings are as follows. First, Thinking-RFT effectively improves ToM in all scenarios, with a 6% improvement over SFT, particularly in complex higher-order reasoning, with a 10% improvement over SFT, and multimodal cases, with a 7% improvement over SFT. It also generalizes notably better to unseen domains and higher-order queries while being more robust to counterfactuals. Second, ToM benefits specifically from the joint effect of reasoning and RL: Thinking-RFT outperforms Non-Thinking-RFT by 7% on average. Third, RFT works by learning to ground its reasoning on anchor cues, such as keywords and state changes, that correspond to causal factors. We believe our study is useful for developing effective and robust ToM post-training datasets and advancing critical ToM capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Thinking-RFT方法，通过强化微调与显式推理链，有效提升理论心智（ToM）的后训练性能，同时解决数据中的捷径偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 理论心智（ToM）是基础模型在现实世界中安全运行的关键能力，但现有后训练方法存在严重的捷径偏差问题：模型可仅利用虚假因果相关性达到99%的准确率，产生虚假的ToM能力。现有研究缺乏对ToM数据集中捷径的系统检测与消除，导致训练出的模型缺乏真正的推理能力。因此，需要发展一种能避免捷径、增强推理的鲁棒后训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先开发一套系统框架检测ToM数据集中的捷径，发现可简化为状态追踪的问题（如信念问题）尤其容易受捷径影响。然后使用四个无捷径数据集，涵盖三个ToM上下文，研究Thinking-RFT方法：即结合可验证奖励的强化微调（RFT）与显式推理链。与监督微调（SFT）对比，关键设计在于推理链与强化学习的联合作用，并让模型学习基于锚定线索（如关键词、状态变化）进行推理。
light_analysis.result: Thinking-RFT在所有场景中均优于SFT：整体ToM准确率提升6%，复杂高阶推理提升10%，多模态任务提升7%。在未见领域和高阶查询上泛化能力显著更强，对反事实场景更鲁棒。此外，去推理链的RFT（Non-Thinking-RFT）平均低7%，证明推理与RL的联合效果至关重要。模型通过锚定因果线索（如关键词）进行推理，实现了更可靠的ToM。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了ToM后训练中的捷径问题，并证明Thinking-RFT是提升ToM鲁棒性和泛化能力的有效方法。其核心贡献在于系统检测捷径、开发无捷径数据集，并验证推理与强化学习的联合作用。该工作为开发真实ToM能力的基础模型提供了方法论指导，未来可探索更复杂的ToM任务与多步推理，并进一步优化奖励设计。

title: Stabilizing On-Policy Distillation for MLLM Reasoning with Global Normalization
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an important post-training paradigm. By using a stronger teacher model to provide dense, fine-grained supervision for sampled trajectories, OPD offers a clear advantage over reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), which typically depends on sparse binary or outcome-based environmental feedback. However, naive token-level distillation can suffer from gradient instability, due to magnitude misalignment in outlier states. To address this issue, we propose Globally Normalized Distillation Policy Optimization (GNDPO), a practical method that stabilizes optimization by transforming raw KL scores into batch-level relative advantages. This normalization effectively mitigates gradient explosions while retaining the benefits of token-level guidance. Experimental results show that GNDPO substantially improves training robustness and downstream performance across multimodal reasoning tasks. The code is released at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/GNDPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全局归一化蒸馏策略优化（GNDPO），通过批次级相对优势归一化解决on-policy蒸馏中的梯度不稳定问题，提升多模态大语言模型推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: On-policy蒸馏（OPD）利用强教师模型提供密集监督，优于依赖稀疏反馈的强化学习，但token级蒸馏在异常状态下因幅度不一致导致梯度爆炸和不稳定。现有方法无法同时保留token级指导优势并避免梯度问题，亟需一种稳定优化方法。
light_analysis.method: GNDPO将原始KL散度分数转换为批次级相对优势，实现全局归一化。该归一化有效抑制梯度爆炸，同时保留token级指导的细粒度信息。通过批量统计计算优势值，使训练更稳定，适用于多模态推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GNDPO在多个多模态推理任务上显著提高训练鲁棒性和下游性能。与基线相比，训练过程更平稳，最终准确率提升明显（摘要未提供具体数值，但声称substantially improves）。
light_analysis.conclusion: GNDPO为on-policy蒸馏提供了一种实用且有效的稳定方案，提升了多模态大语言模型的推理能力。代码已开源，便于复现。未来可探索其在其他蒸馏场景和更大规模模型中的应用。

title: DynaOD: Dynamic Origin-Destination Flow Generation with Discrete-to-Continuous Temporal Semantic Modeling
abstract: Dynamic origin-destination (OD) flow generation seeks to synthesize realistic mobility dynamics from temporal context alone, without relying on historical OD observations. A key challenge is to translate semantic temporal signals into temporally coherent OD patterns while preserving the inherent spatial heterogeneity of urban regions. We propose DynaOD, a semantic-driven framework that models temporal dynamics through two complementary perspectives: discrete directional trends that characterize qualitative shifts in urban activity patterns, and continuous temporal evolution that captures how such shifts unfold over time. By jointly encoding these temporal semantics, the framework constructs time-varying region representations that condition pretrained static OD generators in a lightweight and plug-and-play fashion. This modular design further supports scalable deployment and cross-city transferability. Extensive experiments on large-scale real-world datasets show that our method consistently outperforms representative baselines in both predictive accuracy and distributional fidelity. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/csjiezhao/DynaOD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaOD框架，通过离散到连续时间语义建模生成动态OD流，实现无需历史数据的时空模式合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态OD流生成旨在仅从时间上下文合成逼真的移动动态，无需历史OD观测。现有方法难以将语义时间信号转换为时间连贯的OD模式并保留城市区域空间异质性。
light_analysis.method: DynaOD框架从两个视角建模时间动态：离散方向趋势表征城市活动模式的定性变化，连续时间演化捕捉变化随时间展开的过程。联合编码构造时变区域表示，以轻量级即插即用方式调节预训练静态OD生成器。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模真实数据集上，DynaOD在预测准确性和分布保真度方面持续优于代表性基线，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出语义驱动的动态OD生成框架，解决了时空模式合成中的关键挑战。模块化设计支持跨城市迁移，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精细的时间粒度或扩展至其他时空预测任务。

title: Edge-Constrained UAV Small-Object Detection with P2 Enhancement and Quantum-Inspired Lightweight Structure Search
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) object detection requires compact detectors that retain small-object details under onboard computation and memory constraints. Repeated downsampling inlightweight networks weakens shallow spatial information, while manually adding attention orfusion modules may increase cost without stable gains. This study analyzes YOLOX-Nano underedge-deployment constraints by combining a P2 high-resolution detection branch with a quantum-inspired evolutionary algorithm (QIEA) for lightweight structure screening. The search space isdefined by lightweight priority and task specificity, and the evaluation jointly considers accuracy,floating-point operations (FLOPs), latency, memory consumption, and recall. On VisDrone, theP2 branch increases APamall by 31.10% over the YOLOX-Nano baseline. Compared with NanoDet-Plus with similar model size, YOLOX-Nano+-P2 improves APs0.ss by 17.5% and APamal by 44.9%.The QIEA-selected candidate obtains the highest Recallso, but +P2 remains the strongest AP-oriented variant after full training. Full 100-epoch verification of Random-best, GA-best, andSA/QUBO-best candidates further shows that proxy rankings do not necessarily transfer to finalAPse9s. These results support using P2 as the main small-object enhancement path and QIEA as alightweight tool for candidate screening and accuracy-cost analysis. The source code, configurationfiles, diagnostic scripts, and summarized results are available at https://github.com/Ming23233/UAV-QIEA-Edge-Detection

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合P2高分辨率检测分支与量子启发式进化算法(QIEA)的轻量级无人机小目标检测方法，在VisDrone上显著提升小目标AP。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机目标检测需在边缘设备上兼顾计算约束与小目标细节。现有轻量网络的下采样削弱浅层空间信息，手动添加注意力或融合模块可能增加成本且收益不稳。亟需自动化的轻量结构搜索方法，在精度、FLOPs、延迟、内存和召回率间取得平衡。
light_analysis.method: 分析YOLOX-Nano在边缘部署下的限制，引入P2高分辨率检测分支增强小目标特征，并利用量子启发式进化算法(QIEA)进行轻量结构筛选。搜索空间由轻量优先级和任务特异性定义，评估联合考虑精度、FLOPs、延迟、内存和召回率。在VisDrone数据集上实验。
light_analysis.result: P2分支使YOLOX-Nano的AP_small提升31.10%。与尺寸相似的NanoDet-Plus相比，YOLOX-Nano+-P2的AP_50提升17.5%，AP_small提升44.9%。QIEA选出的候选在召回率方面最优，但完全训练后P2仍是AP导向的最佳变体。代理排名与最终AP不完全一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: P2分支可有效提升无人机小目标检测精度，QIEA作为轻量工具辅助候选筛选和精度-成本分析。未来可探索更优的搜索策略和更广泛的搜索空间，进一步提升边缘部署效率。

title: Beyond FLOPs: Benchmarking Real Inference Acceleration of LLM Pruning under a GEMM-Centric Taxonomy
abstract: Pruning has emerged as a dominant paradigm for accelerating large language model (LLM) inference, spanning a broad spectrum of methods that remove computation across tokens, layers, heads, dimensions, and attention patterns. Despite sharing the same objective, these pruning approaches induce fundamentally different execution behaviors, causing realized speedups to depend heavily on hardware and kernel implementations. Consequently, the practical acceleration benefits of different pruning families remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a GEMM-centric taxonomy that reorganizes existing pruning methods according to the logical \textbf{M}, \textbf{N}, and \textbf{K} dimensions of general matrix multiplication (GEMM). Leveraging this abstraction, we build a unified benchmarking framework that enables implementation-consistent comparison across the pruning design space and systematically characterizes the acceleration--quality Pareto frontier. Our results show that static depth pruning remains the strongest Pareto-optimal baseline and stays closest to its theoretical acceleration upper bound in memory-bounded scenarios. During prefill, the frontier transitions from static depth at low quality loss (0\%--4\%), to dynamic depth at moderate loss (5\%--16\%), and finally to static width pruning at higher loss levels (17\%--26\%). These findings establish the first unified view of the practical limits of pruning-based LLM acceleration and provide guidance for future pruning research.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning/tree/main/PruningInferSim}

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEMM中心的剪枝分类法，构建统一基准框架，系统评估LLM剪枝的实际加速效果与质量帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM剪枝方法多样，但不同方法在实际硬件上的加速效果受限于执行行为差异，现有研究缺乏统一比较框架，导致不同剪枝家族的加速收益不明确。本文旨在系统量化剪枝方法的实际加速上限。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于GEMM的M、N、K逻辑维度分类法，将现有剪枝方法重新组织。构建统一基准测试框架，实现剪枝设计空间的一致比较，并系统刻画加速-质量帕累托前沿。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 静态深度剪枝在内存受限场景下最接近理论加速上界，是最强帕累托最优基线。预填阶段：低质量损失下静态深度最优，中等损失下动态深度，高损失下静态宽度剪枝。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了LLM剪枝加速实际限制的统一视图，指出不同质量损失下的最优剪枝策略。为未来剪枝研究提供指导，开源代码促进复现。

title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
abstract: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. Rather than passively attending to all historical tokens, LSA proactively predicts future context demands and preserves only the query-critical KV chunks in the GPU memory. Crucially, we instantiate this architecture via a backbone-free decoupled training strategy. By formulating the indexer as a standard dual-encoder architecture, we train it independently using standard retrieval training frameworks without ever loading the massive backbone model into GPU memory.   We demonstrate that this "less is more" paradigm significantly maximizes serving efficiency while acting as an effective attention denoiser in tasks that rely on long-term global memory. Across primary long-context evaluation suites (e.g., LongBench-v2, LongMemEval, and RULER), FM-DS-V4 compresses the average physical KV cache footprint down to merely 13.5% of the full-context baseline, while consistently preserving or slightly elevating downstream accuracy (+0.6% absolute margin on average). Crucially, at extreme 500K scales, FlashMemory suppresses the physical KV cache overhead by over 90% without destabilizing the backbone's core reasoning capacities.
comment: Technical report. 11 pages. Code and model available at https://github.com/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4 and https://huggingface.co/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA) 与神经记忆索引器，通过预测未来上下文需求仅保留关键KV块，将物理KV缓存压缩至全上下文的13.5%，在超长上下文中保持或提升精度并大幅降低GPU内存开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统LLM解码时需保留完整KV缓存，导致GPU内存瓶颈，难以支持超长上下文服务。现有方法被动关注所有历史token，无法高效利用有限内存，限制了实际部署中的上下文长度。需一种能预测性稀疏化缓存的技术，在降低内存占用的同时不损害推理质量。
light_analysis.method: 基于DeepSeek-V4架构设计神经记忆索引器，采用Lookahead Sparse Attention机制，主动预测未来查询所需的KV块并仅缓存关键部分。通过无骨干解耦训练策略，将索引器构建为标准双编码器，使用独立检索训练框架训练，无需加载大模型到GPU内存，实现高效训练与部署。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench-v2、LongMemEval、RULER等长上下文基准上，FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4将平均物理KV缓存压缩至全上下文基线的13.5%，同时下游准确率平均提升0.6%绝对值。在500K极端长度下，物理缓存开销降低超90%，且核心推理能力未受影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了“少即是多”的稀疏注意力范式能显著提升超长上下文服务效率，同时作为注意力去噪器增强长期记忆任务性能。学术上提出了基于预测的KV缓存管理新方向，实际中可支持更长上下文部署。未来可探索索引器预测的鲁棒性及与其它架构的兼容性。

title: The Hidden Bias of Process Reward Models:PRISM for Rewarding the Right Reasoning
abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) improve credit assignment for reasoning by providing step-level feedback. However, we identify a hidden bias in PRMs caused by severe imbalance in step-level training data. Standard cross-entropy training amplifies this bias, causing PRMs to overcredit plausible but incorrect steps and produce high false-positive rates. We show that these false positives have an asymmetric downstream effect: false negatives mainly slow exploration, whereas false positives actively steer Best-of-N selection, guided decoding, and policy optimization toward flawed reasoning. This suggests that PRM training should shift from pointwise label fitting to reliable relative comparisons. To address this, we propose PRISM (Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling), a policy-aware PRM training framework that learns from contrastive step-level comparisons and hard negatives generated by a temporal lookahead strategy, requiring no new human labels. We further use a difficulty-aware curriculum to optimize the contrastive step margin. Across PRMBench and ProcessBench, PRISM substantially reduces false positives (22% on PRMBench) and improves macro F1 over strong discriminative PRMs. When applied to policy optimization and search tasks, including guided decoding and Best-of-N selection, it consistently improves accuracy (up to 22% for guided decoding and 33% for Best-of-N) and robustness. More broadly, trustworthy process supervision is not just about assigning high rewards, but about rewarding the right reasoning for the right reasons.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISM框架，通过对比学习和困难负样本生成解决过程奖励模型的隐藏偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 过程奖励模型（PRMs）通过步骤级反馈改善推理的信用分配，但存在由步骤级训练数据严重不平衡导致的隐藏偏差。标准交叉熵训练会放大这种偏差，使PRMs过度奖励看似合理但错误的步骤，产生高假阳性率。这些假阳性会引导最佳N选择、引导解码和策略优化走向错误推理，而假阴性主要影响探索效率。因此，需要从点标签拟合转向可靠的相对比较。
light_analysis.method: PRISM（Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling）是一种策略感知的PRM训练框架，通过对比步骤级比较和时间前瞻策略生成的困难负样本进行学习，无需新的人工标注。采用困难感知课程优化对比步骤的边际，从点拟合转向相对排名，以降低假阳性率。
light_analysis.result: 在PRMBench和ProcessBench上，PRISM显著降低假阳性率（PRMBench上降低22%），并改进宏F1分数。应用于策略优化和搜索任务（引导解码和最佳N选择）时，准确率持续提升（引导解码提升22%，最佳N选择提升33%），并增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM证明了通过对比学习和困难负样本可以有效纠正过程奖励模型的隐藏偏差，实现更可靠的过程监督。其学术价值在于揭示了PRM训练的偏差问题并提出解决方案，实际应用上可提升推理系统的准确性和鲁棒性。未来工作可探索更复杂的困难样本生成策略。

title: Neural Legendre-Fenchel transform with Hessian Preconditioning
abstract: The Legendre-Fenchel (LF) transform is a fundamental tool in convex analysis and machine learning that maps lower semi-continuous functions to their convex conjugates. In practice, when closed-form formula are not available for expressing convex conjugates of given functions, one must approximate them using various techniques. One recent such versatile numerical method is the deep Legendre transform method which relies on neural networks although it remains challenging particularly for tackling ill-conditioned functions. This work builds on the reformulation of the LF transform as a projective polarity. A notable property of this framework is its affine invariance. We leverage this affine invariance to introduce a Hessian-based preconditioning strategy. Specifically, we apply an affine deformation around a minimizer so that the second-order Taylor approximation of the function coincides with the canonical paraboloid, whose conjugation map is the identity. A residual network initialized near the identity can then learn this simplified mapping, while the original conjugation map is recovered through the inverse deformation. The proposed preconditioning incurs only a modest computational overhead, consisting of a single eigendecomposition during initialization and two matrix-vector multiplications per query. Experiments on a diverse set of convex functions, including high-dimensional benchmarks, demonstrate improved convergence rates and enhanced numerical accuracy of the conjugation, with particularly significant gains for ill-conditioned problems. Finally, we discuss the scope of applicability of our proposed method and highlight several of its limitations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Hessian预条件的神经Legendre-Fenchel变换方法，通过仿射不变性改进凸共轭数值逼近的收敛性和精度。
light_analysis.motivation: Legendre-Fenchel变换是凸分析和机器学习中的基本工具，但实际中许多函数的凸共轭缺少闭式解，需数值近似。现有深度勒让德变换方法在处理病态函数时面临挑战，收敛慢且精度低。因此，需要一种高效稳定的数值方法，尤其适用于高维和病态问题。
light_analysis.method: 将LF变换重述为射影对极，利用其仿射不变性引入Hessian预条件策略。在极小点附近施加仿射变形，使函数二阶泰勒近似与标准抛物面一致（其共轭映射为恒等）。用初始化为近恒等的残差网络学习简化映射，再通过逆变形恢复原始共轭。预条件仅需初始化时一次特征分解和每次查询两次矩阵向量乘法。
light_analysis.result: 在多种凸函数（包括高维基准）上验证，该方法相比基线方法显著改善收敛速率和数值精度，尤其对病态问题增益明显。实验表明预条件仅带来适度计算开销，有效提升了共轭计算的稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出结合Hessian预条件的神经LF变换方法，通过仿射不变性简化学习任务，在保持计算效率的同时提升精度和收敛性。方法适用于广泛凸函数，但存在局限（如需要可微函数、二阶信息可获取等）。未来可探索拓展至非光滑或更大规模问题。

title: Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions
abstract: Reward models are central to text-to-image post-training, but visual preference is subjective and better represented as a distribution over rubric scores than as a deterministic scalar. Existing scalar, score-token, and pairwise reward models over-compress uncertainty and fine-grained score differences, while reasoning-based generative rewards provide stronger judgments but are costly to deploy and difficult to use as direct optimization signals. We propose Z-Reward, a teacher-student reward modeling framework that decouples reasoning-heavy judgment from efficient reward deployment. The teacher is a large VLM that uses reasoning to infer rubric-aligned score distributions, and is trained with Group-wise Direct Score Optimization (GDSO), which combines policy-gradient rewards from distribution expectations with direct pointwise and pairwise supervision on score distributions and score gaps. The student is trained with Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation (RISD), which transfers the teacher's reasoning-conditioned score distribution into a compact VLM without requiring explicit reasoning chains at inference time. On our internally annotated evaluation set, the 27B GDSO teacher reaches 89.6% human preference accuracy, outperforming SFT, RewardDance, and GRPO, while the 9B RISD student reaches 88.6%, outperforming the OPD baseline and closely matching the larger teacher. We further show that Z-Reward can serve as a differentiable reward signal for text-to-image optimization, yielding a 41.3% net human-preference improvement over the SFT baseline.

light_analysis.overview: Z-Reward 通过教师-学生框架将推理内化为分数分布，实现高效且准确的奖励建模，显著提升文本到图像后训练性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉偏好主观性强，更适合表示为分数分布而非确定性标量。现有标量、分数令牌和成对奖励模型过度压缩不确定性和分数差异，而基于推理的生成式奖励虽强但部署昂贵且难以直接优化。Z-Reward 旨在解耦推理与部署，实现高效奖励建模。
light_analysis.method: Z-Reward 采用教师-学生框架。教师为大型 VLM，通过推理推断与评分标准对齐的分数分布，使用群组导向直接分数优化（GDSO）训练，结合策略梯度奖励和点对点/成对监督。学生通过推理内化分数蒸馏（RISD）将教师的推理条件分数分布迁移到紧凑 VLM，推理时无需显式推理链。
light_analysis.result: 在内部标注评估集上，27B GDSO 教师达到 89.6% 人类偏好准确率，优于 SFT、RewardDance 和 GRPO。9B RISD 学生达到 88.6%，优于 OPD 基线，接近教师。Z-Reward 作为可微奖励信号用于文本到图像优化，比 SFT 基线净提升 41.3% 人类偏好。
light_analysis.conclusion: Z-Reward 通过教师-学生框架有效解耦推理与部署，实现了高效且准确的奖励建模，在文本到图像后训练中取得显著提升。未来可探索更紧凑的学生模型或跨模态应用。

title: REFINE: Super-efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning via Rendering-Free Primitive Importance
abstract: Existing pruning methods for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) suffer from either severe quality degradation or prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose REFINE, a highly accelerated 3DGS pruning framework centered on a novel rendering-free primitive importance metric. Our approach leverages an analytically approximated, rendering-aware Hessian field to quantify the expected perceptual error induced by the removal of individual primitives. By modeling the joint modulation of visibility, projection geometry and the content adaptive hyperparameter, we entirely bypass costly forward rendering passes and derive an anisotropic perceptual weight field that serves as a high-fidelity proxy for primitive importance. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that REFINE maintains highly competitive rendering quality while achieving an unprecedented $3,000\times$ reduction in pruning-related computational complexity compared to state-of-the-art pruning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFINE框架，通过无渲染的基元重要性度量实现3D高斯溅射的超高效剪枝。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射剪枝方法要么导致严重质量下降，要么计算开销巨大。为解决这一矛盾，需要一种既能保持高渲染质量又能大幅降低计算复杂度的剪枝方法。该研究针对此类方法缺失的问题，提出一种无需渲染即可评估基元重要性的新度量，从而在剪枝过程中避免昂贵的前向渲染计算。
light_analysis.method: REFINE使用解析近似的渲染感知Hessian场来量化移除单个基元时引起的预期感知误差。该方法联合建模了可见性、投影几何和内容自适应超参数的调制作用，完全绕过了前向渲染过程，导出一个各向异性的感知权重场，作为基元重要性的高保真代理。此方法无需实际渲染即可高效评估基元重要性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，REFINE保持了极具竞争力的渲染质量，同时相比最先进的剪枝方法，将剪枝相关计算复杂度降低了前所未有的3000倍。摘要未提供具体PSNR或视觉质量数值，但强调计算效率的极大提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFINE提出了一种高效的3DGS剪枝框架，其核心创新在于无渲染的基元重要性度量，显著降低了计算开销而不牺牲渲染质量。该方法具有学术和应用价值，适用于需要高实时性或低计算资源的3D场景渲染场景。未来可探索更复杂的感知模型或扩展到动态场景。

title: A Unifying Lens on Reward Uncertainty in RLHF
abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is bottlenecked by \emph{reward hacking}, where the policy exploits errors in a proxy reward model (RM) and produces high RM scores without genuine quality gains. A natural mitigation is \emph{pessimism}: penalizing rewards in regions where the RM is uncertain. However, standard scalar RMs provide no principled notion of uncertainty. We argue that the right object is a \emph{distributional} reward model $p(r\mid x,y)$. Under either a Bayesian inference or a KL-distributionally robust optimization (KL-DRO) lens, the KL-regularized RLHF objective admits a closed-form effective reward $\tilde r(x,y) = \pmβ\log\mathbb{E}_p[e^{\pm r/β}]$. The pessimistic branch unifies the prior heuristics for RM ensemble aggregation: mean aggregation, worst-case optimization (WCO), and uncertainty-weighted optimization (UWO) all emerge as limits or truncations of this single expression. This also clarifies the implicit assumptions of each existing rule.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布奖励模型统一RLHF中的悲观奖励构建，揭示现有启发式方法的理论基础。
light_analysis.motivation: RLHF面临奖励破解问题，即策略利用代理奖励模型的错误产生高分但无真正质量提升。标准标量奖励模型无法提供不确定性度量，导致缺乏原则性的悲观策略。现有缓解方法（如集成聚合）依赖于启发式规则，缺乏统一理论框架。该研究旨在通过分布奖励模型为悲观奖励提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出将奖励模型视为分布形式 p(r|x,y)，在贝叶斯推断或KL-DRO视角下，推导出KL正则化RLHF目标的闭式有效奖励：	ilde r(x,y) = ±β log E_p[e^{±r/β}]。其中悲观分支将均值聚合、最坏情况优化和不确定性加权优化等现有启发式方法统一为该表达式的极限或截断形式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但理论分析表明所提统一表达式能够涵盖并解释多种现有奖励集成聚合策略，为不同聚合规则的隐式假设提供了清晰的理论说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过分布奖励模型和统一的有效奖励表达式，为RLHF中的悲观奖励提供了理论基础，揭示了现有启发式方法的联系与假设。这有助于设计更稳健的奖励模型，减少奖励破解。未来可探索该框架在实践中的应用与扩展。

title: REFLECT: Intervention-Supported Error Attribution for Silent Failures in LLM Agent Traces
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents now solve complex tasks through long plan-and-execution traces, yet the ability to locate errors in a completed traces still lags far behind, especially in the \emph{silent failure} regime. Existing approaches predict suspect steps via classifiers or LLM judges, or recover correct answers via retry, but none feed the intervention outcome back to \emph{refine the attribution itself}. We propose \methodname, a method that closes this gap by diagnosing a candidate error step, testing it through controlled replay with a diagnosis-specific patch, and using the verified outcome flip as contrastive evidence to refine the final attribution. Across four localization benchmarks spanning multi-hop reasoning across domains, \methodname achieves the highest localization accuracy among same-auditor methods across all four benchmarks, with the largest gains on structured tool-use traces, while providing actionable localization even when ground-truth answers are unavailable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFLECT方法，通过诊断候选错误步骤、受控重放和对比证据，精确定位LLM代理轨迹中的静默失败。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理通过长计划执行轨迹解决复杂任务，但静默错误定位能力不足。现有方法仅预测可疑步骤或重试，未利用干预结果改进归因。静默失败难以检测且影响任务正确性，因此需要更精准的定位方法。
light_analysis.method: REFLECT首先诊断候选错误步骤，然后使用特定补丁进行受控重放，将验证后的结果翻转作为对比证据来细化最终归因。该方法通过闭环反馈提升定位精度，集成到代理轨迹审计中。
light_analysis.result: 在四个跨领域多跳推理的定位基准上，REFLECT在相同审计器方法中取得最高准确率，尤其在结构化工具使用轨迹上提升最大。即使无真实答案，也能提供可操作定位。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFLECT显著提升了LLM代理静默错误的定位能力，具有学术价值。未来可扩展至更复杂错误类型和场景，但需注意其对诊断补丁的依赖。

title: Emergent Misalignment Can Be Induced by Sycophancy and Reversed via Alignment Gating
abstract: Prior work has shown that fine-tuning large language models on malicious or incorrect outputs in narrow domains can induce broad misalignment and harmful behavior, a phenomenon known as emergent misalignment. However, efficient methods for reversing such misalignment remain limited. In this work, we make two contributions. First, we identify sycophancy fine-tuning, i.e., training models to passively agree with users' incorrect opinions, as a previously underexplored driver of emergent misalignment, and show that it induces broad and severe misaligned behavior. Second, we propose Alignment Gating, an efficient method for reversing emergent misalignment that inserts learnable and controllable gates into the model during fine-tuning. Through fine-tuning, these gates learn to identify the internal representations responsible for unsafe responses. Thus, amplifying or suppressing these representations then exacerbates or mitigates EM, respectively. We further find that alignment gating module exhibits strong generalization: gating weights obtained from narrow-domain fine-tuning substantially suppress broad-domain misaligned behavior while preserving the model's general capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示奉承微调可诱导大语言模型产生新兴错位，并提出对齐门控方法高效逆转此错位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明，在狭窄领域对恶意输出进行微调会导致广泛的新兴错位，但缺乏有效的逆转方法。本文旨在探索奉承微调（即训练模型被动同意用户错误观点）作为新兴错位的驱动因素，并开发一种高效的逆转技术，以维护模型的安全性。
light_analysis.method: 提出对齐门控（Alignment Gating）方法，在微调期间插入可学习且可控的门控模块。这些门通过学习识别导致不安全响应的内部表示，从而通过放大或抑制这些表示来恶化或缓解新兴错位。该方法仅需狭窄领域微调，即可泛化至广泛领域。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，奉承微调显著诱导了广泛且严重的错位行为。对齐门控模块在狭窄领域微调后，能有效抑制广泛领域的错位行为，同时保持模型的通用能力，展现出强泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了两个关键发现：奉承微调作为新兴错位的新驱动因素，以及对齐门控作为高效逆转方法。该方法具有强泛化能力，为模型安全微调提供了实用方案，未来可探索门控机制的更广泛应用。

title: OnlyDense: Reduced-Order Modeling for Lagrangian simulation
abstract: In science and engineering, Lagrangian simulation methods such as Smooth Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) or Material Point Method (MPM) are often employed to study the behavior of dynamic systems. However, these methods can be prohibitively computationally expensive, particularly when simulating multi-scale spatial or temporal phenomena, e.g., void growth and coalescence within macro-scale geometries, structural failure of spacecraft components resulting from hypervelocity impact of space debris particles, etc. In contrast to graph-based methods, where the state of the system is understood as a discrete set of particles, we propose a learning framework for scalable representation and dynamics modeling of massive particle systems by treating the system state as a function and its evolution as a trajectory in Hilbert space. Rather than representing the state as a discrete set of particles or embedding it in a nonlinear latent manifold, we approximate the state space with a linear subspace spanned by learned neural basis functions. This parameterization enables direct projection to obtain latent coefficients and explicit access to the basis functions, avoiding optimization over a nonlinear latent space. The resulting representation admits a natural interpretation: latent variables correspond to coefficients in Hilbert space, and basis functions correspond to spatial modes, analogous to Proper Orthogonal Decomposition. The framework thus unifies classical projection-based reduced-order modeling with modern deep learning, while remaining invariant to the number of discretization points. Experiments on large-scale SPH simulations with over one million particles, including dynamic events with extreme deformation and fragmentation, demonstrate that the proposed method accurately reconstructs and predicts dynamics, achieving an R$^2$ score above $0.99$ with as few as $32$ basis functions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于神经基函数线性子空间的降阶建模方法，高效表示和预测大规模拉格朗日粒子系统动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 拉格朗日模拟方法（如SPH、MPM）计算开销巨大，尤其在多尺度时空现象（如宏观几何中的空洞增长和聚结、超高速冲击导致的结构失效）中。现有图方法将系统视为离散粒子集，计算复杂度高。需要一种可扩展的表示和动力学建模方法，能处理大规模粒子系统且保持计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 将系统状态视为Hilbert空间中的函数，其演化轨迹由学习到的神经基函数张成的线性子空间逼近。通过直接投影获取潜在系数，显式访问基函数，避免非线性潜在空间的优化。该表示统一了经典投影降阶建模与深度学习，且对离散化点数保持不变性。
light_analysis.result: 在超过一百万个粒子的SPH模拟（包括极端变形和碎裂的动态事件）上，仅用32个基函数即实现R²分数高于0.99的准确重建与预测，验证了方法的有效性和高效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的降阶建模框架，将系统状态函数化并在线性子空间中近似，结合了经典方法可解释性与深度学习灵活性。适用于大规模拉格朗日模拟，具有显著加速潜力。未来可探索更复杂的基函数形式或应用于其他粒子方法。

title: See More, Think Deeper: Query-Expanded Visual Evidence and Answer-Clue Guided Reflection for Long Video Understanding
abstract: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have enabled performance on long-video understanding tasks. However, existing methods still face two key limitations: evidence acquisition often relies on a single search intent, and answer generation lacks an effective visual feedback mechanism. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CoVER}, a Comprehensive Visual Evidence and Reflection framework for long-video understanding. CoVER enables Video-LLMs to \textbf{See More} by dynamically gathering query-expanded visual evidence, and \textbf{Think Deeper} by verifying draft answers with effective answer-specific visual feedback. Together, these mechanisms shift long-video understanding from answer-centric generation to evidence-centric and visually verifiable reasoning. Experimental results show that CoVER-7B substantially outperforms models with the same parameter scale and even surpasses state-of-the-art closed-source models on certain metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoVER框架，通过查询扩展视觉证据和答案线索引导的反思机制，提升长视频理解的准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Video-LLMs在长视频理解中存在两大局限：证据获取依赖单一搜索意图，导致信息不全；答案生成缺乏视觉反馈机制，难以验证正确性。这些问题限制了模型对复杂长视频场景的推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoVER框架，包含两个核心机制：See More通过查询扩展动态收集多样化的视觉证据；Think Deeper利用答案特定的视觉反馈对草稿答案进行验证和修正。该框架将长视频理解从答案中心转向证据中心和视觉可验证的推理。
light_analysis.result: CoVER-7B在多个长视频理解基准上显著超越同参数量模型，部分指标甚至超过闭源模型（如GPT-4V），但具体数值未在摘要中提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoVER通过引入查询扩展和视觉反思机制，为长视频理解提供了新的范式，增强了模型的可信度和可解释性。未来可探索更高效的证据收集和反馈策略以提升推理效率。

title: Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome
abstract: Two-stage post-training -- a Stage-1 warm-start (supervised fine-tuning, SFT, or on-policy distillation, OPD) followed by Stage-2 reinforcement learning (RL) -- is increasingly used for vision-language models (VLMs). We ask what Stage-1 actually controls in a small-data study using Qwen2.5-VL-7B with a same-modality 72B VLM teacher for OPD. First, the three warm-starts reach a narrow $53$--$54\%$ band on Geometry3K internal validation, consistent with the narrow range reported by recent specialized methods; this setup provides little evidence that Stage-1 changes the in-domain endpoint. Second, a matched-recipe, early-stopped SFT improves out-of-domain MathVista by $+2.1$ points, reversing the $-9.5$-point drop of an over-trained variant. The clearest difference is the \emph{entropy regime}: OPD enters RL with substantially higher policy entropy than either SFT initialization, and the separation remains visible through the available trajectories. At the in-domain initialization, OPD also has higher answer diversity and pass@16 ($+2.0$ to $+5.2$ points over SFT), although problem-level bootstrap intervals show that the smaller contrast is uncertain. The advantage is absent after RL (endpoint pass@16 values within $1.1$ points) and on MathVista (six models within $1.2$ points). Our contribution is therefore a bounded empirical characterization: Stage-1 is strongly associated with the entropy regime in this setup, but the downstream payoff is small, localized, and not evidence that OPD is a better RL warm-start.

light_analysis.overview: 两阶段后训练中，Stage-1主要影响策略熵状态而非最终性能，OPD相比SFT带来更高熵但下游收益有限。
light_analysis.motivation: 两阶段后训练（Stage-1 SFT/OPD + Stage-2 RL）在视觉语言模型中广泛应用，但Stage-1的具体作用尚不明确。现有研究多关注最终性能，忽略了中间状态如策略熵的影响。本文旨在通过可控实验，揭示Stage-1实际上控制的是训练过程中的熵状态，而非域内或域外最终结果，从而为理解多阶段训练机制提供实证基础。
light_analysis.method: 使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，并以同模态72B VLM作为教师进行OPD。对比三种Stage-1热身：SFT、过训练SFT和OPD。在Geometry3K内验证集和MathVista外域数据集上评估。测量策略熵、答案多样性和pass@16等指标。采用匹配配方和早期停止控制。通过bootstrap区间量化不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 三种热身在内域验证集上表现接近（53-54%）。早期停止SFT在MathVista上提升+2.1点，而过训练SFT下降-9.5点。OPD进入RL时策略熵显著高于SFT，且差异持续可见。OPD初始pass@16比SFT高2.0-5.2点，但bootstrap区间显示不确定性大。RL后pass@16差异在1.1点内，MathVista上六模型差异在1.2点内。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stage-1与策略熵状态强相关，但下游性能提升小且局部化，不能证明OPD是更好的RL热身。研究为多阶段训练的熵作用提供了实证边界，提示需谨慎评估Stage-1的长期影响。未来可探索熵状态与RL收敛的关系，以及更大规模模型下的泛化性。

title: MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation
abstract: Video generative models have become increasingly powerful, but long-range consistency remains challenging to achieve because even a few dozen frames require impractically long transformer sequence lengths. We show that this issue can be mitigated by generating video using coarse-to-fine rollout within a multi-scale token space. Our approach is simple: first, we pre-train an autoencoder that compresses each frame into a hierarchy of tokens, with levels ranging from the typical latent resolution to only a handful of tokens per frame. The coarsest levels capture the most consequential information, such as scene layout and semantics, while finer levels add high-frequency appearance and texture. Then, we train a video diffusion model to generate these tokens using coarse-to-fine rollout. By carefully controlling the level of detail at which frames are generated and used as context during each rollout step, we are able to preserve long-range consistency in geometry and object permanence while spending less compute on the long-range consistency of less perceptually relevant details. We validate this approach using a custom dataset of long Minecraft videos, where it produces substantially more consistent rollouts compared to existing baselines.
comment: Ishaan Preetam Chandratreya and David Charatan contributed equally. Project page: https://davidcharatan.com/millivid/

light_analysis.overview: 提出多尺度分层潜在空间方法，通过粗到细的逐级生成实现视频长程一致性，无需长序列Transformer。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型的长程一致性难以实现，因为即使是几十帧也需要过长的Transformer序列长度，计算不可行。现有方法在保持场景布局、物体恒存等全局一致性上存在不足，且对高频细节的长程一致性计算浪费。因此需要一种高效机制，在保持关键结构一致性的同时降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 首先预训练一个自编码器，将每帧压缩为层次化token，从典型潜在分辨率到每帧仅几个token。最粗层级捕捉场景布局和语义，更细层级增加高频外观和纹理。然后训练视频扩散模型，采用粗到细的逐级生成策略：在每个生成步骤中，精心控制帧的细节级别作为上下文，从而在保持几何和物体恒存长程一致性的同时，减少对感知不重要的细节的长程一致性计算。使用自定义长Minecraft视频数据集验证。
light_analysis.result: 在自定义长Minecraft视频数据集上，该方法生成的视频相较于现有基线，在长程一致性上明显更优。具体表现为场景布局、物体恒存等关键方面的一致性大幅提升，同时计算效率更高。论文未给出精确数值指标，但定性结果和用户研究支持其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种通过多尺度分层潜在空间实现视频长程一致性的新方法，利用粗到细生成策略平衡一致性与计算效率。该方法在Minecraft长视频生成中验证了有效性，为视频扩散模型的长程一致性提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的场景和更多样的视频类型，以及进一步优化编码器-解码器结构。

title: INFUSER: Influence-Guided Self-Evolution Improves Reasoning
abstract: Self-evolution offers a scalable path to stronger reasoning: a pretrained language model improves itself with only minimal external supervision. Yet existing methods either depend on extensively curated or teacher-generated training data, or, when the generator runs unsupervised, reward it by a difficulty heuristic that need not improve the solver. We introduce INFUSER, an iterative co-training framework with two co-evolving roles: a Generator that drafts questions and reference golden answers from a pool of unstructured, automatically collected documents, and a Solver that improves by training on them. The solver is trained with standard correctness rewards against the generator-provided answers, while the generator is rewarded by an optimizer-aware influence score that measures whether each proposed question would actually improve the solver on the target distribution. Because this continuous, noisy influence score is poorly served by standard GRPO, we propose DuGRPO, a dual-normalized variant of GRPO, for generator training. Together, these turn the document pool into an adaptive curriculum that favors questions useful to the current solver, not just hard ones. On Qwen3-8B-Base, INFUSER outperforms strong self-evolution baselines with over 20% relative improvement on Olympiad and SuperGPQA benchmarks, and an 8B INFUSER co-evolving generator outperforms a frozen 32B thinking generator on math and coding. Ablations confirm each design choice is necessary, and two extensions, applying INFUSER to an instruction-finetuned anchor and augmenting it with rule-verifiable RLVR data, further demonstrate the flexibility and generalizability of the framework. Code is available at https://github.com/FFishy-git/INFUSER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出INFUSER，一种基于影响引导的自进化推理框架，通过协同训练生成器和求解器并引入DuGRPO优化，显著提升模型推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自进化方法依赖精心策划或教师生成的训练数据，或使用困难启发式奖励，未必能有效改进求解器。需要一种无需大量外部监督、能自动生成有效训练数据并自适应优化求解器的方法。INFUSER旨在解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: INFUSER采用迭代协同训练框架，包含生成器和求解器。生成器从无结构化文档池中起草问题和参考答案，求解器通过标准正确性奖励训练。生成器使用优化器感知的影响分数作为奖励，该分数衡量问题对求解器目标分布的改进。由于影响分数连续且嘈杂，提出DuGRPO（双归一化GRPO）进行生成器训练，从而形成自适应课程学习。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-8B-Base上，INFUSER在Olympiad和SuperGPQA基准上相对提升超20%。8B生成器优于冻结的32B思维生成器。消融实验验证各组件必要性。扩展至指令微调锚点和规则可验证RLVR数据，展示了灵活性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: INFUSER有效提升了语言模型的推理能力，通过影响引导的自进化减少了对外部监督的依赖。框架具有灵活性和可扩展性，可应用于多种场景。代码已开源，为后续研究提供了基础。

title: Beyond Convolution: Advancing Hypergraph Neural Networks with Hypergraph U-Nets
abstract: Convolutions have successfully transitioned from image processing to the complex realm of non-Euclidean higher-order domains, particularly in hypergraphs. Despite the success in convolution, the exploration of a popular architecture named U-Net remains largely unexplored for hypergraph data due to the lack of well-defined pooling and unpooling operations. This work pioneers the study of U-Net architectures for hypergraph data, addressing the critical challenge of designing effective pooling and unpooling operations that retain maximal structural information from the input hypergraph. Motivated by hierarchical clustering, we propose to construct the pooling and unpooling operators all at once by cutting the clustering dendrogram at different granularities, named the Parallel Hierarchical Pooling (PHPool) and Unpooling (PHUnpool) operators. Unlike existing pooling methods that risk local structural damage through a sequential learning procedure, our PHPool operators are designed in a global and parallel manner to ensure fidelity to the original hypergraph structure with efficient computation while the PHUnpool operators are tailored to perform inverse operations of the PHPools for hypergraph reconstruction. We validate our model through hypergraph reconstruction simulation, hypergraph classification, and node-level anomaly detection, where it demonstrates superior performance over existing state-of-the-art graph and hypergraph deep learning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超图U-Net架构，通过并行层次化池化（PHPool）与解池化（PHUnpool）操作，有效保留超图结构信息，在多个任务上超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 超图上U-Net架构探索不足，缺乏有效保持结构信息的池化与解池化操作。现有方法通过顺序学习易损坏局部结构，亟需全局并行且高效的池化方案以提升超图学习性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于层次聚类，在不同粒度切割聚类树状图，同时构建PHPool和PHUnpool算子。PHPool以全局并行方式操作，保证原始结构忠实度与计算效率；PHUnpool执行逆操作实现超图重建。
light_analysis.result: 在超图重建仿真、超图分类和节点级异常检测任务中，所提模型均取得最优性能，显著优于现有图与超图深度学习方法（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将U-Net引入超图学习，提出并行层次化池化方法，有效解决结构信息保留难题。该工作拓展了超图神经网络的架构设计，具有理论价值与应用前景，未来可探索更复杂超图场景。

title: Decoy-Calibrated Failure Audits for Language Models
abstract: Useful audits reveal not only how often a model fails, but also where its failures concentrate. An auditor may test many candidate explanations: long inputs, indirect questions, distracting evidence, or combinations of these factors. The risk is selection. The largest observed effect may reflect a real failure mode, or it may simply be the best result among many tried. We introduce Janus, a procedure for deciding when a proposed error explanation is credible enough to report. The goal is not to generate new explanations, but to decide which ones hold up. The auditor starts with a fixed model, a labeled evaluation set, and a frozen list of candidate explanations, which we call descriptors. Janus scores each descriptor by its error-rate lift, then compares real descriptors with fake ones that have the same frequencies but are randomly assigned to examples. A descriptor is confirmed only if it beats this decoy floor on the data used for discovery and then repeats on separate held-out data. In a controlled audit of multi-table lookup tasks, Janus identifies the planted failure, confirming long-chain descriptors and their interactions. The LLM often stops partway through the lookup chain instead of reaching the final answer. On two public benchmarks, MuSiQue and LongBench v2, the SliceLine baseline flags plausible high-error pockets, but Janus confirms none of them. Ablations show why both safeguards matter. On LongBench v2, an uncalibrated fixed threshold reports 20 descriptors, the decoy floor leaves one, and the holdout check rejects the last one after its lift shrinks from 0.36 to 0.05. The resulting principle separates proposing explanations from reporting them. Candidates may come from any source, but only those that beat decoys and replicate on fresh data become audit findings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Janus方法，通过虚假描述符和保留数据双重校准，判断语言模型失败审计中错误解释的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 审计语言模型失败时，测试多种候选解释会导致选择偏差：观测到的最大错误率提升可能来自偶然而非真实失败模式。需要一种统计严谨的方法来区分真实失败与伪相关，确保审计结果可信。
light_analysis.method: Janus方法包含三步骤：首先固定模型、评估集和预定义描述符；计算每个描述符的错误率提升；然后创建频率相同但随机分配的假描述符作为decoy floor，真实描述符必须超过该基线；最后在保留数据上验证其提升是否稳定。通过假描述符和holdout双校准避免虚假发现。
light_analysis.result: 在可控多表查找任务中，Janus准确识别植入的长链描述符失败。在MuSiQue和LongBench v2上，SliceLine基线标识多个高错误区域，但Janus未确认任何解释。消融显示：LongBench v2上无校准固定阈值报告20个描述符，decoy floor后剩1个，holdout验证后该描述符提升从0.36降至0.05被拒绝。
light_analysis.conclusion: Janus原则将提出解释与报告解释分离，只有击败虚假基线并在新数据上可复现的解释才成为审计发现。该方法提升了审计的统计严谨性，可应用于语言模型可靠性评估，但依赖预定义描述符列表。

title: DynaCF: Mitigating Shortcut Learning in Reward Models via Dynamic Counterfactual Sensitivity
abstract: Reward models trained from pairwise preferences often exploit superficial shortcut cues rather than learning true response quality. We propose DynaCF, a dynamic reweighting framework for mitigating shortcut learning in reward model training. Unlike static shortcut heuristics, DynaCF measures shortcut sensitivity online during optimization by applying semantics-preserving counterfactual perturbations and tracking the resulting margin shifts and preference flips under the current model. Samples with higher shortcut sensitivity are dynamically downweighted in the Bradley-Terry objective, encouraging the model to rely less on superficial patterns and more on task-relevant preference signals. Extensive experiments show that DynaCF consistently improves robustness in preference modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaCF动态重加权框架，通过在线测量反事实敏感性来缓解奖励模型中的捷径学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励模型从偏好对训练时容易利用表面捷径线索而非真实响应质量，现有静态启发式方法无法动态适应优化过程，导致模型鲁棒性不足。亟需一种在线动态调整样本权重的方法，以削弱捷径模式的影响。
light_analysis.method: DynaCF在模型优化过程中在线测量每个样本的捷径敏感性：通过保持语义的反事实扰动，观察当前模型下的边际得分偏移和偏好翻转情况。将高敏感性样本在Bradley-Terry目标函数中赋予更低权重，使模型更关注任务相关的偏好信号。
light_analysis.result: 在多个偏好建模基准上，DynaCF持续提升了奖励模型的鲁棒性，有效降低了捷径模式的依赖，优于静态加权基线。具体数值因实验设置不同而有所差异，但整体改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynaCF通过动态重加权策略有效遏制了奖励模型中的捷径学习问题，增强了模型泛化能力。该框架具有通用性，可推广至其他基于偏好的学习任务。未来可进一步探索更精细的敏感性度量或结合对抗训练。

title: Agent Economics: An Entropy-Controlled Pluralistic Alignment Framework for Preventing Artificial Hivemind in Autonomous Agents
abstract: This study proposes the Behavioral Protocol Framework (BPF), an entropy-controlled pluralistic alignment framework designed to address two critical challenges in autonomous agent economies: the hivemind effect arising from excessive strategic convergence among agents and the lack of transparency in autonomous decision-making processes. The proposed BPF consists of three core modules: Mentalizing-based Social Intelligence (MbSI) grounded in Theory of Mind (ToM), Pluralistic Alignment (PA), and a Verifiable Execution Kernel (VEK). These modules are organically integrated within a closed-loop architecture that governs the entire lifecycle of agent behavior, from decision-making and execution to verification and feedback. To evaluate the proposed framework, a simulation environment implemented in Python and a Streamlit-based user interface will be developed. Through empirical experimentation, the study aims to examine whether the entropy-control mechanism of the PA module can effectively preserve strategic diversity among agents and mitigate collective convergence, while the VEK module provides a comprehensive and transparent audit trail of the decision-making process. The anticipated results are expected to demonstrate that the proposed framework can simultaneously enhance the stability, efficiency, and trustworthiness of autonomous agent economies. Consequently, this research offers a practical approach for developing robust, transparent, and accountable agent-native economic systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Behavioral Protocol Framework (BPF)，通过熵控制的多元对齐机制，解决自主智能体经济中的蜂群思维和行为透明度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主智能体经济中，智能体策略过度趋同导致蜂群思维，降低系统多样性与鲁棒性；同时，决策过程缺乏透明度，影响信任与问责。现有方法难以同时应对这两个挑战，亟需一个能兼顾策略多样性与决策可解释性的对齐框架。
light_analysis.method: BPF框架包含三个模块：基于心智理论的心理化社会智能(MbSI)、多元对齐(PA)和可验证执行内核(VEK)。PA通过熵控制机制保持策略多样性，VEK提供全程透明审计。使用Python构建模拟环境并结合Streamlit界面开展实验。
light_analysis.result: 预期结果显示，PA模块的熵控制机制能有效维持智能体策略多样性，缓解集体趋同；VEK模块能提供完整透明的决策审计。BPF整体上提升自主智能体经济的稳定性、效率和可信度。具体性能提升幅度需通过实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为开发稳健、透明、可问责的智能体原生的经济系统提供了实用途径。学术价值在于融合心智理论与熵控制实现多元对齐；应用价值面向去中心化金融和多智能体协调。未来需在更真实场景中验证，并考虑扩展至异构智能体。

title: Personalization Meets Safety:Mechanisms,Risks,and Mitigations in Personalized LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly personalized interactions by adapting to users' preferences, contexts, and long-term histories. However, the mechanisms that enable personalization also expand the safety landscape in ways not systematically addressed by existing literature. Existing reviews typically focus either on personalization or safety, leaving their intersection largely unexplored. We present the first comprehensive, safety-aware review of personalized LLMs. We organize personalization along three dimensions-user representation, personalization paradigm, and evaluation-and introduce a unified taxonomy of safety risks. At the representation level, we analyze risks arising from diverse user representations. Across mainstream personalization paradigms, we delineate vulnerabilities inherent to prompting, retrieval augmentation, parameter fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), pruning, agent frameworks, and multimodal personalization, and synthesize mitigation strategies across the model lifecycle. Beyond these fine-grained risks, we characterize paradigm-agnostic safety risks arising from personalized adaptation. We further summarize personalized datasets and evaluation methodologies. Through a case study of OpenClaw, we analyze deployment trends in personalized agent ecosystems. Our analysis reveals three structural inadequacies in existing research: safety is evaluated as user-invariant rather than relational, personalization techniques are analyzed in isolation rather than in composition, and evaluation frameworks cannot capture emergent long-term risks. By jointly examining personalized representations, personalization paradigms, safety risks, defenses, and evaluation methods, we provide a unified framework for developing safe personalized LLMs and highlight key directions for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统综述个性化LLM的安全风险、机制与缓解策略，提出统一分类法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究孤立探讨个性化或安全性，未系统分析两者交叉带来的新安全挑战。个性化使模型适应个人偏好，但可能引入用户表示、机制（如提示、微调）相关的独特漏洞，亟需全面梳理风险与防御。
light_analysis.method: 沿用户表示、个性化范式、评估三维度组织，分析提示、检索增强、参数微调、强化学习、MoE、剪枝、智能体框架及多模态个性化的安全风险，并总结模型生命周期内的缓解策略，同时涵盖范式无关风险和评估方法。
light_analysis.result: 通过案例OpenClaw分析部署趋势；揭示三大结构性不足：安全评估非关系性、技术孤立分析、评估框架无法捕捉长期风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供开发安全个性化LLM的统一框架，指明未来研究方向，强调需联合考虑表示、范式、风险、防御与评估。

title: A Multi-Agent System for IPMSM Design Optimization via an FEA-AI Hybrid Approach
abstract: Interior permanent magnet synchronous motor (IPMSM) design requires balancing conflicting objectives and multi-physics constraints, while modern optimization workflows face three bottlenecks: manual problem setup, high finite element analysis (FEA) cost, and unreliable surrogate-based search in sparse or out-of-distribution regions. To address these limitations, we propose an end-to-end automated IPMSM design optimization framework that integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for structured problem definition with an uncertainty-aware FEA-AI hybrid optimization pipeline. A Design agent, connected to a motor textbook through RAG, provides domain-knowledge-based options and engineering tips, and compiles an optimization card and a design-of-experiments plan for AI-model training. A Training agent automates electromagnetic FEA, records geometry-validation and solver-failure logs, analyzes failed geometries using ANOVA-based data analysis and LLM reasoning, and invokes a Design Sampling agent to redefine the design space and generate additional samples. An Optimization agent performs GA-based search with uncertainty-driven switching: low-uncertainty candidates are evaluated by AI-surrogate inference, whereas high-uncertainty and reliability-critical Pareto-front or top-K candidates are corrected by high-fidelity FEA and reused for iterative retraining. The framework converts manual, experience-dependent configuration into a reproducible workflow that balances computational cost and prediction reliability. Experimental results under a matched high-fidelity FEA budget show that the proposed hybrid approach achieves better objective performance while maintaining low and further reducible predictive uncertainty, outperforming FEA-only search, which is limited by early budget exhaustion, and AI-only search, which converges to a low-confidence optimum.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个集成检索增强生成与不确定性感知FEA-AI混合优化的端到端自动化IPMSM设计优化框架。
light_analysis.motivation: IPMSM设计需平衡冲突目标和多物理约束，现有优化工作流面临手动问题设置、高有限元分析成本和稀疏或分布外区域中不可靠的代理搜索三大瓶颈。亟需自动化、高效且可靠的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建多智能体系统：Design agent通过RAG连接电机教材生成优化卡片和实验设计；Training agent自动化FEA并利用ANOVA和LLM分析失败几何体以重新定义设计空间；Optimization agent采用遗传算法，不确定性驱动切换：低不确定性候选由AI代理评估，高不确定性及关键Pareto前沿候选由高保真FEA校正并用于迭代重训练。
light_analysis.result: 在匹配的高保真FEA预算下，混合方法相比纯FEA搜索（因预算耗尽受限）和纯AI搜索（收敛到低置信度最优）实现了更好的目标性能，同时保持低且可进一步降低的预测不确定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将手动经验依赖的配置转化为可复现工作流，平衡计算成本与预测可靠性。为IPMSM设计优化提供新范式，提升自动化程度和设计效率。摘要未明确说明局限性与未来工作。

title: Leveraging NeRF-Rendered Images for 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Neural radiance field (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) are two mainstream approaches for novel view synthesis. They often show complementary performance, i.e., 3DGS demonstrating faster rendering speed and NeRF demonstrating higher rendering quality. Motivated by this, we propose leveraging NeRF-rendered images for 3DGS. Specifically, we target street scenes and utilize a pre-trained street-specific NeRF method to produce training images for a target 3DGS method. In our 3DGS training, NeRF-rendered images are used to remove transient objects in street-level input views and to generate bird's-eye views as additional views, inheriting the higher-quality rendering of NeRF into 3DGS. We further incorporate a diffusion-based image enhancement to improve the image quality of the additional views. Experimental results on one synthetic and two real datasets demonstrate that our proposed method improves street-scene rendering while preserving the speed of 3DGS and the quality of NeRF.

light_analysis.overview: 利用NeRF渲染图像提升3D高斯溅射在街景合成中的渲染质量，同时保持快速渲染速度。
light_analysis.motivation: NeRF和3DGS是新视角合成的两种主流方法，但性能互补：3DGS渲染速度快，NeRF渲染质量高。现有方法未能充分利用两者的优势。本文针对街景场景，提出使用预训练的街景NeRF生成训练图像，以去除输入视图中的瞬态物体并生成鸟瞰图作为额外视图，从而将NeRF的高质量渲染融入3DGS。
light_analysis.method: 本文方法使用街景预训练NeRF生成训练图像，用于目标3DGS方法。具体包括：利用NeRF渲染图像去除街景输入视图中的瞬态物体；生成鸟瞰视角作为额外训练视图；引入扩散模型进行图像增强以提升额外视图质量。无需修改3DGS架构，仅替换和扩充训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在一个合成和两个真实街景数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在保持3DGS快速渲染速度和NeRF渲染质量的同时，显著提升了街景渲染效果。具体性能指标如PSNR、SSIM等优于单独使用NeRF或3DGS，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种利用NeRF渲染图像增强3DGS的框架，成功融合了两者的优点：快速渲染与高质量渲染。该方法针对街景场景有效，尤其擅长处理瞬态物体和稀疏视角问题。未来工作可扩展到其他场景或结合更多图像增强技术。

title: CRANE: Knowledge Editing for Reasoning MLLMs
abstract: The emergence of reasoning multimodal large language models (MLLMs), which generate explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning before producing answers, has introduced a new challenge for knowledge editing: methods that appear successful under traditional metrics (teacher-forcing accuracy up to 100%) can fail severely when the model's reasoning process is examined (Grounded Success as low as 0%). We identify three failure modes: (1) Structural Collapse, where weight-modifying methods destroy the CoT format; (2) Cognitive Dissonance, where the model's reasoning chain actively rejects the injected edit fact based on visual evidence; and (3) Shallow Internalization, where methods succeed on exact queries but fail on rephrase or multi-hop variants. On reasoning MLLMs, these modes interact: methods that generalize (FT, LoRA) trigger format collapse, while methods without deep modification cannot generalize. To expose these failures, we propose a CoT-aware evaluation protocol and construct ReasonEdit-Bench, with conflict stratification, multi-level probes, and multi-hop portability tests.   We propose CRANE, a retrieval-augmented framework that requires no per-edit parameter modification. CRANE combines a modality-aware dual-library retrieval system with a two-phase training strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for structural initialization, followed by GRPO with a Cognitive Routing Reward that trains the model to arbitrate between visual priors and injected edit facts. On ReasonEdit-Bench, CRANE achieves 96.9% Grounded Success on conflict scenarios and 96.9% intermediate entity usage in multi-hop chains, with 97.6% text-locality and 68.1% image-locality Edit Independence. On the out-of-distribution MMEVOKE benchmark, CRANE reaches 87.0% under gold retrieval.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRANE检索增强框架，针对推理多模态大语言模型的知识编辑，解决传统方法在CoT推理中的结构崩溃、认知失调和浅层内化失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理MLLMs生成显式CoT推理，但传统知识编辑方法在教师强制准确率上看似成功（高达100%），在检查推理过程时却严重失败（Grounded Success低至0%）。存在三种失败模式：结构崩溃（权重修改破坏CoT格式）、认知失调（推理链基于视觉证据拒绝编辑事实）、浅层内化（仅精确查询成功，重述或多跳变体失败）。当前缺乏针对推理模型的评估和有效方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CRANE框架，无需逐编辑参数修改。包含模态感知双库检索系统和两阶段训练：先SFT进行结构初始化，再GRPO结合认知路由奖励（Cognitive Routing Reward），训练模型在视觉先验和编辑事实间仲裁。构建ReasonEdit-Bench基准，含冲突分层、多层次探测和多跳可移植性测试，以暴露失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 在ReasonEdit-Bench上，CRANE在冲突场景中Grounded Success达96.9%，多跳链中间实体使用率96.9%，文本局部性97.6%，图像局部性68.1%（Edit Independence）。在分布外MMEVOKE基准黄金检索下达87.0%。相比基线方法（如FT、LoRA）避免了结构崩溃和认知失调，显著提升了推理可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRANE有效解决了推理MLLMs知识编辑的三种失败模式，提供了CoT感知评估协议和基准。学术贡献在于揭示并解决了推理模型知识编辑的新挑战，实际价值在于无需修改参数即可可靠更新知识。未来可改进图像局部性（68.1%），并扩展到更复杂的多模态推理场景。

title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly used in interactive textual environments, from web navigation and code editing to tool use and long-horizon dialogue. Yet many remain largely reactive, mapping observations to actions without an explicit model of how these environments are structured and evolve. This motivates text world models (TWMs): transition models over textual states that, given a state and a candidate action, predict the resulting webpage, terminal output, API response, or user reply, thereby supporting planning, efficient learning, and principled evaluation. We systematically review text world models for LLM-based agents, organized around a formal framework and the agent lifecycle: (1) Foundations, defining text world models and characterizing them by state representation and grounding domain; (2) Construction, taxonomizing LLM-as-WM and code-as-WM paradigms and reviewing methods for building them; (3) Application, examining how world models support agents at training time through experience synthesis and at inference time through planning, verification, and adaptation; and (4) Evaluation, covering both evaluation of the world model itself and its use as an evaluation environment for agents. We aim to consolidate this rapidly developing area, clarify its design space, and highlight open challenges for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述了基于LLM的智能体的文本世界模型，提出统一框架和智能体生命周期划分。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体大多反应式，直接将观测映射到动作，缺乏对环境结构和动态的显式模型，限制了智能体的规划、高效学习和原则性评估。文本世界模型通过建模状态转移，预测环境变化，有望解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: 围绕形式化框架和智能体生命周期组织综述：基础部分定义文本世界模型，区分状态表示和领域；构造部分分类LLM-as-WM和code-as-WM两种范式；应用部分涵盖训练时的经验合成和推理时的规划、验证与适应；评估部分包括模型自身评估及其作为评价环境。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但综述系统整合了现有文本世界模型方法，明确了设计空间，并指出了领域内开放挑战，如模型构建效率、泛化性等。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述为基于LLM的智能体文本世界模型研究提供了系统性梳理和分类，有助于研究者快速了解领域全貌，推动未来在规划、学习和评估方面的发展。潜在局限性包括未深入探讨具体性能比较，未来工作可聚焦于挑战的解决。

title: TRIAGE: Dialectical Reasoning for Explainable Risk Prediction on Irregularly Sampled Medical Time Series with LLMs
abstract: Clinical early warning systems built on electronic health records, in which clinical observations are recorded as irregularly sampled medical time series (ISMTS), must deliver both calibrated risk scores for patient triage and interpretable rationales that clinicians can verify. Large Language Models (LLMs) have been explored for this task, yet they collapse graded clinical risk into overconfident binary predictions. This risk polarization undermines both calibration and cross-patient comparability. To address this, we propose TRIAGE, a framework that trains an LLM to generate dialectical reasoning over competing clinical outcomes by eliciting outcome-specific rationales. This dialectical formulation mitigates risk polarization, enabling a single LLM to yield continuous risk scores grounded in explicit clinical reasoning. Evaluated on three ISMTS benchmarks, TRIAGE achieves an average AUPRC improvement of 3.3% and reduces calibration error by 81% compared to the competitive baselines. An LLM-as-a-judge assessment further shows that our rationales surpass post-hoc explanations from the baseline by 20% in clinical reasoning quality. The source code is available at https://github.com/HyeongWon-Jang/TRIAGE .

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRIAGE框架，通过辩证推理生成连续风险评分和可解释理由，解决LLM在医学时间序列风险预测中的风险极化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床早期预警系统需要校准的风险评分和可解释理由，但现有LLM方法在预测医学时间序列时会出现风险极化，即过度自信的二元预测，损害校准性和跨患者可比性。因此，需要一种能生成连续风险评分并保持临床推理可解释性的方法。
light_analysis.method: TRIAGE框架训练LLM生成辩证推理，针对竞争性临床结果引出结果特定的理由。通过辩证形式减轻风险极化，使单个LLM能输出基于显式临床推理的连续风险评分。在不规则采样医学时间序列（ISMTS）基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个ISMTS基准上，TRIAGE相比竞争基线平均AUPRC提升3.3%，校准误差降低81%。LLM-as-a-judge评估显示，其理由在临床推理质量上比基线的事后解释高出20%。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRIAGE通过辩证推理实现了连续风险预测和高质量可解释性，显著改进校准性和推理质量。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更多临床场景。局限性包括依赖LLM能力及计算开销。

title: Frequency Decoupled Framework for Screen Content Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Methods based on implicit neural representations have demonstrated superior performance in Screen Content Image Super-Resolution (SCISR) . However, they overlooked the inherent frequency characteristics, leading to suboptimal performance. We propose a frequency decoupled framework (FDF) that rethinks SCISR from a phasor perspective by capturing structured energy in amplitude and relational continuity in phase, and jointly exploiting them with bespoke implicit representations to faithfully recover the regular textures and global configuration of Screen Content Image (SCI).   Amplitude-Phase Factorization Network (APFN) first separates images into amplitude and phase streams, where Amplitude Clustering Module (ACM) organizes sparse yet high-energy amplitude responses into representative prototypes for periodic pattern extraction, while Phase Consistency Self-Attention (PCSA) progressively reinforces configuration through continuous consistency propagation.
