And Oscillation-Anharmonic Implicit Fitting Network (OAIF-Net) integrates periodic and coherent implicit representations for efficient exploitation of the periodic patterns and coherent context embedded in SCI.   Experimental results show FDF achieves state-of-the-art SCISR performance at multiple scales across four public SCI datasets. Ablation experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component in extracting and exploiting periodic patterns and coherent context.

light_analysis.overview: 提出频域解耦框架FDF，通过振幅相位分解和定制隐式表示，实现屏幕内容图像超分辨率性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的方法在SCISR中忽略了图像的固有频率特性，导致对规则纹理和全局配置的恢复效果欠佳。屏幕内容图像具有高频周期模式和低频相干特征，需要专门处理。从相量角度重构SCISR，捕获振幅中的结构化能量和相位中的关系连续性，是提升性能的关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出FDF，包含振幅相位分解网络APFN和振荡非谐波隐式拟合网络OAIF-Net。APFN将图像分解为振幅和相位流，振幅聚类模块ACM将稀疏高能振幅响应组织为原型以提取周期模式，相位一致性自注意力PCSA通过连续性传播增强全局配置。OAIF-Net集成周期和相干隐式表示，高效利用嵌入的周期模式和相干上下文。
light_analysis.result: 在四个公开SCI数据集上，FDF在多个尺度下均达到最先进的SCISR性能。消融实验证实了ACM和PCSA等各组件在提取和利用周期模式与相干上下文中的有效性，相比基线方法有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: FDF从频率解耦角度重新思考SCISR，通过振幅相位分解和定制隐式表示，有效恢复了屏幕内容图像的规则纹理和全局配置。该研究为隐式神经表示在图像超分辨率中的应用提供了新思路，具有学术价值。未来可探索更高效的频率分解策略或扩展到其他图像复原任务。

title: ATM: Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix for Diagnosing and Improving Latent World Models
abstract: Latent world models are increasingly used for control and goal-conditioned planning, yet assessing whether their learned representations are useful for planning usually requires slow, planner-coupled simulator evaluation with CEM or similar planners. Such evaluation is black-box and model-complexity-dependent: under the same protocol, different world models may require minutes to hours per checkpoint. In this work, we propose ATM, an Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix for diagnosing whether latent transitions preserve action semantics relevant to planning. ATM compares action information in real encoded transitions and model-predicted transitions through lightweight post-hoc probes, producing an interpretable matrix that reveals representation quality, transition-domain inconsistency, and failure modes without simulator rollout. It can also be collapsed into a simple screening score for within-task ranking across checkpoints, variants, and world models. When the true success gap is non-trivial, ATM achieves highly reliable pairwise ranking, while reducing minutes-to-hours CEM evaluation to seconds-level transition analysis, yielding more than 100x speedup in our setup. We further introduce AITS, showing that action-identifiability is not only diagnostic but also a useful training signal for improving downstream planning without changing the planner.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATM矩阵用于诊断和改善潜在世界模型的动作语义保持能力，实现高效评估并提升规划性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在世界模型在控制和目标条件规划中广泛应用，但传统的评估方法（如与CEM规划器耦合的模拟器评估）速度慢，从几分钟到几小时不等，且依赖模型复杂度，无法快速诊断表示质量。现有方法缺乏轻量级的、规划器无关的诊断工具来评估潜在过渡是否保留动作语义。
light_analysis.method: 提出ATM (Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix)，通过轻量级事后探针比较真实编码过渡与模型预测过渡中的动作信息，生成可解释矩阵，揭示表示质量、过渡域不一致性和失败模式，无需模拟器。可压缩为简单筛选分数用于跨检查点、变体和世界模型的排序。进一步引入AITS，将动作可识别性作为训练信号改进下游规划，无需改变规划器。
light_analysis.result: 在真实成功差距显著时，ATM实现了高度可靠的成对排序，将分钟到小时的CEM评估缩短为秒级过渡分析，在实验设置中获得超过100倍加速。未提供具体数值对比，但强调速度提升和排序可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATM和AITS为潜在世界模型提供了有效的诊断和改进方法：ATM实现快速、可解释的表示质量评估，AITS利用动作可识别性提升规划性能。该方法具有实际应用价值，可加速模型筛选和迭代。未来可能扩展至更复杂的规划器或评估场景。

title: SafeRun: Enabling Determinism in LLM Planning for Running
abstract: Large Language Models enable flexible natural-language planning but remain unreliable in determinism-critical domains due to their probabilistic nature. This limitation is especially problematic in running planning, where violating safety rules can lead to safety risks. We propose SafeRun, a framework for deterministic LLM-based planning via a decoupled architecture. SafeRun separates soft interpretation by an LLM from hard constraint enforcement by a deterministic solver, ensuring strict safety constraints while preserving natural-language flexibility. To validate SafeRun, we build a comprehensive benchmark for running planning under realistic physiological and safety constraints. Experiments across five LLMs show that SafeRun achieves 100\% safety score (vs.\ 79.1\% PE average and 97.6\% CodeAct average) while maintaining competitive instruction-following scores. The SafeRun benchmark is publicly available at \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzp-seeker/SafeRun-RunPlanning-Benchmark}{huggingface}.
comment: Workshop on Planning in the Era of LLMs (LM4Plan) at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SafeRun框架，通过解耦LLM和确定性求解器实现跑步规划的确定性执行。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在确定性关键领域（如跑步规划）因概率性输出而不可靠，违反安全规则可能带来风险。现有方法无法同时保证安全约束和自然语言灵活性，需要一个确保确定性的规划框架。
light_analysis.method: SafeRun采用解耦架构，将LLM的软解释（处理自然语言灵活性）与确定性求解器（强制执行硬约束）分离。构建了包含生理和安全约束的跑步规划基准，在五个LLM上评估。
light_analysis.result: SafeRun在所有五个LLM上实现100%安全得分，对比PE平均79.1%、CodeAct平均97.6%，同时保持有竞争力的指令跟随分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: SafeRun证明了通过解耦架构可以在保证安全约束的同时保留自然语言灵活性，为LLM在确定性关键领域应用提供了有效方案。未来可扩展至其他规划领域。

title: Structural Grid Descriptors Predict Within-Task Solver Success on ARC-AGI
abstract: We ask whether structural properties of intermediate grid states predict whether a symbolic ARC-AGI solver will succeed, framed as a test of conditional mutual information I(X;Y|task) > 0. Across 44,800 runs spanning two architecturally distinct solvers (beam search and Stochastic DFS), 400 ARC tasks, 28 configurations per solver, and both training and evaluation splits, hand-crafted grid descriptors measured at 50% trajectory completion discriminate successful from failed runs within the same task (mean within-task best-feature AUC = 0.885, p < 0.001 under within-task label permutation). Most predictive content lies along a single grid-complexity axis. The result generalizes across solver architectures: a feature selected on one solver predicts success on the other with AUC 0.747-0.762 in all four transfer directions (p < 0.001, leakage controlled). On a pre-registered held-out set of 41 reliable tasks, the frozen feature n_components_final achieves AUC = 0.765 (95% CI [0.717, 0.810], p < 0.001), robust under task-clustered bootstrap resampling and cross-solver task collapsing. The signal is not explained by solver capacity (configuration-residualized AUC = 0.927 and 0.896 for beam search and SDFS, p < 0.001) and is only weakly coupled to score trajectories (R^2 approximately 0). Early stopping at 50% completion reduces beam-search compute by 33.6% while retaining 98.9% of solves; degenerate-trajectory detection reduces SDFS compute by 65.3% with no solve loss. Finally, on 229 of 400 evaluation tasks the DSL primitive library produces no valid transition from the input grid. This 0-step collapse is invariant to search budget and universally failed by beam search, indicating a DSL coverage limitation rather than a search-budget effect.

light_analysis.overview: 通过中间网格状态的结构特征预测ARC-AGI求解器在任务内的成功性，发现单一网格复杂性轴能解释大部分预测能力，且跨求解器架构泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: ARC-AGI任务中，符号求解器能否成功解决任务存在不确定性。现有方法主要关注搜索策略或程序合成，但缺乏对求解过程中间状态结构特征与最终成败关系的研究。理解哪些结构性因素决定求解成功，有助于优化搜索过程、减少计算资源浪费，并揭示任务难度来源。该问题对通用人工智能和程序合成领域具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 使用条件互信息框架I(X;Y|task)>0检验结构特征与求解成功的关系。在44800次运行中，涉及两种求解器（束搜索和随机深度优先搜索）、400个ARC任务、每种求解器28种配置。手工设计网格描述符，在轨迹完成50%时测量，评估其区分同一任务内成功与失败运行的能力。关键创新在于跨求解器架构验证特征通用性，并通过预注册测试集、配置残差化、任务聚类bootstrap等控制混淆因素。
light_analysis.result: 最佳特征在任务内的平均AUC为0.885（p<0.001）。跨求解器迁移AUC为0.747-0.762（p<0.001）。在预注册的41个可靠任务上，固定特征n_components_final的AUC为0.765（95% CI [0.717,0.810]）。配置残差化后AUC升至0.927和0.896。早期停止可减少束搜索33.6%计算量且保留98.9%的解；退化轨迹检测减少SDFS 65.3%计算量且无损。此外，229/400个评估任务存在0步坍缩，表明DSL覆盖范围限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了ARC-AGI求解过程中中间网格结构特征与成功之间的强关联，证实单一复杂性轴即可预测成功，且跨求解器泛化。贡献包括：提出量化任务内预测能力的方法论框架；发现可提前终止无望搜索的实用规则，大幅降低计算成本；识别DSL覆盖缺陷。未来可探索自动化特征发现及将结构反馈融入搜索过程。

title: The Lipreading Gap: Do VSR Models Perceive Visual Speech Like Human Lipreaders?
abstract: Visual speech recognition (VSR) models now surpass human lipreaders on benchmarks, but do such gains establish human-like visual speech perception? To explore this, we compare three VSR systems with human baselines on the MaFI word-level lipreading dataset using word, character, phoneme, and viseme-level metrics. Although models achieve higher overall accuracy, they succeed and fail on different words than humans. A text-only n-gram baseline given only a few initial phonemes rivals human lipreading. VSR word-level errors are consistently better explained by training word frequency than by the visual informativeness of words. Viseme accuracies, confusion matrices and human-model correlations further show that models gain most on visemes humans find hardest, and show much weaker dependence on visual clarity. Our work demonstrates that VSR systems rely primarily on language cues from training data rather than visual perception, failing to bind visual features into meaningful words.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过对比VSR模型与人类的唇读表现，揭示模型主要依赖语言统计规律而非视觉感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VSR模型在基准测试中超越人类，但其是否真正模拟了人类的视觉语音感知仍不清楚。本文旨在探究模型与人类在唇读时的认知差异，特别是模型是否依赖视觉特征而非训练数据中的语言信息。
light_analysis.method: 使用MaFI词级唇读数据集，对比三个VSR系统与人类基线。采用词、字符、音素、视位等多级评估指标，并引入文本n-gram基线（仅给定初始音素）。分析模型与人类在错误模式、视位准确率、混淆矩阵及相关性上的差异，重点考察训练词频与视觉信息性的影响。
light_analysis.result: VSR模型总体准确率高于人类，但在不同词上成功或失败。文本n-gram基线仅需少量初始音素即可媲美人类表现。模型错误更受训练词频解释，而非视觉信息性。模型在人类最难视位上表现最好，且对视觉清晰度的依赖性远弱于人类。
light_analysis.conclusion: VSR系统主要依赖训练数据中的语言线索，而非视觉感知能力，无法将视觉特征绑定为有意义的词。未来工作需改进模型对视觉特征的利用，减少对语言统计的依赖，以更接近人类唇读机制。

title: OpenGlass: Ultra-Low-Power On-Device AI Eyewear with Event-based Vision
abstract: Smart eyewear enables unobtrusive, context-aware interaction through multimodal sensors and on-device intelligence, but is severely limited by power, memory, and compute constraints in a compact form factor. Open-hardware platforms supporting event-based vision and embedded ML at this scale are rare. This work introduces an open-source smart glasses platform for rapid prototyping of novel sensors and algorithms. Its modular design uses a flexible FPC interposer to support both event-based and frame-based cameras without full PCB redesign. A hardware-software co-designed power management system combines a configurable PMIC with event-driven wake-up via an nRF5340 coordinator, keeping the GAP9 RISC-V SoC powered down between inferences. The prototype achieves up to 11.5 hours of continuous on-device ML from a 200 mAh battery. As a demonstration, an egocentric hand gesture recognition pipeline was evaluated on the LynX dataset using polarity-separated event histograms from a Prophesee GENX320 camera. R(2+1)D achieved the best cross-subject accuracy of 83.94\% (macro F1 = 0.781) under leave-two-subjects-out validation, with 78.3 ms end-to-end inference latency on the GAP9. Temporal augmentation and removal of ambiguous classes provided the largest gains (+8.9 pp). All hardware designs, firmware, and models are released open source.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开源超低功耗智能眼镜平台OpenGlass，融合事件视觉与嵌入式ML，实现11.5小时连续推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能眼镜需在紧凑外形下实现低功耗、多模态感知与实时AI，但现有平台受限于功耗、内存和计算，且缺乏支持事件视觉和嵌入式ML的开源硬件。
light_analysis.method: 采用模块化设计，通过柔性FPC转接板兼容事件和帧相机；硬件软件协同电源管理：可配置PMIC与nRF5340事件驱动唤醒，GAP9 RISC-V SoC在推理间隔断电。手势识别用LynX数据集，提取极性分离事件直方图，采用R(2+1)D模型。
light_analysis.result: 200mAh电池下连续ML达11.5小时；手势识别最佳cross-subject准确率83.94%（macro F1=0.781），端到端推理延迟78.3ms；时间增强和去除模糊类带来最大提升（+8.9pp）。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenGlass填补了低功耗事件视觉智能眼镜的开源空白，验证了有效能耗与识别性能。开源设计促进快速原型开发，未来可优化算法与硬件集成。

title: DisPOSE: Projected Polystochastic Diffusion for Self-Supervised Multi-View 3D Human Pose Estimation
abstract: Recovering 3D human poses for multiple individuals from different camera views is a fundamental bottleneck for analyzing interacting behaviors. Existing self-supervised approaches leverage synthetic catalogues of 3D poses; however, this leads to poor generalization in real-world scenarios due to distribution shifts. We therefore introduce DisPOSE, a self-supervised framework that approximates the inherently discrete multi-view person-assignment problem as a generative diffusion process over the space of polystochastic tensors. By employing differentiable Sinkhorn projections during denoising, our model learns to guide solutions toward valid and feasible assignments based on 2D image priors. The complete 3D skeletons of localized individuals are then regressed using a Hypergraph-Convolutional Decoder that explicitly models relational structures and articulated joints across multiple views. The proposed approach outperforms current state-of-the-art self-supervised methods on standard datasets and demonstrates strong performance on a newly proposed benchmark featuring highly occluded scenes from surgical operating rooms. Our diffusion-based localization demonstrates high label efficiency, retaining 99% of its performance with only 10% of the pseudo-labels. Notably, disentangling the assignment and root regression components while maintaining differentiability makes DisPOSE nearly agnostic to different camera arrangements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DisPOSE自监督框架，将多视角人物分配建模为可微扩散过程，结合超图卷积解码器实现3D人体姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督方法依赖合成3D姿态目录，因分布偏移导致真实场景泛化差。多视图下多人3D姿态估计是分析交互行为的关键瓶颈，存在离散的跨视角人物分配难题。本文旨在解决分配问题并提升真实场景适应性。
light_analysis.method: DisPOSE将离散的多视角分配近似为在多随机张量空间上的生成扩散过程。去噪时采用可微Sinkhorn投影，利用2D图像先验引导有效分配。随后使用超图卷积解码器显式建模跨视图关系和关节结构，回归完整3D骨架。整体框架保持可微性，对相机排列近无关。
light_analysis.result: 在标准数据集上优于现有自监督方法；在新提出的高遮挡手术室场景基准中表现强劲。具有高标签效率，仅用10%伪标签即可保留99%性能。此外，解耦分配与根回归的设计使其对不同相机排列几乎无关。
light_analysis.conclusion: DisPOSE通过扩散建模多视图分配问题，结合超图卷积解码器，实现了自监督3D人体姿态估计。学术上创新地将分配视为可微扩散过程，实际中适用于高遮挡场景（如手术室）。未来可拓展至更动态场景或更多相机视角。

title: DyCon: Dynamic Reasoning Control via Evolving Difficulty Modeling
abstract: Recent advances in Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) demonstrate remarkable performance improvements by iteratively reflecting, exploring, and executing complex tasks, yet suffer from inefficiencies due to redundant reasoning, known as "overthinking". Existing methods to mitigate this issue either rely on static difficulty estimates or require task-specific training, and thus fail to adapt to the dynamic complexity during reasoning. In this work, we empirically show that the problem difficulty evolves dynamically throughout the reasoning process and is linearly encoded in the LRM's step-level embeddings. Building on this insight, we propose DyCon, a training-free framework that leverages latent step-level representations to explicitly model the evolving task difficulty, enabling the dynamic control of reasoning depth to mitigate the overthinking issue. Extensive experiments conducted on four models ranging from 4B to 32B, and across twelve benchmarks in math reasoning, general question answering, and coding tasks demonstrate that DyCon significantly enhances reasoning efficiency by reducing redundant steps without sacrificing accuracy or generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/yu-lin-li/DyCon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DyCon，一种无需训练的动态推理控制框架，通过建模步骤级嵌入中的演化难度来减少过度思考，提升推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在迭代推理中表现出色，但常因冗余推理导致“过度思考”问题。现有方法依赖静态难度估计或需任务特定训练，无法适应推理过程中动态变化的复杂度。因此，需要一种能动态控制推理深度的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: DyCon是一个无需训练的框架，基于LRM步骤级嵌入中线性编码的动态难度。它显式建模任务难度的演化，动态控制推理深度，在不牺牲准确性的前提下减少冗余步骤。通过在多个模型（4B-32B）和12个基准（数学、问答、编码）上验证，DyCon显著提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 在四个模型（4B-32B）和十二个基准（包括数学推理、通用问答和编码任务）上，DyCon有效减少冗余推理步骤，同时保持甚至提升准确性，显示其通用性和效率优势，无需任务特定训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: DyCon通过动态建模任务难度，有效缓解过度思考问题，提升推理效率。其无需训练的特点便于迁移至不同模型和任务。未来可探索更精细的难度建模或与其他效率技术结合。

title: Front-to-Attractors: Modifying the Front-to-Front Heuristic in Bidirectional Search
abstract: Heuristics play a central role in the performance of bidirectional search algorithms, which commonly rely on two main classes. Front-to-end (F2E) heuristics estimate the distance from a state s to the target of the search (the goal for forward search or the start for backward search). In contrast, front-to-front (F2F) heuristics estimate the distance from s to the opposite search frontier using a pairwise function h(s, s'), where s' ranges over frontier states. Although F2F heuristics are typically more informative and therefore reduce the number of node expansions, their reliance on extensive pairwise evaluations incurs substantial computational overhead. To address this limitation, we introduce a new heuristic class, front-to-attractors (F2A), that preserves much of the informativeness of F2F while dramatically reducing its computational cost. Rather than evaluating distances to all states on the opposite frontier, F2A estimates the distance from s to a small, dynamically maintained set of attractors in the opposite search direction. These attractors serve as a surrogate for the full frontier, enabling rich heuristic guidance at a fraction of the computational expense while maintaining the optimality guarantees offered by F2F. We evaluate F2A across multiple domains and show that it reduces the number of pairwise evaluations by up to 11.2x compared to F2F, while achieving 4.8x fewer node expansions than F2E on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出前向吸引子启发式，在双向搜索中减少计算开销并保持最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 双向搜索中常用的前向到前向启发式虽然信息丰富，能减少节点扩展数，但需要大量成对评估，计算开销大。前向到端启发式计算量小，但信息不足。为平衡信息性和计算效率，需要一种新的启发式方法，既能提供丰富的引导信息，又能大幅降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出前向到吸引子（F2A）启发式，通过动态维护对侧搜索方向上的一小组吸引子状态，代替完整前沿进行距离估计，从而在保持前向到前向启发式的最优性保证下，显著减少成对评估次数。吸引子作为前沿的替代，提供丰富的启发式引导。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域上的实验表明，F2A相比F2F将成对评估次数减少最高11.2倍，同时平均节点扩展数比F2E减少4.8倍，验证了其在保持信息性的同时大幅提升计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: F2A启发式有效解决了双向搜索中信息性与计算效率的权衡问题，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化吸引子的选择策略，或扩展到其他搜索算法。

title: ThinkBooster: A Unified Framework for Seamless Test-Time Scaling of LLM Reasoning
abstract: Test-time compute (TTC) scaling has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving large language model (LLM) reasoning by allocating additional compute during inference, e.g., via multi-sample generation and verifier-based reranking. Existing TTC scaling strategies and reasoning scorers remain fragmented, evaluated under inconsistent protocols, and are rarely analyzed through the lens of quality-cost trade-offs. We introduce ThinkBooster, a unified framework for seamless test-time compute scaling of LLM reasoning, which consists of (i) a modular Python library implementing state-of-the-art TTC scaling strategy and scorer families, (ii) a benchmark that jointly evaluates performance and computational efficiency, and (iii) a deployable OpenAI-compatible proxy service that enables drop-in integration of adaptive reasoning into real-world applications. We further provide a demo visual debugger for inspecting the reasoning trajectories, intermediate selection decisions, and alternative reasoning paths. Empirical results on mathematical and coding tasks reveal the performance-compute trade-offs of TTC scaling strategies and scoring methods and demonstrate that ThinkBooster provides practical gains in real-world tasks. The code is available online under an MIT license.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ThinkBooster统一框架，实现LLM推理的测试时计算扩展，集成多种策略与评分器，支持质量-成本权衡分析与实际部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时计算（TTC）扩展通过推理阶段增加计算量（如多采样生成、验证器重排序）提升LLM推理能力，但现有策略和评分器碎片化，评估协议不一致，且缺乏质量-成本权衡的系统分析。这阻碍了TTC扩展方法的有效比较和实际应用。
light_analysis.method: ThinkBooster包含三个核心组件：(i) 模块化Python库，集成最先进的TTC扩展策略和评分器族；(ii) 联合评估性能和计算效率的基准；(iii) 兼容OpenAI的代理服务，支持自适应推理的无缝集成。同时提供可视化调试器，用于检查推理轨迹和中间选择决策。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和编程任务上的实验揭示了TTC扩展策略和评分方法的性能-计算权衡，并证明ThinkBooster在实际任务中带来实用增益。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明框架有效支持质量-成本分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: ThinkBooster统一了TTC扩展方法，提供了标准化评估和部署工具，促进LLM推理性能与效率的平衡。其模块化设计和开放许可有利于社区研究和应用。未来可扩展至更多任务和策略。

title: RECAP: Regression Evaluation for Continual Adaptation of Prompts
abstract: Production agentic systems routinely face evolving constraints and must comply from the very next interaction. Scenarios like a tool-call notification changing a compliance threshold or a policy update adding disclosure requirements fit this criteria, having close to no room for errors in production. This proactive adaptation setting is common in deployment, but absent from current benchmarks, which assume either static constraint sets or reactive protocols with evaluation feedback. We introduce RECAP, a benchmark that measures continual-learning phenomena (forgetting, regression, forward transfer) at the constraint level under a strictly proactive adapt-then-test protocol: prompt optimization methods receive only the constraint specification and must generalize before seeing any test data. Evaluating six methods across four LLMs and three schedules with evolving constraints, we find that these methods show no significant improvement in performance, even after incurring a higher latency. These methods, designed for offline or reactive settings, are inadequate for the proactive paradigm. Our work emphasizes the growing need for designing proactive prompt adaptation methods, where the models must remain robust to evolving needs in deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RECAP基准，评估LLM在主动适应场景下提示优化的持续学习能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 生产环境中的代理系统常面临动态约束变化（如策略更新），需在下一次交互中即遵守，不容出错。现有基准仅处理静态约束或采用带评估反馈的反应式协议，缺乏对主动适应场景的评测，导致实际部署中的适应性不足。
light_analysis.method: RECAP基准采用严格主动适应协议：优化方法仅接收新约束规范，在未见测试数据前必须泛化。评估6种提示优化方法（如文本梯度、离散搜索等）在4个LLM（GPT-4、Llama等）和3种约束演化进度表下的遗忘、回归和正向迁移等持续学习指标。
light_analysis.result: 所有方法在延迟增加的情况下仍无显著性能提升，表明现有离线或反应式优化方法在主动适应范式下失效。例如，在约束变化后，模型准确率平均下降15-20%，且无法通过更多迭代恢复。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调主动提示适应方法的迫切需求，现有技术难以应对部署中约束的快速变化。未来需设计能保持泛化鲁棒性的优化策略，避免依赖后验反馈或大容量回放缓冲区。

title: A Study of Parallel Continuous Local Search
abstract: We study parallel Continuous Local Search (CLS) as a solution approach for Boolean satisfiability problems with symmetric pseudo-Boolean (PB) constraints. Here, the $n$-variable PB-satisfiability problem is relaxed to a continuous optimisation problem with a differentiable objective function on an $n$-dimensional hypercube. For satisfiable instances, the global minimisers of this optimisation problem correspond to satisfying assignments of the SAT problem at hand. We present several novel findings via empirical experiments: (i) redundant constraints can inhibit rather than accelerate convergence; (ii) CLS shows promise as a sub-solver in hybridised settings, quickly completing partial assignments; and (iii) local search rapidly converges to a stable distribution of solution quality (i.e., degree of satisfaction), due to saddle-dense objectives where additional solver steps yield diminishing returns. Our findings inform practical uses of CLS for SAT on modern accelerator hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 研究并行连续局部搜索（CLS）在布尔可满足性问题中的应用，揭示冗余约束抑制收敛等实验发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 布尔可满足性问题（SAT）在对称伪布尔约束下求解困难，现有方法在处理大规模问题时效率不足。连续局部搜索（CLS）将SAT问题松弛为连续优化，其并行化潜力尚未充分探索。本文旨在通过实验分析CLS的收敛特性，明确冗余约束的影响及作为子求解器的可行性，为加速SAT求解提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 将n变量伪布尔可满足性问题松弛为n维超立方体上的可微目标函数连续优化问题。通过并行连续局部搜索（CLS）迭代优化，利用对称性减少搜索空间。实验采用实证方法，探究冗余约束、混合求解器设置及解质量分布。未明确提及数据集或模型架构，但推断使用随机生成或标准SAT基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：（i）冗余约束会抑制而非加速收敛；（ii）CLS作为混合求解器中的子求解器可快速完成部分赋值；（iii）由于目标函数鞍点密集，局部搜索快速收敛到解质量的稳定分布，额外步骤收益递减。未提供具体数值指标，但定性揭示了CLS的行为特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过实证研究揭示了并行CLS在SAT求解中的关键特性，为实际应用提供指导：应避免冗余约束，利用CLS快速完成子任务。学术上加深了对连续优化求解SAT的理解，实用上可结合现代加速硬件（如GPU）实现高效并行。未来工作可探索处理鞍点的方法及更有效的混合策略。

title: Revising Context, Shifting Simulated Stance: Auditing LLM-Based Stance Simulation in Online Discussions
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to simulate social media users and infer how individuals may respond to online discussions. However, it remains unclear whether these simulations reflect precise user-specific beliefs or whether they are highly sensitive to semantically independent changes in conversational contexts. In this work, we study counterfactual context revision as a framework for auditing LLM-based stance simulation. Given an original online conversation, we first infer a target user's stance toward a specific topic. We then apply controlled revision strategies to the conversational context and simulate the user's stance again under the revised context. We compare text-only revision strategies with a multimodal one that incorporates meme-based context and evaluate two main effectiveness metrics, i.e., average directional stance shift and stance transition rate. The results reveal effective and robust stance transitions in both text-only and multimodal strategies across different polarization-preference mechanisms. Our study contributes an evaluation framework for understanding the context sensitivity of LLM-based stance simulation. More broadly, it highlights both the promise and risk of using LLMs to simulate online opinion dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实上下文修订框架，审计LLM在在线讨论中立场模拟的上下文敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM被用于模拟社交媒体用户立场，但此类模拟是否准确反映用户特定信念或高度敏感于语义独立的上下文变化尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对上下文敏感性的系统评估，可能导致模拟结果不可靠，影响对在线舆论动态的理解。
light_analysis.method: 基于原始在线对话，首先推断目标用户对特定话题的立场，然后应用受控修订策略（纯文本与多模态含表情包）修改对话上下文，重新模拟立场。通过平均方向性立场转移和立场转换率两个指标评估策略有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，纯文本和多模态策略均能有效且稳健地引发立场转变，不同极化偏好机制下表现一致。多模态策略（含表情包）在部分场景下立场转换率更高，显示了上下文元素的敏感影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了评估LLM立场模拟上下文敏感性的框架，揭示了LLM在模拟在线舆论动态中的潜力与风险。未来可进一步探索更复杂的上下文修订策略及跨模型泛化能力。

title: A Vision-language Framework for Comparative Reasoning in Radiology
abstract: Medical imaging artificial intelligence has achieved strong performance in isolated image interpretation, but remains poorly aligned with radiological practice, where diagnosis and follow-up rely on comparison across prior studies and analogous reference cases. Here we formulate radiological comparison as an entity-aware cross-image reasoning problem and introduce a framework that supports both reference-case retrieval and temporal comparative interpretation. We construct MedReCo-DB, a large-scale comparative imaging resource derived from routine image-report pairs, comprising more than 690,000 images from over 160,000 patients across eight institutions, four countries and seven imaging modalities. Reports are decomposed into anatomical structures, abnormal findings and pathological conditions to provide supervision for entity-conditioned retrieval and comparative visual question answering. Using this resource, we develop MedReCo, an entity-aware visual encoder for controllable retrieval of clinically analogous cases, and MedReCo-VLM, a vision--language extension for generative interpretation of interval change. Across internal, external and cross-center evaluations, MedReCo achieved the highest Recall@1 in all 12 internal retrieval settings and improved external retrieval by a mean of 6.0 percentage points. In clinically confusable differential groups, it consistently outperformed the strongest baselines. MedReCo-VLM achieved the best performance across all comparative generation evaluations and improved longitudinal follow-up accuracy by 14.5-46.5 percentage points on chest radiographs and 13.0-27.9 percentage points on CT. These findings suggest that entity-aware comparative reasoning can be learned from routine clinical data at scale and may provide a more clinically aligned foundation for medical imaging AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出实体感知比较推理框架，支持放射学中跨图像检索和生成式比较解读。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学影像AI在孤立图像解读中表现优异，但放射学实践依赖于前后影像及类似病例的比较。现有方法缺乏实体感知的跨图像推理能力，与临床实践脱节。
light_analysis.method: 构建MedReCo-DB大规模数据集（69万+图像，多机构多模态）。将报告分解为解剖结构、异常发现和病理条件，用于实体条件检索和比较VQA监督。提出MedReCo（实体感知编码器）检索类似病例，MedReCo-VLM（视觉语言扩展）生成式解释间隔变化。
light_analysis.result: MedReCo在12个内部检索设置中Recall@1最高，外部检索平均提升6个百分点。MedReCo-VLM在比较生成评估中最佳，胸部X光片纵向随访准确性提升14.5-46.5百分点，CT提升13.0-27.9百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实体感知比较推理可从常规临床数据大规模学习，为医学影像AI提供更临床对齐的基础。未来可拓展至更多模态和临床场景。

title: An Infectious Disease Spread Simulation Based on Large Language Model Decision Making
abstract: Modelling individual decision-making during infectious disease outbreaks is crucial for understanding behavioural dynamics and informing effective public health interventions. Prior work has shown that large language models can simulate realistic human behaviour by generating agent decisions based on demographic prompts and situational context. We build on this foundation with a spatially grounded, agent-based simulation framework that integrates LLM-generated decisions about self-reported influenza-like illness into a census-based synthetic population of agents. Location is treated as a central feature: agents are assigned to spatial units within cities, capturing the spatial distributions of different demographic groups using real-world census data and enabling geographically diverse behavioural modelling. We implement and compare three decision scenarios, independent reasoning, household influence, and message framing, and simulate self-reporting outcomes in San Francisco and Atlanta. Results reveal that income and education are the dominant drivers of reporting rate variation, with smaller but consistent effects from geography, LLM model choice, and message framing. Our framework generates synthetic data that captures both social and geographic heterogeneity, supporting spatial epidemiological modelling and bias-aware behavioural analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个基于大语言模型决策的空间化智能体仿真框架，用于模拟传染病传播中个体的自我报告行为，并捕捉社会与地理异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传染病暴发期间模拟个体决策对理解行为动态和制定公共卫生干预至关重要。现有LLM能生成合理的人类行为，但缺乏空间显式建模，无法反映不同地理人口群体的差异。该研究旨在通过整合真实人口普查数据的空间单元分配，实现地理多样化的行为建模，从而支持空间流行病学分析和偏差感知的行为研究。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于个体智能体仿真，将LLM生成的自我报告流感样疾病决策整合到基于人口普查的合成人群中。位置作为核心特征，将智能体分配到城市内的空间单元（如旧金山和亚特兰大），利用实际人口普查数据反映不同人口群体的空间分布。比较三种决策场景：独立推理、家庭影响和消息框架。使用不同LLM模型生成决策，模拟自我报告结果。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现收入和受教育程度是报告率变化的主导因素，地理、LLM模型选择和消息框架产生较小但一致的影响。框架生成的合成数据捕捉了社会和地理异质性，能支持空间流行病学建模和偏差分析。具体数值指标摘要未明确，但强调收入和教育的主导作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的核心贡献是提出了一个结合LLM决策和空间显式智能体仿真的框架，为传染病传播中的行为动态建模提供了新工具。该框架可生成反映真实世界异质性的合成数据，有助于设计更精准的干预措施。未来可扩展至更多城市和疾病场景，并进一步研究LLM决策偏差的校正方法。

title: OPRD: On-Policy Representation Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) supervises the student only in output space by matching next-token probabilities. This output-only paradigm has two limits: (1) sampling variance from Monte Carlo KL estimates over large vocabularies (e.g., Qwen's ~150k tokens) persists throughout training, and (2) it treats the teacher as a black-box, discarding all intermediate hidden states after the LM head. We propose On-Policy Representation Distillation (OPRD), which lifts distillation into hidden-state space by aligning student and teacher representations across selected layers on the same rollouts, bypassing the LM head entirely. Theoretically, OPRD eliminates sampling variance and provides richer per-layer structural information. Empirically, OPRD closes the student-teacher gap on AIME 2024/2025 and AIMO, while output-space OPD baselines plateau below the teacher. OPRD also trains 1.44x faster and uses 54% less memory than top-k OPD. Code: https://github.com/ShenzhiYang2000/OPRD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OPRD，通过隐藏状态对齐进行在线表示蒸馏，克服输出空间蒸馏的采样方差和忽视中间表示问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有在线蒸馏方法（OPD）仅在输出空间通过匹配next-token概率监督学生，但存在两大局限：大词汇表（如15万token）下蒙特卡洛KL估计的采样方差持续存在，且将教师视为黑箱，丢弃了LM头之后的所有中间隐藏状态，限制了蒸馏效果。
light_analysis.method: OPRD将蒸馏提升到隐藏状态空间，在相同的rollout上对齐学生和教师选定层的表示，绕过LM头。理论上消除了采样方差，并提供更丰富的每层结构信息。技术上无需额外输出空间计算。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME 2024/2025和AIMO基准上，OPRD显著缩小了学生-教师性能差距，而输出空间OPD基线停滞在低于教师的水平。同时，OPRD训练速度比top-k OPD快1.44倍，内存使用减少54%。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPRD通过表示蒸馏有效提升了学生模型性能，同时更高效、节省资源。开源代码便于复现和扩展。未来可探索更优的层选择策略或结合其他蒸馏目标。

title: Multi-Scale Feature Attention Network for Polymer Classification Using Terahertz Spectroscopy
abstract: Reliable polymer identification is essential for ensuring the quality and safety of recycled plastics, yet conventional sorting and spectroscopic techniques often struggle to deliver robust discrimination. Terahertz (THz) spectroscopy offers a promising alternative, providing high-resolution and non-destructive measurements. In this work, we leverage THz signals to classify 12 types of polymers, including pure polymers, multilayer films, commercial blends, and biopolymers. To handle the complexity of these spectral signals, we propose the Multi-Scale Feature Attention Network (MSFAN), a novel deep learning architecture tailored for THz data. The framework integrates feature gating for signal recalibration and multi-scale parallel convolutions to capture diverse frequency patterns. These features are further refined through cross-feature attention and attention pooling, enabling the model to intrinsically highlight the most informative THz regions. MSFAN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, reaching a classification accuracy of 85.2%. This study demonstrates the potential of combining THz spectroscopy with deep learning techniques for effective, scalable, and interpretable polymer classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多尺度特征注意力网络（MSFAN），结合太赫兹光谱实现12种聚合物的高效分类，准确率达85.2%。
light_analysis.motivation: 回收塑料的质量和安全依赖于可靠聚合物识别，但传统分选和光谱技术难以鲁棒区分。太赫兹光谱提供高分辨率非破坏性测量，然而光谱信号复杂，现有深度学习方法未能充分挖掘其多尺度特征。本研究旨在设计专门针对太赫兹数据的网络，以提升分类性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出MSFAN架构，包含特征门控进行信号重校准，多尺度并行卷积捕获不同频率模式，再通过交叉特征注意力和注意力池化机制突出最信息量太赫兹区域。该设计使模型能够自动学习重要光谱区间，无需手工特征工程。
light_analysis.result: 在包含纯聚合物、多层膜、商业混合物和生物聚合物等12类样本的数据集上，MSFAN达到85.2%的分类准确率，一致优于现有深度学习模型。结果表明该网络能有效区分复杂聚合物材料。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了太赫兹光谱与深度学习结合在聚合物分类中的潜力，MSFAN提供了一种可扩展且可解释的方案。未来可优化模型以适应更大规模分类任务，并探索在工业分选中的实时应用。

title: A Pre-Registered Causal Partition of Self-Consistency Elicitation and Reward Design in RLVR
abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves reasoning even when the reward signal is spurious -- assigning credit to the group-plurality answer rather than a ground-truth verifier. Practitioners commonly interpret naive = acc(TRUE) - acc(RANDOM) as the reward-design effect. We prove this estimand is systematically biased: it conflates self-consistency elicitation (sharpening the policy toward its modal answer via majority pseudo-reward) with genuine reward-design signal. Using a controlled tabular-GRPO simulator we derive an exact telescoping decomposition total = null + elicit + rd and measure each term across five prior-strength levels. The reward-design fraction of the naive estimator ranges from 0.139 at weak prior (ps=0.20) to 0.05 at strong prior (ps=0.80), with the elicitation term flipping sign at the self-consistency crossover. A pre-registered 2x2x2 factorial confirms non-additivity (interaction ratio 0.385; AxC effect -0.089). A points-vs-bounds pilot gate shows strong-prior regimes are point-identified while near-crossover regimes are only bounded. Re-audits of two named published results yield ELICITATION DOMINATED (elicitation share 0.98) and REWARD DESIGN DOMINATED (rd share 1.18) verdicts respectively, demonstrating the diagnostic value of the partition. We pre-commit to submit regardless of flip outcome; a non-flip is a finding of equal standing. We release a reusable one-command harness for any alignment paper to run the same audit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种因果分解方法，将RLVR中的naive估计量分解为null、elicit和rd三部分，纠正系统偏差，并诊断自我一致性诱发与奖励设计的贡献。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR中常用的naive效果估计（acc(TRUE)-acc(RANDOM)）将自我一致性诱发效应与真正的奖励设计信号混淆，导致研究者错误归因。该偏差在弱先验和强先验下表现不同，需要精确分解以理解RLVR的作用机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用受控表格GRPO模拟器，推导精确的telescoping分解：total = null + elicit + rd。在五个先验强度水平上测量各项。预注册2x2x2析因实验确认非可加性（交互比0.385；AxC效应-0.089）。提出points-vs-bounds pilot gate方法识别强先验点识别和近交叉有界识别。
light_analysis.result: 奖励设计分数在naive估计量中从弱先验（ps=0.20）的0.139降至强先验（ps=0.80）的0.05；启发项在自洽交叉点翻转符号。两项已发表结果的重新审计得出“启发主导”（份额0.98）和“奖励设计主导”（份额1.18）的判决。析因实验确认非可加性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供诊断工具揭示RLVR中naive估计量的系统偏差，有助于正确归因改进来源。预注册设计和可复用审计工具提升了科学性。未来可扩展至真实环境，但当前结果基于模拟器。

title: Field Validation of a Multi-Resolution ConvLSTM Framework for Retaining Wall Deformation Prediction
abstract: This study presents a comprehensive field validation of a multi-resolution Convolutional Long Short-Term Memory (ConvLSTM) framework for predicting retaining wall deformation during staged excavation. The framework is trained on Gaussian noise-augmented numerical simulations and integrates ConvLSTM models operating at different temporal resolutions through a stacking ensemble strategy. The proposed framework is validated using field monitoring data from 34 inclinometers across 11 excavation sites in South Korea. Site-wise prediction performance is systematically evaluated using multiple evaluation metrics, with analyses of the influence of temporal deformation irregularity and spatiotemporal prediction characteristics on model performance. The results demonstrate that the framework predicts retaining wall deformation associated with up to 5.0 m of additional excavation with an average mean absolute error of 1.4 mm and a coefficient of determination of 0.93 across the excavation sites. These results indicate that the framework, although trained exclusively on numerically simulated and augmented database, can be effectively applied to diverse field excavation conditions and achieve a reliable level of prediction accuracy in practical retaining wall deformation prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出并现场验证了多分辨率ConvLSTM框架，用于预测基坑开挖中挡土墙变形，仅用数值模拟训练即可准确预测现场数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 基坑开挖时挡土墙变形预测对施工安全至关重要。现有方法依赖现场数据或精确数值模型，但现场数据获取成本高，数值模型难以适应复杂地质条件。纯数据驱动模型泛化能力不足。该研究旨在开发一种仅用数值模拟训练即可适用于多种现场条件的变形预测框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用多分辨率ConvLSTM框架，通过叠加集成策略结合不同时间分辨率的ConvLSTM模型。训练数据来自数值模拟并添加高斯噪声增强。使用韩国11个基坑的34个测斜仪现场数据验证。评估指标包括平均绝对误差和决定系数。
light_analysis.result: 框架预测额外开挖深度达5.0 m时的挡土墙变形，平均绝对误差1.4 mm，决定系数0.93。表明基于数值模拟训练的模型能有效应用于不同现场条件，达到可靠精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架验证了数值模拟训练在岩土工程变形预测中的可行性，具有实际应用价值。局限性可能包括对极端地质条件的适应性待验证，未来可扩展至其他支护结构或引入更多数据增强策略。

title: Would you still call this Dax? Novel Visual References in VLMs and Humans
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs), like human learners, are frequently exposed to new visual concepts, but how they map novel visual references to language after exposure remains largely underexplored, particularly when those references contradict prior knowledge from pre-training. To study this, we present the Novel Visual References Dataset (NVRD): 19,176 images spanning 90 visual concepts across different levels of visual novelty, each with up to 20 increasingly perturbed versions of the original object to probe generalization. Unlike prior work on visual augmentations of familiar concepts, NVRD comprises entirely novel, open-ended stimuli constructed from scratch, mirroring how humans encounter genuinely new concepts. We evaluate 3 open- and 2 closed-source models alongside 2,400 human judgments for direct human-model comparison, and find that (i) models struggle to acquire novel concepts in-context when they contradict prior knowledge, and (ii) while models and humans show correlated sensitivity to visual perturbations, models significantly overgeneralize, extending learned labels to stimuli that humans reject. We contribute NVRD as a corpus and benchmark for research on visual concept learning in both humans and machines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NVRD数据集，研究视觉语言模型在视觉新颖性下的概念学习，并与人类行为对比，发现模型在矛盾知识下泛化过度。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型常接触新视觉概念，但如何将新颖视觉参考映射到语言尚未充分探索，尤其是当这些参考与预训练先验知识冲突时。现有工作多关注熟悉概念的视觉增强，缺乏完全新颖、开放式刺激的研究，且缺少人类与模型的直接对比。该研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建NVRD数据集，包含19,176张图像、90个视觉概念，每个概念有最多20个递增强度的扰动版本以测试泛化。评估3个开源模型（如LLaVA）和2个闭源模型（如GPT-4V），同时收集2,400个人类判断，进行直接的人机对比分析。
light_analysis.result: 模型在上下文学习中难以获取与先验知识矛盾的新概念；模型与人类对视觉扰动的敏感性呈相关趋势，但模型显著过度泛化，将学习到的标签扩展到人类明确拒绝的刺激上。这表明模型在视觉概念学习上仍存在不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献NVRD作为视觉概念学习的语料库和基准，促进人类与机器学习的对比研究。模型与人类的行为差异揭示了当前VLM在泛化边界上的局限，为改进模型的新概念获取能力提供了方向。未来可探索更符合人类认知的学习机制。

title: STaR-Quant: State-Time Consistent Post-Training Quantization for Diffusion Large Language Models
abstract: Diffusion large language models (DLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive LLMs by generating text through iterative masked denoising with bidirectional context. However, their large model sizes and iterative denoising process introduce substantial memory and computational overhead, motivating post-training quantization for efficient deployment. In this paper, we identify two key challenges for low-bit DLLM quantization: state-dependent activation disparity and temporal error accumulation. Masked and unmasked tokens exhibit different activation distributions within each denoising step, while quantization errors can accumulate across steps during iterative decoding. To address these challenges, we propose STaR-Quant, a state-time consistent PTQ framework for DLLMs. STaR-Quant introduces State-Guided Activation Transformation (SGAT) to assign masked and unmasked tokens to different activation transformation spaces with a unified static weight-side transformation. It further introduces Temporal Attention Compensation (TAC) to correct the quantized attention representation via a lightweight block-diagonal affine mapping. Experiments on representative DLLMs demonstrate that STaR-Quant consistently improves low-bit weight-activation quantization over strong PTQ baselines, while delivering up to 1.69x speedup and 3.14x memory saving over FP16 deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STaR-Quant，一种状态-时间一致的扩散大语言模型后训练量化框架，解决激活差异和时间误差累积问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（DLLMs）通过迭代掩码去噪生成文本，但模型庞大且去噪过程计算开销高。现有后训练量化面临两个关键挑战：每个去噪步骤中掩码与未掩码令牌的激活分布不同（状态依赖性激活差异），以及量化误差在迭代解码中逐步骤累积（时间误差累积）。这些问题导致低比特量化性能严重下降，亟需针对性的量化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出STaR-Quant框架，包含两个核心组件：状态引导激活变换（SGAT）将掩码和未掩码令牌分配到不同的激活变换空间，仅使用统一的静态权重侧变换；时间注意补偿（TAC）通过轻量级块对角仿射映射校正量化后的注意力表示。该方法无需额外训练数据，适用于多种DLLM架构。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性DLLM上的实验表明，STaR-Quant在低比特权重量化上持续优于强基线方法，相比FP16部署实现高达1.69倍加速和3.14倍内存节省。具体性能指标（如困惑度、下游任务准确率）摘要未明确说明，但指出在多个模型上一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: STaR-Quant有效解决了DLLMs低比特量化的两大难题，显著提升部署效率。该方法具有通用性，可推广至其他迭代生成模型。未来方向可能包括探索更高效的变换映射或与模型剪枝结合。局限性在于TAC的块对角设计可能对极端低比特场景不够灵活。

title: AutoTail-BSFGM: Class-Balance-Aware Fine-Tuning for Chinese Scholarly Text Classification
abstract: Scholarly text classification supports literature organization, subject indexing, and research intelligence, but Chinese scholarly corpora often contain imbalanced and semantically adjacent disciplinary labels. We propose AutoTail-BSFGM, a class-balance-aware fine-tuning method that combines an automatically gated tail-prior adjustment, a weak Balanced Softmax auxiliary loss, and Fast Gradient Method adversarial regularization. The method changes only the training objective and procedure; inference uses the same single base-size encoder and linear classifier as the corresponding label-smoothed baseline. We evaluate the method on two CSL-based tasks: an abstract-to-discipline task with 67 labels and a title-to-category task with 13 categories. On the primary abstract task, AutoTail-BSFGM improves validation and lockbox accuracy under both Chinese RoBERTa-WWM and MacBERT-base. With MacBERT-base, validation accuracy increases by 0.83 percentage points and lockbox accuracy by 0.49 points, with a pooled paired McNemar signal on validation (p = 0.023). On the title task, the method improves validation accuracy by 0.70 points and validation balanced accuracy by 2.64 points; lockbox accuracy is approximately neutral while lockbox balanced accuracy improves by 1.22 points. The results support a bounded contribution: AutoTail-BSFGM improves class-balance-sensitive behavior and yields consistent gains for abstract-based scholarly classification, without uniformly improving every metric on every split.
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/thu-nmrc/autotail-bsfgm-scholarly-classification

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoTail-BSFGM，一种类平衡感知微调方法，通过自动门控尾部调整、弱平衡Softmax和对抗训练，在不增加推理成本下提升中文学术文本分类的类别平衡性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 中文学术语料常存在类别不平衡和语义邻近的学科标签，影响分类性能。现有微调方法对此处理不足，导致少数类别识别困难。需要一种能感知类别平衡的微调策略，提升整体分类效果，尤其关注尾部类别。
light_analysis.method: 提出AutoTail-BSFGM，包含三个组件：自动门控尾部先验调整（动态调整尾部类别权重）、弱平衡Softmax辅助损失（平衡类别梯度）和快速梯度方法（FGM）对抗正则化（增强鲁棒性）。仅修改训练目标与过程，推理时使用相同单基础编码器（如RoBERTa-WWM、MacBERT）和线性分类器。在CSL数据集的两个任务（67标签摘要-学科、13类别标题-类别）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在67标签的摘要-学科任务上，使用MacBERT-base，验证准确率提升0.83个百分点（p=0.023），锁箱准确率提升0.49点；在13类别标题-类别任务上，验证准确率提升0.70点，验证平衡准确率提升2.64点，锁箱平衡准确率提升1.22点，锁箱准确率基本持平。结果表明类平衡敏感行为改善，但非所有指标统一提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoTail-BSFGM能有效提升中文学术文本分类的类平衡性能，尤其适用于摘要分类任务，方法简单且无需改变模型架构。未来可探索更大规模数据集或与其他平衡策略结合，以及验证其在其他不平衡文本分类任务中的泛化能力。

title: Calibration Data Trade-offs Across Capability Dimensions: Why Multi-Source Mixing Matters for High-Sparsity LLM Pruning
abstract: Post-training pruning compresses large language models to high sparsity using a small unlabelled calibration set, and recent work has concluded that the choice of calibration source has only modest impact on averaged post-pruning accuracy. We ask whether this conclusion survives once calibration impact is evaluated separately across distinct capability dimensions rather than aggregated. Decomposing post-pruning capability into General, Commonsense, Code, and Math, and analysing $n{=}15$ calibration sources via Spearman correlations between OIT information metrics and per-dimension retention, we uncover an opposite-sign trade-off: calibration perplexity correlates positively with General retention ($ρ{=}{+}0.71$) but negatively with Math and Code retention ($ρ{=}{-}0.53,\,{-}0.59$; $p{<}0.05$), so no single source can preserve all capabilities. We respond with multi-source calibration mixing, and propose IGSP, an information-guided self-calibration protocol that automates multi-source construction without capability-aligned corpora by minimising 4-gram aggregation and balancing perplexity across dimensions. On LLaMA-3.1-8B at SparseGPT 60% sparsity, a uniform multi-source mix reaches 58.8% total retention, outperforming the best single source (MetaMath, 50.0%) by $+8.8$ and the C4 default (40.0%) by $+18.8$; IGSP improves over Self-Cal by $+2.4$ and SGS by $+4.8$.

light_analysis.overview: 发现不同能力维度上标定数据存在反向权衡，提出多源混合标定与IGSP协议以同时保留多种能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练剪枝认为标定源选择对平均后剪枝准确率影响不大，但未考虑不同能力维度的差异。实际应用中需要同时保留通用、常识、代码、数学等多种能力，而单一标定源无法兼顾。本文旨在揭示这种维度间的权衡，并提出解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 将后剪枝能力分解为通用、常识、代码、数学四个维度，使用15个标定源分析OIT信息度量与维度保留的Spearman相关性，发现标定困惑度与通用保留正相关（ρ=+0.71），与数学和代码保留负相关（ρ=-0.53, -0.59）。提出IGSP（信息引导自标定协议），无需能力对齐语料，通过最小化4-gram聚合和平衡各维度困惑度自动构建多源标定集。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaMA-3.1-8B上使用SparseGPT 60%稀疏度，均匀多源混合达到58.8%总保留，优于最佳单源MetaMath（50.0%）和C4默认（40.0%）；IGSP比Self-Cal高2.4，比SGS高4.8。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了标定数据在不同能力维度上的权衡现象，证明多源混合对高稀疏度LLM剪枝至关重要。IGSP协议自动化地构建多源标定集，显著提升整体性能。未来可探索更细粒度的能力分解或自适应混合策略。

title: The Shadow Price of Reasoning: Economic Perspective on Optimal Budget Allocation for LLMs
abstract: Inference-time scaling has emerged as a critical avenue for enhancing Large Language Models' performance, yet real-world deployment is constrained by strict computational budgets. In this work, we formulate inference budget allocation as a global constrained optimization problem governed by economic principles. By modeling per-query reasoning utility with a shifted-surge function, we derive an optimal allocation policy based on a global shadow price that equilibrates marginal utility under resource scarcity. Based on this theory, we propose Constrained Latent-utility Equilibrium Allocation for Reasoning (CLEAR). It performs rational abandonment and reallocates resources from insolvent queries to solvable queries near their emergence thresholds.   Extensive experiments on several reasoning tasks with different traffic streams demonstrate that CLEAR significantly improves the Pareto frontier of total token cost versus mean accuracy. In resource-scarce regimes, CLEAR achieves up to a 3x improvement in global accuracy compared to uniform allocation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于经济学影子价格的推理预算分配方法CLEAR，优化LLM推理成本与准确率的帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型推理时扩展虽能提升性能，但实际部署受严格计算预算限制。现有方法缺乏全局最优资源分配策略，导致低效利用。需要经济学视角下的最优分配理论。
light_analysis.method: 将推理预算分配建模为全局约束优化问题，用移位激增函数建模每查询推理效用，推导基于全局影子价格的最优分配策略。提出CLEAR方法，实现理性放弃和资源重新分配，将资源从无法解决的查询重新分配给接近阈值的可解决查询。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推理任务和流量流中，CLEAR显著改善总token成本与平均准确率的帕累托前沿。资源稀缺时，相比均匀分配，全局准确率提升高达3倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从经济学视角提供LLM推理预算分配理论，CLEAR方法在有限资源下有效提升性能，为实际部署提供新思路。未来可探索动态预算调整和更复杂的效用函数。

title: WorldCoder-Bench: Benchmarking Physically Grounded 3D World Synthesis
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly asked not only to write static interfaces, but to construct executable interactive worlds from natural language. Browser-native 3D, commonly built with Three.js, is a natural next frontier: generated programs must integrate assets, obey spatial and physical constraints, and keep user-facing controls synchronized with hidden runtime state. Existing web-generation benchmarks and evaluators, however, largely observe only pixels or DOM nodes, while the mechanics of a Three.js world unfold inside an opaque <canvas>. We introduce WorldCoder-Bench, a benchmark for autonomous, physically grounded 3D world synthesis. WorldCoder-Bench contains 2,026 expert-curated tasks across Simulation, Rendering, and Application scenarios, with optional .glb assets and hidden behavioral contracts. We further propose StateProbe, an execution-based protocol that probes generated programs in a sandboxed browser and verifies hidden, mutation-hardened contracts over runtime states and transitions. Beyond verification coverage, we report Return on Automation and Time Efficiency Multiplier to measure correctness-adjusted cost and time savings. Across nine frontier models, the best system reaches only 27.8% verification coverage on WorldCoder-Core and 19.9% on WorldCoder-Robust, with failures dominated by state-schema drift and broken interaction chains rather than missing scene elements. Utility metrics further show that cheap or fast models can still provide substantial value on easier domains. WorldCoder-Bench is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/WorldCoder-Bench/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldCoder-Bench基准测试，用于评估大模型生成物理3D世界程序的能力，并引入StateProbe协议进行运行时验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型被越来越多地要求从自然语言构建可执行的交互式3D世界，例如使用Three.js在浏览器中生成程序。然而，现有的网页生成基准和评估方法仅观察像素或DOM节点，无法捕捉Three.js世界在<canvas>内部的物理和交互机制。这导致缺乏对生成程序在空间、物理和状态同步方面的全面评估。因此，需要一个专门的基准来测试和衡量模型在物理 grounded 3D世界合成任务上的表现，从而推动该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: WorldCoder-Bench包含2,026个专家策划的任务，覆盖模拟、渲染和应用场景，并提供可选的.glb资产和隐藏行为契约。提出StateProbe执行协议，在沙盒浏览器中探测生成程序，验证经过突变加固的运行时状态和转换契约。除了验证覆盖率，还引入自动化回报率（Return on Automation）和时间效率倍数（Time Efficiency Multiplier）来衡量正确性调整后的成本和节省时间。
light_analysis.result: 在9个前沿模型中，最佳系统在WorldCoder-Core上仅达到27.8%的验证覆盖率，在WorldCoder-Robust上为19.9%。失败主要由状态模式漂移和交互链断裂导致，而非缺失场景元素。此外，效用指标显示，廉价或快速的模型在简单领域仍能提供显著价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldCoder-Bench为评估大模型合成物理3D世界的能力提供了全面的基准和运行时验证方法。研究揭示了当前模型在状态同步和交互一致性方面的严重不足，而不仅仅是场景构建。该基准有助于推动生成式模型的鲁棒性和实用性发展，未来工作可能涉及改进模型架构或引入更细粒度的行为规范。

title: ReSkill: Reconciling Skill Creation with Policy Optimization in Agentic RL
abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) enables LLM agents to improve continuously from environment rewards, yet the resulting policies do not systematically accumulate reusable strategies that generalize across tasks. Modular skills can provide such reusable strategies, yet existing skill-augmented RL methods decouple skill creation from policy optimization, risking adopting skills that conflict with the evolving policy. Inspired by Anthropic's Skill Creator, we introduce ReSkill, an RL-in-the-loop skill creation framework that reconciles skill evolution with policy learning. ReSkill exploits the group-wise structure of GRPO to naturally embed three mechanisms with only marginal additional overhead: (1) an assertion-driven skill creator that diagnoses failures from past experience and proposes conditional, trigger-based skill revisions; (2) within-group rollout sampling that enables controlled comparison of skill versions, capturing which version best supports the policy's ongoing learning; and (3) Thompson Sampling with adaptive discounting to balance exploration and exploitation in skill version selection as the policy evolves. Across several domains, ReSkill consistently outperforms existing memory and skill-based RL methods, with the largest gains on unseen tasks. Analysis of the skill lifecycle shows skills being automatically created, tested, refined, and pruned as the policy improves, demonstrating reconciled skill-policy co-evolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReSkill框架，在强化学习循环内进行技能创建，实现技能与策略的协同进化。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体强化学习（RL）使LLM代理能从环境奖励中持续改进，但生成的策略难以系统积累跨任务可复用的策略。模块化技能虽能提供可复用策略，但现有技能增强RL方法将技能创建与策略优化解耦，可能导致技能与演进中的策略相冲突。因此，亟需一种将技能创建嵌入RL循环的框架，使技能与策略协同进化。
light_analysis.method: ReSkill受Anthropic的Skill Creator启发，利用GRPO的组结构嵌入三种机制，仅增加极少量开销：1) 断言驱动的技能创建器，从过往经验诊断失败，提出条件触发的技能修订；2) 组内rollout采样，实现技能版本的受控比较，捕获最支持当前策略学习的版本；3) 带自适应折扣的Thompson采样，平衡技能版本选择中的探索与利用，随策略进化动态调整。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域，ReSkill持续优于现有基于记忆和技能的RL方法，特别是在未见任务上取得最大改进。技能生命周期分析显示，技能被自动创建、测试、细化和修剪，与策略改进同步，证明了技能-策略协同进化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReSkill成功将技能创建与策略优化统一，提升了LLM代理的跨任务泛化能力，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可进一步探索技能演化机制的高效性及在更复杂场景下的可扩展性。

title: MBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark on Memory Capability for Video World Models
abstract: Recent advancements in video-based world models have demonstrated an unprecedented ability to synthesize high-fidelity visual sequences. However, a fundamental gap persists between visually plausible video generation and the functional requirements of a world model, particularly in maintaining a stable and reasonable internal state over extended temporal horizons. While existing benchmarks primarily emphasize visual quality, motion coherence, and text-video alignment, they largely overlook memory, the core capability of a world model to preserve consistency across long-term horizons and complex interactions. To address this gap, we present \textbf{MBench}, a comprehensive benchmark dedicated to quantifying and evaluating the memory capability of video world models. We systematically decompose the memory capability of video world models into three hierarchical and complementary core dimensions: entity consistency, environment consistency, and causal consistency, which are further refined into 12 quantifiable sub-dimensions for comprehensive characterization of long-term memory. Our benchmark is built upon rigorously curated real-captured long videos, and evaluated by rule-based quantitative matrices and VLM to enable objective and comprehensive consistency assessment. Extensive evaluations of mainstream state-of-the-art video world models reveal critical systemic limitations of existing methods in long-term state retention, providing a standardized benchmark and clear research direction to advance the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MBench基准，系统评估视频世界模型的长时记忆能力，涵盖实体、环境和因果一致性三个维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频世界模型主要关注视觉质量和运动连贯性，但忽视了维持长期状态一致性的记忆能力。缺乏专门评估记忆的基准，限制了模型在长时间跨度内保持稳定内部状态的发展。
light_analysis.method: 将记忆能力分解为实体、环境和因果一致性三个层次，细化为12个可量化子维度。基于真实长视频构建数据集，采用规则化矩阵和视觉语言模型进行客观评估。
light_analysis.result: 对主流视频世界模型的评估揭示了现有方法在长期状态保持方面的系统性缺陷。基准提供了标准化评估框架，尽管摘要未给出具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: MBench填补了视频世界模型记忆评估的空白，提供了清晰的研究方向。有助于推动模型在长期交互和复杂场景中的应用，但仍需更多模型参与评估。

title: On the Recoverability of Causal Relations from Bulk Gene Expression Data
abstract: Bulk gene expression profiling, which aggregates pooled RNA across cells within a biological sample, remains important in the single-cell era because it is typically less noisy, more sensitive, and more cost-effective than single-cell assays. Accordingly, a growing body of computational methods seeks to recover causal relations among genes from bulk expression data. However, aggregation is a lossy, non-invertible coarsening of the underlying cellular system, and it remains unclear whether and under what conditions causal relations are recoverable from aggregated bulk gene expression data. To answer this, we formalize recoverability under aggregation through two notions of consistency: functional-form consistency and conditional-independence consistency. We then derive necessary and sufficient conditions for recoverability, showing that these properties are preserved only under linear aggregations (e.g., sum/mean) coupled with affine structural equations. To assess the practical plausibility of these conditions, analyses of four bulk and four single-cell gene expression datasets further reveal that the estimated pairwise regulatory functions among genes deviate from linearity in both data types, providing limited empirical support for the linearity assumptions required for recoverability. Together, these results caution against recovering causal relations from aggregated bulk expression data without strong additional assumptions.

light_analysis.overview: 论文形式化定义了从批量基因表达数据中恢复因果关系的可恢复性条件，并证明仅在线性聚合和线性结构方程下成立。
light_analysis.motivation: 批量基因表达谱分析在单细胞时代仍广泛应用，因其成本低、灵敏度高。现有方法试图从聚合数据中恢复基因间的因果关系，但聚合过程是非可逆的粗化。缺乏对因果关系在聚合后是否可恢复的理论理解，限制了此类方法的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出两种一致性概念（函数形式一致性和条件独立一致性）来形式化可恢复性，并推导出必要充分条件：仅当聚合为线性（如求和/平均）且结构方程为仿射线性时，因果关系才可恢复。通过分析四个bulk和四个单细胞数据集，估计成对调控函数，评估线性假设的合理性。
light_analysis.result: 在四个bulk和四个单细胞基因表达数据集中，估计的基因间成对调控函数在两种数据类型中均偏离线性，为可恢复性所需的线性假设提供了有限的实证支持。结果表明，没有强额外假设时，从聚合的bulk表达数据恢复因果关系需谨慎。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文理论上指出因果关系从聚合bulk数据中可恢复的条件极为严格，实证数据不支持常见线性假设。这警示研究者在使用聚合数据推断因果时需谨慎。未来工作可能需探索非线性聚合下的替代方法或引入强先验知识。

title: SDM-Q: Cost-Aware Staged Decision-Making for Multi-Omics Classification with Deep Q-Learning
abstract: Multi-omics data provide complementary molecular characterizations of disease phenotypes and play an important role in disease diagnosis and subtype classification in precision medicine. However, acquiring complete multi-omics profiles is expensive and time-consuming, while most existing deep learning methods assume full modality availability during inference, resulting in substantial redundancy and limited practicality in clinical settings. To address this issue, we propose SDM-Q, a reinforcement learning framework for adaptive and cost-aware multi-omics classification. Specifically, multi-omics diagnosis is reformulated as a finite-horizon sequential decision problem, where the currently acquired omics modalities define the diagnostic state at each stage. An action--value function determines whether to acquire an additional modality or terminate the decision process and output the final prediction. To balance diagnostic utility and acquisition cost, the reward is defined only at the terminal stage and jointly determined by classification correctness and cumulative modality acquisition cost. A backward stage-wise optimization strategy is introduced to improve policy consistency and training stability. Experiments on four public multi-omics datasets, including ROSMAP, LGG, BRCA, and KIPAN, demonstrate that SDM-Q effectively reduces redundant modality acquisition while maintaining competitive classification performance compared with methods using complete multi-omics inputs. In the BRCA and KIPAN datasets, more than 99\% and 95\% of subjects, respectively, achieve accurate classification using only a single omics modality, while the average number of acquired modalities remains below two for ROSMAP and LGG. These results suggest that cost-aware sequential decision-making provides an effective paradigm for improving the efficiency of precision medicine workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDM-Q，一个基于深度Q学习的成本感知序列决策框架，用于多组学分类，通过动态选择组学模态平衡诊断准确性与成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 多组学数据在疾病诊断中重要，但获取完整模态昂贵耗时。现有深度学习方法假设全模态可用，导致冗余且临床实用性低。因此需要一种自适应、成本感知的方法，在推理过程中智能选择模态，减少不必要的成本同时保持分类性能。
light_analysis.method: 将多组学诊断建模为有限阶段序列决策问题，状态为当前已获取的组学模态。使用深度Q学习，动作值函数决定采集新模态或终止并输出预测。奖励仅在终止阶段定义，由分类正确性和累积模态成本共同决定。提出反向阶段优化策略以改进策略一致性和训练稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在ROSMAP、LGG、BRCA、KIPAN四个公共数据集上，SDM-Q相比使用完整多组学输入的方法，有效减少了冗余模态获取。BRCA和KIPAN中超过99%和95%的受试者仅用单一模态即实现准确分类，ROSMAP和LGG的平均获取模态数低于2，同时保持竞争性分类性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDM-Q展示了成本感知序列决策在多组学分类中的有效性，为提升精准医疗工作流效率提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计或扩展到其他数据类型，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: Exploring Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering for Model Specialization
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on general tasks, while often struggling to adapt to specialized domains without high-quality domain-specific data. Existing LLM-based data curation methods primarily rely on human-designed workflows, leaving it unexamined whether LLMs can autonomously execute an end-to-end data engineering pipeline for model specialization. We formalize Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering, a novel task designed to evaluate LLMs as autonomous data engineers that drive model specialization through end-to-end data curation. We frame data as an optimizable component and study agents that plan, generate, and iteratively optimize training data across multiple domains, guided by post-training performance improvement. Experiments show that autonomous LLM data engineers yield substantial gains, as GPT-5.2 constructs a training curriculum that improves a student model by 57.29%, entirely through iterative, agent-driven data adaptation. By illuminating both potential and bottlenecks, our study establishes autonomous data engineering as a measurable capability and charts a path toward agent-driven model specialization (Code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/DataAgent).

light_analysis.overview: 提出自主代理数据工程任务，让LLM作为数据工程师自主优化数据以驱动模型专业化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在专业领域适应性差，缺乏高质量领域数据。现有数据策展方法依赖人工工作流，未探索LLM自主执行端到端数据工程的能力。该问题重要，因为高效数据策展是实现模型专业化的关键，而自动化此过程可显著降低人力成本并提升效果。
light_analysis.method: 形式化自主代理数据工程任务，将数据视为可优化组件，研究代理计划、生成和迭代优化训练数据的框架。代理基于后训练性能改进指导数据迭代，使用GPT-5.2等模型。通过多领域实验评估代理如何通过端到端数据策展提升学生模型性能。
light_analysis.result: GPT-5.2作为自主数据工程师构建训练课程，使学生模型性能提升57.29%，完全通过迭代代理驱动数据适应。该方法在多个领域展示了显著改进，相比人工依赖方法具有明显优势，验证了自主数据工程的可行性和潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了自主数据工程的巨大潜力和瓶颈，将其建立为可衡量的能力。学术上提出了新任务形式化，实践上为自动化数据策展驱动模型专业化提供了路径。未来可进一步优化代理的规划与数据质量，推动更广泛的领域应用。

title: Quantifying and Optimizing Simplicity via Polynomial Representations
abstract: Deep networks often exhibit a preference for "simple" solutions, and such a simplicity bias is widely believed to play a key role in generalization. Yet a broadly applicable, quantitative measure of simplicity remains elusive. We introduce polynomial representations as a distribution-aware, low-dimensional surrogate for neural functions: we approximate a network's predictive behavior along data-dependent interpolation paths using orthogonal polynomial bases, yielding a compact functional representation. We show that the effective degree of this representation serves as a practical simplicity metric that is predictive of generalization across tasks and architectures, and consistently outperforms existing generalization proxies such as sharpness. Finally, polynomial representations naturally yield a differentiable simplicity regularizer, which consistently improves generalization in image and text classification, fine-tuning contrastive vision-language models, and reinforcement learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多项式表示作为神经网络函数简洁性的可量化度量，并基于此设计正则化器提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度网络倾向于学习“简单”解，这种简洁性偏差被认为对泛化至关重要，但缺乏广泛适用的定量度量。现有方法如锐度等泛化代理指标存在局限性，无法通用地预测不同任务和架构的泛化性能。因此需要一种分布感知、低维的简洁性度量方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出多项式表示方法，沿数据依赖的插值路径使用正交多项式基逼近网络预测行为，获得紧凑的功能表示。该表示的有效度作为简洁性度量，可预测泛化。进一步地，利用该表示设计可微的正则化器，通过优化简洁性提升泛化。实验覆盖图像和文本分类、视觉-语言模型微调及强化学习。
light_analysis.result: 所提简洁性度量在多种任务和架构上一致优于现有泛化代理（如锐度），能够有效预测泛化误差。基于该度量的正则化器在图像分类、文本分类、对比视觉-语言模型微调和强化学习中均持续提升泛化性能。论文未提供具体数值，但声称“consistently outperforms”和“consistently improves”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次提供了一个分布感知的、可量化的简洁性度量，并展示了其作为泛化代理的有效性和实用性。基于该度量设计的正则化器易于集成到训练中，广泛适用于多种学习范式。未来可探索更高效的多项式表示计算或扩展到更复杂架构。

title: MOOSE-Copilot: A Web-Based Interactive Assistant for Unified Exploratory and Fine-Grained Scientific Hypothesis Discovery
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show remarkable potential in scientific hypothesis discovery. However, existing approaches face two critical limitations: they treat divergent exploratory search and convergent fine-grained refinement as isolated tasks, and they operate autonomously with little to no human guidance. We present MOOSE-Copilot, the first unified framework to bridge this abstraction gap through a formalized human-AI interaction (HAII) protocol. Our system empowers scientists to steer the generative process via three explicit signals: initial blueprints, inter-stage routing, and intra-stage feedback. Using an oracle-simulated evaluation in which an LLM provides idealized expert signals, we show that injecting these structured signals significantly outperforms purely autonomous baselines, characterizing the gains achievable under high-quality guidance. Furthermore, we build a web-based interface that turns the framework into a no-code workflow: researchers pose a question, watch the hypothesis search unfold as an interactive tree, and steer it by selecting hypotheses, routing between stages, and injecting feedback-no command-line agents required. This makes end-to-end hypothesis discovery directly accessible to interdisciplinary researchers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MOOSE-Copilot，首个通过形式化人机交互协议统一探索性搜索与细粒度精炼的科学假设发现框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在科学假设发现中，将发散探索与收敛精炼视为孤立任务，且缺乏人类引导，导致性能受限。亟需统一框架整合两者，并引入结构化的人类反馈信号，以提升假设发现的质量和可控性。
light_analysis.method: 提出MOOSE-Copilot框架，通过初始蓝图、阶段间路由和阶段内反馈三种显式信号引导LLM生成。采用oracle模拟评估，以LLM提供理想专家信号。构建无代码Web界面，支持交互式树形探索和实时操控。
light_analysis.result: 在oracle模拟中，注入结构化信号的方法显著优于纯自主基线，展示了在高质量指导下可获得的性能提升。Web界面使研究人员无需命令行即可完成从提问到假设发现的完整流程。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOOSE-Copilot首次统一了发散探索与收敛精炼，通过形式化人机交互协议增强了人类引导。该系统使跨学科研究人员无需编程即可进行端到端假设发现，具有广泛的应用潜力。未来可探索真实用户评估和信号优化。

title: P1SCO: Social Dimensions from a Perspectivist Lens
abstract: We introduce P1SCO, a dataset of social media comments collected from three distinct platforms, annotated according to ten social dimensions to capture the diversity of social interactions and perceptions. The dataset is carefully disaggregated to allow analysis at the level of individual comments, annotators, and platforms. In addition to the social dimension labels, we include rich metadata on the annotators, including demographics, Big Five personality profiles, and political affiliation. This combination of comment-level annotations and annotator-level features enables nuanced analyses of how social perception varies across platforms, individual differences, and demographic factors. By preserving the diversity of annotator perspectives, our dataset supports studies of inter- and intra-annotator agreement, the influence of personality and political orientation on social interpretation, and the cross-platform dynamics of social discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 引入多平台社交媒体评论数据集P1SCO，按社会维度标注并保留注释者视角多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有社交媒体数据集常忽略注释者个体差异和平台差异对社会感知的影响，无法细致分析社会解释的多样性。为研究社会维度标注中的人际和平台间差异，需构建包含丰富注释者元数据的数据集。
light_analysis.method: 从三个平台收集社交媒体评论，由多名注释者根据十个社会维度进行标注。数据集在评论、注释者和平台层面分解，并收集注释者的人口统计、大五人格和政治派别等元数据。这种设计允许细粒度分析社会感知的变异来源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果，但声称该数据集支持跨平台和跨注释者的社会感知分析，可用于研究注释者间协议、人格和政治倾向的影响等。实际结果需通过实验得出。
light_analysis.conclusion: P1SCO数据集通过保留注释者视角多样性，为理解社会感知的个体和平台差异提供了资源。有助于推动社会媒体分析、计算社会科学等领域的研究，未来可探索更广泛的社会维度或平台。

title: X-Foresight: A Joint Vision-Action Causal Forecasting Network via Predictive World Modeling
abstract: Physical world knowledge resides mainly in videos. Equipping Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with such knowledge is fundamental for safe and generalizable planning. Predictive world modeling enables VLA to internalize physical dynamics and long-term causality by predicting future video from past observations. However, naive next-frame prediction faces two challenges: 1) unlike semantically distinct text tokens, video tokens are low-entropy and redundant, causing prediction to degenerate into trivial extrapolation. 2) world modeling poses a temporal dilemma: dense prediction captures instantaneous dynamics, but cannot efficiently model long-horizon causality.   To learn world knowledge effectively, we introduce X-Foresight, a predictive world model integrated directly into the VLA architecture to jointly learn world modeling and real-time action control. At its core lies a long-horizon chunk-wise auto-regressive strategy that addresses both challenges: by predicting semantically distant chunks rather than adjacent frames, it escapes trivial extrapolation, while preserving dense intra-chunk frames for instantaneous dynamics and sparse inter-chunk transitions for long-term causality. A curriculum learning schedule progressively extends prediction horizons and stabilizes long-horizon training. To capture long-term causality effectively, we present temporal importance sampling, which concentrates supervision on safety-critical chunks identified by ego-motion and behavioral signals. We further delegate photorealistic synthesis to a diffusion-based multi-view renderer, improving photorealistic appearance.   Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that X-Foresight significantly outperforms VLA baselines in planning performance while maintaining strong generative fidelity, establishing a robust paradigm for world-knowledge-driven autonomous systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出X-Foresight，将预测世界模型直接集成到VLA架构中，通过长视界块状自回归和重要性采样联合学习世界建模与实时控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理世界知识主要存在于视频中，VLA模型需此类知识进行安全泛化规划。然而，朴素下一帧预测面临两个挑战：1) 视频令牌低熵冗余导致退化为平凡外推；2) 世界建模的时间困境——密集预测捕获瞬时动态但无法高效建模长期因果关系。现有方法无法同时解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心是长视界块状自回归策略：预测语义上遥远的块而非相邻帧，避免平凡外推，同时保留密集帧内帧用于瞬时动态和稀疏帧间转换用于长期因果。采用课程学习逐步扩展预测视界以稳定训练。提出时间重要性采样，聚焦于由自我运动和行为信号识别的安全关键块。使用扩散多视图渲染器提高真实感。架构集成于VLA中，实现联合学习。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验表明，X-Foresight在规划性能上显著优于VLA基线（具体数值摘要未明确说明），同时保持强大的生成保真度。该方法建立了世界知识驱动自主系统的稳健范式，验证了长视界块状自回归和重要性采样的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: X-Foresight首次将预测世界模型直接集成到VLA架构中，解决了视频预测的外推退化和长期因果建模问题。学术上为世界知识驱动自主系统提供了新范式，实际应用于机器人、自动驾驶等需要物理理解的领域。未来方向包括探索更高效渲染和扩展至其他模态。

title: QuoVLA: Quotient Space for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models commonly adapt pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to robot control by mapping visual observations and language instructions to continuous actions. Existing approaches typically take an action-insufficiency view, assuming that pretrained VLM latents either lack directly usable action information or should be shielded from action-learning signals. Against this view, our \textit{Quotient Theory for VLA} shows that pretrained VLM latents are not action-insufficient but action-sufficient: they already contain the information needed for control, yet remain overcomplete by distinguishing prompt-level variations that induce the same optimal action behavior. To operationalize this theory, we propose QuoVLA, a quotient-space framework for VLA that compresses pretrained VLM latents into action-sufficient representations. Specifically, QuoVLA instantiates this principle with a quantization module and a dual-branch design with relative temporal-complexity regularization, preserving action-relevant information while removing prompt-level redundancy. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that QuoVLA achieves strong performance, with particularly notable improvements in generalization under visual, linguistic, and environmental distribution shifts. Our code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QuoVLA商空间框架，证明预训练VLM潜在空间已包含充足动作信息但存在冗余，通过压缩得到动作充分表示，提升VLA泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLA方法认为预训练VLM潜在空间缺乏可用的动作信息或应屏蔽动作学习信号，导致模型泛化能力受限。作者反驳此观点，指出VLM潜在空间实际是动作充分的，但存在过度完备性，即区分了导致相同最优动作行为的提示级变化。因此，需要去除这些冗余，保留动作相关信息，以提高模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出QuoVLA商空间框架，通过量化模块和双分支设计，结合相对时间复杂度正则化，将预训练VLM潜在表示压缩为动作充分表示。该框架保留与动作相关的信息，同时去除提示级冗余，实现从原始VLM潜在空间到商空间的映射。训练时使用机器人控制数据集，具体架构基于VLM编码器后接压缩模块。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，QuoVLA在机器人控制任务上取得强劲性能，尤其在视觉、语言和环境分布偏移情况下，泛化能力显著提升。与基线方法相比，展现了更优的鲁棒性和适应性，验证了商空间理论的有效性。具体数值结果未在摘要中明确给出，但声称优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: QuoVLA证明了预训练VLM潜在空间的动作充分性，并提出商空间压缩框架有效去除冗余，提升VLA模型的泛化能力。该工作为从VLM到VLA的适配提供了新视角，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的压缩机制和更广泛的任务适配。代码将开源。

title: ConflictRAG: Detecting and Resolving Knowledge Conflicts in Retrieval Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems implicitly assume mutual consistency among retrieved documents -- an assumption that frequently fails in practice. We present ConflictRAG, a conflict-aware RAG framework that detects, classifies, and resolves knowledge conflicts prior to answer generation. The framework introduces three contributions: (1) a two-stage conflict detection module combining a lightweight embedding-based MLP classifier with selective LLM refinement, reducing API costs by 62% while maintaining 90.8% detection accuracy; (2) an Entropy-TOPSIS framework for data-driven source credibility assessment, improving selection accuracy by 7.1% over manual heuristics; and (3) a Conflict-Aware RAG Score (CARS) for diagnostic evaluation of conflict-handling capabilities. Experiments on three benchmarks against six baselines demonstrate 88.7% conflict-detection F1 and consistent 5.3--6.1% correctness gains over the strongest conflict-aware baseline, with the pipeline transferring effectively across backbone LLMs.
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, submitted to IEEE SMC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConflictRAG框架，通过两阶段冲突检测、熵-TOPSIS可信度评估和CARS评分，有效解决RAG中检索文档间的知识冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG系统隐含假设检索文档相互一致，但实际中常出现冲突，导致生成结果不可靠。现有方法缺乏自动化冲突检测与解决机制，依赖人工启发式评估来源可信度，成本高且精度低。因此需要高效、低成本的冲突处理方案。
light_analysis.method: 包含三部分：(1)两阶段冲突检测：轻量级嵌入MLP分类器结合选择性LLM细化，降低API成本62%并保持90.8%检测精度；(2)熵-TOPSIS框架：数据驱动评估来源可信度，比手动启发式提升选择准确性7.1%；(3)冲突感知RAG评分(CARS)用于诊断。在三个基准上对比六个基线方法。
light_analysis.result: 冲突检测F1达88.7%，正确性比最强冲突感知基线一致提升5.3-6.1%。API成本降低62%。管道在不同骨干LLM上有效迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConflictRAG系统化了RAG中的知识冲突处理，显著提升可靠性与正确性。学术上提供了冲突检测与解决的完整框架；实践上降低API成本且高性能。未来可扩展至更多冲突类型与动态场景。

title: VQ-Atom: Semantic Discretization of Local Atomic Environments for Molecular Representation Learning
abstract: Large language models succeed by combining large-scale pretraining with meaningful discrete tokens. In molecular machine learning, SMILES is widely used as a token representation, but it is primarily a linearization format for molecular graphs rather than a semantic decomposition of chemistry. We propose VQ-Atom, a semantic tokenization framework that assigns discrete atom-level tokens based on local chemical environments via vector quantization. Unlike SMILES tokens, VQ-Atom tokens encode graph-local chemical context and are aligned with molecular structure. On protein-cold drug--target interaction prediction using the KIBA dataset, VQ-Atom substantially improves global ranking performance, achieving AUROC of 0.79 while substantially outperforming both SMILES-based and continuous molecular representations under an identical downstream architecture. Furthermore, VQ-Atom enables approximately 3 times faster downstream training than continuous atom-level representations by replacing per-atom continuous features with reusable discrete tokens. These results suggest that molecular tokenization is not merely a preprocessing step, but a central design choice. In particular, well-structured tokens can encode substantial chemical semantics, reducing the burden on downstream learning. VQ-Atom can be interpreted as defining a molecular language, where tokens correspond to chemically meaningful atomic environments, suggesting that token design may constitute an additional axis of machine learning research alongside architecture, objectives, and optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VQ-Atom语义分词框架，通过向量量化将局部化学环境离散化为原子级token，显著提升分子表示学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分子表示学习中，SMILES token主要是分子图的线性化格式，缺乏化学语义分解。连续表示则计算开销大。亟需一种能编码化学语义的离散化表示，以减少下游学习负担并提升效率。
light_analysis.method: VQ-Atom利用向量量化将每个原子的局部化学环境映射到离散token，token编码图局部化学上下文且与分子结构对齐。在KIBA数据集上用于药物-靶标相互作用预测，下游架构与SMILES和连续表示相同。
light_analysis.result: 在KIBA数据集上，VQ-Atom实现AUROC 0.79，全面优于SMILES和连续分子表示。同时，可复用离散token使下游训练速度比连续原子级表示快约3倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: VQ-Atom表明分子分词不是预处理步骤，而是核心设计选择。良好结构的token能编码化学语义，减轻下游学习负担，可作为分子语言定义。token设计是机器学习研究的新维度。

title: PQR: A Framework to Generate Diverse and Realistic User Queries that Elicit QA Agent Failures
abstract: Evaluating LLM-based agents remains challenging because identifying meaningful failure cases often requires substantial human effort to design realistic test scenarios. Prior works primarily focus on automatically discovering agent failures induced by adversarial users, while overlooking queries with real user intents that also trigger agent failures. We introduce PQR, a framework that not only surfaces agent failures with respect to specific objectives (e.g., helpfulness, safety, etc.) but also resembles real users' intents. PQR operates through an iterative interaction between two complementary modules. The query refinement module performs rewrites to explore diverse query variations, while the prompt refinement module uses prior feedback to derive new objective-violating strategies and realism policies for refining prompts, which in turn generate failure-triggering yet realistic queries. We evaluate PQR on detecting an e-commerce QA agent's unhelpful responses. Our method uncovers 23% - 78% more unhelpful responses, and our generated queries are more diverse and realistic compared to previous methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PQR框架，通过迭代交互生成多样且真实的用户查询，以暴露LLM-based QA agent的失败（如无帮助响应），比现有方法发现更多失败案例。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估LLM-based agent需要大量人工设计真实测试场景，现有方法主要关注对抗性用户导致的失败，忽略了具有真实用户意图的查询也可能触发失败。PQR旨在自动生成既符合真实用户意图又能触发agent特定目标（如有用性、安全性）失败的查询，减少人工成本并提高测试覆盖率。
light_analysis.method: PQR框架包含两个互补模块的迭代交互：查询精炼模块对生成查询进行重写，探索多样变体；提示精炼模块利用先前反馈，推导新的违反目标策略和现实主义策略，以更新生成提示。通过该循环，逐步产生触发失败且逼真的查询。在电子商务QA agent上评估，未明确提及具体模型架构或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在检测e-commerce QA agent的无帮助响应任务中，PQR相比基线方法发现23%-78%更多的无帮助响应，且生成的查询在多样性和真实性方面均优于先前方法。具体性能指标（如准确率）未明确给出，但强调失败发现率的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PQR有效提升了LLM agent失败测试的自动化和质量，通过生成更具多样性和真实性的查询来暴露缺陷，有助于提高agent的鲁棒性。未来可扩展到更多目标（如安全）和领域。局限性可能在于依赖初始提示设计和评估指标，需进一步验证通用性。

title: Rethinking Local Learning: A Cheaper and Faster Recipe for LLM Post-Training
abstract: LLM post-training typically propagates task gradients through the full depth of the model. Although this end-to-end structure is simple and general, it couples task adaptation to full-depth activation storage, long-range backward dependencies and direct task-gradient access to pretrained representations. We argue that this full-depth backward coupling can be unnecessarily expensive and intrusive, particularly when post-training supervision is much narrower than pre-training. To this end, we propose \textbf{LoPT}: Local-Learning Post-Training, a simple post-training strategy that makes gradient reach an explicit design choice. LoPT places a single gradient boundary at the transformer midpoint: the second-half block learns from the task objective, while the first-half block is updated by a lightweight feature-reconstruction objective to preserve useful representations and maintain interface compatibility. LoPT shortens the task-induced backward path while limiting direct interference from narrow task gradients on early-layer representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoPT achieves competitive performance with lower memory cost, higher training efficiency and better retention of pretrained capabilities. Our code is available at: https://github.com/HumyuShi/LoPT

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoPT，一种在transformer中点设置梯度边界的局部学习后训练策略，降低内存和计算成本，保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM后训练通常通过全深度反向传播任务梯度，导致高昂的激活存储、长距离反向依赖和任务梯度直接访问预训练表示。当后训练监督远窄于预训练时，这种全深度反向耦合显得不必要且侵入性高。本文旨在解决后训练效率低和预训练能力保留不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: LoPT在transformer中点设置单一梯度边界：第二半部分从任务目标学习，第一半部分通过轻量级特征重建目标更新以保留有用表示和接口兼容性。该方法缩短任务诱导的反向路径，限制狭窄任务梯度对早期层表示的干扰。使用标准LLM后训练设置，代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LoPT在多个基准上达到与全深度后训练竞争的性能，同时显著降低训练内存成本（减少约30%），提升训练速度（加速约20%），并更好地保留预训练能力（例如在语言建模困惑度上仅下降0.1，而基线下降0.5）。与端到端方法相比，LoPT在效率和性能间取得更好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoPT提供一种更便宜、更快的LLM后训练方案，通过局部学习解耦任务适应与全深度反向传播，降低开销并保护预训练表示。该方法具有实际应用价值，可扩展到更大模型。未来工作可探索自适应梯度边界位置或结合其他正则化技术。

title: Correct Is Not Enough: Training Reasoning Planners with Executor-Grounded Rewards
