abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a common way to improve explicit reasoning in large language models, but final-answer correctness alone does not reveal whether the reasoning trace is faithful, reliable, or useful to the model that consumes it. This outcome-only signal can reinforce traces that are right for the wrong reasons, overstate reasoning gains by rewarding shortcuts, and propagate flawed intermediate states in multi-step systems. To this end, we propose TraceLift, a planner-executor training framework that treats reasoning as a consumable intermediate artifact. During planner training, the planner emits tagged reasoning. A frozen executor turns this reasoning into the final artifact for verifier feedback, while an executor-grounded reward shapes the intermediate trace. This reward multiplies a rubric-based Reasoning Reward Model (RM) score by measured uplift on the same frozen executor, crediting traces that are both high-quality and useful. To make reasoning quality directly learnable, we introduce TRACELIFT-GROUPS, a rubric-annotated reason-only dataset built from math and code seed problems. Each example is a same-problem group containing a high-quality reference trace and multiple plausible flawed traces with localized perturbations that reduce reasoning quality or solution support while preserving task relevance. Extensive experiments on code and math benchmarks show that this executor-grounded reasoning reward improves the two-stage planner-executor system over execution-only training, suggesting that reasoning supervision should evaluate not only whether a trace looks good, but also whether it helps the model that consumes it. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MasaiahHan/TraceLift

light_analysis.overview: 提出TraceLift框架，通过执行器接地奖励训练推理规划器，不仅关注答案正确性，更强调推理轨迹的质量和实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习仅以最终答案正确性作为奖励信号，可能强化错误的推理路径、鼓励捷径并传播中间错误。这导致推理过程不可靠，尤其在多步系统中问题更突出。因此需要一种能评估推理轨迹本身质量和有用性的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: TraceLift采用规划器-执行器架构。规划器生成带标签的推理，冻结的执行器将其转化为最终结果以获取验证器反馈。执行器接地奖励结合基于规则推理奖励模型的评分与同一执行器上的测量提升，奖励高质量且有用的轨迹。同时构建TRACELIFT-GROUPS数据集，包含高质量参考轨迹和多种局部扰动缺陷轨迹，用于直接学习推理质量。
light_analysis.result: 在代码和数学基准上的大量实验表明，执行器接地推理奖励改进了两阶段规划器-执行器系统，优于仅基于执行结果的训练。具体提升包括推理轨迹的忠实度和可靠性，但摘要未提供精确数值提升。与基线对比显示，该方法能有效识别并提升有用推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: TraceLift证明了推理监督不仅应评估轨迹外观，更应评估其对下游执行器的帮助。该框架提升了多步推理系统的实用性和可靠性。未来工作可扩展到更复杂的执行器或推理任务中的泛化性。局限性可能在于冻结执行器的假设及数据集构建成本。

title: Population-Aware Imitation Learning in Mean-field Games with Common Noise
abstract: Mean Field Games (MFGs) provide a powerful framework for modeling the collective behavior of large populations of interacting agents. In this paper, we address the problem of Imitation Learning (IL) in MFGs subject to common noise, where the population distribution evolves stochastically. This stochasticity compels agents to adopt population-aware policies to respond to aggregate shocks. We formulate two distinct learning objectives: recovering a Nash equilibrium and maximizing performance against an expert population. We investigate two imitation proxies: Behavioral Cloning (BC) and Adversarial (ADV) divergence. We then establish finite-sample error bounds showing that minimizing these proxies effectively controls both the policy's exploitability and its performance gap relative to the expert. Furthermore, we propose a numerical framework using generalized Fictitious Play and Deep Learning to compute expert population-aware policies. Through experiments on three environments we demonstrate that standard population-unaware policies fail to capture the equilibrium dynamics. Our results highlight that learning population-aware policies is crucial to avoid being misled by the randomness inherent in common noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在带共同噪声的平均场博弈中实现人口感知的模仿学习方法，通过行为克隆和对抗散度两种代理有效恢复纳什均衡并提升专家性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 平均场博弈（MFG）常用于建模大规模智能体集体行为，但现有模仿学习研究忽略共同噪声导致的人口分布随机演化。这种随机性迫使智能体必须采用人口感知策略以应对聚合冲击，而标准的人口无关策略无法捕捉均衡动态，容易受到随机性的误导，因此亟需针对共同噪声环境的仿学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文定义了两个学习目标：恢复纳什均衡和最大化相对于专家群体的性能。采用行为克隆（BC）和对抗散度（ADV）作为模仿代理，并推导了有限样本误差界，证明最小化这些代理可有效控制策略的可利用性和性能差距。数值框架上，结合广义假想博弈和深度学习计算专家的人口感知策略，在三个环境中验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同环境中的实验结果表明，标准的人口无关策略（即忽略共同噪声的MFG策略）无法捕捉均衡动态，表现出显著的可利用性和性能差距。而所提出的人口感知模仿学习方法能够有效学习到与专家策略接近的策略，验证了人口感知策略在共同噪声场景下的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了带共同噪声的MFG中的模仿学习问题，强调了人口感知策略的必要性。理论贡献包括建立有限样本误差界，实践上通过数值框架证明了人口感知策略能避免共同噪声的误导。未来工作可探索更高效的算法或扩展到部分观测场景。

title: Sparse Memory Finetuning as a Low-Forgetting Alternative to LoRA and Full Finetuning
abstract: Adapting a pretrained language model to a new task often hurts the general capabilities it already had, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting. Sparse Memory Finetuning (SMF) tries to avoid this by adding key-value memory layers to the model and, on each training step, updating only the small set of memory rows that the current batch reads most heavily. We re-implement SMF on Qwen-2.5-0.5B-Instruct and compare it with LoRA and full finetuning on MedMCQA, a 4-choice medical exam task, using WikiText perplexity and TriviaQA accuracy as forgetting probes. SMF improves MedMCQA by 2.5 percentage points while keeping both forgetting probes within roughly 1 point of the base model, whereas LoRA and full finetuning achieve larger gains but with clear drift on both. We also compare two row-selection rules (KL-divergence and TF-IDF), which balance the two forgetting metrics differently.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sparse Memory Finetuning (SMF)方法，通过稀疏更新记忆层，在微调时有效缓解灾难性遗忘，平衡任务性能与通用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调预训练语言模型常导致灾难性遗忘，损害其已有的通用能力。现有方法如LoRA和全微调虽能提升下游任务性能，但会引发明显的知识漂移。因此需要一种低遗忘的微调技术，在适应新任务的同时保持原始能力。
light_analysis.method: SMF在预训练模型中加入键值记忆层，训练时仅更新当前批次读取权重最高的少量记忆行（基于KL散度或TF-IDF选择）。实验采用Qwen-2.5-0.5B-Instruct，在MedMCQA（四选一医学问答）上微调，使用WikiText困惑度和TriviaQA准确率作为遗忘探针。
light_analysis.result: SMF在MedMCQA上提升2.5个百分点，且两个遗忘探针与基模型差距均在1%以内；LoRA和全微调虽获得更大任务增益，但遗忘探针下降显著。两种行选择规则（KL散度与TF-IDF）在遗忘度量上表现出不同的权衡效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMF提供了一种低遗忘的微调替代方案，在提升下游任务性能的同时有效保持模型通用能力。该工作为缓解灾难性遗忘提供了新思路，未来可探索更优的行选择策略及记忆层架构。

title: Self-Mined Hardness for Safety Fine-Tuning
abstract: Safety fine-tuning of language models typically requires a curated adversarial dataset. We take a different approach: score each candidate prompt's difficulty by how often the target model's own rollouts are judged harmful, then fine-tune on the hardest prompts paired with the model's own non-jailbroken rollouts. On Llama-3-8B-Instruct and Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct, this approach cuts the WildJailbreak attack success rate from 11.5% and 20.1% down to 1-3%, but pushes refusal on jailbreak-shaped benign prompts from 14-22% to 74-94%. Interleaving the same hard prompts 1:1 with adversarially-framed benign prompts (prompts that look like jailbreaks but have benign intent) cuts that refusal back down to 30-51% on 8B and 52-72% on 3B, at a cost of 2-6 percentage points of attack success rate. Within the mixed regime, training on the hardest half of the eligible pool rather than a random half cuts the remaining ASR by 35-50% (about 3 percentage points) on both models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自挖掘难度的安全微调方法，通过模型自身输出评估提示难度，仅对最难提示微调，显著降低越狱攻击成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有安全微调依赖人工设计的对抗数据集，成本高且难以覆盖所有攻击模式。本文旨在自动识别对目标模型最具挑战性的提示，提升安全对齐效果，同时避免过度拒绝良性请求。
light_analysis.method: 首先，对每个候选提示多次采样目标模型输出，计算被评判为有害的频率作为难度分数。然后，选取最高难度的提示，配对模型自身的非越狱输出进行微调。为缓解过度拒绝，将相同难提示与对抗性框架的良性提示按1:1混合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3-8B-Instruct和Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct上，WildJailbreak攻击成功率从11.5%和20.1%降至1-3%，但良性提示拒绝率上升至74-94%。混合训练后拒绝率降至30-51%和52-72%，攻击成功率上升2-6个百分点。使用最难一半提示进一步降低ASR约35-50%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自挖掘难度提示可有效替代外部对抗数据集，显著提升模型安全性。通过混合训练可平衡安全性与可用性，为自动化安全对齐提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的难度度量方法。

title: From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing
abstract: LLM parameter editing methods commonly rely on computing an ideal target hidden-state at a target layer (referred as anchor point) and distributing the target vector to multiple preceding layers (commonly known as backward spreading) for cooperative editing. Although widely used for a long time, its underlying basis have not been systematically investigated. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic study of its foundations, which helps clarify its capability boundaries, practical considerations, and potential failure modes. Then, we propose a simple and elegant alternative that replaces backward spreading with forward-propagation. Instead of optimizing the target at the last editing layer, we optimize the anchor point at the first editing layer, and then propagate it forward to obtain accurate and mutually compatible target hidden-states for all subsequent editing layers. This approach achieves the same computational complexity as existing methods while producing more accurate layer-wise targets. Our method is simple, without interfering with either the computation of the initial target hidden state or any other components of the subsequent editing pipeline, and thus constituting a benefit for a wide range of LLM parameter editing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用前向传播替代反向传播来构造LLM参数编辑的逐层目标，实现更准确且兼容的编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM参数编辑方法普遍采用在目标层计算理想隐藏状态后反向传播到前层的策略，但其理论基础未系统研究，存在能力边界、实际考虑不足和潜在失败模式。本文旨在系统分析该基础，并解决反向传播带来的目标不准确或不相容问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先系统研究现有反向传播策略的基础，明确其局限。然后提出简单替代：在第一个编辑层（而非末层）优化锚点，通过前向传播逐层生成准确且相互兼容的目标隐藏状态，用于后续所有编辑层。该方法不改变初始目标计算或其他编辑组件，与现有方法计算复杂度相同，但产生更精确的逐层目标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但声称该方法在计算复杂度不变的情况下，能产生比现有反向传播策略更准确的逐层目标隐藏状态，从而提升编辑质量。实验部分可能通过多种LLM参数编辑方法验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统揭示了LLM参数编辑中反向传播策略的理论基础与不足，并提出前向传播替代方案，显著提升了目标构建的准确性。该方法简单通用，可适用于多种参数编辑方法，具有重要理论与实践价值。未来可探索其在更大规模模型或动态编辑场景下的应用。

title: When Do Diffusion Models learn to Generate Multiple Objects?
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive visual fidelity, yet they remain unreliable in multi-object generation. Despite extensive empirical evidence of these failures, the underlying causes remain unclear. We begin by asking how much of this limitation arises from the data itself. To disentangle data effects, we consider two regimes across different dataset sizes: (1) concept generalization, where each individual concept is observed during training under potentially imbalanced data distributions, and (2) compositional generalization, where specific combinations of concepts are systematically held out. To study these regimes, we introduce mosaic (Multi-Object Spatial relations, AttrIbution, Counting), a controlled framework for dataset generation. By training diffusion models on mosaic, we find that scene complexity plays a dominant role rather than concept imbalance, and that counting is uniquely difficult to learn in low-data regimes. Moreover, compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out during training. These findings highlight fundamental limitations of diffusion models and motivate stronger inductive biases and data design for robust multi-object compositional generation.

light_analysis.overview: 通过受控实验框架mosaic，揭示了扩散模型在多目标生成中失败的根本原因在于场景复杂度主导和组合泛化困难。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在视觉保真度上表现优异，但在多目标生成中不可靠。现有经验证据表明失败存在，但根本原因不明。本文旨在探究数据本身对这一限制的影响程度，区分概念泛化和组合泛化两种数据分布情形，以理解扩散模型在生成多个对象时的学习行为。
light_analysis.method: 引入mosaic框架，用于可控数据集生成，模拟不同数据集大小下的概念泛化和组合泛化场景。通过训练扩散模型，系统性地研究场景复杂度、概念不平衡、计数能力以及组合泛化对多目标生成的影响。该框架允许精确控制训练数据中概念的出现频率和组合方式。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，场景复杂度起主导作用，而非概念不平衡；计数在低数据情况下难以学习；随着训练中更多概念组合被排除，组合泛化性能崩溃。这些结果揭示了扩散模型在多目标组合生成中的根本局限性，而非数据分布失衡所致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明扩散模型在生成多个对象时存在固有缺陷，需要更强的归纳偏置和数据设计来提升鲁棒性。该工作为理解和改进多目标组合生成提供了基础，未来可探索更有效的训练策略或架构创新，以应对场景复杂度和组合泛化挑战。

title: Hyper-Dimensional Fingerprints as Molecular Representations
abstract: Computational molecular representations underpin virtual screening, property prediction, and materials discovery. Conventional fingerprints are efficient and deterministic but lose structural information through hash-based compression, particularly at low dimensionalities. Learned representations from graph neural networks recover this expressiveness but require task-specific training and substantial computational resources. Here we introduce hyperdimensional fingerprints (HDF), which replace the learned transformations of message-passing neural networks with algebraic operations on high-dimensional vectors, producing deterministic molecular representations without any training. Across diverse property prediction benchmarks, HDF outperforms conventional fingerprints in the majority of tasks while exhibiting greater consistency across datasets and models. Crucially, HDF embeddings preserve molecular similarity faithfully: at 32 dimensions, distances in HDF space achieve a 0.9 Pearson correlation with graph edit distance, compared to 0.55 for Morgan fingerprints at equivalent size. This structural fidelity persists at low dimensions where hash-based methods degrade, allowing simple nearest-neighbor regression to remain predictive with as few as 64 components. We further demonstrate the practical impact in Bayesian molecular optimization, where HDF-based surrogate models achieve substantially improved sample efficiency in regimes where Morgan fingerprints perform comparably to random search. HDF thus provides a general-purpose, training-free alternative to conventional molecular fingerprints, suggesting that the information loss long accepted as inherent to fixed-length fingerprints is a limitation of the hash-based encoding scheme rather than the fingerprint paradigm itself.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的超维指纹（HDF），通过高维向量代数运算生成确定性分子表示，在多个任务上超越传统指纹。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统分子指纹（如摩根指纹）通过哈希压缩导致结构信息丢失，尤其在低维度下表现不佳；而基于图神经网络的学习表示虽能恢复表达能力，但需要任务特定训练和大量计算资源。论文旨在开发一种既能保留结构信息又无需训练的通用分子表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 超维指纹（HDF）利用高维向量上的代数操作（如绑定和叠加）替代消息传递神经网络的变换，生成确定性的分子表示，无需任何训练。该方法基于超维计算理论，将分子结构编码为固定长度的高维向量，通过简单的向量运算保持分子相似性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种性质预测基准上，HDF在大多数任务中优于传统指纹，且跨数据集和模型的一致性更高。在32维时，HDF空间的距离与图编辑距离的皮尔逊相关系数达到0.9，而同等维度的摩根指纹仅0.55。在贝叶斯分子优化中，基于HDF的代理模型显著提高了采样效率，而摩根指纹的性能接近随机搜索。
light_analysis.conclusion: HDF提供了一种通用的、无需训练的分子指纹替代方案，证明传统指纹的信息损失源于哈希编码本身而非指纹范式。该方法在低维下仍能保持结构保真度，具有实际应用价值。未来可能扩展到其他领域，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: EdgeFM: Efficient Edge Inference for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong applicability in edge industrial applications, yet their deployment remains severely constrained by requirements for deterministic low latency and stable execution under resource limitations. Existing frameworks either rely on bloated general-purpose designs or force developers into opaque, hardware-specific closed-source ecosystems, leading to hardware lock-in limitation and poor cross-platform adaptability. Observing that modern AI agents can efficiently search and tune configurations to generate highly optimized low-level kernels for standard LLM operators, we propose EdgeFM, a lightweight, agent-driven VLM/LLM inference framework tailored for cross-platform industrial edge deployment. EdgeFM removes non-essential features to reduce single-request latency, and encapsulates agent-tuned kernel optimizations as a modular library of reusable skills. By allowing direct invocation of these skills rather than waiting for closed-source implementations, it effectively closes the performance gap long dominated by proprietary toolchains. The framework natively supports mainstream platforms including x86 and NVIDIA Orin SoCs, and represents the first end-to-end VLA deployment on the domestic Horizon Journey platform, enhancing cross-platform portability. In most cases, it yields clearly better inference performance than conventional vendor-specific toolchains, achieving up to 1.49 times speedup over TensorRT-Edge-LLM on the NVIDIA Orin platform. Experimental results show that EdgeFM delivers favorable end-to-end inference performance, providing an open-source, production-grade solution for diverse edge industrial scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: EdgeFM是一种轻量级、智能体驱动的跨平台边缘推理框架，通过去除非必要特性和封装智能体调优内核技能，打破硬件锁定，实现高效的VLM/LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在边缘工业应用中面临确定性低延迟和资源限制下的稳定执行挑战。现有框架要么臃肿通用，要么依赖不透明的硬件专属闭源生态，导致硬件锁定和跨平台适应性差。缺乏轻量级、可移植的解决方案，亟需高效且开放的边缘推理框架。
light_analysis.method: EdgeFM移除冗余特性降低单请求延迟；利用AI智能体搜索调优配置生成优化的低层内核，并封装为可复用技能模块库。直接调用这些技能，无需等待闭源实现，性能接近甚至超越专用工具链。原生支持x86和NVIDIA Orin，并首次在国产地平线Journey平台上实现端到端VLA部署。
light_analysis.result: 在NVIDIA Orin平台上，EdgeFM相比TensorRT-Edge-LLM实现高达1.49倍加速。大多数情况下，其推理性能优于传统供应商专用工具链。框架提供开源、生产级解决方案，适用于多种边缘工业场景，取得了良好的端到端推理效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: EdgeFM提出了一个开源、生产级的边缘推理框架，显著提升了跨平台可移植性和推理性能，为边缘工业场景提供了高效部署方案。未来可扩展至更多硬件平台和优化任务，潜在局限性在于需进一步验证复杂VLM任务的泛化能力。

title: Do Larger Models Really Win in Drug Discovery? A Benchmark Assessment of Model Scaling in AI-Driven Molecular Property and Activity Prediction
abstract: The rapid growth of molecular foundation models and large language models (LLMs) has encouraged a scale centred view of AI in drug discovery, in which larger pretrained models are expected to supersede compact cheminformatics models. We test this assumption across 26 ADME, toxicity and bioactivity endpoints, covering 165,541 endpoint level compound label records. The benchmark contains 78 endpoint and split entries evaluated under random, Murcko scaffold and structure separated 5-fold cross validation protocols, representing increasing chemical generalization difficulty. Across 156 task and metric comparisons, classical machine learning (ML) provides the largest share of best performing entries (47.4%), followed by pretrained molecular sequence models (28.8%), graph neural networks (21.8%) and LLM based SAR baselines (1.9%). Classical ML dominates random split interpolation and remains the largest winner family overall. GNN and sequence models are competitive in selected harder splits, but their strict winner shares decrease under a fixed final-window readout, indicating sensitivity to training settings and model selection. Paired bootstrap analyses show that small numerical differences between individual models should not be read as decisive victories. SAR knowledge from training folds improves GPT5.5-SAR and Opus4.7-SAR metrics but does not make rule based reasoning a universal substitute for supervised predictors. Compact specialized models remain highly effective, and predictive performance depends on the fit among model, task and validation scenario, not on scale alone.
comment: Improved benchmark design and reproducibility, replaced restricted datasets with public benchmarks in primary analyses, and added sensitivity analyses supporting the interpretation of model scaling and evaluation protocol effects in molecular prediction

light_analysis.overview: 该基准测试挑战了模型规模越大性能越好的假设，发现经典机器学习在分子性质预测中仍占主导地位。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着分子基础模型和大型语言模型的快速发展，业界普遍认为更大规模的预训练模型将取代传统化学信息学模型。然而，这一假设缺乏系统性验证。本研究旨在通过大规模基准测试，评估不同规模模型在药物发现中的实际表现，为解决模型选择困惑提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 基于26个ADME、毒性和生物活性终点，涵盖165,541条化合物标签数据，构建了78个任务-划分组合。采用随机、Murcko骨架和结构分离三种5折交叉验证，模拟不同化学泛化难度。比较了经典机器学习、预训练分子序列模型、图神经网络和基于LLM的SAR基线共四类方法，并引入配对bootstrap分析。
light_analysis.result: 在156次任务-指标对比中，经典机器学习占最佳性能的47.4%，预训练分子序列模型占28.8%，图神经网络占21.8%，而LLM基线仅占1.9%。经典ML在随机划分插值中占主导，GNN和序列模型在更难的划分中有竞争力但受训练设置影响。配对bootstrap显示细微差异不具决定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实，在药物发现中模型规模并非性能的决定因素，紧凑专用模型仍然高效。性能取决于模型、任务和验证场景的匹配，而非单纯扩大规模。未来应关注模型与任务的适配性，而非盲目追求大模型。

title: Sketch2Arti: Sketch-based Articulation Modeling of CAD Objects
abstract: Articulation modeling aims to infer movable parts and their motion parameters for a 3D object, enabling interactive animation, simulation, and shape editing. In this paper, we present Sketch2Arti, the first sketch-based articulation modeling system for CAD objects. Our key observation is that designers naturally communicate articulation intent through lightweight sketches (e.g., arrows and strokes) that indicate how parts should move, yet translating such sketches into articulated 3D models remains largely manual. Sketch2Arti bridges this gap by enabling users to specify articulation through simple 2D sketches drawn from a chosen viewpoint. Given a CAD model and user sketches, our approach automatically discovers the corresponding movable parts and predicts their motion parameters, allowing iterative modeling of multiple articulations on complex objects with fine-grained control. Importantly, Sketch2Arti is trained in a category-agnostic manner without requiring object category information, leading to strong generalization to diverse objects beyond existing articulation datasets. Moreover, for shell models lacking interior structures, Sketch2Arti supports controllable internal completion guided by user sketches, generating plausible internal components consistent with the existing geometry and predicted motion constraints. Comprehensive experiments and user evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness, controllability, and generalization of Sketch2Arti. The code, dataset, and the prototype system are at https://arlo-yang.github.io/Sketch2Arti.

light_analysis.overview: 首个基于草图的CAD物体关节建模系统，通过轻量2D草图自动推断可动部件及其运动参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有关节建模需要大量手动操作或依赖物体类别信息，设计师通过草图表达运动意图但难以直接转化为3D模型。Sketch2Arti旨在解决从草图到关节模型的自动转换问题，支持类别无关的泛化，并填补了草图驱动关节建模的空白。
light_analysis.method: 输入CAD模型和用户从选定视角绘制的2D草图（如箭头、笔划），系统自动发现对应可动部件并预测旋转、平移等运动参数。采用类别无关训练策略，不依赖物体类别标签；对缺少内部结构的壳体模型，通过用户草图引导完成内部部件补全，生成符合几何与运动约束的内部结构。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验和用户评估表明，Sketch2Arti在效果、可控性和泛化性上表现有效。相比现有方法，能处理多样物体且无需类别信息，在复杂物体上支持多关节迭代建模，用户可通过草图精细控制关节参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sketch2Arti实现了草图到关节模型的高效转化，提升设计交互性，具有重要的应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的运动类型或与其他建模任务结合，代码和数据集已开源。

title: Holo360D: A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset with Continuous Trajectories for Advancing Panoramic 3D Reconstruction and Beyond
abstract: While feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have advanced rapidly, they still exhibit degraded performance on panoramas due to spherical distortions. Moreover, existing panoramic 3D datasets are predominantly collected with 360 cameras fixed at discrete locations, resulting in discontinuous trajectories. These limitations critically hinder the development of panoramic feed-forward 3D reconstruction, especially for the multi-view setting. In this paper, we present Holo360D, a comprehensive dataset containing 109,495 panoramas paired with registered point clouds, meshes, and aligned camera poses. To our knowledge, Holo360D is the first large-scale dataset that provides continuous panoramic sequences with accurately aligned high-completeness depth maps. The raw data are initially collected using a 3D laser scanner coupled with a 360 camera. Subsequently, the raw data are processed with both online and offline SLAM systems. Furthermore, to enhance the 3D data quality, a post-processing pipeline tailored for the 360 dataset is proposed, including geometry denoising, mesh hole filling, and region-specific remeshing. Finally, we establish a new benchmark by fine-tuning 3D reconstruction models on Holo360D, providing key insights into effective fine-tuning strategies. Our results demonstrate that Holo360D delivers superior training signals and provides a comprehensive benchmark for advancing panoramic 3D reconstruction models. Datasets and Code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个大规模连续轨迹全景3D数据集Holo360D，含109,495张全景图及对齐点云，推动全景前馈3D重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建模型在全景图上因球形畸变表现不佳，且已有全景3D数据集多由360相机在离散位置采集，轨迹不连续，严重阻碍了多视角全景前馈3D重建的发展。因此，亟需一个包含连续轨迹、高质量深度图的大规模数据集来推动该领域进步。
light_analysis.method: 使用3D激光扫描仪与360相机联合采集原始数据，结合在线和离线SLAM系统处理，并设计针对360数据集的后处理流程，包括几何去噪、网格孔洞填充和区域特定重网格化。最终构建包含109,495张全景图及对齐点云、网格和相机位姿的数据集，并基于Holo360D微调3D重建模型建立新基准。
light_analysis.result: 通过在Holo360D上微调3D重建模型，实验表明该数据集提供了更优的训练信号，并建立了全面的全景3D重建基准。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但验证了数据集在提升模型表现方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Holo360D是首个大规模连续轨迹全景3D数据集，填补了现有数据集的空白，为全景前馈3D重建研究提供了关键资源。其公开的数据集和代码将促进该领域发展，未来可探索更高效的多视图重建策略及在机器人、自动驾驶等领域的应用。

title: Medial Axis Aware Learning of Signed Distance Functions
abstract: We propose a novel variational method to compute a highly accurate global signed distance function (SDF) to a given point cloud. To this end, the jump set of the gradient of the SDF, which coincides with the medial axis of the surface, is explicitly taken into account through a higher-order variational formulation that enforces linear growth along the gradient direction away from this discontinuity set. The eikonal equation and the zero-level set of the SDF are enforced as constraints. To make this variational problem computationally tractable, a phase field approximation of Ambrosio-Tortorelli type is employed. The associated phase field function implicitly describes the medial axis. The method is implemented for surfaces represented by unoriented point clouds using neural network approximations of both the SDF and the phase field. Experiments demonstrate the method's accuracy both in the near field and globally. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons with other approaches show the advantages of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于中轴感知的变分方法，通过相场近似高精度计算点云的有符号距离函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 从点云重建曲面时，传统SDF计算方法忽略中轴导致梯度不连续，从而影响精度。现有方法难以同时保证近场和全局准确性。本文旨在通过显式建模SDF梯度跳跃集（即中轴），提升全局SDF计算的精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出高阶变分公式，约束SDF满足Eikonal方程和零水平集，并在梯度跳跃集外强制线性增长。采用Ambrosio-Tortorelli型相场近似隐式描述中轴，将变分问题转化为可计算形式。使用两个神经网络分别近似SDF和相场，针对无向点云实现端到端优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个点云数据集上评估，所提方法在近场和全局均达到高精度。定量对比表明，相较于传统变分法和神经隐式函数方法，SDF误差显著降低；定性结果显示曲面重建更平滑，中轴附近无伪影。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过显式中轴正则化，实现了高精度全局SDF学习，为点云曲面重建提供了新思路。框架可扩展至其他几何学习任务。未来工作可探索更高效的相场求解策略及适应噪声点云。

title: ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding
abstract: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is constrained by the cost of accessing and processing the Key-Value (KV) cache. Despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning, as incorporating values incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. Rather than replacing KV selection, ART dynamically terminates redundant KV traversal on top of existing dense or sparse attention policies. We introduce a stability-based criterion that monitors both magnitude and directional changes of intermediate attention outputs, and provide a theoretical characterization of the resulting truncation error. Experiments on LongBench and RULER Needle-in-a-Haystack tasks show that ART increases the generation throughput of existing KV-cache methods by up to 20%, without compromising the quality of the results.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ART，一种轻量级运行时机制，通过动态终止冗余KV块遍历加速LLM解码，提升吞吐量而不影响质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型长上下文解码受限于KV缓存的访问和处理开销。现有KV管理方法多采用仅针对键的剪枝，因为引入值会带来额外开销。然而注意力输出依赖于键和值的联合，因此关键剪枝可能不够精确。需要一种轻量级方法在维持生成质量的同时减少冗余KV访问。
light_analysis.method: ART在kernel执行期间跟踪累积注意力输出，基于稳定性判据（监控中间输出的幅度和方向变化）判断后续贡献是否可忽略，从而动态终止KV块访问。该方法可叠加于现有密集或稀疏注意力策略之上，而非替代KV选择。同时提供理论截断误差分析。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench和RULER Needle-in-a-Haystack任务上，ART使现有KV缓存方法的生成吞吐量提升高达20%，且不牺牲结果质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: ART通过运行时终止冗余KV遍历，在不影响生成质量的前提下显著提升LLM解码效率。其轻量级特性和理论保证使其易于集成到现有系统中。未来可探索更精细的终止条件或其他注意力机制变体。

title: MedVeriSeg: Teaching LISA-Like Medical Segmentation Models to Verify Query Validity Without Extra Training
abstract: Despite recent progress in text-prompt-based medical image segmentation, existing LISA-like MLLM-based methods typically generate masks regardless of whether the target specified in the query is present, leading to hallucinated segmentation. In this work, we propose MedVeriSeg, a training-free query verification framework that enables LISA-like medical segmentation models to reject false segmentation queries. MedVeriSeg first quantifies the response quality between the [SEG] token and image features through a Similarity Response Quality Scoring Module. To further improve robustness, it employs a Lightweight Routed Multi-Agent Verification Module, which fuses quantitative score evidence with qualitative agent evidence to comprehensively verify the validity of the query. To support systematic evaluation, we construct MedVeriSeg-Bench, a benchmark designed for query verification in medical image segmentation. Experimental results demonstrate that MedVeriSeg effectively identifies false segmentation queries and reduces hallucinated segmentation, while maintaining a high acceptance rate for valid queries, thereby largely preserving the segmentation utility of LISA-like medical segmentation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的查询验证框架MedVeriSeg，使LISA-like医疗分割模型能够拒绝虚假查询，减少幻觉分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于文本提示的医疗图像分割方法（如LISA-like模型）在查询目标不存在时仍生成掩码，导致幻觉分割。这一问题严重影响模型可靠性，但现有方法缺乏有效的查询验证机制。本文旨在解决这一实际需求，即在不增加训练成本的前提下，赋予模型判断查询有效性的能力，从而避免不必要的错误分割输出。
light_analysis.method: MedVeriSeg包含两个核心模块：一是相似性响应质量评分模块，通过量化[SEG]令牌与图像特征之间的响应质量获得分数证据；二是轻量级路由多智能体验证模块，融合定量分数证据与定性智能体证据，对查询有效性进行全面验证。整个框架无需额外训练，直接应用于预训练的LISA-like模型。为支持评估，构建了专用基准MedVeriSeg-Bench。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MedVeriSeg能够有效识别虚假分割查询，显著减少幻觉分割现象。同时，对有效查询保持高接受率，从而在提升模型可靠性的前提下，尽量保留原有分割功能。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出该方法在基准测试中取得了良好效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedVeriSeg为LISA-like医疗分割模型提供了一种无需训练的查询验证方案，有效解决了幻觉分割问题，提高了模型在临床场景中的可信度。其训练免费的特性便于集成到现有系统中。未来可考虑将该框架扩展到其他类型的多模态理解任务，或结合更复杂的智能体机制进一步提升验证准确性。

title: S3Mem: Structured Spatiotemporal Scene-Event Memory for Long-Horizon Interactive Question Answering
abstract: Long-horizon memory question answering often requires sparse evidence from heterogeneous histories, including events, object states, visual observations, temporal relations, and causal steps. Existing memory interfaces expand reader context, retrieve semantically related chunks, or expose graph neighborhoods, but they are not explicitly designed to select compact evidence for a fixed reader. We propose Structured Spatiotemporal Scene--Event Memory (S3Mem), a query-time memory interface that writes textual, visual, and agent-use histories into structured scene--event units and routes compact evidence packs to the reader. Its router scores candidate units, query anchors, and anchor--support links, enabling both single-hop selection and short multi-hop evidence chains without reader fine-tuning or test-time training. Across LoCoMo, EMemBench Visual Games, and AMA-Bench, S3Mem provides a strong score--token trade-off, with the clearest gains on localized event, state, temporal, causal, or provenance evidence. On LoCoMo, S3Mem reaches \(0.48\) F1 and \(0.40\) BLEU with (1{,}073) evidence tokens per question, about \(15.8\times\) fewer than the LoCoMo reference. On EMemBench Visual Games, it obtains the best F1 and second-best accuracy with only \(189\)tokens.On AMA-Bench, it is not the highest-scoring method, but remains competitive while using the fewest reader-visible evidence tokens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S3Mem，一种查询时的结构化时空场景-事件记忆接口，通过紧凑证据路由提升长时交互问答性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 长时记忆问答需从异质历史中稀疏证据，现有方法扩展上下文、检索语义块或暴露图邻域，但未明确为固定读者设计紧凑证据选择，导致效率或精度欠佳。
light_analysis.method: S3Mem将文本、视觉和代理历史写入结构化场景-事件单元，通过路由模块评分候选单元、查询锚点和锚-支持链接，实现单跳和短链多跳证据路由，无需微调或训练。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo上F1 0.48、BLEU 0.40，证据token 1073（减少15.8倍）；EMemBench Visual Games最佳F1和次优准确率，仅189 token；AMA-Bench竞争力强且token最少。
light_analysis.conclusion: S3Mem在局部事件、状态、时间、因果和来源证据上显著提升，实现高效证据选择，适用于长时交互问答，未来可拓展多模态场景。

title: AI generates well-liked but templatic empathic responses
abstract: Recent research shows that greater numbers of people are turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) for emotional support, and that people rate LLM responses as more empathic than human-written responses. We suggest a reason for this success: LLMs have learned and consistently deploy a well-liked template for expressing empathy. We develop a taxonomy of 10 empathic language "tactics" that include validating someone's feelings and paraphrasing, and apply this taxonomy to characterize the language that people and LLMs produce when writing empathic responses. Across a set of 2 studies comparing a total of n = 3,265 AI-generated (by six models) and n = 1,290 human-written responses, we find that LLM responses are highly formulaic at a discourse functional level. We discovered a template -- a structured sequence of tactics -- that matches between 83--90% of LLM responses (and 60--83\% in a held out sample), and when those are matched, covers 81--92% of the response. By contrast, human-written responses are more diverse. We end with a discussion of implications for the future of AI-generated empathy.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大型语言模型生成共情回复时高度模板化，提出一种共情语言策略分类法并验证其模板匹配率高达90%。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管人们越来越依赖LLM获取情感支持，且LLM的共情回复评价优于人类，但其高评价背后的原因尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对LLM共情语言模式的结构化分析，无法解释其为何受欢迎以及潜在问题。
light_analysis.method: 开发包含10种共情语言策略的分类法（如情感验证、释义等），对6个LLM模型生成的3265条回复和人类写的1290条回复进行对比分析。通过策略序列匹配发现LLM回复呈现高度模板化结构，匹配率83-90%，覆盖回复内容的81-92%。
light_analysis.result: LLM回复中83-90%匹配特定模板序列（人类仅60-83%），模板覆盖81-92%的回复内容。人类回复策略序列更多样，而LLM回复高度公式化，表明其高共情评价可能源于稳定运用受青睐的模板。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM通过一致运用受欢迎的共情模板获得高评价，但模板化回复可能缺乏人类共情的多样性和自然性。该发现对AI情感支持系统的设计具有警示意义，需平衡模板效率与真实共情表达。

title: Energy-Regularized Spatial Masking: A Novel Approach to Enhancing Robustness and Interpretability in Vision Models
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks achieve remarkable performance by exhaustively processing dense spatial feature maps, yet this brute-force strategy introduces significant computational redundancy and encourages reliance on spurious background correlations. As a result, modern vision models remain brittle and difficult to interpret. We propose Energy-Regularized Spatial Masking (ERSM), a novel framework that reformulates feature selection as a differentiable energy minimization problem. By embedding a lightweight Energy-Mask Layer inside standard convolutional backbones, each visual token is assigned a scalar energy composed of two competing forces: an intrinsic Unary importance cost and a Pairwise spatial coherence penalty. Unlike prior pruning methods that enforce rigid sparsity budgets or rely on heuristic importance scores, ERSM allows the network to autonomously discover an optimal information-density equilibrium tailored to each input. We validate ERSM on convolutional architectures and demonstrate that it produces emergent sparsity, improved robustness to structured occlusion, and highly interpretable spatial masks, while preserving classification accuracy. Furthermore, we show that the learned energy ranking significantly outperforms magnitude-based pruning in deletion-based robustness tests, revealing ERSM as an intrinsic denoising mechanism that isolates semantic object regions without pixel-level supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出能量正则化空间掩码（ERSM），通过可微能量最小化增强视觉模型的鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有卷积网络密集处理特征图，计算冗余且易依赖背景相关，导致模型脆弱、难以解释。传统剪枝方法依赖刚性稀疏预算或启发式重要性分数，无法自适应输入。ERSM旨在让网络自主发现最优信息密度平衡。
light_analysis.method: ERSM在标准卷积骨干中嵌入轻量能量掩码层，为每个视觉token分配标量能量（Unary重要性成本+Pairwise空间一致性惩罚），将特征选择建模为可微能量最小化问题，允许网络根据输入自适应学习稀疏掩码。
light_analysis.result: 在卷积架构上，ERSM产生涌现稀疏性，提升对结构化遮挡的鲁棒性，生成高可解释性空间掩码，同时保持分类精度。能量排名在删除测试中优于基于幅度的剪枝，证明其内在去噪能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERSM无需像素级监督即可隔离语义区域，可作为内在去噪机制提升模型鲁棒性与可解释性。其自适应稀疏化策略具有广泛应用价值，未来可扩展至其他视觉架构。

title: MC-CPO: Mastery-Conditioned Constrained Policy Optimization for Pedagogically Safe Intelligent Tutoring Systems
abstract: Intelligent tutoring systems increasingly rely on reinforcement learning to personalise instruction, yet optimising for observable engagement signals can systematically decouple learner activity from genuine knowledge acquisition. Analysing over 21 million student interactions across two deployed platforms, we find engagement events without corresponding mastery gains occur in 26.5% of interactions on Junyi Academy (72,758 students) and 3.1% on XES3G5M (14,453 students, NeurIPS 2023), confirming this pattern is directly observable in deployed educational technology at scale. We introduce Mastery-Conditioned Constrained Policy Optimisation (MC-CPO), a reinforcement learning framework that addresses this problem structurally. MC-CPO conditions the admissible instructional action space on learner mastery state: a concept becomes available only when prerequisite knowledge meets a mastery threshold, yielding an action space that expands naturally as learners acquire knowledge. Pedagogical safety constraints are enforced by construction, with formal guarantees of structural prerequisite safety, primal-dual convergence, and strict dominance over post-hoc filtering. MC-CPO is the only method to reduce reward hacking severity across all conditions. Mean per-episode mastery gain increases by 18.3% on Junyi Academy and 54.0% on XES3G5M relative to all baselines, while competitive engagement performance is maintained. These results support structural constraint modelling as a principled foundation for safer adaptive instructional policies in deployed tutoring systems.
comment: 35 pages, 8 figures. v2: Major revision adding real-world validation on Junyi Academy (16.2M interactions, 72,758 students) and XES3G5M (NeurIPS 2023, 5.1M interactions, 14,453 students). Revised title and abstract. Submitted to Computers and Education: Artificial Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出MC-CPO框架，通过掌握条件约束动作空间结构性地解决强化学习在智能辅导系统中奖励黑客问题，实现更安全的自适应教学策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能辅导系统使用强化学习优化可见参与信号，但可能将学习活动与真实知识获取解耦，导致奖励黑客。分析超过2100万次学生互动，发现26.5%（Junyi Academy）和3.1%（XES3G5M）的互动存在参与事件而无对应掌握增益，证实问题在真实环境中普遍存在。因此需要一种结构性方法确保教学策略安全。
light_analysis.method: MC-CPO框架基于掌握条件约束策略优化。动作空间根据学生掌握状态动态扩展：仅当先决知识达到掌握阈值时，新概念才可用。通过构造性方式强制执行教学安全约束，提供结构先决安全、原始-对偶收敛和严格优于事后过滤的形式化保证。该方法在部署的辅导系统中进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 相比所有基线，MC-CPO在Junyi Academy上将平均每回合掌握增益提升18.3%，在XES3G5M上提升54.0%，同时保持有竞争力的参与性能。该方法是唯一在所有条件下均能降低奖励黑客严重程度的方法。摘要未明确说明具体参与性能数值，但指出维持竞争性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MC-CPO通过结构约束建模为更安全的自适应教学策略提供了原则性基础，其形式化保证和实证效果表明在真实辅导系统中应用价值。局限性可能涉及掌握阈值设定等，未来可探索更细粒度的知识建模或跨领域迁移。

title: A Camera-Native Talking-Head Video Dataset for Various Computer Vision Tasks
abstract: Talking-head videos constitute a predominant content type in real-time communication, yet publicly available datasets for video processing research in this domain remain scarce and limited in signal fidelity. In this paper, we open-source a camera-native dataset of 847 talking-head recordings (approximately 212 minutes), each 15s in duration, captured from 805 participants using 446 unique consumer webcam devices in their natural environments. All recordings are stored using the FFV1 lossless codec, preserving the camera-native signal -- uncompressed (24.4%) or MJPEG-encoded (75.6%) -- without additional lossy processing. Each recording is annotated with a Mean Opinion Score (MOS) and ten perceptual quality tokens that jointly explain 64.4% of the MOS variance. From this corpus, we curate a stratified benchmarking subset of 120 clips in three content conditions: original, background blur, and background replacement. Codec efficiency evaluation across four datasets and four codecs, namely H.264, H.265, H.266, and AV1, yields VMAF BD-rate savings up to $-71.3\%$ (H.266) relative to H.264, with significant encoder$\times$dataset ($η_p^2 = .112$) and encoder$\times$content condition ($η_p^2 = .149$) interactions, demonstrating that both content type and background processing affect compression efficiency. A preliminary super-resolution evaluation with four SR models confirms that the dataset significantly affects absolute performance while preserving model rankings, demonstrating applicability beyond codec benchmarking. The dataset offers 5$\times$ the scale of the largest prior talking-head webcam dataset (847 vs. 160 clips) with lossless signal fidelity, establishing a resource for benchmarking video compression, super-resolution, quality assessment, and enhancement models in real-time communication.

light_analysis.overview: 开源一个相机原生、无损保真的谈话头视频数据集，规模是先前最大数据集的5倍，支持视频压缩、超分辨率、质量评估等任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时通信中谈话头视频普遍存在，但公开数据集稀缺且信号保真度有限。现有数据集大多经过有损压缩，无法反映相机原生质量，限制了视频处理研究（如编解码器评估、超分辨率）的准确性和泛化能力。因此，需要构建一个大规模、高保真、带有细粒度质量标注的数据集。
light_analysis.method: 从805名参与者使用446种网络摄像头在自然环境中采集847段15秒谈话头视频（共212分钟），以FFV1无损格式存储，保留原始未压缩或MJPEG编码。每段视频标注MOS和10个感知质量token（解释64.4% MOS方差），并筛选120段子集用于三种内容条件（原始、背景模糊、背景替换）。
light_analysis.result: 编解码效率评估显示H.266相比H.264的VMAF BD-rate节省达-71.3%，编码器与数据集（η_p²=0.112）及内容条件（η_p²=0.149）存在显著交互。超分辨率初步实验表明数据集影响绝对性能但保持模型排名。数据集规模为847段，是先前最大数据集的5倍，且具有无损保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集为实时通信中的视频压缩、超分辨率、质量评估及增强模型提供了大规模、高保真基准资源。其细粒度质量标注和多种内容条件有助于深入分析编解码器交互效应。未来可扩展至更多内容类型或联合其他任务。

title: Back to Point: Exploring Point-Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Anomaly Detection
abstract: Zero-shot (ZS) 3D anomaly detection is crucial for reliable industrial inspection, as it enables detecting and localizing defects without requiring any target-category training data. Existing approaches render 3D point clouds into 2D images and leverage pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for anomaly detection. However, such strategies inevitably discard geometric details and exhibit limited sensitivity to local anomalies. In this paper, we revisit intrinsic 3D representations and explore the potential of pre-trained Point-Language Models (PLMs) for ZS 3D anomaly detection. We propose BTP (Back To Point), a novel framework that effectively aligns 3D point cloud and textual embeddings. Specifically, BTP aligns multi-granularity patch features with textual representations for localized anomaly detection, while incorporating geometric descriptors to enhance sensitivity to structural anomalies. Furthermore, we introduce a joint representation learning strategy that leverages auxiliary point cloud data to improve robustness and enrich anomaly semantics. Extensive experiments on Real3D-AD and Anomaly-ShapeNet demonstrate that BTP achieves superior performance in ZS 3D anomaly detection. Code will be available at \href{https://github.com/wistful-8029/BTP-3DAD}{https://github.com/wistful-8029/BTP-3DAD}.
comment: Corrected several numerical entries due to a reporting error; the corrected values do not affect the main conclusions

light_analysis.overview: 提出BTP框架，利用预训练点-语言模型实现零样本3D异常检测，通过多粒度对齐和几何描述符提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本3D异常检测对工业检测至关重要。现有方法将3D点云渲染为2D图像并使用视觉-语言模型，但丢弃了几何细节，对局部异常敏感度低。因此，探索直接使用3D表示和预训练点-语言模型成为必要。
light_analysis.method: BTP框架通过多粒度补丁特征与文本表示对齐实现局部异常检测，并引入几何描述符增强结构异常敏感性。同时采用联合表示学习策略利用辅助点云数据提升鲁棒性和异常语义丰富性。
light_analysis.result: 在Real3D-AD和Anomaly-ShapeNet数据集上，BTP取得了优于现有方法的零样本3D异常检测性能，具体指标包括更高的检测和定位精度，但摘要未提供数值细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: BTP展示了点-语言模型在零样本3D异常检测中的潜力，为工业检测提供无需目标类别训练数据的解决方案。学术上开创了新范式，实际中可降低数据成本。未来可探索更多几何先验和模型泛化能力。

title: Reflection in the Dark: Exposing and Escaping the Black Box in Reflective Prompt Optimization
abstract: Automatic prompt optimization (APO) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving LLM performance without manual prompt engineering. Reflective APO methods such as GEPA iteratively refine prompts by diagnosing failure cases, but the optimization process remains black-box and label-free, leading to uninterpretable trajectories and systematic failure. We identify and empirically demonstrate four limitations: on GSM8K with a defective seed, GEPA degrades accuracy from 23.81% to 13.50%. We propose VISTA, a multi-agent APO framework that decouples hypothesis generation from prompt rewriting, enabling semantically labeled hypotheses, parallel minibatch verification, and interpretable optimization trace. A two-layer explore-exploit mechanism combining random restart and epsilon-greedy sampling further escapes local optima. VISTA recovers accuracy to 87.57% on the same defective seed and consistently outperforms baselines across all conditions on GSM8K and AIME2025.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VISTA多智能体框架，通过解耦假设生成与提示重写实现可解释的反思性提示优化，并引入两层探索-利用机制提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动提示优化中，反思性方法如GEPA以黑盒方式进行优化，缺乏可解释性，且无标签导致优化轨迹不可理解，容易陷入局部最优。例如在GSM8K上使用缺陷种子时GEPA准确率从23.81%降至13.50%。因此需要一种可解释、鲁棒的优化方法来暴露和逃离黑箱。
light_analysis.method: VISTA是一个多智能体APO框架，将假设生成与提示重写解耦，产生语义标签化的假设，支持并行小批量验证，提供可解释的优化轨迹。采用两层探索-利用机制：随机重启和epsilon-greedy采样，帮助逃离局部最优，确保优化过程透明且高效。
light_analysis.result: 在相同缺陷种子上，VISTA将GSM8K准确率从GEPA的13.50%恢复至87.57%，并在所有条件（包括GSM8K和AIME2025数据集）下一致优于基线，证明了其有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了反思性提示优化的黑箱问题，并提出VISTA框架实现可解释、高效的优化。该工作提升了自动提示优化的透明度和鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步拓展至其他任务和更复杂的优化场景。

title: AgroOmni: A Large-Scale Multi-view Agricultural Dataset for Cross-Scale Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Modern agricultural data is sourced from diverse platforms and spans multiple spatial scales, ranging from ground-level close-up photography to Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) aerial observation and satellite remote sensing imagery. Accordingly, agricultural multimodal reasoning demands robust cross-scale spatial understanding. However, due to the lack of multi-view agricultural benchmark datasets, existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibit severe ground-level bias, which leads to scale confusion then semantic collapse in agricultural perception tasks, such as misinterpreting farmland imagery as walls or floors. To address this, we introduce AgroOmni, a large-scale multi-view training corpus with 288K Visual Question Answering pairs covering 56 specialized task categories across 14 task types, designed to capture diverse scales in modern precision agriculture. Built on this dataset, we propose AgroNVILA, which achieves a new state-of-the-art of 62.32% on the AgroMind benchmark (+15.03% over GPT-5.2), effectively mitigating the multi-view cross-scale gap for holistic agricultural understanding. Diagnostic evaluations on AgMMU further reveal an inherent heterogeneity between macro-priors and micro-diagnostics through constrained zero-shot performance. Meanwhile, even minimal fine-tuning leads to a dramatic performance gain of AgroNVILA on AgMMU, strongly demonstrating its generalization capability empowered by AgroOmni. Full training scripts are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AgroOmni-6510.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模多视角农业数据集AgroOmni及模型AgroNVILA，解决跨尺度多模态推理中的尺度混淆问题，在农业理解基准上取得最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代农业数据来自地面、无人机和卫星等多平台，存在跨尺度空间理解挑战。现有多模态大语言模型缺乏多视角农业基准，导致地面视角偏差，出现尺度混淆和语义坍塌，如将农田影像误判为墙壁或地板。为此需要构建多尺度、多视角的农业数据集来弥合此差距。
light_analysis.method: 构建AgroOmni数据集，包含288K视觉问答对，覆盖14种任务类型的56个专业任务类别，捕捉精准农业中的多样化尺度。基于此提出AgroNVILA模型，通过多视图跨尺度训练，增强对宏观和微观特征的联合理解，减少尺度混淆。
light_analysis.result: 在AgroMind基准上，AgroNVILA达到62.32%的新最高准确率，比GPT-5.2提升15.03%。在AgMMU诊断评估中，零样本性能受限于宏观与微观异质性，但最小微调后性能大幅提升，验证了AgroOmni带来的强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgroOmni数据集显著缓解多视角跨尺度差距，推动农业全貌理解。AgroNVILA展示了优异泛化性，但零样本性能显示宏观与微观信息异质性仍有待探索。未来可扩展更多传感器模态，并研究跨尺度特征融合策略。

title: PicoSAM3: Real-Time In-Sensor Region-of-Interest Segmentation
abstract: Real-time, on-device segmentation is critical for latency-sensitive and privacy-aware applications such as smart glasses and Internet-of-Things devices. We introduce PicoSAM3, a lightweight promptable visual segmentation model optimized for edge and in-sensor execution, including deployment on the Sony IMX500 vision sensor. PicoSAM3 has 1.3M parameters and combines a dense CNN architecture with region of interest prompt encoding, Efficient Channel Attention, and knowledge distillation from SAM2 and SAM3. On COCO and LVIS, PicoSAM3 achieves 65.45% and 64.01% mIoU, respectively, outperforming existing SAM-based and edge-oriented baselines at similar or lower complexity. The INT8 quantized model preserves accuracy with negligible degradation while enabling real-time in-sensor inference at 11.82ms latency on the IMX500, fully complying with its memory and operator constraints. Ablation studies show that distillation from large SAM models yields up to +14.5% mIoU improvement over supervised training and demonstrate that high-quality, spatially flexible promptable segmentation is feasible directly at the sensor level.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级、可提示的实时分割模型PicoSAM3，可在IMX500传感器上执行，通过知识蒸馏和注意力机制实现高性能低延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能眼镜和物联网设备对低延迟、保护隐私的实时分割需求迫切，但现有模型计算量大，难以部署在边缘或传感器上。Vision Transformer参数多，不适合资源受限场景。PicoSAM3旨在实现传感器内的感兴趣区域分割，解决延迟和隐私问题。
light_analysis.method: PicoSAM3采用1.3M参数的密集CNN架构，结合区域兴趣提示编码、高效通道注意力和来自SAM2/SAM3的知识蒸馏。在COCO和LVIS数据集上训练，最终INT8量化部署于Sony IMX500视觉传感器，满足内存和算子约束。
light_analysis.result: PicoSAM3在COCO上mIoU 65.45%，LVIS上64.01%，优于同类SAM基线和边缘模型。INT8量化后精度几乎无损失，在IMX500上推理延迟仅11.82ms。蒸馏相比有监督训练提升高达14.5% mIoU。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明在传感器级别实现高质量、空间灵活的提示分割是可行的，为边缘AI提供高效方案。未来可扩展至更多传感器和实时应用，局限性可能在于泛化到其他任务需调整。

title: Integral Formulas for Vector Signal Tensor Products
abstract: We derive integral formulas that simplify the Vector Signal Tensor Product recently introduced by Xie et al., which generalizes the Gaunt tensor product to anti-symmetric couplings. In particular, we obtain explicit closed-form expressions for the anti-symmetric analogues of the Gaunt coefficients. This enables us to simulate the Clebsch-Gordan tensor product using a single Vector Signal Tensor Product, yielding up to a $9\times$ reduction in the required tensor product evaluations. Our results enable efficient and practical implementations of the Vector Signal Tensor Product, paving the way for applications of this generalization of Gaunt Tensor Products in $\mathrm{SO}(3)$-equivariant neural networks. Moreover, we discuss how the Gaunt and the Vector Signal Tensor Products allow to control the expressivity-runtime tradeoff associated with the usual Clebsch-Gordan Tensor Products. Finally, we investigate low rank decompositions of the normalizations of the considered tensor products in view of their use in equivariant neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出积分公式简化向量信号张量积，实现Clebsch-Gordan张量积的单一模拟，减少9倍计算量。
light_analysis.motivation: 向量信号张量积推广了Gaunt张量积到反对称耦合，但计算复杂。现有Clebsch-Gordan张量积计算量大，需要高效实现以应用于SO(3)-等变神经网络。
light_analysis.method: 推导积分公式获得反对称Gaunt系数的显式闭式表达式，用单一向量信号张量积模拟Clebsch-Gordan张量积，并讨论低秩分解用于归一化。
light_analysis.result: 实现高达9倍的张量积评估减少，提供了高效实用的向量信号张量积实现，适用于SO(3)-等变神经网络。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为Gaunt张量积在等变神经网络中的应用铺平道路，控制表达性-运行时间权衡，低秩分解可进一步优化。

title: A Baseline Study and Benchmark for Few-Shot Open-Set Action Recognition with Feature Residual Discrimination
abstract: Few-Shot Action Recognition (FS-AR) has shown promising results but is often limited by a closed-set assumption that fails in real-world open-set scenarios. While Few-Shot Open-Set (FSOS) recognition is well-established for images, its extension to spatio-temporal video data remains underexplored. To address this, we propose an architectural extension based on a Feature-Residual Discriminator (FR-Disc), adapting previous work on skeletal data to the more complex video domain. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that while common open-set techniques provide only marginal gains, our FR-Disc significantly enhances unknown rejection capabilities without compromising closed-set accuracy, setting a new state-of-the-art for FSOS-AR. The project website, code, and benchmark are available at: https://hsp-iit.github.io/fsosar/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于特征残差判别器的少样本开集动作识别方法，首次将开集识别扩展到视频领域，并建立了基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本动作识别在闭集假设下表现良好，但现实场景中常遇到开集问题，即测试时可能出现训练未见过的类别。现有方法多针对图像数据，对时空视频数据探索不足。本文旨在解决视频领域少样本开集动作识别的问题，填补研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出特征残差判别器（FR-Disc），作为对现有少样本动作识别架构的扩展。该方法基于骨骼数据工作，通过残差特征判别未知类别。在五个数据集（包括Kinetics、HMDB51等）上进行实验，与多种开集技术对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，常见开集技术仅带来微小提升，而FR-Disc显著增强了未知类别的拒绝能力（具体指标摘要未明确说明），同时不降低闭集准确率，达到少样本开集动作识别的最新性能。项目网站、代码和基准已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究少样本开集动作识别，提出有效的FR-Disc方法，为视频开集识别提供了新思路。实验验证了方法的有效性，建立了基准。未来可探索更复杂的视频特征或结合其他开集策略。

title: CRAG: Can 3D Generative Models Help 3D Assembly?
abstract: Most existing 3D assembly methods treat the problem as pure pose estimation, rearranging observed parts via rigid transformations. In contrast, human assembly naturally couples structural reasoning with holistic shape inference. Inspired by this intuition, we reformulate 3D assembly as a joint problem of assembly and generation. We show that these two processes are mutually reinforcing: assembly provides part-level structural priors for generation, while generation injects holistic shape context that resolves ambiguities in assembly. Unlike prior methods that cannot synthesize missing geometry, we propose CRAG, which simultaneously generates plausible complete shapes and predicts poses for input parts. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across in-the-wild objects with diverse geometries, varying part counts, and missing pieces. Project Page: https://ai4ce.github.io/CRAG/

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRAG，将3D组装与生成联合，实现同时生成完整形状和预测部件位姿，相互增强以处理缺失几何信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D组装方法仅视为纯位姿估计，通过刚性变换重排部件，缺乏整体形状推理，且无法合成缺失几何。受人类组装中结构推理与形状推理结合的启发，提出联合方法以解决歧义和缺失问题。
light_analysis.method: CRAG框架将组装与生成联合建模：组装提供部件级结构先验指导生成，生成注入整体形状上下文辅助位姿预测。模型同时学习生成完整形状和预测部件位姿，通过相互增强提升性能。实验涵盖不同几何、部件数和缺失情况的对象。
light_analysis.result: 在非结构化对象上达到最先进性能，包括不同几何形状、部件数量和缺失部件的情况。与仅位姿估计方法相比，CRAG能合成缺失几何并准确预测位姿，展示了泛化性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRAG通过联合组装与生成，解决了传统方法无法处理缺失几何的问题，验证了生成模型在3D组装中的有效性。未来可扩展到更复杂的装配任务和交互场景，具有机器人操作等应用价值。

title: Polaffini: A feature-based approach for robust affine and polyaffine image registration
abstract: In this work we present Polaffini, a robust and versatile framework for anatomically grounded registration. Medical image registration is dominated by intensity-based registration methods that rely on surrogate measures of alignment quality. In contrast, feature-based approaches that operate by identifying explicit anatomical correspondences, while more desirable in theory, have largely fallen out of favor due to the challenges of reliably extracting features. However, such challenges are now significantly overcome thanks to recent advances in deep learning, which provide pre-trained segmentation models capable of instantly delivering reliable, fine-grained anatomical delineations. We aim to demonstrate that these advances can be leveraged to create new anatomically-grounded image registration algorithms. To this end, we propose Polaffini, which obtains, from these segmented regions, anatomically grounded feature points with 1-to-1 correspondence in a particularly simple way: extracting their centroids. These enable efficient global and local affine matching via closed-form solutions. Those are used to produce an overall transformation ranging from affine to polyaffine with tunable smoothness. Polyaffine transformations can have many more degrees of freedom than affine ones allowing for finer alignment, and their embedding in the log-Euclidean framework ensures diffeomorphic properties. Polaffini has applications both for standalone registration and as pre-alignment for subsequent non-linear registration, and we evaluate it against popular intensity-based registration techniques. Results demonstrate that Polaffini outperforms competing methods in terms of structural alignment and provides improved initialisation for downstream non-linear registration. Polaffini is fast, robust, and accurate, making it particularly well-suited for integration into medical image processing pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polaffini框架，利用深度学习分割结果提取解剖特征点质心，实现鲁棒的仿射和多项式仿射图像配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像配准中，基于强度的配准方法依赖对齐质量的替代度量，而理论上更优的基于特征的方法因特征提取困难而少用。近年来深度学习分割模型可可靠提取精细解剖结构，为克服此挑战提供了可能。本文旨在利用这些进展创建新的解剖学图像配准算法。
light_analysis.method: Polaffini从深度学习分割区域提取质心作为具有一一对应关系的解剖特征点。利用这些点通过闭式解实现高效的全局和局部仿射匹配，进而生成从仿射到多项式仿射的变换，其光滑度可调。多项式仿射变换自由度更高，通过嵌入对数-欧几里得框架保证微分同胚性质。
light_analysis.result: 评估表明，Polaffini在结构对齐方面优于流行的基于强度的配准方法，并为后续非线性配准提供更好的初始化。该方法快速、鲁棒、精确，适合集成到医学图像处理流水线中。具体定量数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polaffini通过利用深度学习分割特征，复兴了基于特征的配准方法，实现了高效且解剖上合理的配准。其闭式解和可调光滑度的多项式仿射变换兼具鲁棒性与灵活性。未来可进一步优化特征提取或扩展到更多应用场景。

title: Operationalising the Superficial Alignment Hypothesis via Task Complexity
abstract: The superficial alignment hypothesis (SAH) posits that large language models learn most of their knowledge during pre-training, and that post-training merely surfaces this knowledge. The SAH, however, lacks a precise definition, which has led to (i) different and seemingly orthogonal arguments supporting it, and (ii) important critiques to it. We propose a new metric called task complexity: the length of the shortest program that achieves a target performance on a task. In this framework, the SAH simply claims that pre-trained models drastically reduce the complexity of achieving high performance on many tasks. Our definition unifies prior arguments supporting the SAH, interpreting them as different strategies to find such short programs. Experimentally, we estimate the task complexity of mathematical reasoning, machine translation, and instruction following; we then show that these complexities can be remarkably low when conditioned on a pre-trained model. Further, we find that pre-training enables access to strong performances on our tasks, but it can require programs of gigabytes of length to access them. Post-training, on the other hand, collapses the complexity of reaching this same performance by several orders of magnitude. Overall, our results highlight that task adaptation often requires surprisingly little information -- often just a few kilobytes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出任务复杂度度量，将表面对齐假说操作化，统一了先验论点并量化后训练的作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 表面对齐假说（SAH）认为大语言模型在预训练中习得大部分知识，后训练仅是表面化这些知识。但SAH缺乏精确定义，导致不同的支持和批评。本文旨在解决SAH定义模糊的问题，通过引入任务复杂度这一新度量来操作化SAH，从而统一先前的支持论点并回应批评。
light_analysis.method: 定义任务复杂度为达到目标任务性能的最短程序长度。在此框架下，SAH声称预训练模型大幅降低许多任务达到高性能的复杂度。实验估计了数学推理、机器翻译和指令遵循的任务复杂度。使用预训练模型作为条件，通过搜索或推理找到短程序，并比较预训练和后训练阶段的复杂度差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在预训练模型基础上，数学推理、机器翻译和指令遵循的任务复杂度非常低，通常仅需几千字节的程序。然而，预训练模型本身需要千兆字节长度的程序才能访问强性能。后训练则将复杂度降低几个数量级，凸显了任务适应所需信息之少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过任务复杂度度量成功操作化了表面对齐假说，统一了先验论点并量化了后训练的贡献。结果表明任务适应通常需要极少信息，支持了SAH的核心观点。该工作为理解预训练与后训练的作用提供了理论框架，未来可扩展至更多任务和模型。

title: SurveyLens: A Discipline-Aware Benchmark for Automatic Survey Generation
abstract: Automatic Survey Generation (ASG) aims to produce comprehensive literature surveys by retrieving, organizing, and synthesizing academic papers. Despite rapid progress in specialized ASG frameworks and Deep Research agents, existing evaluations largely center on Computer Science or rely on generic criteria, leaving it unclear whether current systems satisfy the survey standards of diverse disciplines. We introduce SurveyLens, the first discipline-aware ASG benchmark. SurveyLens comprises SurveyLens-1k, a curated dataset of 1,000 human-written surveys across 10 disciplines, and a dual-lens framework that combines discipline-aware rubric scoring with reference-based alignment to human-written surveys. Evaluating 11 state-of-the-art systems across vanilla LLMs, ASG systems, and Deep Research agents, we find that Deep Research agents are the only paradigm robust across all 10 disciplines, ASG systems lead on structural planning, and all paradigms remain weak on reference quality, providing practical guidance for discipline-specific tool selection and future ASG design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个学科感知的自动调查生成基准SurveyLens，包含跨10个学科的数据集和双镜头评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动调查生成评估多集中于计算机科学或使用通用标准，无法验证系统是否满足不同学科的调查撰写规范。不同学科在文献综述的结构、引用风格和深度上存在显著差异，亟需一个覆盖多学科的基准来指导系统选择和设计。
light_analysis.method: 构建SurveyLens-1k数据集，包含1,000篇人工撰写的调查，均匀分布在10个学科。开发双镜头评估框架：学科感知评分（rubric scoring）衡量对学科规范的遵循程度，参考对齐（reference-based alignment）评估与人类撰写调查的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 评估了11个最新系统（包括基础LLM、ASG系统和Deep Research代理）。Deep Research代理是唯一在所有10个学科上表现鲁棒的范式；ASG系统在结构规划任务上领先；所有范式在引用质量上表现较弱。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurveyLens填补了多学科ASG评估的空白。实验结果为不同学科选择合适工具提供了实证依据，并指出提升引用质量是未来ASG系统设计的关键方向。

title: SciFlow-Bench: Evaluating Structure-Aware Scientific Diagram Generation via Inverse Parsing
abstract: Scientific diagrams convey explicit structural information, yet modern text-to-image models often produce visually plausible but structurally incorrect results. Existing benchmarks either rely on image-centric or subjective metrics insensitive to structure, or evaluate intermediate symbolic representations rather than final rendered images, leaving pixel-based diagram generation underexplored. We introduce SciFlow-Bench, a structure-first benchmark for evaluating scientific diagram generation directly from pixel-level outputs. Built from real scientific PDFs, SciFlow-Bench pairs each source framework figure with a canonical ground-truth graph and evaluates models as black-box image generators under a closed-loop, round-trip protocol that inverse-parses generated diagram images back into structured graphs for comparison. This design enforces evaluation by structural recoverability rather than visual similarity alone, and is enabled by a hierarchical multi-agent system that coordinates planning, perception, and structural reasoning. Experiments show that preserving structural correctness remains a fundamental challenge, particularly for diagrams with complex topology, underscoring the need for structure-aware evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SciFlow-Bench，一种基于逆向解析的结构感知科学图表生成评估基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型常生成视觉合理但结构错误的科学图表，而现有基准依赖图像中心或主观指标，或仅评估中间符号表示而非最终渲染图像，缺乏对像素级图表结构的评估。SciFlow-Bench 从真实科学PDF中构建，每对源框架图与规范真值图，通过闭环逆向解析协议将生成图转为结构化图进行比较，强调结构可恢复性而非视觉相似性。
light_analysis.method: SciFlow-Bench 采用闭环往返协议，通过逆向解析将生成的图表图像解析为结构化图，并与真值图比较。其核心是分层多智能体系统，协调规划、感知和结构推理。数据集源自真实科学PDF，每对源框架图与规范真值图绑定，评估模型作为黑盒图像生成器。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，保持结构正确性仍是根本挑战，尤其对于拓扑复杂的图表。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但指出现有模型在结构恢复方面表现不足，凸显了结构感知评估的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SciFlow-Bench 填补了科学图表生成中像素级结构评估的空白。其结构优先的逆向解析方法可有效检测模型的结构缺陷，推动生成模型向结构感知方向发展。未来可扩展至更复杂图表类型，并改进多智能体系统的效率。

title: A Graphop Analysis of Graph Neural Networks on Sparse Graphs: Generalization and Universal Approximation
abstract: Generalization and approximation capabilities of message passing graph neural networks (MPNNs) are often studied by defining a compact metric on a space of input graphs under which MPNNs are equicontinuous. Such analyses are of two varieties: 1) when the metric space includes graphs of unbounded sizes, the theory is only appropriate for dense graphs, and, 2) when studying sparse graphs, the metric space only includes graphs of uniformly bounded size. In this work, we present a unified approach, defining a compact metric on the space of graphs of all sizes, both sparse and dense, under which MPNNs are equicontinuous. This leads to more powerful universal approximation theorems and generalization bounds than previous works. The theory is based on, and extends, a recent approach to graph limit theory called graphop analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图算子(graphop)分析的统一框架，定义包含所有规模图的紧度量空间，证明MPNN的等度连续性，从而改进稀疏图的泛化与逼近理论。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究通常将图分为密集图和稀疏图两类分析：密集图理论允许图规模无界但仅适用于密集情况；稀疏图理论则限制图规模一致有界。缺乏一个统一的理论框架来处理任意规模的图（包括稀疏和密集），导致泛化界和逼近定理的适用范围受限。本文旨在解决这一鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 采用并扩展了图算子（graphop）分析这一图极限理论方法。通过定义一个新的紧度量空间，该空间包含所有大小的图（稀疏和密集），并在此空间上证明消息传递图神经网络（MPNN）是等度连续的。该度量空间基于图算子，能够统一处理不同稀疏性的图结构。
light_analysis.result: 该统一框架导出比先前工作更强的普适逼近定理和泛化界。具体地，在包含无界大小稀疏图的空间中，MPNN仍能保持等度连续性，从而在理论上保证了更优的泛化性能。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过图算子分析为图神经网络的泛化与逼近提供了统一的理论基础，填补了稀疏与密集图理论之间的空白。该工作不仅具有理论价值，还可指导实际中更鲁棒的图神经网络设计。未来可探索图算子框架在其他图学习任务中的应用。

title: Foundation Inference Models for Ordinary Differential Equations
abstract: Ordinary differential equations (ODEs) are central to scientific modelling, but inferring their vector fields from noisy trajectories remains challenging. Current approaches such as symbolic regression, Gaussian process (GP) regression, and Neural ODEs often require complex training pipelines and substantial machine learning expertise, or they depend strongly on system-specific prior knowledge. We propose FIM-ODE, a pretrained Foundation Inference Model that amortises low-dimensional ODE inference by predicting the vector field directly from noisy trajectory data in a single forward pass. We pretrain FIM-ODE on a prior distribution over ODEs with low-degree polynomial vector fields and represent the target field with neural operators. FIM-ODE achieves strong zero-shot performance, matching and often improving upon ODEFormer, a recent pretrained symbolic baseline, across a range of regimes despite using a simpler pretraining prior distribution. Pretraining also provides a strong initialisation for finetuning, enabling fast and stable adaptation that outperforms modern neural and GP baselines without requiring machine learning expertise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FIM-ODE，一种预训练的基础推理模型，通过单次前向传播从噪声轨迹直接预测常微分方程向量场，实现零样本和微调性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 从噪声轨迹推断常微分方程向量场是科学建模的核心问题，但现有方法如符号回归、高斯过程回归和神经常微分方程存在缺陷：要么需要复杂的训练流程和机器学习专业知识，要么强烈依赖系统特定的先验知识。这限制了方法的泛化性和易用性。因此，需要一种能够高效、通用地从噪声数据中推断向量场的模型，降低对专家知识的依赖。
light_analysis.method: FIM-ODE采用预训练的基础推理模型架构，基于低阶多项式向量场的常微分方程先验分布进行预训练。模型使用神经算子表示目标向量场，支持单次前向传播直接从噪声轨迹数据预测向量场。预训练后，模型可以零样本推断，也可通过微调快速适应新系统。预训练先验比现有符号基线更简单，但性能更强。
light_analysis.result: FIM-ODE在零样本设置下匹配并常优于近期预训练符号基线ODEFormer，尽管使用了更简单的先验分布。微调后，FIM-ODE实现了快速且稳定的适应，性能超越现代神经（如Neural ODE）和高斯过程回归基线，且无需机器学习专业知识。实验涵盖了多种动态系统，证明了其泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: FIM-ODE通过预训练基础模型将常微分方程推断转化为单次前向传播，显著降低了计算复杂度和机器学习门槛。零样本和微调性能均优于现有方法，展示了预训练在科学推理中的潜力。未来可扩展至更高维系统或更复杂的向量场，但当前基于多项式先验可能限制对非线性系统的泛化。

title: Optimizing Few-Step Generation with Adaptive Matching Distillation
abstract: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) is a powerful acceleration paradigm, yet its stability is often compromised in Forbidden Zone, regions where the real teacher provides unreliable guidance while the fake teacher exerts insufficient repulsive force. In this work, we propose a unified optimization framework that reinterprets prior art as implicit strategies to avoid these corrupted regions. Based on this insight, we introduce Adaptive Matching Distillation (AMD), a self-correcting mechanism that utilizes reward proxies to explicitly detect and escape Forbidden Zones. AMD dynamically prioritizes corrective gradients via structural signal decomposition and introduces Repulsive Landscape Sharpening to enforce steep energy barriers against failure mode collapse. Extensive experiments across image and video generation tasks (e.g., SDXL, Wan2.1) and rigorous benchmarks (e.g., VBench, GenEval) demonstrate that AMD significantly enhances sample fidelity and training robustness. For instance, AMD improves the HPSv2 score on SDXL from 30.64 to 31.25, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. These findings validate that explicitly rectifying optimization trajectories within Forbidden Zones is essential for pushing the performance ceiling of few-step generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应匹配蒸馏框架，通过显式检测和规避禁区优化少步生成模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布匹配蒸馏虽能加速生成，但常受限于'禁区'——真实教师提供不可靠指导而虚假教师斥力不足，导致稳定性受损。现有方法隐式回避此问题，效果有限。因此需显式识别并逃离禁区以提升少步生成模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应匹配蒸馏，利用奖励代理显式检测禁区，通过结构信号分解动态优先修正梯度，并引入排斥景观锐化构建陡峭能垒防止模式崩塌。在图像（SDXL）和视频（Wan2.1）生成任务上验证，覆盖VBench、GenEval等基准。
light_analysis.result: 在多个生成任务上显著提升样本保真度和训练鲁棒性，例如将SDXL的HPSv2评分从30.64提升至31.25，超越现有最优基线。证实显式修正禁区优化轨迹是提升少步生成模型性能上限的关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMD框架通过自纠正机制有效解决蒸馏中的禁区问题，为少步生成提供统一优化视角。实验证明了其在图像和视频生成中的有效性。未来可探索更高效的奖励代理设计或扩展到其他生成架构。

title: From Conflict to Consensus: Boosting Medical Reasoning via Multi-Round Agentic RAG
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit high reasoning capacity in medical question-answering, but their tendency to produce hallucinations and outdated knowledge poses critical risks in healthcare fields. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates these issues, existing methods rely on noisy token-level signals and lack the multi-round refinement required for complex reasoning. In this paper, we propose MA-RAG (Multi-Round Agentic RAG), a framework that facilitates test-time scaling for complex medical reasoning by iteratively evolving both external evidence and internal reasoning history within an agentic refinement loop. At each round, the agent transforms semantic conflict among candidate responses into actionable queries to retrieve external evidence, while optimizing history reasoning traces to mitigate long-context degradation. MA-RAG extends the self-consistency principle by leveraging the lack of consistency as a proactive signal for multi-round agentic reasoning and retrieval, and mirrors a boosting mechanism that iteratively minimizes the residual error toward a stable, high-fidelity medical consensus. Extensive evaluations across 7 medical Q&A benchmarks show that MA-RAG consistently surpasses competitive inference-time scaling and RAG baselines, delivering substantial +6.8 points on average accuracy over the backbone model. Our code is available at https://github.com/NJU-RL/MA-RAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MA-RAG框架，通过多轮智能体精炼循环，迭代优化外部证据和内部推理历史，提升医学推理的准确性和一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在医学问答中具有高推理能力，但易产生幻觉和过时知识。检索增强生成虽能缓解这些问题，但现有方法依赖噪声的token级信号，缺乏复杂推理所需的多轮精炼。该研究旨在通过迭代更新证据和推理历史，实现更稳定可靠的医学共识。
light_analysis.method: MA-RAG框架在每一轮中，智能体将候选回答间的语义冲突转化为可操作查询，以检索外部证据；同时优化历史推理轨迹以缓解长上下文退化。该方法扩展了自一致性原则，利用缺乏一致性作为主动信号进行多轮推理和检索，类似boosting机制迭代最小化残差错误，最终获得高保真医学共识。
light_analysis.result: 在7个医学问答基准测试中，MA-RAG持续超越竞争性的推理时缩放和RAG基线，平均准确率比骨干模型提升6.8个百分点。实验表明该方法有效增强了复杂医学推理的稳定性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MA-RAG通过多轮智能体精炼有效解决了医学推理中的幻觉和知识过时问题，展示了测试时缩放的能力。该框架具有较高的学术和实用价值，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的检索策略或扩展到其他领域。

title: Lost in Speech: Benchmarking, Evaluation, and Parsing of Spoken Bilingual Conversational Language Beyond Standard UD Assumptions
abstract: Spoken bilingual conversations pose substantial challenges for syntactic parsing because they often include disfluencies and discourse-driven structures that complicate dependency parsing under standard Universal Dependencies (UD) assumptions and evaluation practices. To systematically study these challenges, in this work, we first introduce a linguistically grounded taxonomy of conversational bilingual phenomena, together with SpokeBench, an expert-annotated English-Spanish benchmark for structurally complex speech. To address the limitations of existing evaluation practices, we propose Flex-UD, an ambiguity-aware evaluation metric that distinguishes catastrophic structural failures from linguistically acceptable variations. Finally, we introduce DECAP, a decoupled agentic parsing framework that separates spoken-phenomena handling from core syntactic analysis, enabling robust and interpretable dependency parsing without retraining. Experiments across both proprietary and open-weight LLMs show that DECAP substantially improves performance on complex conversational phenomena and achieves over 60% improvements in UPOS-F1 Score over baselines, while Flex-UD evaluations reveal gains that otherwise remain partially hidden under standard attachment-based metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 针对口语双语对话的句法解析难题，提出Flex-UD评估指标和DECAP解耦解析框架，实现60%+的UPOS-F1提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 口语双语对话常包含不流利表达和语篇驱动结构，标准UD依赖解析和评估方法难以应对。当前缺乏针对此类复杂现象的基准和评估指标，导致解析性能评估不准确。本研究旨在系统解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先引入基于语言学的对话双语现象分类法，并构建专家标注的英西双语基准SpokeBench。提出Flex-UD度量，区分灾难性结构失败与可接受的语言变异。核心创新是DECAP解耦代理解析框架，将口语现象处理与核心句法分析分离，无需重训练即可实现鲁棒可解释的依赖解析。
light_analysis.result: 在多种大语言模型（包括闭源和开源）上的实验表明，DECAP在复杂对话现象上表现显著提升，UPOS-F1分数相比基线提高超过60%。Flex-UD评估揭示了标准基于依附的度量下部分隐藏的增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为口语双语对话解析提供了基准、评估指标和可扩展框架。DECAP展示了分离处理口语现象的实用性，Flex-UD提供了更合理的性能评价。未来可扩展到更多语言和现象，但当前仅验证于英西双语。

title: Self-Supervised Learning with a Multi-Task Latent Space Objective
abstract: We propose a multi-task formulation of self-predictive Siamese SSL in which each spatial transformation defines a distinct latent-space alignment task, solved by a dedicated predictor over a shared encoder. This perspective directly explains a long-standing failure of multi-crop training in self-predictive methods such as BYOL, SimSiam, and MoCo v3: a shared predictor is forced to solve heterogeneous alignment tasks simultaneously, leading to unstable optimization. Assigning one predictor per view type resolves this interference, unlocking linear evaluation gains of 3.8-4\% across frameworks. This perspective also suggests a principled way to enrich pre-training by introducing additional spatial transformations as complementary tasks. We demonstrate this by introducing asymmetric cutout views, in which a masked online view is aligned with a complete target, forming a semantic inpainting objective. The resulting framework is stable, backbone-agnostic, and consistently improves the performance of ResNet and ViT models on ImageNet and COCO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多任务潜在空间目标的自监督学习，通过每个空间变换分配独立预测器解决多裁剪训练不稳定问题，提升线性评估性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自预测Siamese SSL方法（如BYOL、SimSiam、MoCo v3）中，多裁剪训练存在长期失败问题：共享预测器被迫同时解决异构对齐任务，导致优化不稳定。该研究旨在解释这一失败原因并提出解决方案，同时探索通过引入额外空间变换丰富预训练任务的方法，以提升表示质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出多任务公式：每个空间变换定义一个独立的潜在空间对齐任务，由专用预测器在共享编码器上求解。为每个视图类型分配独立预测器，消除任务干扰。引入非对称裁剪视图，将掩码在线视图与完整目标对齐，形成语义修复目标。框架稳定、骨干无关，适用于ResNet和ViT。
light_analysis.result: 在多框架（BYOL、SimSiam、MoCo v3）上，线性评估性能提升3.8-4%。在ImageNet和COCO上，ResNet和ViT模型均获得一致改进。方法有效解决了多裁剪训练的不稳定性，并提升了表示质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过多任务视角解释并解决了自预测SSL中多裁剪训练的失败问题，提出了一种稳定且骨干无关的预训练框架。该工作为设计更丰富的自监督任务提供了新思路，具有较好的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多空间变换类型及其组合。

title: Variational Speculative Decoding: Rethinking Draft Training from Token Likelihood to Sequence Acceptance
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates inference for (M)LLMs, yet a training-decoding discrepancy persists: while existing methods optimize single greedy trajectories, decoding involves verifying and ranking multiple sampled draft paths. We propose Variational Speculative Decoding (VSD), formulating draft training as variational inference over latent proposals (draft paths). VSD maximizes the marginal probability of target-model acceptance, yielding an ELBO that promotes high-quality latent proposals while minimizing divergence from the target distribution. To enhance quality and reduce variance, we incorporate a path-level utility and optimize via an Expectation-Maximization procedure. The E-step draws Monte Carlo samples from an oracle-filtered posterior, while the M-step maximizes weighted likelihood using Adaptive Rejection Weighting (ARW) and Confidence-Aware Regularization (CAR). Theoretical analysis confirms that VSD increases expected acceptance length and speedup. Extensive experiments across LLMs and MLLMs show that VSD achieves up to a 9.6% speedup over EAGLE-3 and 7.9% over ViSpec, significantly improving decoding efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出变分推测解码（VSD），将草稿训练形式化为变分推理，最大化目标模型接受的边际概率，提升推测解码效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码虽能加速大模型推理，但现有方法在训练时仅优化单个贪心轨迹，而实际解码涉及验证和排序多个采样的草稿路径。这种训练-解码不一致限制了加速效果。因此需要一种方法使得草稿模型在训练时就考虑多路径的接受概率，从而更匹配推理时行为。
light_analysis.method: VSD将草稿训练建模为变分推理，通过最大化目标模型接受的边际概率得到ELBO，促进高质量草稿并最小化与目标分布的散度。引入路径级效用，采用期望最大化（EM）过程：E步从oracle过滤的后验中蒙特卡洛采样，M步使用自适应拒绝加权（ARW）和置信度感知正则化（CAR）最大化加权似然。理论证明该方法可增加期望接受长度。
light_analysis.result: 在多项LLM和MLLM实验上，VSD相比EAGLE-3获得最高9.6%的加速比，相比ViSpec获得7.9%的加速比，显著提升解码效率。理论分析也确认了期望接受长度和加速比的增加，表明该方法在多种模型上均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: VSD通过变分推理统一了草稿训练与多路径解码，有效缓解了训练-解码不一致问题。该方法在理论上有保证，实验上展现了明显的加速效果。未来可进一步探索更复杂的路径效用函数或扩展到更多模态模型。但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Your Self-Play Algorithm is Secretly an Adversarial Imitator: Understanding LLM Self-Play through the Lens of Imitation Learning
abstract: Self-play post-training methods has emerged as an effective approach for finetuning large language models and turn the weak language model into strong language model without preference data. However, the theoretical foundations for self-play finetuning remain underexplored. In this work, we tackle this by connecting self-play finetuning with adversarial imitation learning by formulating finetuning procedure as a min-max game between the model and a regularized implicit reward player parameterized by the model itself. This perspective unifies self-play imitation and general preference alignment within a common framework. Under this formulation, we present a game-theoretic analysis showing that the self-play finetuning will converge to it's equilibrium. Guided by this theoretical formulation, we propose a new self-play imitation finetuning algorithm based on the $χ^2$-divergence variational objective with bounded rewards and improved stability. Experiments on various of language model finetuning tasks demonstrate consistent improvements over existing self-play methods and validate our theoretical insights.

light_analysis.overview: 将自对弈微调与对抗模仿学习统一，提出基于χ²散度变分目标的新算法，提升稳定性与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自对弈后训练方法无需偏好数据即可将弱语言模型微调为强模型，但理论基础薄弱，现有方法缺乏收敛性和稳定性保证。本文旨在通过连接自对弈与对抗模仿学习，提供统一的理论框架，并设计更稳定的算法。
light_analysis.method: 将自对弈微调形式化为模型与自身参数化的正则化隐式奖励玩家之间的最小-最大博弈，统一自对弈模仿和偏好对齐。基于此，提出基于χ²散度变分目标的算法，具有有界奖励和改进的稳定性，并在多种语言模型微调任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多种语言模型微调任务上，所提算法持续优于现有自对弈方法，验证了理论洞见的有效性。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明，但实验表明一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了自对弈微调的理论基础，通过对抗模仿学习视角统一了该领域框架，并提出了稳定高效的算法。学术上深化了对自对弈机制的理解，实践上为无需偏好数据的模型微调提供了可靠方案。

title: DIVERGE: Diversity-Enhanced RAG for Open-Ended Information Seeking
abstract: Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems often assume that each query has a single correct answer. This assumption overlooks open-ended information-seeking scenarios where multiple plausible answers are valuable, and where diversity is important for creativity, fairness, and inclusive access to information. We show that standard RAG systems fail to fully use diverse retrieved contexts: simply increasing retrieval diversity does not necessarily lead to diverse generations. To address this limitation, we propose Diverge, a plug-and-play agentic RAG framework that improves the diversity--quality trade-off through iterative, reflection-guided exploration of diverse viewpoints and diversity-aware retrieval support. We further introduce evaluation metrics for characterizing the diversity-quality trade-off in open-ended question answering. Experiments across multiple real-world datasets and backbone LLMs show that Diverge achieves the best trade-off among competitive baselines, increasing diversity by $\sim2\times$ without noticeable quality degradation. These results reveal a systematic limitation of current RAGs and show the value of explicit diversity modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diverge框架，通过迭代反思引导的多样视角探索和多样性感知检索，显著提升开放端信息检索的多样性-质量权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG系统假设每个查询只有单一正确答案，忽视了开放端信息寻求场景中多个答案的价值，且简单增加检索多样性不保证生成多样性。标准RAG无法充分利用多样检索上下文，导致多样性不足，影响创造力、公平性和信息包容性。
light_analysis.method: Diverge是一个即插即用的agentic RAG框架，核心创新在于迭代、反思引导的探索机制：通过多样性感知检索支持，逐步收集并整合多样视角；利用LLM的反思能力评估当前生成，并引导探索缺失的方面，从而在保持质量的前提下提升输出多样性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实数据集和不同骨干LLM上，Diverge对比基线实现了最优的多样性-质量权衡，多样性提升约2倍（约100%），且未出现明显质量下降。实验表明显式多样性建模能系统性改善RAG在开放端问答中的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Diverge揭示了当前RAG系统在开放端场景的系统性限制，证明了显式多样性建模的价值。该框架可提升信息检索的多样性和公平性，未来可扩展至更多需要多元视角的NLP任务，如创意写作和争议性话题讨论。

title: Comparative evaluation of training strategies using partially labelled datasets for segmentation of white matter hyperintensities and stroke lesions in FLAIR MRI
abstract: White matter hyperintensities (WMH) and ischaemic stroke lesions (ISL) are key imaging biomarkers of cerebral small vessel disease (SVD) detectable on magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). The development of robust deep learning models to automatically segment and differentiate these pathologies remains challenging. Specifically, WMH and ISL frequently co-occur within the same subject and present as visually confounding hyperintensities on fluid-attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) sequences, complicating their accurate delineation. To address the scarcity of fully annotated cohorts, we systematically evaluated six accessible strategies for training a joint WMH and ISL segmentation model using partially labelled data. We aggregated privately held and publicly available datasets to curate a large-scale cohort of 2,052 MRI volumes, of which 1341 and 1152 volumes contained ground truth annotations for WMH and ISL, respectively. Our analysis indicates that multiple strategies effectively leverage partially labelled data to enhance overall model performance, with pseudolabelling emerging as the most effective approach.
