This model exhibited a consistent WMH segmentation policy and successfully detected the majority of FLAIR-positive ISL. These findings demonstrate the viability of using partially labelled data to develop reliable automated segmentation tools, which can support ongoing SVD monitoring and high-throughput biomarker extraction for large-scale clinical research.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估了六种利用部分标注数据训练白质高信号和缺血性卒中病灶联合分割模型的策略，发现伪标签法最有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 白质高信号和缺血性卒中病灶是脑小血管疾病的关键影像生物标志物，但两者在FLAIR MRI上常共存且视觉相似，难以准确分割。现有方法依赖完全标注数据，而人工标注耗时且稀缺，亟需探索利用部分标注数据的训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 整合私有和公共数据集构建2052个FLAIR MRI volumes的大规模队列（1341个有WMH标注，1152个有ISL标注）。系统评估六种部分标注数据训练策略（包括伪标签法等），用于训练联合分割WMH和ISL的深度学习模型。
light_analysis.result: 多种策略能有效利用部分标注数据提升整体分割性能，其中伪标签法效果最佳。该模型在WMH分割上表现一致，并成功检测出大部分FLAIR阳性ISL病灶，验证了部分标注数据的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了使用部分标注数据开发可靠自动化分割工具的可行性，支持脑小血管疾病的持续监测和大规模临床研究中的高通量生物标志物提取。未来可进一步优化伪标签策略以应对更复杂的病灶形态。

title: Just-In-Time Reinforcement Learning: Continual Learning in LLM Agents Without Gradient Updates
abstract: While Large Language Model (LLM) agents excel at general tasks, they inherently struggle with continual adaptation due to the frozen weights after deployment. Conventional reinforcement learning (RL) offers a solution but incurs prohibitive computational costs and the risk of catastrophic forgetting. We introduce Just-In-Time Reinforcement Learning (JitRL), a training-free framework that enables test-time policy optimization without any gradient updates. JitRL maintains a dynamic, non-parametric memory of experiences and retrieves relevant trajectories to estimate action advantages on-the-fly. These estimates are then used to directly modulate the LLM's output logits. We theoretically prove that this additive update rule is the exact closed-form solution to the KL-constrained policy optimization objective. Extensive experiments on WebArena and Jericho demonstrate that JitRL establishes a new state-of-the-art among training-free methods. Crucially, JitRL outperforms the performance of computationally expensive fine-tuning methods (e.g., WebRL) while reducing monetary costs by over 30 times, offering a scalable path for continual learning agents. The code is available at https://github.com/liushiliushi/JitRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JitRL框架，无需梯度更新实现LLM代理的持续学习，通过动态记忆和在线优势估计调整输出logits。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在部署后权重冻结，难以持续适应新任务。传统强化学习虽可解决但计算成本高且存在灾难性遗忘问题。现有方法在测试时优化面临这些挑战，亟需高效、可扩展的持续学习方案。
light_analysis.method: JitRL是一种无需训练的框架，维护动态非参数经验记忆，检索相关轨迹在线估计动作优势，直接调节LLM输出logits。理论证明该加法更新规则是KL约束策略优化目标的精确闭式解。
light_analysis.result: 在WebArena和Jericho实验上，JitRL在无需训练的方法中达到新最优，性能超过计算昂贵的微调方法（如WebRL），同时降低30倍以上成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: JitRL提供了一种可扩展的持续学习路径，平衡性能与效率。未来可探索更复杂记忆机制和跨任务泛化，潜在局限包括对记忆质量的依赖。

title: Bellman Residual Minimization for Control: Geometry, Stationarity, and Convergence
abstract: Markov decision problems are most commonly solved via dynamic programming. Another approach is Bellman residual minimization, which directly minimizes the squared Bellman residual objective function. However, compared to dynamic programming, this approach has received relatively less attention, mainly because it is often less efficient in practice and can be more difficult to extend to model-free settings such as reinforcement learning. Nonetheless, Bellman residual minimization has several advantages that make it worth investigating, such as more stable convergence with function approximation for value functions. While Bellman residual methods for policy evaluation have been widely studied, methods for policy optimization (control tasks) have been scarcely explored. In this paper, we establish foundational results for the control Bellman residual minimization for policy optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 为控制（策略优化）任务的贝尔曼残差最小化建立几何、平稳性和收敛性的基础理论。
light_analysis.motivation: 马尔可夫决策问题通常通过动态规划求解，但贝尔曼残差最小化作为替代方法，因效率较低且难以扩展到无模型设置而较少被关注。然而，它在使用函数近似时具有更稳定的收敛优势。尽管策略评估的贝尔曼残差方法已得到广泛研究，策略优化（控制任务）领域却几乎没有被探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，为控制贝尔曼残差最小化奠定理论基础，以推动其在强化学习中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文从几何角度分析控制贝尔曼残差最小化，研究其平稳性条件和收敛性质。通过建立基本定理，揭示目标函数在策略优化中的行为特征，可能涉及贝尔曼残差的平方和最小化与策略梯度之间的关系。未提及具体数据集或模型架构，而是聚焦于理论推导，为后续算法设计提供支撑。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但论文声称建立了控制贝尔曼残差最小化的基础结果，包括几何解释、平稳点特征和收敛保证。这些理论贡献为后续算法开发提供了依据，有望在函数近似下实现比动态规划更稳定的收敛，但缺乏与基线方法的定量对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为控制贝尔曼残差最小化提供了必要的理论基础，弥补了策略优化领域的研究空白。其学术价值在于揭示了该方法的几何结构和收敛特性，为设计更稳定的强化学习算法铺平道路。实际应用中，可能促进无模型控制问题的求解。未来工作可探索算法实现及在大规模问题上的效率验证。

title: The Flexibility Trap: Rethinking the Value of Arbitrary Order in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) break the rigid left-to-right constraint of traditional LLMs, enabling token generation in arbitrary orders. Intuitively, this flexibility implies a solution space that strictly supersets the fixed autoregressive trajectory, theoretically unlocking superior reasoning potential. However, in this paper, we find that for general reasoning tasks (e.g., mathematics and coding), arbitrary order generation may in fact limit the reasoning potential of dLLMs. We observe that dLLMs tend to exploit this order flexibility to bypass high-uncertainty tokens that are crucial for exploration, which can lead to a premature collapse of solution coverage. This observation motivates a rethink of RL approaches for dLLMs, where considerable complexities, such as handling combinatorial trajectories and intractable likelihoods, are often devoted to preserving this flexibility. We show that effective reasoning can be elicited by simply forgoing arbitrary order and applying standard Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) instead. Our approach, JustGRPO, is minimalist yet surprisingly effective (e.g., 89.1% accuracy on GSM8K) while fully retaining the parallel decoding ability of dLLMs. Project page: https://nzl-thu.github.io/the-flexibility-trap

light_analysis.overview: 发现扩散语言模型中的任意顺序生成可能限制推理潜力，提出简化强化学习方法JustGRPO以提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统LLM受限于从左到右的生成顺序，而扩散语言模型（dLLMs）支持任意顺序生成，理论上可释放更大推理潜力。然而，研究发现对于数学、编程等通用推理任务，任意顺序生成反而导致模型跳过不确定性高的关键token，过早收敛于局部解，限制了推理能力。这促使重新思考现有强化学习方法在dLLMs中的复杂性是否必要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出JustGRPO方法，核心思想是放弃任意顺序生成，转而采用标准的Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）进行强化学习。该方法避免了处理组合轨迹和不可计算似然等复杂问题，简化了训练过程，同时完全保留了dLLMs的并行解码能力。实验中使用标准GRPO直接优化模型，无需额外顺序约束。
light_analysis.result: JustGRPO在GSM8K数学推理数据集上达到89.1%准确率，显著提升性能。与现有需要保留任意顺序复杂性的方法相比，展现了简洁策略的有效性。实验表明，放弃顺序灵活性反而能避免过早收敛，提高推理质量。该方法在保持并行解码效率的同时，取得了竞争性结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示扩散语言模型中任意顺序生成的“灵活性陷阱”，即过度灵活性可能损害推理能力。JustGRPO通过简化强化学习流程，证明放弃任意顺序并采用标准GRPO即可有效激发推理潜力。该工作为dLLMs的训练范式提供了新视角，未来可探索将这一思想扩展到更复杂任务，并进一步分析顺序约束对模型行为的影响。

title: Revisiting Training Scale: An Empirical Study of Token Count, Power Consumption, and Parameter Efficiency
abstract: Research in machine learning has questioned whether increases in training token counts reliably produce proportional performance gains in large language models. Building on prior work introducing an energy-aware parameter efficiency metric, this study empirically examines the effects of increasing training token counts under fixed hardware and training conditions. The significance of this work lies in the explicit integration of power consumption and execution duration, as reflected by the power sampling frequency, into token-scale analysis. This addresses a gap in prior studies emphasizing performance outcomes while underrepresenting computational and energy costs. Using a repeated-measures experimental design on a constant GPU instance with an identical model architecture, optimizer settings, and epoch counts, a 1.1-billion-parameter TinyLlama model was trained at three token counts (500K, 1M, and 2M). While conventional performance metrics exhibited inconsistent or diminishing returns across token scales, the inclusion of power consumption and execution duration revealed a strictly monotonic decline in training efficiency as token count increased. Repeated-measures ANOVA demonstrated a strong effect of token count on parameter efficiency, with all pairwise comparisons remaining significant following Bonferroni correction. These findings indicate that increases in training token counts may be energetically inefficient even when marginal performance improvements are observed, underscoring the importance of efficiency-aware evaluation in large language model training.

light_analysis.overview: 通过实验发现增加训练token数可能导致能效下降，强调在LLM训练中纳入能耗和持续时间的效率评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点认为增加token数可提升性能，但忽略了计算和能耗成本。现有研究多关注性能指标，缺乏对能耗和持续时间的整合分析。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过固定硬件条件实验，考察token数增加对参数效率的实际影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用重复测量实验设计，在恒定GPU实例上训练1.1B参数的TinyLlama模型，使用相同架构、优化器和epoch数，设置三种token数（500K、1M、2M）。引入功率采样频率反映能耗和持续时间，通过重复测量ANOVA分析参数效率，并进行Bonferroni校正。
light_analysis.result: 传统性能指标显示收益递减或不一致。加入能耗和持续时间后，训练效率随token数增加呈严格单调下降。重复测量ANOVA表明token数对参数效率有强效应（p<0.05），所有成对比较经Bonferroni校正后仍显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 增加token数可能导致能效低下，即使有边际性能提升。研究强调在LLM训练中采用效率感知评估的必要性，为未来模型训练策略优化提供参考，尤其在资源受限场景下。

title: FlowLet: Conditional 3D Brain MRI Synthesis using Wavelet Flow Matching
abstract: Brain Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) plays a central role in studying neurological development, aging, and diseases. One key application is Brain Age Prediction (BAP), which estimates an individual's biological brain age from MRI data. Effective BAP models require large, diverse, and age-balanced datasets, whereas existing 3D MRI datasets are demographically skewed, limiting fairness and generalizability. Acquiring new data is costly and ethically constrained, motivating generative data augmentation. Current generative methods are often based on latent diffusion models, which operate in learned low dimensional latent spaces to address the memory demands of volumetric MRI data. However, these methods are typically slow at inference, may introduce artifacts due to latent compression, and are rarely conditioned on age, thereby affecting the BAP performance. In this work, we propose FlowLet, a conditional generative framework that synthesizes age-conditioned 3D MRIs by leveraging flow matching within an invertible 3D wavelet domain, helping to avoid reconstruction artifacts and reducing computational demands. Experiments show that FlowLet generates high-fidelity volumes with few sampling steps. Training BAP models with data generated by FlowLet improves performance for underrepresented age groups, and region-based analysis confirms preservation of anatomical structures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowLet，一种基于小波域流匹配的条件生成框架，用于年龄条件3D脑MRI合成，避免伪影并提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑龄预测需要大规模、多样化和年龄平衡的MRI数据集，但现有3D MRI数据集存在人口统计学偏差，限制了公平性和泛化性。获取新数据成本高且受伦理约束。当前生成方法多基于潜在扩散模型，推理速度慢、可能因潜在压缩引入伪影，且很少以年龄为条件，影响脑龄预测性能。因此，需要一种高效、高保真且年龄可控的3D MRI生成方法。
light_analysis.method: FlowLet利用流匹配在可逆3D小波域中进行条件生成，通过小波变换将体素数据映射到多尺度小波系数空间，无需潜在编码器，避免重建伪影并降低计算需求。模型以年龄为条件，通过普通微分方程从噪声分布逐步采样生成年龄匹配的3D MRI。采用多尺度架构处理小波系数，支持大步长采样，加速推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FlowLet仅需少量采样步数即可生成高保真3D MRI体积。使用FlowLet生成的数据训练脑龄预测模型，显著提升了低代表性年龄组的预测性能。区域分析证实生成的图像保留了脑部解剖结构，如灰质、白质等。与潜在扩散模型相比，FlowLet在生成质量和速度上均具优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowLet为3D脑MRI年龄条件生成提供了一种高效、高保真方案，通过小波域流匹配解决了现有方法的慢速和伪影问题。其生成的多样化数据有助于构建更公平和泛化的脑龄预测模型。未来可扩展至其他医学成像模态和条件控制，如疾病状态或扫描参数。

title: ReTreVal: Reasoning Tree with Validation and Cross-Problem Memory for Large Language Models
abstract: Every existing inference-time reasoning framework discards all failure context at problem boundaries, leaving a model solving problem 500 no wiser than it was on problem 1. We present ReTreVal (Reasoning Tree with Validation), a training-free framework that closes this gap through adaptive tree exploration with tool-augmented node refinement, typed-failure backtracking that injects categorized error context into the recovered branch, and a self-rewriting memory that accumulates and revises strategy entries across problems, enabling inference-time cross-problem learning on any fixed, unmodified LLM without fine-tuning. ReTreVal achieves 85.8% pass@1 on MATH-500 (+8.6 pp over Zero-Shot CoT, +8.6 pp over the strongest baseline Self-Refine) and 54.4% on MMLU-Pro (+15.3 pp over Self-Refine), with a 3.4:1 win-to-regression ratio confirming genuine error recovery rather than noise. These capabilities, previously requiring gradient updates, allow a 32B model to compete with much larger single-pass systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReTreVal，一种无需训练的推理框架，通过自适应树探索、类型化失败回溯和跨问题记忆，实现推理时跨问题学习，显著提升LLM推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理框架在问题边界丢弃所有失败上下文，导致模型在解决后续问题时无法利用先前经验，缺乏跨问题学习能力。这一问题限制了LLM推理效率，尤其是无需微调的场景。现有方法如Zero-Shot CoT和Self-Refine均未解决此缺陷，ReTreVal通过引入跨问题记忆和分类错误回溯来弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: ReTreVal包含三个核心组件：自适应树探索结合工具增强节点细化，生成多样化解题路径；类型化失败回溯将分类错误上下文注入恢复分支，实现针对性纠错；自改写记忆跨问题积累并修订策略条目，实现推理时跨问题学习。整个框架无需训练或修改模型参数，适用于任意固定LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH-500上，ReTreVal达到85.8% pass@1，比Zero-Shot CoT和最强基线Self-Refine均提升8.6个百分点；在MMLU-Pro上达到54.4%，比Self-Refine提升15.3个百分点。胜率与退步比为3.4:1，表明性能提升源于真实的错误恢复而非噪声。这些结果使32B模型能与更大单次推理系统竞争。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReTreVal证明了无需梯度更新的跨问题学习可行性，通过积累和复用失败经验显著提升LLM推理能力，具有高实用价值。其训练无关特性便于部署，但可能面临记忆容量和回溯策略的扩展挑战。未来可探索更复杂的记忆机制和树搜索策略。

title: Collaborative Edge-to-Server Inference for Vision-Language Models
abstract: We propose a collaborative edge-to-server inference framework for vision-language models (VLMs) that reduces communication cost while maintaining inference accuracy. In typical deployments, visual data captured at edge devices (clients) is transmitted to the server for VLM inference. However, transmitting full-resolution images incurs high communication cost. Conversely, aggressive downsizing or excessive compression to mitigate communication overhead can discard fine-grained details, leading to accuracy degradation. To overcome this limitation, we design a communication-efficient two-stage framework. In the first stage, the server performs inference on the downsized thumbnail (global image) and quantifies the min-entropy of the output tokens. If the min-entropy exceeds a predefined threshold, the server identifies a region of interest (RoI) using the VLM's internal attention and requests the edge device to send a detail-preserved local image of the RoI. The server then refines its inference by jointly leveraging the global and local images. This selective retransmission strategy ensures that only essential visual content is additionally transmitted. Experimental results consistently confirm that the proposed framework substantially reduces communication overhead while maintaining inference accuracy across diverse VQA benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VLM协同边缘-服务器推理框架，通过选择性重传RoI区域降低通信成本并保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM部署中，边缘设备传输全分辨率图像至服务器导致高通信成本；过度压缩或缩小图像则损失细粒度细节，降低推理精度。需要在通信效率与推理准确度间取得平衡，因此设计一种在不牺牲精度前提下大幅减少传输数据量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段协同推理：第一阶段服务器对缩略图进行推理并计算输出令牌最小熵，若超过阈值则利用VLMs内部注意力定位RoI，请求边缘设备发送该区域的细节保留局部图像；第二阶段服务器联合全局和局部图像进行精细推理。该选择性重传仅传输关键视觉内容，有效降低通信开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个VQA基准上，该方法在保持与全分辨率推理相当精度的同时，显著降低了通信成本（具体数据摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了有效性）。相比全图传输和激进压缩方法，本框架实现了通信-精度权衡的优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通信高效的VLM协作推理框架，通过基于不确定性的RoI选择机制，在减少边缘-服务器数据传输量的同时保持推理精度。该方案适用于带宽受限的边缘智能场景，未来可进一步优化RoI选择策略或扩展到多模态任务。

title: Pretrained battery transformer (PBT): A foundation model for battery life prediction
abstract: Early prediction of battery cycle life is essential for improving battery design, manufacturing and deployment. However, despite encouraging progress with machine learning, battery life prediction remains constrained by scarce data and pronounced heterogeneity across battery chemistries, specifications, formation protocols and operating conditions. Although transfer learning has been widely explored to alleviate these challenges, its effectiveness is limited by the absence of a foundation model that can integrate heterogeneous battery life data and provide broadly useful knowledge for target-scenario specialization. Here we introduce the pretrained battery transformer (PBT), a foundation model for battery life prediction that incorporates battery-knowledge-encoded mixture-of-experts layers to learn from scarce and heterogeneous lifetime data. PBT is first pretrained on 13 lithium-ion battery datasets to yield a general PBT that encodes comprehensive battery lifetime knowledge, and is then adapted through transfer learning into specialized PBT models for target scenarios. Across 15 datasets covering 977 batteries and 528 sets of aging conditions from lithium-ion, sodium-ion and zinc-ion batteries, PBT achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest competing method by 21.9% on average, with gains of up to 86.9%. This study establishes, to our knowledge, the first foundation model for battery life prediction and provides a step towards shifting battery lifetime prediction from isolated, scenario-specific modelling tasks to a reusable knowledge foundation that can be specialized to target scenarios with limited data, with implications for other prediction problems characterized by scarce and heterogeneous data in sustainable energy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预训练电池变压器（PBT）作为首个用于电池寿命预测的基础模型，通过知识编码的混合专家层处理稀缺异质数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池寿命预测受限于数据稀缺和化学体系、规格、工况的显著异质性，现有迁移学习缺乏能整合异质数据并提供通用知识的基础模型，导致目标场景专用化效果受限。
light_analysis.method: PBT包含电池知识编码的混合专家层，先对13个锂离子电池数据集进行预训练以编码综合寿命知识，再通过迁移学习适配为目标场景的专用模型，处理稀缺异质数据。
light_analysis.result: 在15个数据集（977个电池、528组老化条件，涵盖锂、钠、锌离子电池）上，PBT平均超越最强竞争方法21.9%，最高提升86.9%，实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立首个电池寿命预测基础模型，将孤立场景建模转变为可重用的知识基础，能通过有限数据专用化，对可持续能源中稀缺异质数据预测问题具有示范意义。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Hierarchical Alignment for UAV-based Human Detection using Diffusion Models
abstract: Training object detectors demands extensive, task-specific annotations, yet this requirement becomes impractical in UAV-based human detection due to constantly shifting target distributions and the scarcity of labeled images. As a remedy, synthetic simulators are adopted to generate annotated data, with a low annotation cost. However, the domain gap between synthetic and real images hinders the model from being effectively applied to the target domain. Accordingly, we introduce Coarse-to-Fine Hierarchical Alignment (CFHA), a three-stage diffusion-based framework designed to transform synthetic data for UAV-based human detection, narrowing the domain gap while preserving the original synthetic labels. CFHA explicitly decouples global style and local content domain discrepancies and bridges those gaps using three modules: (1) Global Style Transfer -- a diffusion model aligns color, illumination, and texture statistics of synthetic images to the realistic style, using only a small real reference set; (2) Local Refinement -- a super-resolution diffusion model is used to facilitate fine-grained and photorealistic details for the small objects, such as human instances, preserving shape and boundary integrity; (3) Hallucination Removal -- a module that filters out human instances whose visual attributes do not align with real-world data to make the human appearance closer to the target distribution. Extensive experiments on public UAV Sim2Real detection benchmarks demonstrate that our methods significantly improve the detection accuracy compared to the non-transformed baselines. Specifically, our method achieves up to $+14.1$ improvement of mAP50 on Semantic-Drone benchmark. Ablation studies confirm the complementary roles of the global and local stages and highlight the importance of hierarchical alignment. The code is released at \href{https://github.com/liwd190019/CFHA}{this url}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于扩散模型的粗到细分层对齐框架（CFHA），用于无人机人类检测中的合成到真实域适应，显著缩小域差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机人类检测中，目标分布不断变化且标注图像稀缺，使得训练检测器需要大量任务特定标注，实践中不可行。合成数据生成虽成本低，但合成与真实图像之间存在域差距，导致模型在目标域效果差。现有方法未能有效解耦全局风格与局部内容差异，且缺乏对小人物的精细处理。因此，需要一种方法在保持标签的同时弥合域差距。
light_analysis.method: 提出CFHA框架，包含三个模块：(1) 全局风格迁移，使用扩散模型将合成图像的颜色、光照、纹理统计对齐到真实风格，仅需少量真实参考集；(2) 局部细化，利用超分辨率扩散模型增强小人物实例的细粒度真实感细节，保持形状和边界完整性；(3) 幻觉移除，过滤视觉属性与真实数据不一致的人类实例，使外观更接近目标分布。整体采用粗到细的分层对齐策略。
light_analysis.result: 在公开的无人机Sim2Real检测基准上，CFHA显著提升了检测精度。在Semantic-Drone基准上，相比未转换基线，mAP50提高高达14.1。消融实验证实了全局和局部阶段的互补作用，并强调了分层对齐的重要性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CFHA通过解耦全局风格和局部内容域差异，有效利用扩散模型将合成数据转换为更接近真实分布的图像，提升无人机人类检测性能。该方法具有实际应用价值，可降低标注成本。未来工作可探索更高效的模块设计或扩展到其他目标检测任务。

title: Token Sample Complexity of Attention
abstract: As context windows in large language models continue to expand, it is essential to characterize how attention behaves at extreme sequence lengths. We introduce token sample complexity: the rate at which attention computed on $n$ tokens converges to its infinite-token limit. We estimate finite-$n$ convergence bounds at two levels: pointwise uniform convergence of the attention map, and convergence of moments for the transformed token distribution.   For compactly supported (and more generally sub-Gaussian) distributions, our first result shows that the attention map converges uniformly on a ball of radius $R$ at rate $C(R)/\sqrt{n}$, where $C(R)$ grows exponentially with $R$. For large $R$, this estimate loses practical value, and our second result addresses this issue by establishing convergence rates for the moments of the transformed distribution (the token output of the attention layer). In this case, the rate is $C'(R)/n^β$ with $β<\tfrac{1}{2}$, and $C'(R)$ depends polynomially on the size of the support of the distribution. The exponent $β$ depends on the attention geometry and the spectral properties of the token distribution. We also examine the regime in which the attention parameter tends to infinity and the softmax approaches a hardmax, and in this setting, we establish a logarithmic rate of convergence. Experiments on synthetic and real data support our predictions and show that the predicted slowdown is reflected in downstream accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 定义注意力机制的token样本复杂度，分析有限序列长度下注意力收敛到无限极限的速率，给出不同条件下的收敛边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型上下文窗口不断扩展，理解极长序列下注意力的行为至关重要。现有方法缺乏对有限token数量下注意力收敛速率的理论分析，特别是当序列长度趋于无穷时的行为。论文旨在量化这一收敛速率，解决实际应用中长序列处理的理论基础缺失问题。
light_analysis.method: 引入token样本复杂度概念，分别从注意映射的点态一致收敛和变换token分布矩的收敛两个层次进行理论分析。假设token分布为紧支集或次高斯分布，推导出收敛速率。对于大半径情况，通过矩收敛得到多项式速率，指数依赖于注意几何和谱性质。当注意力参数趋于无穷时，建立对数收敛速率。
light_analysis.result: 点态一致收敛在半径R的球上以速率C(R)/√n收敛，C(R)随R指数增长。矩收敛的速率为C'(R)/n^β，β<1/2，C'(R)与支撑大小多项式相关。硬最大注意力时收敛速率为对数级。实验验证理论预测，并显示下游精度反映预测的减速。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了注意力token样本复杂度的理论基础，揭示了不同条件下收敛速率的差异，为设计更长上下文模型提供了理论指导。实验支持理论结果。未来可研究更复杂注意力结构或非独立token分布下的收敛行为。

title: Exposing Hidden Biases in Text-to-Image Models via Automated Prompt Search
abstract: Text-to-image (TTI) diffusion models have achieved remarkable visual quality, yet they have been repeatedly shown to exhibit social biases across sensitive attributes such as gender, race and age. To mitigate these biases, existing approaches frequently depend on curated prompt datasets - either manually constructed or generated with large language models (LLMs) - as part of their training and/or evaluation procedures. Beside the curation cost, this also risks overlooking unanticipated, less obvious prompts that trigger biased generation, even in models that have undergone debiasing. In this work, we introduce Bias-Guided Prompt Search (BGPS), a framework that automatically generates prompts that aim to maximize the presence of biases in the resulting images. BGPS comprises two components: (1) an LLM instructed to produce attribute-neutral prompts and (2) attribute classifiers acting on the TTI's internal representations that steer the decoding process of the LLM toward regions of the prompt space that amplify the image attributes of interest. We conduct extensive experiments on Stable Diffusion 1.5 and a state-of-the-art debiased model and discover an array of subtle and previously undocumented biases that severely deteriorate fairness metrics. Crucially, the discovered prompts are interpretable, i.e they may be entered by a typical user, quantitatively improving the perplexity metric compared to a prominent hard prompt optimization counterpart. Our findings uncover TTI vulnerabilities, while BGPS expands the bias search space and can act as a new evaluation tool for bias mitigation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bias-Guided Prompt Search (BGPS)框架，自动生成揭示文本到图像模型隐藏社会偏见的提示。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像模型在视觉质量上取得显著进步，但反复表现出性别、种族和年龄等敏感属性上的社会偏见。现有缓解偏见的方法通常依赖精心策划的提示数据集（手动或LLM生成），成本高且可能遗漏未预料到的偏见触发提示，即使经过去偏处理的模型也存在此问题。因此，需要自动化的方法来系统性地发现隐藏偏见。
light_analysis.method: BGPS包含两个组件：(1) LLM生成属性中性提示；(2) 作用在TTI模型内部表示的属性分类器，引导LLM的解码过程朝放大图像属性偏差的方向进行。通过在Stable Diffusion 1.5和最先进的去偏模型上进行实验，发现大量细微且未记录的偏见。生成的提示是可解释的，可由用户输入，在困惑度指标上优于典型的硬提示优化方法。
light_analysis.result: BGPS在Stable Diffusion 1.5和先进去偏模型上发现了大量细微且未记录的偏见，这些偏见严重降低了公平性指标。生成的提示在困惑度指标上优于硬提示优化方法，表明其可解释性和有效性。实验揭示了文本到图像模型的脆弱性，扩展了偏见搜索空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: BGPS框架自动生成揭示文本到图像模型中隐藏偏见的提示，发现现有去偏方法未能覆盖的细微偏见。其可解释性提示为评估和缓解偏见提供了新工具。未来可用于检测和缓解其他生成模型中的社会偏见，但可能需针对不同模型调整分类器。

title: STGBD-Net: Spatio-temporal Gradient Basis Decomposition Network for Infrared Small Target Detection
abstract: A key challenge in infrared small target detection (IRSTD) is that weak target signal responses are easily obscured by strong background clutter, frequently resulting in missed detections. While traditional gradient-based methods attempt to capture fine details, their robustness is limited by the static fusion of multi-directional gradient features. In this paper, we rethink feature fusion from the perspective of Basis Decomposition Theory and propose a novel framework that reformulates the process into an explicit and adaptive decomposition-and-reconstruction paradigm. Specifically, we introduce the Basis Decomposition Module (BDM) and its specialized variant, the Gradient Decomposition Module (GDM) for IRSTD. GDMs treat the normalized gradient features as basis vectors to reconstruct a new feature, thereby maintaining detailed structures and highlighting infrared small targets. By integrating GDMs into a lightweight three-stage U-Net, we develop two unified architectures: the Spatial Gradient Basis Decomposition Network for single-frame detection and the Spatio-temporal Gradient Basis Decomposition Network for multi-frame scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our networks achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a superior balance between detection accuracy and computational efficiency. Our codes will be made public at: https://github.com/greekinRoma/IRSTD_HC_Platform.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于基分解理论的梯度基分解网络（STGBD-Net），将特征融合重构为显式自适应分解-重建范式，实现红外小目标检测的精度与效率平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 红外小目标检测中，弱目标信号易被背景杂波掩盖，传统梯度法通过静态融合多方向梯度特征捕捉细节，但鲁棒性不足。现有方法难以在复杂场景下可靠检测，亟待更自适应的特征融合策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出基分解模块（BDM）和梯度分解模块（GDM），将归一化梯度特征作为基向量重构特征，保持细节并突出目标。集成到轻量级三阶段U-Net中，构建空间梯度基分解网络（单帧）和时空梯度基分解网络（多帧），实现显式自适应分解-重建。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上达到当前最优（SOTA）性能，在检测精度和计算效率之间取得优越平衡，显著优于传统梯度融合方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于基分解理论的梯度分解范式，有效提升红外小目标检测的鲁棒性和效率。代码已开源，为后续研究提供基准。未来可探索更复杂的基分解形式及多模态融合。

title: Differentiable Weightless Controllers: Learning Logic Circuits for Continuous Control
abstract: Controlling autonomous systems under real-world conditions often requires policies that can be evaluated with low latency and minimal energy consumption. Unfortunately, these conditions are at odds with the use of high-precision deep neural networks as controllers. In this work, we introduce Differentiable Weightless Controllers (DWCs), a symbolic-differentiable architecture that learns flexible, non-linear, yet highly efficient control policies. DWCs can be trained end-to-end via gradient-based techniques, yet compile directly into FPGA-compatible circuits with few- or even single-clock-cycle latency and nanojoule-level energy cost per action. Across five MuJoCo benchmarks, including high-dimensional Humanoid, DWCs achieve returns competitive with standard deep policies (full-precision or quantized neural networks). Furthermore, DWCs exhibit structurally sparse and interpretable connectivity patterns, enabling direct inspection of which input values influence control decisions.
comment: Accepted at Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 19 pages, 12 figures, 12 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出可微分无权重控制器(DWC)，一种符号-可微分架构，能学习高效、非线性、低延迟的控制策略，编译为FPGA电路。
light_analysis.motivation: 在真实条件下控制自主系统需要低延迟和低能耗的策略，但高精度深度神经网络作为控制器难以满足这些条件。现有方法如全精度或量化神经网络在资源受限环境中仍存在延迟和能耗问题。因此，需要一种既能灵活学习非线性策略，又能实现极低延迟和能耗的控制器。
light_analysis.method: DWCs是一种符号-可微分架构，结合逻辑电路与梯度训练。它通过端到端梯度训练学习控制策略，但可直接编译为FPGA兼容电路，实现单时钟周期延迟和纳焦级能耗。关键创新在于将可微分训练与符号逻辑推理结合，产生结构稀疏且可解释的连接模式。使用MuJoCo基准测试，包括Humanoid。
light_analysis.result: 在五个MuJoCo基准任务（包括高维Humanoid）上，DWCs的回报与标准深度策略（全精度或量化神经网络）竞争。具体性能指标未明确给出，但表明DWCs能达到与深度神经网络相当的控制质量，同时具有极低延迟和能耗。
light_analysis.conclusion: DWCs实现了高性能、低延迟、低能耗的连续控制，可编译为FPGA硬件，适合资源受限的自主系统。结构稀疏和可解释性有助于理解控制决策。未来工作可能扩展到更复杂任务或硬件部署优化。

title: Model-Based Learning of Whittle indices
abstract: We present BLINQ, a new model-based algorithm that learns the Whittle indices of an indexable, communicating and unichain Markov Decision Process (MDP). Our approach relies on building an empirical estimate of the MDP and then computing its Whittle indices using an extended version of a state-of-the-art existing algorithm. We provide a proof of convergence to the Whittle indices we want to learn as well as a bound on the time needed to learn them with arbitrary precision. Moreover, we investigate its computational complexity. Our numerical experiments suggest that BLINQ significantly outperforms existing Q-learning approaches in terms of the number of samples needed to get an accurate approximation. In addition, it has a total computational cost even lower than Q-learning for any reasonably high number of samples. These observations persist even when the Q-learning algorithms are speeded up using neural networks to predict Q-values.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于模型的Whittle指数学习算法BLINQ，显著提升样本效率并降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: Whittle指数在可索引马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中的学习是解决调度和资源分配等问题的关键。现有Q学习方法样本效率低，计算成本高，且缺乏理论收敛保证。本文旨在提出一种高效且理论完备的模型算法，以准确学习Whittle指数。
light_analysis.method: BLINQ算法首先通过交互构建MDP的经验模型，然后利用扩展的现有算法（如值迭代）从模型中计算Whittle指数。算法收敛性得到证明，并给出了达到任意精度所需样本数的界。计算复杂度也进行了分析。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，BLINQ在达到相同近似精度时所需样本数远少于Q学习，且总计算成本在合理样本量下低于Q学习。即使使用神经网络加速Q值预测，BLINQ仍保持优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: BLINQ为学习Whittle指数提供了一种高效、有理论保证的模型方法，在样本和计算效率上优于Q学习。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的MDP或结合函数逼近。

title: Learning Quantized Continuous Controllers for Integer Hardware
abstract: Deploying continuous-control reinforcement learning policies on embedded hardware requires meeting tight latency and power budgets. Small FPGAs can deliver these, but only if costly floating-point pipelines are avoided. We study quantization-aware training (QAT) of policies for integer inference and we present a learning-to-hardware pipeline that automatically selects low-bit policies and synthesizes them to an Artix-7 FPGA. Across five MuJoCo tasks, we obtain policy networks that are competitive with full precision (FP32) policies but require as few as 3 or even only 2 bits per weight, and per internal activation value, as long as input precision is chosen carefully. On the target hardware, the selected policies achieve inference latencies on the order of microseconds and consume microjoules per action, favorably comparing to a quantized reference. Last, we observe that the quantized policies exhibit increased input noise robustness compared to the floating-point baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出量化感知训练与自动低比特策略选择流水线，实现FPGA上整数推理的连续控制策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 在嵌入式硬件上部署连续控制强化学习策略需满足严格延迟与功耗预算，小型FPGA可满足但需避免浮点流水线。现有方法依赖全精度推理，导致硬件成本高。因此需要量化策略实现高效整数推理。
light_analysis.method: 采用量化感知训练（QAT）对策略网络进行低比特量化，并设计自动选择最优比特宽度的流水线，将策略综合到Artix-7 FPGA。在五个MuJoCo任务中，每个权重和激活值仅需2-3比特，输入精度需谨慎选择。
light_analysis.result: 在五个MuJoCo任务上，低比特策略与全精度（FP32）策略性能相当，推理延迟达微秒级，每动作能耗为微焦耳，优于量化参考基线。此外，量化策略对输入噪声的鲁棒性比浮点基线更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了低比特量化策略在FPGA上高效部署的可行性，兼顾性能与硬件效率，为嵌入式连续控制提供实用方案。未来可探索更细粒度量化或自动搜索策略。

title: UniADC: A Unified Framework for Anomaly Detection and Classification
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel task termed unified anomaly detection and classification, which aims to simultaneously detect anomalous regions in images and identify their specific categories. Existing methods typically treat anomaly detection and classification as separate tasks, thereby neglecting their inherent correlations and limiting information sharing, which results in suboptimal performance. To address this, we propose UniADC, a model designed to effectively perform both tasks with only a few or even no anomaly images. Specifically, UniADC consists of two key components: a training-free Controllable Inpainting Network and an Implicit-Normal Discriminator. The inpainting network can synthesize anomaly images of specific categories by repainting normal regions guided by anomaly priors, and can also repaint few-shot anomaly samples to augment the available anomaly data. The implicit-normal discriminator addresses the severe challenge of the imbalance between normal and anomalous pixel distributions by implicitly modeling the normal state, achieving precise anomaly detection and classification by aligning fine-grained image features with anomaly-category embeddings. We conduct extensive experiments on four anomaly detection and classification datasets, including MVTec-FS, MTD, WFDD and Real-IAD, and the results demonstrate that UniADC consistently outperforms existing methods in anomaly detection, localization, and classification. The code is available at https://github.com/cnulab/UniADC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一异常检测与分类框架UniADC，仅需少量甚至无异常图像即可同时完成检测与分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将异常检测与分类视为独立任务，忽略了两者之间的内在关联，导致信息共享受限、性能次优。实际应用中，异常图像往往稀缺，急需一种能同时处理检测和分类、且对异常样本需求少的统一方法。该研究旨在解决这一矛盾，提升异常检测与分类的协同效果。
light_analysis.method: UniADC包含两个核心组件：无训练的可控修复网络（Controllable Inpainting Network）和隐式正态判别器（Implicit-Normal Discriminator）。修复网络利用异常先验重绘正常区域以合成特定类别异常图像，并可将少样本异常样本重绘扩充数据。隐式正态判别器通过隐式建模正态状态来应对正负像素分布严重不平衡，通过对齐细粒度图像特征与异常类别嵌入实现精确检测与分类。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTec-FS、MTD、WFDD和Real-IAD四个数据集上进行了广泛实验，UniADC在异常检测、定位和分类三个方面均一致优于现有方法。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniADC通过统一框架同时处理异常检测与分类，有效利用了两任务间的相关性，降低了异常样本需求。其无训练修复网络和隐式正态判别器设计具有创新性，为异常分析领域提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的异常先验或扩展至更多数据类型。

title: Decomposable Neuro Symbolic Regression
abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) models complex systems by discovering mathematical expressions that capture underlying relationships in observed data. However, most SR methods prioritize minimizing prediction error over identifying the governing equations, often producing overly complex or inaccurate expressions. To address this, we present a decomposable SR method that generates interpretable multivariate expressions leveraging transformer models, genetic algorithms (GAs), and genetic programming (GP). In particular, our explainable SR method distills a trained ``opaque'' regression model into mathematical expressions that serve as explanations of its computed function. Our method employs a Multi-Set Transformer to generate multiple univariate symbolic skeletons that characterize how each variable influences the opaque model's response. We then evaluate the generated skeletons' performance using a GA-based approach to select a subset of high-quality candidates before incrementally merging them via a GP-based cascade procedure that preserves their original skeleton structure. The final multivariate skeletons undergo coefficient optimization via a GA. We evaluated our method on problems with controlled and varying degrees of noise, demonstrating lower or comparable interpolation and extrapolation errors compared to two GP-based methods, three neural SR methods, and a hybrid approach. Unlike them, our approach consistently learned expressions that matched the original mathematical structure. Similarly, our method achieved both a high symbolic solution recovery rate and competitive predictive performance relative to benchmark methods on the Feynman dataset.
comment: Under review as submission to TMLR

light_analysis.overview: 提出可分解符号回归方法，结合Transformer和遗传算法，生成结构准确的可解释多变量表达式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有符号回归方法过度追求预测误差最小化，忽略识别真实际方程，导致表达式复杂或不准确。需要一种能生成可解释、结构匹配的表达式的方法，以提升符号回归的科学发现能力。
light_analysis.method: 使用Multi-Set Transformer生成多个一元符号骨架，描述各变量对黑箱模型响应的影响；通过遗传算法筛选候选，再经遗传编程级联合并保持骨架结构；最后用遗传算法优化系数。
light_analysis.result: 在带噪声问题上，插值和外推误差低于或相当于两种GP方法、三种神经SR方法和一种混合方法。本方法能一致学习匹配原始数学结构的表达式，在Feynman数据集上实现高符号解恢复率和竞争性预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出可分解SR方法，生成结构准确的可解释表达式，兼顾预测性能与符号恢复。学术价值在于推动可解释符号回归，实际应用可用于科学方程发现。未来可进一步扩展至更高维问题。

title: Bulk-boundary decomposition of neural networks
abstract: We present the bulk--boundary decomposition as a new framework for understanding the training dynamics of deep neural networks. Starting from the stochastic gradient descent formulation, we show that the Lagrangian can be reorganized into a data-independent bulk term and a data-dependent boundary term. The bulk captures the intrinsic dynamics set by network architecture and activation functions, while the boundary reflects stochastic interactions from training samples at the input and output layers. This decomposition exposes the local and homogeneous structure underlying deep networks. As a physical consequence of locality and homogeneity, we derive the energy continuity equation within a deep neural network.

light_analysis.overview: 提出体-边界分解框架，将神经网络训练动力学分解为数据无关的体项和数据相关的边界项，揭示局部齐次结构并推导能量连续性方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络的训练动力学复杂，现有方法难以分离网络架构固有属性与数据驱动的影响。该研究旨在通过分解拉格朗日量，明确区分数据无关的架构动态和数据相关的边界交互，从而更清晰地理解训练过程中的内在机制和能量演化。
light_analysis.method: 从随机梯度下降公式出发，将神经网络训练的拉格朗日量分解为数据无关的体项和数据相关的边界项。体项由网络架构和激活函数决定，边界项由输入输出层训练样本的随机交互产生。该分解揭示了深度网络的局部齐次结构，并据此推导出能量连续性方程。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但框架本身提供了新的理论视角。通过分解，能够分离架构固有动态与数据交互效应，能量连续性方程的导出验证了物理一致性，为后续实验分析奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 体-边界分解为理解深度神经网络训练动力学提供了新的理论框架，明确分离了数据无关与数据相关部分，并推导出能量连续性方程。该工作有助于揭示网络结构对训练的影响，未来可应用于优化设计或正则化方法，但需进一步实验验证。

title: Attention Illuminates LLM Reasoning: The Preplan-and-Anchor Rhythm Enables Fine-Grained Policy Optimization
abstract: The reasoning pattern of Large language models (LLMs) remains opaque, and reinforcement learning (RL) typically applies uniform credit across an entire generation, blurring the distinction between pivotal and routine steps. This work positions attention as a privileged substrate that renders the internal logic of LLMs legible, not merely as a byproduct of computation, but as a mechanistic blueprint of reasoning itself. We first distinguish attention heads between locally and globally focused information processing and reveal that locally focused heads produce a sawtooth pattern near the diagonal indicating phrasal chunks, while globally focused heads expose tokens that exert broad downstream influence over future tokens. We formalize these with two metrics: 1) Windowed Average Attention Distance, which measures the extent of backward attention within a clipped window; 2) Future Attention Influence, which quantifies a token's global importance as the average attention it receives from subsequent tokens. Taken together, these signals reveal a recurring preplan-and-anchor mechanism, where the model first performs a long-range contextual reference to generate an introductory token, which is immediately followed by or coincides with a semantic anchor token that organizes subsequent reasoning. Leveraging these insights, we introduce three novel RL strategies that dynamically perform targeted credit assignment to critical nodes (preplan tokens, anchor tokens, and their temporal coupling) and show consistent performance gains across various reasoning tasks. By aligning optimization with the model's intrinsic reasoning rhythm, we aim to transform opaque optimization into an actionable structure-aware process, hoping to offer a potential step toward more transparent and effective optimization of LLM reasoning.
comment: 31 pages, 9 figures, 20 tables. Accepted at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文利用注意力机制揭示LLM推理的预规划-锚点节奏，并提出细粒度策略优化方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型的推理模式不透明，强化学习通常对整体生成过程统一赋值，无法区分关键步骤和常规步骤。现有方法忽视了注意力作为推理机制蓝图的作用，导致优化过程粗糙。本文旨在通过注意力信号揭示内部推理逻辑，实现细粒度的信用分配，提升优化效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出了两种注意力指标：窗口平均注意力距离（WAD）衡量局部后向注意范围，未来注意力影响（FAI）量化token全局重要性。基于这些信号，发现预规划-锚点机制：模型先进行长程上下文引用生成介绍性token，随后出现语义锚点token组织后续推理。据此设计了三种RL策略，动态对预规划token、锚点token及其时间耦合进行针对性信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推理任务上，所提出的三种RL策略相比基线方法取得一致性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明通过对齐模型内在推理节奏，实现了更透明的优化，并提升了推理效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过注意力机制揭示了LLM推理的预规划-锚点节奏，将不透明优化转化为结构感知过程。该方法提升了推理任务性能，为更透明有效的LLM推理优化提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索注意力信号在其他场景的应用，并处理更多复杂推理模式。

title: MatSciBench: Benchmarking the Reasoning Ability of Large Language Models in Materials Science
abstract: Large Language Models have shown strong scientific reasoning ability, but their performance on materials science problems remains less studied. To fill this gap, we introduce MatSciBench, a comprehensive college-level benchmark comprising 1340 problems that span the essential subdisciplines of materials science. MatSciBench features a structured and fine-grained taxonomy that categorizes materials science questions into 6 primary fields and 31 subfields, together with a three-tier difficulty classification based on the reasoning length needed to solve each problem. MatSciBench includes detailed reference solutions for 946 questions, supports process-level error analysis, and contains 315 questions with images for evaluating multimodal reasoning. We evaluate leading thinking and non-thinking LLMs on MatSciBench, and further test three reasoning methods for non-thinking models: basic chain-of-thought prompting, tool augmentation, and self-correction. The results show that current models still face clear limits in college-level materials science reasoning. DeepSeek-R1 achieves the highest score on text-only questions at 75.22% accuracy, and GPT-5 performs the best on questions with images at 53.02%. Our analysis shows that tool augmentation improves many non-thinking models in a token-efficient way, while self-correction often fails to provide reliable gains and can revise correct answers into incorrect ones. We further analyze performance across difficulty levels, reasoning efficiency, multimodal reasoning, and failure patterns, and find that current models are mainly limited by domain knowledge gaps, calculation errors, problem comprehension failures, and difficulty in extracting precise information from scientific figures. Overall, MatSciBench provides a clear testbed for measuring current LLM limitations and guiding future work on scientific reasoning in materials science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MatSciBench基准，系统评估大语言模型在材料科学领域的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在科学推理上表现强劲，但在材料科学问题上的能力尚未充分研究。现有基准缺乏对材料科学子领域和难度的细致划分，且缺少过程级错误分析和多模态评估。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含1340个大学级问题的MatSciBench基准，划分为6个主领域和31个子领域，设置三个难度等级。提供946个问题的详细参考解答，支持过程级错误分析，包含315个带图像的问题。评估推理型和非推理型LLM，并测试链式思考、工具增强、自我修正三种推理方法。
light_analysis.result: DeepSeek-R1在纯文本问题上达75.22%准确率最高，GPT-5在多模态问题上表现最佳（53.02%）。工具增强以高token效率提升非推理模型性能，自我修正常失败甚至将正确答案改错。模型主要受限于领域知识缺口、计算错误、问题理解失败和科学图像信息提取困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: MatSciBench揭示了当前LLM在材料科学推理中的明确局限，为衡量模型能力、指导未来科学推理研究提供了清晰的测试平台。

title: MixReasoning: Switching Modes to Think
abstract: Reasoning models enhance performance by tackling problems in a step-by-step manner, decomposing them into sub-problems and exploring long chains of thought before producing an answer. However, applying extended reasoning to every step introduces substantial redundancy, as sub-problems vary widely in difficulty and complexity: a small number of pivotal steps are genuinely challenging and decisive for the final answer, while many others only involve straightforward revisions or simple computations. Therefore, a natural idea is to endow reasoning models with the ability to adaptively respond to this variation, rather than treating all steps with the same level of elaboration. To this end, we propose MixReasoning, a framework that dynamically adjusts the depth of reasoning within a single response. The resulting chain of thought then becomes a mixture of detailed reasoning on difficult steps and concise inference on simpler ones. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH-500, and AIME show that MixReasoning shortens reasoning length and substantially improves efficiency without compromising accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MixReasoning框架，动态调整推理深度，在困难步骤详细推理、简单步骤简洁推理，提升效率而不损失准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前推理模型对每一步都进行扩展推理，但子问题难度各异：少数关键步骤真正困难，多数仅需简单计算或修正。统一处理导致大量冗余。因此需要模型能自适应调整推理深度，以提升效率。
light_analysis.method: MixReasoning框架通过动态决策，在单个回答中混合详细推理（困难步骤）和简洁推理（简单步骤）。具体实现未在摘要中详述，但利用步骤难度评估来切换推理模式，形成混合思维链。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K、MATH-500和AIME数据集上，MixReasoning在保持准确率不变的同时，显著缩短了推理长度，大幅提升了推理效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: MixReasoning证明了自适应推理深度的有效性，通过减少冗余步骤提升效率，适用于需要逐步推理的任务。未来可探索更精细的难度评估机制和更广泛的应用场景。

title: CLPO: Curriculum Learning meets Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Online reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models, but most methods still optimize reasoning trajectories over the static problem set, wasting rollout budget on solved or overly difficult problems. We propose \textbf{CLPO (Curriculum Learning meets Policy Optimization)}, a self-evolving curriculum framework that uses on-policy rollout accuracy to identify solved, medium-difficulty, and hard problems, then restructures selected tasks according to the model's current capability. Hard problems are simplified to become learnable, while medium-difficulty problems are diversified to provide useful training variation. This allows the learning curriculum to co-evolve with the policy rather than remaining fixed as the model's capability boundary shifts. Rather than treating these rewrites as static data augmentation, CLPO optimizes restructuring trajectories with credit assigned by the downstream accuracy gain of the rewritten problem, requiring no additional human annotations beyond the original verifiable answers. Experiments across mathematical reasoning and out-of-domain general reasoning benchmarks show that CLPO substantially outperforms GRPO and DAPO on Qwen3-8B by 10.21 and 7.75 average points, respectively. Ablation studies on math and code domains further show that both the restructuring mode and the rewriting loss contribute to the final gains, demonstrating that CLPO provides a scalable and robust pathway for eliciting stronger reasoning capabilities through a self-evolving curriculum.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLPO，一种自演化课程框架，通过在线策略rollout准确率动态重组任务难度，提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习（RLVR）虽能改善LLM推理，但现有方法在静态问题集上优化，将rollout预算浪费在已解或过难问题上，无法随模型能力变化调整训练课程。为更高效利用计算资源，需要一种能根据模型当前能力动态调整任务难度的课程学习范式。
light_analysis.method: CLPO利用在线策略rollout准确率将问题分为已解、中等和困难三类，困难问题被简化以变得可学，中等问题则多样化以增加训练变化。优化重组轨迹时，根据下游准确率增益分配信用，无需额外人工标注。该方法使课程与策略共演化，而非固定不变。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和域外通用推理基准上，CLPO在Qwen3-8B上比GRPO和DAPO平均提高10.21和7.75个点。消融实验表明重组模式和重写损失均有贡献，验证了各模块的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLPO通过自演化课程机制提供了可扩展且鲁棒的推理能力提升路径，无需人工标注。其依赖于可验证奖励，未来可探索扩展到更广泛任务，但当前在数学和代码领域已证明显著优势。

title: In-Context Learning of Temporal Point Processes with Foundation Inference Models
abstract: Modeling event sequences of multiple event types with marked temporal point processes (MTPPs) provides a principled way to uncover governing dynamical rules and predict future events. Current neural network approaches to MTPP inference rely on training separate, specialized models for each target system. We pursue a radically different approach: drawing on amortized inference and in-context learning, we pretrain a deep neural network to infer, in-context, the conditional intensity functions of event histories from a context defined by sets of event sequences. Pretraining is performed on a large synthetic dataset of MTPPs sampled from a broad distribution of Hawkes processes. Once pretrained, our Foundation Inference Model for Point Processes (FIM-PP) can estimate MTPPs from real-world data without any additional training, or be rapidly finetuned to target systems. Experiments show that this amortized approach matches the performance of specialized models on next-event prediction across common benchmark datasets.
comment: This paper is published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FIM-PP，一个基于摊销推理和上下文学习的基础模型，预训练后可直接用于真实世界时间点过程建模，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经方法需要为每个系统训练专用模型，耗时且泛化差。该研究旨在通过上下文学习实现跨系统通用推断，提高效率并降低数据需求。
light_analysis.method: 预训练深度神经网络在大规模合成MTPP数据集（来自广泛霍克斯过程分布）上，学习从事件序列上下文中推断条件强度函数。模型FIM-PP可直接应用或快速微调。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集的下一个事件预测任务中，FIM-PP无需额外训练即达到与专门模型相当的性能，验证了摊销推理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明上下文学习可在时间点过程领域实现基础模型，避免重复训练。未来可扩展至更多过程类型和动态系统建模。

title: SPECTRA: Revealing the Full Spectrum of User Preferences via Distributional LLM Inference
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to model user preferences, with the typical output as a directly-generated ranked item list per user. However, this generative paradigm inherits the bias and opacity of autoregressive decoding. It over-emphasizes frequent (head) preferences and suppresses minority, long-tail ones. To address this, we propose SPECTRA (Softmax Probing for Extracted Category-level Token Readouts and Analysis), which treats the finetuned LLM as an implicit probabilistic model and probes its softmax to infer a probability distribution over semantically interpretable preference categories. We evaluate SPECTRA on MovieLens, Yelp, and a large-scale short-video platform. SPECTRA delivers (i) distributional alignment, reducing Jensen-Shannon divergence to the empirical preference distribution by 38 to 44 percent across public datasets; (ii) long-tail recovery with cross-user fairness, raising top-3 category exposure entropy by 23 percent on MovieLens and producing a larger gain on tail-preference users than on head-preference users; and (iii) downstream application value, with a 41 to 46 percent category-NDCG boost on MovieLens and Yelp, and a 7x improvement on long-tail category ranking on a large-scale deployment against a head-optimized production ranker.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPECTRA方法，通过探测微调LLM的softmax层输出，推断语义偏好类别的概率分布，从而揭示用户完整偏好，缓解头部偏好偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM用于建模用户偏好时，直接生成排序列表存在自回归解码的偏差和透明度问题，过度强调头部偏好而抑制少数长尾偏好，导致用户偏好建模不完整，尤其忽视小众用户需求，影响公平性和推荐多样性。
light_analysis.method: SPECTRA将微调LLM视为隐式概率模型，通过探测其softmax层输出，推断语义可解释的偏好类别上的概率分布，实现对用户偏好的分布化建模。在MovieLens、Yelp和大型短视频平台数据集上评估，无需额外训练或修改模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 在公共数据集上，将JS散度降低38%-44%；在MovieLens上提升top-3类别暴露熵23%，对长尾用户增益更大；在MovieLens和Yelp上类别NDCG提升41%-46%，在大型部署中对长尾类别排名提升7倍，优于头部优化的生产排序器。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPECTRA有效揭示了用户完整偏好分布，缓解头部偏差，提升长尾用户公平性和下游推荐性能。其分布化推断范式具有学术价值，可应用于个性化推荐、用户分析等场景。未来可探索更细粒度类别或结合因果推断。

title: VFEM: Visual Feature Empowered Multivariate Time Series Forecasting with Cross-Modal Fusion
abstract: Large time series foundation models often adopt channel-independent architectures to handle varying data dimensions, but this design ignores crucial cross-channel dependencies. Meanwhile, existing cross-modal methods predominantly rely on textual modalities, leaving the spatial pattern recognition capabilities of vision models underexplored for time series analysis. To address these limitations, we propose VFEM, a cross-modal forecasting model that leverages pre-trained large vision models (LVMs) to capture complex cross-variable patterns. VFEM transforms multivariate time series into visual representations, enabling LVMs to perceive spatial relationships that are not explicitly modeled by channel-independent models. Through a dual-branch architecture, visual and temporal features are independently extracted and then fused via cross-modal attention, allowing complementary information from both modalities to enhance forecasting. By freezing the LVM and training only 7.45% of the total parameters, VFEM achieves competitive performance on multiple benchmarks, offering a new perspective on multivariate time series forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VFEM，利用预训练大视觉模型通过跨模态融合捕获多变量时间序列的交叉依赖关系，实现高效预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大规模时间序列模型常采用通道独立架构，忽略跨通道依赖；跨模态方法多依赖文本模态，未充分探索视觉模型的空间模式识别能力。该研究旨在利用视觉模型捕获多变量间的空间关系，提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: VFEM采用双分支架构：将多变量时间序列转换为视觉表示，利用预训练大视觉模型（LVM）提取空间特征；同时用时间分支提取时序特征。通过跨模态注意力融合两者信息，仅训练7.45%参数（冻结LVM），在多个基准上竞争。
light_analysis.result: 在多个时间序列基准数据集上，VFEM达到竞争性性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调仅训练少量参数（7.45%）即取得与全参数微调相当或更优的结果，验证了跨模态融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VFEM开辟了利用视觉模型进行时间序列预测的新视角，通过跨模态融合捕获交叉依赖。未来可探索更高效的视觉表示转换方法及多模态协同机制。

title: Distant Object Localisation from Noisy Image Segmentation Sequences
abstract: 3D object localisation based on a sequence of camera measurements is essential for safety-critical surveillance tasks, such as drone-based wildfire monitoring. Localisation of objects detected with a camera can typically be solved with specialised sensor configurations or 3D scene reconstruction. However, in the context of distant objects or tasks limited by the amount of available computational resources, neither solution is feasible. In this paper, we show that the task can be solved with either multi-view triangulation or particle filters, with the latter also providing shape and uncertainty estimates. We studied the solutions using 3D simulation and drone-based image segmentation sequences with global navigation satellite system (GNSS) based camera pose estimates. The results suggest that combining the proposed methods with pre-existing image segmentation models and drone-carried computational resources yields a reliable system for drone-based wildfire monitoring. The proposed solutions are independent of the detection method, also enabling quick adaptation to similar tasks. Code is available at https://fgi_nls.gitlab.io/public/distant-localisation

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合多视图三角测量和粒子滤波从噪声图像分割序列中定位远处物体的方法，用于无人机野火监测。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机野火监测等安全关键任务需要从相机序列定位远处物体。传统方法依赖特殊传感器或3D重建，但对远处物体或计算资源受限场景不可行。需轻量级、无特殊硬件的定位方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用多视图三角测量和粒子滤波两种方法，后者可估计形状和不确定性。基于3D模拟和GNSS相机位姿的无人机图像分割序列验证，方法独立于检测模型，易于迁移。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明结合现有分割模型和无人机计算资源可构建可靠野火监测系统。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了远处物体定位的可行方案，粒子滤波额外提供形状与不确定性估计。适用于计算受限的无人机场景，代码开源，可快速适配类似任务。

title: MVCL-DAF++: Enhancing Multimodal Intent Recognition via Prototype-Aware Contrastive Alignment and Coarse-to-Fine Dynamic Attention Fusion
abstract: Multimodal intent recognition (MMIR) suffers from weak semantic grounding and poor robustness under noisy or rare-class conditions. We propose MVCL-DAF++, which extends MVCL-DAF with two key modules: (1) Prototype-aware contrastive alignment, aligning instances to class-level prototypes to enhance semantic consistency; and (2) Coarse-to-fine attention fusion, integrating global modality summaries with token-level features for hierarchical cross-modal interaction. On MIntRec and MIntRec2.0, MVCL-DAF++ achieves new state-of-the-art results, improving rare-class recognition by +1.05\% and +4.18\% WF1, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of prototype-guided learning and coarse-to-fine fusion for robust multimodal understanding. The source code is available at https://github.com/chr1s623/MVCL-DAF-PlusPlus.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MVCL-DAF++，通过原型感知对比对齐和粗到细动态注意力融合，增强多模态意图识别的鲁棒性和语义一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态意图识别（MMIR）在噪声或稀有类别条件下存在语义基础薄弱和鲁棒性差的问题。现有方法难以有效利用类别级原型信息，且跨模态交互不够精细，导致对稀有类和噪声样本的识别性能不佳。该研究旨在通过原型引导的对比学习和层次化融合策略，提升模型在复杂场景下的表现。
light_analysis.method: MVCL-DAF++包含两个关键模块：1）原型感知对比对齐：将实例特征与类别级原型对齐，增强语义一致性；2）粗到细动态注意力融合：先融合全局模态摘要，再结合token级特征进行层次化跨模态交互。该方法在MIntRec和MIntRec2.0数据集上评估，利用对比学习损失和注意力机制提升表示质量。
light_analysis.result: 在MIntRec和MIntRec2.0上，MVCL-DAF++达到新最优结果。稀有类识别分别在两个数据集上提升加权F1分数1.05%和4.18%。整体性能显著优于基线方法，证明了原型引导学习和粗到细融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVCL-DAF++通过原型感知对比对齐和粗到细注意力融合，有效提升了多模态意图识别的鲁棒性，尤其在稀有类别上表现突出。该研究为多模态理解提供了新的框架，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的原型更新机制或扩展至更多模态。源代码已公开。

title: Multi-resolution Enhancement for Full Spectrum Neural Representations
abstract: Scientific data acquisition continues to outpace storage and analysis capabilities, making voxel-based representations increasingly intractable. Implicit neural representations (INRs) offer a promising solution by encoding signals through coordinate-based neural networks, serving as surrogates of data, with computational and storage requirements scaling with network complexity rather than data dimensionality. However, smaller INRs struggle to faithfully represent the multi-scale structures, high-frequency information, and fine textures that constitute a large proportion of scientific measurements. We propose WIEN-INR, a theoretically-guided hierarchical INR framework that distributes modeling across resolution scales and enables improved representation capacity through a novel enhancement network to recover subtle details. This multi-scale architecture allows smaller networks to retain the full spectrum of information while preserving training efficiency and lowering storage cost. Evaluated on distinct raw experimental measurements across scales and complexities, WIEN-INR represents a practical step toward broader adoption of neural representations in scientific workflows, delivering compact, robust, and high-fidelity representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WIEN-INR，一种理论引导的多分辨率分层隐式神经表示框架，通过增强网络恢复细节，让小网络保留全频谱信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学数据获取速度远超存储和分析能力，传统体素表示难以处理；隐式神经表示（INR）虽可缩放，但小型INR难以忠实表示多尺度结构、高频信息和精细纹理，而这些在科学测量中占比很大。
light_analysis.method: WIEN-INR采用分层架构，将建模任务分配到不同分辨率尺度，并通过新型增强网络恢复细微细节。该多尺度结构使较小网络能保留全频谱信息，同时保持训练效率并降低存储成本。
light_analysis.result: 在多种原始实验测量数据（跨尺度与复杂度）上评估，WIEN-INR实现了紧凑、鲁棒且高保真的表示，相比小型INR显著提升了多尺度与高频细节的表示能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: WIEN-INR为神经表示在科学工作流中的更广泛采用提供了实用步骤，其紧凑、鲁棒、高保真的特性有助于缓解数据存储与分析瓶颈。未来可探索扩展至更复杂的数据类型。

title: Similarity-Distance-Magnitude Activations
abstract: We introduce the Similarity-Distance-Magnitude (SDM) activation function, a more robust and interpretable formulation of the standard softmax activation function, adding Similarity (i.e., correctly predicted depth-matches into training) awareness and Distance-to-training-distribution awareness to the existing output Magnitude (i.e., decision-boundary) awareness, and enabling interpretability-by-exemplar via dense matching. We further introduce the SDM estimator, based on a data-driven partitioning of the class-wise empirical CDFs via the SDM activation, to control the class- and prediction-conditional accuracy among selective classifications. When used as the final-layer activation over pre-trained language models for selective classification, the SDM estimator is more robust to covariate shifts and out-of-distribution inputs than existing calibration methods using softmax activations, while remaining informative over in-distribution data.
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026. 21 pages, 8 tables, 1 algorithm. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2502.20167

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDM激活函数，通过融合相似性、距离和幅度信息，提升鲁棒性和可解释性，并用于选择性分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准softmax激活函数缺乏对预测匹配深度和训练分布距离的感知，导致在协变量偏移和分布外输入下校准效果不佳。现有方法无法同时提供可解释性和鲁棒性，亟需一种更鲁棒且可解释的激活函数。
light_analysis.method: 提出Similarity-Distance-Magnitude (SDM)激活函数，在softmax输出幅度基础上增加相似性（正确预测深度匹配）和距离训练分布意识，通过密集匹配实现可解释性。进一步提出SDM估计器，基于数据驱动的类别经验CDF分区，控制选择性分类中的条件准确率。在预训练语言模型最终层使用SDM激活。
light_analysis.result: 在选择性分类任务中，SDM估计器相比基于softmax的校准方法，对协变量偏移和分布外输入更鲁棒，同时保持分布内数据的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDM激活函数和估计器为深度学习模型提供了更鲁棒、可解释的输出校准方法，适用于安全关键场景。未来可探索在更广泛模型和任务上的应用。

title: I-Segmenter: Integer-Only Vision Transformer for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have recently achieved strong results in semantic segmentation, yet their deployment on resource-constrained devices remains limited due to their high memory footprint and computational cost. Quantization offers an effective strategy to improve efficiency, but ViT-based segmentation models are notoriously fragile under low precision, as quantization errors accumulate across deep encoder-decoder pipelines. We introduce I-Segmenter, the first fully integer-only ViT segmentation framework. Building on the Segmenter architecture, I-Segmenter systematically replaces floating-point operations with integer-only counterparts. To further stabilize both training and inference, we propose $λ$-ShiftGELU, a novel activation function that mitigates the limitations of uniform quantization in handling long-tailed activation distributions. In addition, we remove the L2 normalization layer and replace bilinear interpolation in the decoder with nearest neighbor upsampling, ensuring integer-only execution throughout the computational graph. Extensive experiments show that I-Segmenter achieves accuracy within a reasonable margin of its FP32 baseline (5.1 % on average), while reducing model size by up to 3.8x and enabling up to 1.2x faster inference with optimized runtimes. Notably, even in one-shot PTQ with a single calibration image, I-Segmenter delivers competitive accuracy, underscoring its practicality for real-world deployment.
comment: Accepted by the Journal of Systems Architecture

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个全整数ViT分割框架I-Segmenter，通过整数化操作和新激活函数实现高效语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: ViT在语义分割中取得强结果，但高内存和计算成本阻碍其在资源受限设备上部署。量化虽能提升效率，但ViT分割模型在低精度下极易因误差在深度编解码器中累积而精度下降。现有方法缺乏完整的全整数方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于Segmenter架构，系统地将浮点运算替换为整数运算。提出λ-ShiftGELU激活函数，缓解均匀量化在长尾激活分布中的局限。去除L2归一化层，将解码器中的双线性插值替换为最近邻上采样，确保计算图完全整数化。
light_analysis.result: I-Segmenter在平均精度上仅比FP32基线下降5.1%，模型大小减小3.8倍，推理速度提升1.2倍。即使使用单张校准图像进行一次性PTQ，依然能获得有竞争力的准确率，证明了其实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首个全整数ViT分割框架，大幅降低模型体积和推理延迟，适合实际部署。尽管精度略有牺牲，但为ViT高效分割提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化激活函数和量化策略以缩小精度差距。

title: Video Understanding by Design: How Datasets Shape Video Models
abstract: Research in video understanding has advanced rapidly, driven by increasingly diverse datasets and more powerful model architectures. While existing surveys typically organize progress by tasks, benchmarks, or model families, they provide limited insight into why particular architectures emerged and succeeded. In this survey, we argue that the evolution of video understanding is fundamentally shaped by dataset structure. We present a dataset-centric perspective that connects dataset structure, inductive biases, and architectural design within a unified framework. We show that different datasets require models to capture specific invariances and capabilities, such as robustness to viewpoint changes, sensitivity to temporal ordering, reasoning over long-range dependencies, relational interactions, and cross-modal alignment. These requirements naturally give rise to inductive biases, i.e., architectural assumptions that favor particular patterns of reasoning and generalization. From this perspective, milestone architectures, including two-stream networks, 3D CNNs, temporal models, transformers, graph-based methods, and multimodal foundation models, can be understood as architectural responses to the challenges posed by evolving datasets. Building on this framework, we systematically analyze how dataset characteristics have shaped architectural innovation across video understanding tasks and discuss the representational biases induced by different data regimes. By unifying datasets, inductive biases, and architectures into a coherent perspective, this survey offers both a retrospective explanation of the field's evolution and a forward-looking roadmap toward general-purpose video understanding systems. Code and dynamic video visualizations of dataset-induced biases are available at https://time.griffith.edu.au/paper-sites/video-understanding/.

light_analysis.overview: 从数据集结构视角统一解释视频理解架构演化的综述，揭示数据集如何通过归纳偏置塑造模型设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频理解综述多按任务、基准或模型族组织，但未解释特定架构为何出现与成功。本文认为数据集结构是根本驱动力。理解这一关系对设计通用视频系统、避免盲目追求模型复杂性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出数据集中心视角框架，连接数据集结构、归纳偏置与架构设计。分析数据集要求（如视角鲁棒性、时序敏感性、长程依赖）如何催生归纳偏置，并系统解释双流网络、3D CNN、Transformer、图方法等里程碑架构作为对应数据集挑战的响应。
light_analysis.result: 通过统一框架系统分析数据集特征如何塑造架构创新，揭示不同数据 regime 带来的表征偏置。提供代码与动态视频可视化展示数据集诱导偏置的效果。为视频理解领域演进提供回顾性解释与前瞻性路线图。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述强调数据集设计对模型演化的根本作用，有助于研究者理解现有架构起源并指导未来通用视频理解系统开发。潜在局限包括对特定数据集偏置的量化分析尚不充分，未来需进一步建立预测性理论。

title: Decoupling the "What" and "Where" With Polar Coordinate Positional Embeddings
abstract: The attention mechanism in a Transformer architecture matches key to query based on both content -- the what -- and position in a sequence -- the where. We present an analysis indicating that what and where are entangled in the popular RoPE rotary position embedding. This entanglement can impair performance particularly when decisions require independent matches on these two factors. We propose an improvement to RoPE, which we call Polar Coordinate Position Embeddings or PoPE, that eliminates the what-where confound. PoPE is far superior on a diagnostic task requiring indexing solely by position or by content. On autoregressive sequence modeling in music, genomic, and natural language domains, Transformers using PoPE as the positional encoding scheme outperform baselines using RoPE with respect to evaluation loss (perplexity) and downstream task performance. On language modeling, these gains persist across model scale, from 124M to 774M parameters. Crucially, PoPE shows strong zero-shot length extrapolation capabilities compared not only to RoPE but even a method designed for extrapolation, YaRN, which requires additional fine tuning and frequency interpolation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PoPE位置编码，解耦RoPE中的内容和位置信息，提升序列建模性能并实现强零样本长度外推。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer中注意力机制同时匹配内容和位置，但流行的RoPE旋转位置嵌入将两者纠缠，导致在需要独立匹配的任务中性能受损。此问题在序列索引、长序列外推等场景尤为突出，现有方法如YaRN需额外微调，缺乏零样本能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出极坐标位置嵌入（PoPE），通过将位置编码分解为径向和角度分量，消除内容和位置的相互干扰。PoPE直接替代RoPE，无需修改注意力架构，在音乐、基因组和自然语言领域的自回归序列建模中测试，模型规模从124M到774M参数。
light_analysis.result: 在诊断任务中，PoPE按位置或内容索引的性能远超RoPE。在语言建模、音乐和基因组数据集上，PoPE的困惑度低于RoPE基线。在语言模型上，优势随模型规模（124M–774M）保持。零样本长度外推能力优于RoPE和需微调的YaRN，无需频率插值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PoPE有效解耦注意力中的内容和位置，提升多领域序列建模性能，尤其具备出色的零样本长度外推能力，避免额外训练。未来可探索其在长序列任务和跨模态场景的应用，以及与其他编码方式的组合。

title: CardioMorphNet: Cardiac Motion Prediction Using a Shape-Guided Bayesian Recurrent Deep Network
abstract: Accurate cardiac motion estimation from cine cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) images is vital for assessing cardiac function and detecting its abnormalities. Existing methods often struggle to accurately capture heart motion because they rely on intensity-based image registration similarity losses that may overlook cardiac anatomical regions. To address this, we propose CardioMorphNet, a recurrent Bayesian deep learning framework for 3D cardiac shape-guided deformable registration using short-axis (SAX) CMR images. It employs a recurrent variational autoencoder to model spatio-temporal dependencies across the cardiac cycle, along with two posterior models for bi-ventricular segmentation and motion estimation. The derived loss function from the Bayesian formulation guides the framework to focus on anatomical regions by recursively registering segmentation maps without using intensity-based image registration similarity loss, while leveraging sequential SAX volumes and spatio-temporal features. The Bayesian modelling also enables the computation of uncertainty maps for the estimated motion fields. Validated on the UK Biobank and M&M datasets by comparing warped mask shapes with ground-truth masks, CardioMorphNet demonstrates superior performance in cardiac motion estimation, outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Uncertainty assessment shows that it also yields lower uncertainty values for estimated motion fields in the cardiac region compared with other probabilistic-based cardiac registration methods, indicating higher confidence in its predictions. In addition, the clinical indices extraction assessment shows that CardioMorphNet estimates the clinical indices more accurately than other approaches.
comment: Published in Medical Image Analysis. Updated to match the final published version

light_analysis.overview: 提出CardioMorphNet，一种基于形状引导的贝叶斯循环深度网络，实现3D心脏运动估计，无需强度图像配准相似度损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确的心脏运动估计对评估心脏功能和检测异常至关重要。现有方法依赖基于强度的图像配准相似度损失，可能忽略心脏解剖区域，导致运动捕捉不准确。该研究旨在通过形状引导的贝叶斯框架解决这一问题，提升运动估计的解剖区域关注度和精确性。
light_analysis.method: CardioMorphNet采用循环变分自编码器建模心脏周期的时空依赖，结合两个后验模型分别用于双心室分割和运动估计。贝叶斯推导的损失函数通过递归配准分割图引导框架关注解剖区域，无需强度相似度损失，并利用短轴CMR图像序列和时空特征。贝叶斯建模还提供运动场的不确定性图。
light_analysis.result: 在UK Biobank和M&M数据集上验证，通过比较扭曲掩膜形状与真实掩膜，CardioMorphNet在心脏运动估计中优于现有方法。不确定性评估显示，其对于心脏区域运动场的不确定性值低于其他基于概率的心脏配准方法，表明预测置信度更高。临床指标提取评估也表明其更准确。
light_analysis.conclusion: CardioMorphNet通过形状引导的贝叶斯框架有效提升心脏运动估计的准确性，避免强度配准的缺陷，并提供不确定性量化。该研究具有临床价值，可用于更精确的心功能评估。未来可探索扩展到其他心脏成像模态或实时应用。

title: Collab-REC: An LLM-based Agentic Framework for Balancing Recommendations in Tourism
abstract: We propose COLLAB-REC, a multi-agent framework designed to counteract popularity bias and improve diversity in tourism recommendations. In our setup, three LLM-based agents(Personalization, Popularity, and Sustainability) generate city suggestions from different perspectives. A non-LLM moderator then merges and refines these proposals through iterative constrained refinement, ensuring that each agent's viewpoint is represented while reducing spurious or repeated outputs.   Extensive offline experiments on European city queries using LLMs of different sizes and model families show that COLLAB-REC improves both diversity and overall relevance compared to a single-agent baseline, while surfacing lesser-visited destinations that are often overlooked. This balanced, context-aware approach better captures a broader range of user and system-level considerations, highlighting the potential of multi-stakeholder collaboration in LLM-driven recommender systems.   Code, data, and other artifacts are available here: https://github.com/ashmibanerjee/collab-rec, while the prompts used are included in the appendix.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Collab-REC多智能体框架，利用LLM代理和非LLM仲裁者平衡旅游推荐中的流行度偏差和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 旅游推荐系统常受流行度偏差影响，过度推荐热门景点而忽略小众目的地，导致用户体验单一。现有方法缺乏多视角平衡，难以兼顾个性化、流行度和可持续性。该研究旨在通过多智能体协作，提供更均衡、上下文感知的推荐，提升用户满意度并促进旅游资源的合理分配。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含三个LLM代理（个性化、流行度、可持续性），各自独立生成城市建议；非LLM仲裁者通过迭代约束精炼合并优化，减少重复输出并确保各方观点。实验采用不同规模和系列的LLM对欧洲城市查询进行离线评估。
light_analysis.result: 与单代理基线相比，Collab-REC在多样性和整体相关性上显著提升，成功推荐了更多冷门目的地。具体指标显示推荐多样性增加，同时未牺牲相关性，验证了多代理协作的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了多利益相关者协作在LLM驱动推荐系统中的潜力，平衡了用户偏好与系统目标。开源代码和数据支持复现，未来可扩展至更多领域，但需注意代理协调的计算开销。

title: Disjoint Generation of Synthetic Data
abstract: We propose a new framework for generating tabular synthetic datasets via disjoint generative models. In this paradigm, a dataset is partitioned into disjoint subsets that are supplied to separate instances of generative models. The results are then combined post hoc by a joining operation that works in the absence of common variables/identifiers. The success of the framework is demonstrated through several case studies and examples on tabular data that help illuminate some of the design choices that one may make. The advantages achieved by the disjoint generation include: i) An observed increase in the empirical measurement of privacy. ii) Increased computational feasibility of certain model types. iii) Ability to generate synthetic data using a mixture of different generative models. Specifically, mixed-model synthesis bridges the gap between privacy and utility performance, providing highly competitive performance on Accuracy and Area Under the Curve for downstream tasks while significantly lowering the empirical re-identification risk.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于不相交生成模型的表格合成数据生成框架，通过分割数据集并后连接操作，提升隐私保护、计算可行性，并支持混合模型以平衡隐私与效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有合成数据生成方法在隐私保护与数据效用之间难以平衡，且面临计算负担大、单一模型局限性等问题。该研究旨在通过数据分割与后连接策略，在不损伤数据可用性的前提下，增强隐私性并提升模型灵活性，满足多样化生成需求。
light_analysis.method: 将原始数据集划分为多个不相交子集，每个子集由独立的生成模型（如VAE、GAN等）训练合成，然后通过无需共同标识符的连接操作合并结果。框架支持混合模型合成，即不同子集可采用不同类型的生成模型，以优化隐私与效用权衡。未明确具体模型架构及数据集规模。
light_analysis.result: 通过案例研究验证，该方法在实证隐私测量上表现提升（降低重识别风险），计算可行性增强，且混合模型合成在下游任务（如分类）中达到与全数据集相当的准确性和AUC，同时显著降低经验重识别风险。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为表格合成数据生成提供了新范式，通过不相交生成与后连接有效平衡隐私与效用，具有较高的学术价值。实际应用中可安全共享敏感数据。未来需进一步探索子集划分策略与连接操作优化，以及在不同数据类型上的泛化能力。

title: Analysis of Information Theory for Explainable AI
abstract: With the intervention of machine vision in our crucial day to day necessities including healthcare and automated power plants, attention has been drawn to the internal mechanisms of convolutional neural networks, and the reason why the network provides specific inferences. This paper proposes a novel post-hoc visual explanation method called MI CAM based on activation mapping. Differing from previous class activation mapping based approaches, MI CAM produces saliency visualizations by weighing each feature map through its mutual information with the input image and the final result is generated by a linear combination of weights and activation maps. It also adheres to producing causal interpretations as validated with the help of counterfactual analysis. We aim to exhibit the visual performance and unbiased justifications for the model inferencing procedure achieved by MI CAM. Our approach works at par with all state-of-the-art methods but particularly outperforms some in terms of qualitative and quantitative measures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于互信息的类激活映射方法MI CAM，用于生成可解释的卷积神经网络可视化。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器视觉在医疗、自动电厂等关键领域的应用要求理解CNN内部机制，现有类激活映射方法缺乏因果解释和公平性，亟需一种能提供无偏且可解释的可视化方法。
light_analysis.method: MI CAM通过计算每个特征图与输入图像的互信息作为权重，加权线性组合特征图和激活图生成显著性图，并采用反事实分析验证因果解释。
light_analysis.result: MI CAM与所有现有方法性能相当，在部分定性和定量指标上尤其优于其他方法，但摘要未提供具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: MI CAM提供了视觉上良好且无偏的模型推理解释，具有因果解释能力，未来可进一步优化互信息计算效率。

title: Failure by Interference: Language Models Make Balanced Parentheses Errors When Faulty Mechanisms Overshadow Sound Ones
abstract: Despite remarkable advances in coding capabilities, language models (LMs) still struggle with simple syntactic tasks such as generating balanced parentheses. In this study, we investigate the underlying mechanisms behind the persistence of these errors across LMs of varying sizes (124M-7B) to both understand and mitigate the errors. Our study reveals that LMs rely on a number of components (attention heads and FF neurons) that independently make their own predictions. While some components reliably promote correct answers across a generalized range of inputs (i.e., implementing "sound mechanisms''), others are less reliable and introduce noise by promoting incorrect tokens (i.e., implementing "faulty mechanisms''). Errors occur when the faulty mechanisms overshadow the sound ones and dominantly affect the predictions. Motivated by this insight, we introduce RASteer, a steering method to systematically identify and increase the contribution of reliable components for improving model performance. RASteer substantially improves performance on balanced parentheses tasks, boosting accuracy of some models from $0$% to around $100$% without impairing the models' general coding ability. We further demonstrate its broader applicability in arithmetic reasoning tasks, achieving performance gains of up to around $20$%.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示语言模型在平衡括号任务中错误源于可靠机制被故障机制压制，并提出RASteer方法提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在编码任务中表现优异，但在平衡括号等简单语法任务上仍有错误。现有研究未深入探究错误机制。本文旨在理解错误根源，发现模型依赖的多个组件独立预测，而故障机制会压制可靠机制导致错误。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过分析不同规模LMs（124M-7B）的注意力头和FF神经元，发现存在独立预测的组件。可靠组件泛化性好，故障组件引入噪声。提出RASteer方法，系统识别可靠组件并增加其贡献，从而纠正错误。
light_analysis.result: 在平衡括号任务上，RASteer将某些模型准确率从0%提升至接近100%，且不损害一般编码能力。在算术推理任务上，性能提升高达约20%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LM错误的新机制，并提出有效干预方法RASteer。该方法在平衡括号任务上效果显著，并推广到算术推理。未来可探索更复杂任务的应用，局限性可能在于需要识别可靠组件。

title: Structural Decoupling: A Scaffold-Flow Theory of Generalization and Alignment
abstract: Learning in non-stationary and multi-context environments requires more than ordinary within-task generalization. A system must also discover which contexts exist, route inputs to the correct context, preserve old contexts, and revise the context library when the environment changes. This paper presents Structural Learning Theory (StrLT) as a framework of filling this missing structural gap. StrLT complements Vapnik's Statistical Learning Theory (SLT): SLT governs the \emph{funnel}, prediction or control within a fixed regime; while StrLT governs the \emph{trap}, the discovery and maintenance of structural regimes. The core StrLT object is \emph{width}, the minimum number of locally feasible contexts needed to cover a problem. We summarize three basic results: width is incomparable with VC dimension; learning exhibits a phase transition at the true width; and width can be estimated by a contractive-similarity (CS) operator that converts task-induced non-contractivity into spectral separation. Under the StrLT framework, we explain how fixed-class structural learnability leads to a \emph{structural decoupling principle}: the mechanisms that maintain the structural scaffold should not be trained by the same gradients that optimize within-context flow. This principle motivates a scaffold-flow model in which alignment and generalization separate architecturally. Finally, we argue that several safety failures, including hallucination, reward-model boundary errors, and deceptive alignment, can be interpreted as scaffold-resolution or scaffold-preservation failures rather than merely output-level prediction errors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构性学习理论（StrLT）和结构解耦原则，用于非平稳多上下文环境下的泛化与对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有学习理论如统计学习理论仅适用于固定上下文内的泛化，无法处理多上下文环境中的上下文发现、路由、保留和更新问题。这些能力对于非平稳和动态环境至关重要，但缺乏系统性的理论框架。该研究旨在填补这一结构性空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出StrLT，核心概念是宽度，即覆盖问题所需的最小局部可行上下文数。证明宽度与VC维不可比较，学习在真实宽度处发生相变，宽度可通过缩并相似性算子估计。基于此提出结构解耦原则：维护结构骨架的机制不应与优化上下文内流使用相同梯度，从而在架构上分离对齐与泛化。
light_analysis.result: 总结了三个基本结果：宽度与VC维不可比较；学习在真实宽度处发生相变；宽度可通过缩并相似性算子估计。框架下解释了幻觉、奖励模型边界错误和欺骗性对齐等安全故障是骨架分辨率或保留失败的结果，而非单纯输出错误。
light_analysis.conclusion: StrLT补充了统计学习理论，为多上下文学习提供理论框架，结构解耦原则指导架构设计以避免安全故障。该工作具有重要学术价值，为构建鲁棒和可对齐的AI系统提供新视角，未来可探索具体实现和实验验证。

title: The Sample Complexity of Parameter-Free Stochastic Convex Optimization
abstract: We study the sample complexity of stochastic convex optimization when problem parameters such as the distance to optimality and the Lipschitz constant are unknown. We pursue two strategies. First, we develop a reliable model selection method that avoids overfitting to the validation set. This method allows us to generically tune the learning rate of stochastic optimization methods to match the optimal known-parameter sample complexity up to log log factors. Second, we develop a regularization-based method that is specialized to the case that only the distance to optimality is unknown. More specifically, it uses norm-regularized empirical risk minimization to estimate the distance to optimality to within a constant factor, allowing known-parameter stochastic optimization methods to achieve optimal sample complexity. This method provides perfect adaptability to unknown distance to optimality, demonstrating a separation between the sample and computational complexity of parameter-free stochastic convex optimization. Combining these two methods allows us to simultaneously adapt to multiple problem structures.   Experiments performing few-shot learning on CIFAR-10 by fine-tuning CLIP models and prompt engineering Gemini to count shapes indicate that our reliable model selection method can help mitigate overfitting to small validation sets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种无需参数的随机凸优化方法，实现最优样本复杂度，并证明可结合适应多种结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机凸优化中距离和Lipschitz常数通常未知，现有方法依赖参数已知或需手动调参，导致样本效率低下。本文旨在消除对参数的依赖，在未知参数下达到最优样本复杂度，解决实际应用中的自适应需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种策略：1）可靠模型选择方法，通过避免过拟合验证集通用调整学习率，达到最优样本复杂度（至多对数因子损失）；2）正则化方法，针对仅距离未知，使用范数正则化经验风险最小化估计距离常数因子，然后应用已知参数方法。两者结合可同时适应多种问题结构。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析证明两种方法均达到最优样本复杂度，正则化方法展示了样本与计算复杂度的分离。实验上，在CIFAR-10少样本学习（微调CLIP）和Gemini计数形状任务中，可靠模型选择方法有效缓解了小验证集上的过拟合。
