light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为参数未知的随机凸优化提供了理论完备的样本复杂度解决方案，具有重要理论价值，并可应用于少样本学习等实际场景。未来可探索更复杂非凸优化的自适应方法。

title: ACTIVE-o3: Empowering MLLMs with Active Perception via Pure Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Active vision, also known as active perception, refers to actively selecting where and how to look in order to gather task-relevant information. It is a critical component of efficient perception and decision-making in humans and advanced embodied agents. With the rise of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as central planners in robotic systems, the lack of methods for equipping MLLMs with active perception has become a key gap. We first provide a systematic definition of MLLM-based active perception tasks and show that GPT-o3's zoom-in strategy can be viewed as a special case, though it suffers from low efficiency and inaccurate region selection. To address these issues, we propose ACTIVE-o3, a reinforcement learning framework built on GRPO that equips MLLMs with active perception capabilities. Leveraging a modular sensing-action design and a dual-form reward, ACTIVE-o3 autonomously learns efficient and stable region selection strategies without explicit region-selection supervision. We further establish a comprehensive benchmark covering both open-world tasks, including small- and dense-object grounding, and domain-specific scenarios, including remote sensing, autonomous driving, and interactive segmentation. Experimental results demonstrate that ACTIVE-o3 significantly enhances active perception capabilities compared to baselines. Moreover, we show that our framework not only preserves the model's general understanding ability but can also serve as a proxy task for leveraging perception data, further improving performance on benchmarks such as RealWorldQA and MME.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Project page: https://aim-uofa.github.io/ACTIVE-o3

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACTIVE-o3框架，通过纯强化学习（GRPO）赋予多模态大模型主动感知能力，无需显式区域选择监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动感知是高效感知和决策的关键，但现有MLLMs缺乏主动感知能力。GPT-o3的缩放策略虽是一种特殊形式，但效率低且区域选择不准确。论文旨在解决MLLMs在机器人系统中作为中央规划器时，无法自主进行主动感知的问题，填补该领域的方法空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）的强化学习框架。采用模块化感知-动作设计，结合双形式奖励（dual-form reward），使MLLM无需区域选择监督即可学习高效稳定的区域选择策略。涵盖开放世界任务（小/密集目标定位）和领域特定场景（遥感、自动驾驶、交互分割）。
light_analysis.result: 在主动感知任务上显著优于基线方法。框架不仅保留模型通用理解能力，还可作为代理任务利用感知数据，进一步提升在RealWorldQA和MME等基准上的性能。摘要未说明具体数值提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACTIVE-o3首次系统定义MLLM主动感知任务，并提出纯强化学习解决方案，兼具高效性和通用性。具备实际应用价值：提升机器人在复杂场景中的感知决策能力。潜在局限：可能依赖任务配置，未来可探索更泛化的主动感知策略。

title: ePC: Fast and Deep Predictive Coding in Digital Simulation
abstract: Predictive Coding (PC) offers a brain-inspired alternative to backpropagation for neural network training, described as a physical system minimizing its internal energy. However, in practice, PC is predominantly digitally simulated, requiring excessive amounts of compute while struggling to scale to deeper architectures. This paper reformulates PC to overcome this hardware-algorithm mismatch. First, we uncover how the canonical state-based formulation of PC (sPC) is, by design, deeply inefficient in digital simulation, inevitably resulting in exponential signal decay that stalls the entire minimization process. Then, to overcome this fundamental limitation, we introduce error-based PC (ePC), a novel reparameterization of PC which does not suffer from signal decay. Though no longer biologically plausible, ePC numerically computes exact PC weights gradients and runs orders of magnitude faster than sPC. Experiments across multiple architectures and datasets demonstrate that ePC matches backpropagation's performance even for deeper models where sPC struggles. Besides practical improvements, our work provides theoretical insight into PC dynamics and establishes a foundation for scaling PC-based learning to deeper architectures on digital hardware and beyond.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 - Main Track. All code available at https://github.com/cgoemaere/error_based_PC

light_analysis.overview: 提出误差基预测编码（ePC），解决数字仿真中信号衰减问题，大幅提升计算效率并匹配反向传播性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测编码（PC）是一种类脑的神经网络训练方法，但在数字仿真中，传统状态基PC（sPC）因信号指数衰减导致优化停滞，且难以扩展到深层架构，计算开销巨大。现有PC方法存在硬件-算法不匹配，限制了其实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 本文重新参数化预测编码，提出误差基PC（ePC），通过数值精确计算权重梯度避免信号衰减。ePC不再追求生物合理性，但能在数字仿真中高效运行，计算速度比sPC快数个数量级。实验采用多种架构和数据集验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多架构和多数据集实验中，ePC匹配了反向传播的性能，尤其在深层模型中sPC表现不佳时仍能保持。ePC运算速度比sPC快数个数量级，无信号衰减问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: ePC解决了PC在数字仿真中的根本局限性，提供了理论洞察，为PC扩展到深层架构和数字硬件奠定了基础。虽失去生物合理性，但实用性强，未来可探索混合方法。

title: Efficient and Stealthy Jailbreak Attacks via Adversarial Prompt Distillation from LLMs to SLMs
abstract: Current jailbreak attacks on large language models (LLMs) predominantly rely on LLMs themselves to generate adversarial prompts, creating a critical efficiency bottleneck: each attack requires substantial computational resources and API queries, limiting scalability and practical deployment. To overcome this limitation, we propose Adversarial Prompt Distillation (APD), a novel framework that transfers jailbreaking capabilities from LLMs to small language models (SLMs) for efficient, low-resource attacks. APD integrates three key components: (1) masked adversarial knowledge pre-training via LoRA fine-tuning, (2) dynamic temperature-controlled knowledge distillation to bridge architectural gaps, and (3) reinforcement learning-based template optimization for adaptive refinement. Extensive experiments across 12 models show that APD achieves state-of-the-art attack success rates (e.g., 96.4% ASR_k on GPT-4) while dramatically improving efficiency - generating prompts 3.7x faster with 11.3x fewer parameters than teacher models. Our work establishes the first practical framework for lightweight jailbreak attacks, exposes new vulnerabilities in LLM defenses, and provides a scalable testbed for advancing AI safety research. Our code is available at: https://github.com/lxgem/Efficient_and_Stealthy_Jailbreak_Attacks_via_Adversarial_Prompt.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对抗提示蒸馏框架，将LLM越狱能力迁移至SLM，实现高效低资源攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大语言模型越狱攻击主要依赖LLM生成对抗提示，导致计算资源和API查询开销巨大，限制了可扩展性和实际部署。现有方法效率低下，难以大规模应用。因此，需要一种轻量级、低成本的攻击框架，以揭示LLM防御漏洞并推动AI安全研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出对抗提示蒸馏（APD）框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 基于LoRA微调的掩码对抗知识预训练；2) 动态温度控制的知识蒸馏，弥合架构差异；3) 基于强化学习的模板优化，实现自适应改进。通过将LLM的越狱能力迁移至小型语言模型，实现高效攻击。
light_analysis.result: 在12个模型上实验，APD达到最先进攻击成功率，如GPT-4上ASR_k达96.4%。同时大幅提升效率：提示生成速度比教师模型快3.7倍，参数量减少11.3倍。验证了轻量级越狱攻击的可行性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: APD首次建立轻量级越狱攻击框架，暴露LLM防御新漏洞，为AI安全研究提供可扩展的测试平台。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略及防御机制。代码已开源。

title: Robust Renal Mass Segmentation on CT: A Validation Study of an AI-Based Framework
abstract: Renal mass segmentation has important potential to enhance the clinical workflow, especially in settings requiring quantitative assessments. Kidney volume could serve as an important biomarker for renal diseases, with changes in volume correlating directly with kidney function. Currently, clinical practice often relies on subjective visual assessment for evaluating kidney size and kidney lesions, including tumors and cysts, which are typically staged based on diameter, volume, and anatomical location. To support a more objective and reproducible approach, this research aims to develop a robust, thoroughly validated renal mass segmentation algorithm, named Renal-Net. We employ publicly available training datasets and leverage the state-of-the-art medical image segmentation framework nnU-Net. Validation is conducted using both proprietary and public test datasets, with segmentation performance quantified by Dice coefficient and the 95th percentile Hausdorff distance. Furthermore, we analyze robustness across subgroups based on patient sex, age, CT contrast phases, and tumor histologic subtypes. Our findings demonstrate that our segmentation algorithm, trained exclusively on publicly available data, generalizes effectively to external test sets and outperforms existing state-of-the-art models across all tested datasets. Subgroup analyses reveal consistent high performance, indicating strong robustness and reliability. The developed algorithm and associated code are publicly accessible at https://github.com/DIAGNijmegen/oncology-kidney-abnormality-segmentation.
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2026:012. 23 pages, 12 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于nnU-Net的稳健肾脏肿块分割算法Renal-Net，验证其跨数据集泛化能力和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 肾脏体积是肾功能的重要生物标志物，但临床实践中依赖主观视觉评估，缺乏客观性和可重复性。现有方法可能泛化不足，需要一种稳健、经过充分验证的分割算法以提升定量评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 采用公开训练集，基于nnU-Net框架开发Renal-Net。使用Dice系数和95% Hausdorff距离评估性能，并在私有和公开测试集上验证。分析基于性别、年龄、CT增强期、肿瘤组织学亚型的亚组鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: Renal-Net在外部测试集上有效泛化，优于现有最先进模型。亚组分析显示一致的高性能，表明强鲁棒性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该算法可公开获取，有助于临床工作流程中客观、可重复的肾脏肿块分割。未来可扩展至其他病变或数据集。

title: Enhancing Strawberry Yield Forecasting with Backcasted IoT Sensor Data and Machine Learning
abstract: Rapid global population growth underscores the need for digitally enabled agricultural systems that support sustainable food production and data-driven resource management for farmers and stakeholders. The adoption of Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, capable of capturing real-time environmental (e.g., temperature, humidity) and operational (e.g., irrigation) parameters, is a crucial step toward enabling advanced applications such as AI-based yield forecasting. However, the effectiveness of such models is often constrained by limited data availability, particularly in dynamic farm environments where IoT observations must be accumulated over multiple growing seasons. In this study, we deployed IoT sensors in strawberry production polytunnels over two growing seasons to collect data on water usage, internal and external temperature and humidity, soil moisture, soil temperature, and photosynthetically active radiation. These observations were combined with manually recorded yield data spanning four seasons. To address gaps in IoT data for the two seasons without sensor coverage, we developed an AI-based backcasting approach that synthesizes missing sensor observations using historical weather data from a nearby station and existing polytunnel measurements. We then trained AI-based yield forecasting models using both real and synthetic datasets. In this retrospective evaluation, results show that incorporating synthetic data improved yield forecasting accuracy, with models trained on the combined dataset outperforming those using only real sensor, weather, and yield data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI反向预测方法合成缺失IoT传感器数据，结合真实与合成数据提升草莓产量预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球人口增长需要数字化农业支持可持续生产，IoT技术可捕获实时环境与操作参数，但产量预测模型常受限于数据不足，尤其在动态农场环境中需多个生长季节积累观测数据。现有方法因数据缺失导致模型效果受限，亟需解决数据稀疏问题。
light_analysis.method: 在两个生长季节部署IoT传感器收集水用量、温湿度、土壤温湿度、光合有效辐射等数据，结合四个季节的手动记录产量数据。针对无传感器覆盖的两个季节，提出基于AI的反向预测方法，利用附近气象站历史数据和现有塑料大棚测量值合成缺失传感器观测值。然后使用真实与合成数据集训练AI产量预测模型。
light_analysis.result: 回顾性评估显示，结合合成数据训练的模型在产量预测精度上优于仅使用真实传感器、气象和产量数据的模型。具体改进指标未明确给出，但表明合成数据有效提升预测准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究工作证明AI反向预测可有效填补IoT数据空白，增强产量预测模型性能，为数据驱动的精准农业提供实用方案。未来可在更多作物和环境验证该方法，并探索实时数据融合策略。

title: Hummus: A Dataset of Humorous Multimodal Metaphor Use
abstract: Metaphor and humor share a lot of common ground, and metaphor is one of the most common humorous mechanisms. This study focuses on the humorous capacity of multimodal metaphors, which has not received due attention in the community. We take inspiration from the Incongruity Theory of humor, the Conceptual Metaphor Theory, and the annotation scheme behind the VU Amsterdam Metaphor Corpus, and developed a novel annotation scheme for humorous multimodal metaphor use in image-caption pairs. We create the Hummus Dataset of Humorous Multimodal Metaphor Use, providing expert annotation on 1k image-caption pairs sampled from the New Yorker Caption Contest corpus. Using the dataset, we test state-of-the-art multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on their ability to detect and understand humorous multimodal metaphor use. Our experiments show that current MLLMs still struggle with processing humorous multimodal metaphors, particularly with regard to integrating visual and textual information. We release our dataset and code at github.com/xiaoyuisrain/humorous-multimodal-metaphor-use.

light_analysis.overview: 创建了首个幽默多模态隐喻数据集Hummus，并评估了多模态大语言模型在幽默多模态隐喻检测和理解上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐喻是常见幽默机制，但多模态隐喻的幽默性未得到充分研究。现有工作缺乏针对幽默多模态隐喻的标注方案和数据集，导致难以评估模型对这类复杂语义现象的理解。本研究旨在填补这一空白，推动多模态幽默理解研究。
light_analysis.method: 基于幽默的乖讹理论、概念隐喻理论和VU Amsterdam Metaphor Corpus的标注方案，开发了新的多模态幽默隐喻标注体系。从New Yorker Caption Contest语料库中采样1000个图像-标题对，构建Hummus数据集。使用该数据集测试了多个多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的幽默隐喻检测和理解能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前多模态大语言模型在处理幽默多模态隐喻时表现不佳，尤其在整合视觉与文本信息方面存在困难。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但指出模型仍面临挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作贡献了首个针对幽默多模态隐喻的数据集Hummus，提供标注方案和基准测试。实验结果揭示了现有MLLMs的局限性，为未来研究指明方向。数据集和代码已公开，促进社区发展。

title: phepy: Visual benchmarks and improvements for out-of-distribution detectors
abstract: Applying machine learning to increasingly high-dimensional problems with sparse or biased training data increases the risk that a model is used on inputs outside its training domain. For such out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, the model can no longer make valid predictions, and its error is potentially unbounded. Since testing OOD detection methods on real-world datasets is complicated, we design a benchmark for OOD detection, which includes three novel and easily-visualisable toy examples. These simple examples provide direct and intuitive insight into whether the detector is able to detect (1) linear and (2) non-linear concepts and (3) identify thin in-distribution (ID) subspaces (needles) within high-dimensional spaces (haystacks). We use our benchmark to evaluate the performance of various methods from the literature. Since tactile examples of OOD inputs may benefit OOD detection, we also review several simple methods to synthesise OOD inputs for supervised training. We introduce two improvements, $t$-poking and OOD sample weighting, to make supervised detectors more precise at the ID-OOD boundary. This is especially important when conflicts between real ID and synthetic OOD sample blur the decision boundary. Finally, we provide recommendations for constructing and applying OOD detectors in machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 设计包含三个可视化玩具示例的OOD检测基准，并提出t-poking和OOD样本加权改进监督式检测器。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习模型在高维稀疏或偏斜数据上应用时，易遇到训练域外的输入（OOD），导致预测无效且误差可能无限。现有OOD检测方法在实际数据集上测试复杂，缺乏直观且系统的基准来评估检测器对不同类型OOD概念（线性、非线性、高维稀疏子空间）的识别能力。此外，如何有效合成OOD样本以提升监督训练效果也是关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含三个玩具示例的基准，分别测试检测器对线性、非线性概念以及高维空间中稀疏ID子空间（针）的检测能力。在此基础上，针对监督式OOD检测，引入t-poking（扰动真实ID样本与合成OOD样本的边界）和OOD样本加权（调整冲突样本的损失权重）两种改进，以提高ID-OOD边界的精确性。
light_analysis.result: 利用基准评估了文献中多种OOD检测方法，展示了不同方法在三种玩具示例上的性能差异。实验表明，t-poking和OOD样本加权能有效提升监督式检测器在边界上的精确度，特别是当真实ID与合成OOD样本冲突时。摘要未提供具体数值，但通过可视化示例直观对比了改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为OOD检测提供了直观的基准和实用改进策略，有助于研究者快速评估检测器能力。t-poking和加权方法可提升边界精度，但需注意合成样本与真实ID的冲突问题。未来可探索更复杂的合成方法及在多模态数据上的应用，但摘要未明确限定。

title: In-Context Learning of Stochastic Differential Equations with Foundation Inference Models
abstract: Stochastic differential equations (SDEs) describe dynamical systems where deterministic flows, governed by a drift function, are superimposed with random fluctuations, dictated by a diffusion function. The accurate estimation (or discovery) of these functions from data is a central problem in machine learning, with wide application across the natural and social sciences. Yet current solutions either rely heavily on prior knowledge of the dynamics or involve intricate training procedures. We introduce FIM-SDE (Foundation Inference Model for SDEs), a pretrained recognition model that delivers accurate in-context (or zero-shot) estimation of the drift and diffusion functions of low-dimensional SDEs, from noisy time series data, and allows rapid finetuning to target datasets. Leveraging concepts from amortized inference and neural operators, we (pre)train FIM-SDE in a supervised fashion to map a large set of noisy, discretely observed SDE paths onto the space of drift and diffusion functions. We demonstrate that FIM-SDE achieves robust in-context function estimation across a wide range of synthetic and real-world processes -- from canonical SDE systems (e.g., double-well dynamics or weakly perturbed Lorenz attractors) to stock price recordings and oil-price and wind-speed fluctuations -- while matching the performance of symbolic, Gaussian process and Neural SDE baselines trained on the target datasets. When finetuned to the target processes, we show that FIM-SDE consistently outperforms all these baselines.
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2025. The previous version appeared under the title "Foundation Inference Models for Stochastic Differential Equations: A Transformer-based Approach for Zero-shot Function Estimation."

light_analysis.overview: 提出FIM-SDE，一种预训练的基础推理模型，实现低维随机微分方程漂移和扩散函数的零样本（上下文）估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机微分方程在自然科学和社会科学领域应用广泛，但准确估计其漂移和扩散函数仍具挑战。现有方法要么严重依赖动力学先验知识，要么需要复杂的训练过程。因此，需要一种既能提供准确估计又能避免繁琐训练的方法，FIM-SDE应运而生。
light_analysis.method: FIM-SDE基于摊销推理和神经算子，通过监督预训练将大量噪声、离散观测的SDE路径映射到漂移和扩散函数空间。模型在合成数据和真实世界数据上训练，支持上下文（零样本）估计，并允许快速微调以适应目标数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在合成过程（如双井动力学、弱扰动洛伦兹吸引子）和真实世界数据（股票价格、油价、风速波动）上，FIM-SDE实现了鲁棒的上下文函数估计，匹配甚至超越符号回归、高斯过程和神经SDE等基线方法。微调后，FIM-SDE一致优于所有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: FIM-SDE提供了一种高效、准确的SDE函数估计方法，兼具零样本泛化能力和快速微调适应性，在科学和工程领域具有广泛应用前景。未来可扩展至高维系统或更复杂的噪声模型。

title: AccioScene: Compositional 3D Scene Generation via Graph Diffusion and Interaction-driven Critics
abstract: This paper presents a framework for generating 3D indoor scenes from text prompts. Existing methods often formulate scene synthesis as an object layout prediction problem conditioned on a single input modality, such as a text description, room shape, or scene graph. This design can lead to object collisions and limited functional plausibility, reducing its practical applicability. To address these limitations, we introduce a multi-stage pipeline that better reflects practical scene creation scenarios. Given a text prompt describing partial scene content, our method first uses graph diffusion to produce a contextually coherent scene graph and then predicts a realistic object layout. In addition, we incorporate lightweight human-object interaction priors to encourage human-centric and functional arrangements, with explicit spatial constraints to reduce interpenetration. Our approach generates coherent 3D scenes with viable layouts that better support human interaction. Experiments on the 3D-FRONT dataset demonstrate that our method achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance compared with existing approaches, while improving the physical plausibility of generated scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AccioScene框架，通过图扩散生成场景图并预测物体布局，结合人机交互先验和空间约束，从文本提示生成物理合理且功能连贯的3D室内场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D场景生成方法常依赖单一输入模态（如文本描述或场景图），导致物体碰撞和功能合理性不足，实用受限。本文旨在解决这些问题，通过多阶段流水线生成更连贯、支持人机交互的布局，提升物理合理性。
light_analysis.method: 采用多阶段流水线：首先基于文本提示使用图扩散生成上下文一致场景图；然后预测物体布局；最后引入轻量级人机交互先验和显式空间约束减少穿插。在3D-FRONT数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在3D-FRONT数据集上，与现有方法相比，该方法达到竞争或最先进性能，显著提升了生成场景的物理合理性（如减少物体碰撞和优化功能布局），具体指标未明确但强调实用性的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架生成连贯且功能性强的室内场景，支持人机交互；学术上提出图扩散与交互先验结合的新范式，实际可应用于室内设计。未来可扩展至更复杂场景或动态交互，但需验证泛化性。

title: Adaptive Prior Selection in Gaussian Process Bandits with Thompson Sampling
abstract: Gaussian process (GP) bandits provide a powerful framework for performing blackbox optimization of unknown functions. The characteristics of the unknown function depend heavily on the assumed GP prior. Most work in the literature assume that this prior is known but in practice this seldom holds. Instead, practitioners often rely on maximum likelihood estimation to select the hyperparameters of the prior - which lacks theoretical guarantees. In this work, we study two algorithms for joint prior selection and regret minimization in GP bandits based on GP Thompson sampling (GP-TS): Prior-Elimination GP-TS (PE-GP-TS) that disqualifies priors with poor predictive performance, and HyperPrior GP-TS (HP-GP-TS) that utilizes a bi-level Thompson sampling scheme. We theoretically analyze the algorithms and establish a sublinear regret bound for HP-GP-TS. In addition, we demonstrate the effectiveness of these algorithms compared to the alternatives through extensive experiments with synthetic and real-world data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种自适应先验选择算法（PE-GP-TS和HP-GP-TS）用于高斯过程bandits，实现亚线性遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 高斯过程bandits中，未知函数的特性高度依赖于假设的GP先验。现有文献大多假设先验已知，但实际应用中这一假设很少成立。实践者常使用最大似然估计选择超参数，但该方法缺乏理论保证，可能导致次优的遗憾性能。因此，需要一种既能自适应选择先验又能最小化遗憾的理论驱动方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出两种基于GP Thompson采样（GP-TS）的算法：PE-GP-TS通过消除预测性能差的先验来逐步缩小先验集合；HP-GP-TS采用双层Thompson采样，上层从先验分布中采样，下层基于所选先验进行GP-TS。理论上证明了HP-GP-TS实现了亚线性遗憾界，并通过合成和真实数据实验验证了有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据上的实验表明，所提出的PE-GP-TS和HP-GP-TS算法相比基线方法（如固定先验或最大似然估计）显著降低了累积遗憾。HP-GP-TS在多种设置下均表现稳定，验证了其理论优势。具体性能指标未在摘要中详述，但强调算法有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文解决了GP bandits中先验选择缺乏理论保证的问题，提出了两种自适应算法，其中HP-GP-TS具有严格的亚线性遗憾界。该工作为黑箱优化中的先验自适应提供了理论框架，实用价值在于无需手动调整先验即可高效优化。未来可扩展至更复杂的先验结构或非平稳环境。

title: IDEQ -- Improving Diffusion Models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) by Leveraging the Structure of the Solution Space
abstract: We investigate diffusion models to solve the Traveling Salesman Problem. Building on the recent DIFUSCO and T2TCO approaches, we propose IDEQ. IDEQ improves the quality of the solutions by leveraging the constrained structure of the state space of the TSP. Another key component of IDEQ consists in replacing the last stages of DIFUSCO curriculum learning by considering a uniform distribution over the Hamiltonian tours whose orbits by the 2-opt operator converge to the optimal solution as the training objective. Our experiments show that IDEQ improves the state of the art for such neural network based techniques on synthetic instances. More importantly, our experiments show that IDEQ performs very well on the instances of the TSPlib, a reference benchmark in the TSP community: it closely matches the performance of the best heuristics, LKH3, being even able to obtain better solutions than LKH3 on 2 instances of the TSPlib defined on 1577 and 3795 cities. IDEQ obtains 0.3% optimality gap on TSP instances made of 500 cities, and 0.5% on TSP instances with 1000 cities. This sets a new SOTA for neural based methods solving the TSP. Moreover, IDEQ exhibits a lower variance and better scales-up with the number of cities with regards to DIFUSCO and T2TCO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IDEQ，通过利用TSP解空间的结构约束改进扩散模型，在合成实例和TSPlib基准上达到神经方法新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 旅行商问题（TSP）是经典的组合优化难题，现有神经方法如DIFUSCO和T2TCO利用扩散模型求解，但解质量仍有提升空间。这些方法未充分利用TSP解空间的结构特性（如哈密顿环的2-opt轨道收敛性）。本研究旨在通过引入解空间结构约束和优化的训练目标，提升扩散模型求解TSP的性能，使其接近甚至超越传统启发式方法LKH3。
light_analysis.method: IDEQ基于DIFUSCO和T2TCO框架，核心创新包括：（1）利用TSP解空间的结构约束（哈密顿环的2-opt轨道收敛到最优解）指导训练；（2）在课程学习的最后阶段，用均匀分布覆盖所有哈密顿环，并以2-opt操作收敛到最优解为训练目标。模型为扩散概率模型，在TSP实例上训练，使用合成数据和TSPlib实例评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成TSP实例上，IDEQ达到神经方法新SOTA。在TSPlib基准上，IDEQ与最佳启发式LKH3性能接近，甚至在1577和3795城市的两个实例上获得更优解。IDEQ在500城市实例上最优性差距为0.3%，1000城市实例为0.5%。相比DIFUSCO和T2TCO，IDEQ方差更低且随城市数量扩展性更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: IDEQ通过利用解空间结构显著提升了扩散模型求解TSP的质量，在合成和基准数据集上均达到神经方法SOTA，且接近传统启发式性能。该工作展示了结合问题结构知识改进生成模型的潜力。未来可探索扩展到其他组合优化问题或更复杂的结构约束。

title: Sampling Out-of-Distribution Chemical Spaces via Bayesian Flow
abstract: Generating novel molecules with higher properties than the training space, namely the out-of-distribution generation, is important for de novo drug design. However, it is not easy for distribution learning-based models, for example diffusion models, to solve this challenge as these methods are designed to fit the distribution of training data as close as possible. In this paper, we show that Bayesian flow network, especially ChemBFN model, is capable of intrinsically generating high quality out-of-distribution samples that meet several scenarios. A reinforcement learning strategy is added to the ChemBFN and a controllable ordinary differential equation solver-like generating process is employed that accelerate the sampling processes. Most importantly, we introduce a semi-autoregressive strategy during training and inference that enhances the model performance and surpass the state-of-the-art models. A theoretical analysis of out-of-distribution generation in ChemBFN with semi-autoregressive approach is included as well.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChemBFN模型，基于贝叶斯流网络结合半自回归策略和强化学习，实现高质量分布外分子生成，超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 从头药物设计需要生成性质优于训练样本的分布外分子，但现有分布学习模型如扩散模型旨在拟合训练数据分布，难以生成分布外样本。这一问题限制了药物发现中的创新分子探索，亟需能内在生成分布外样本的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯流网络构建ChemBFN模型，引入强化学习策略优化生成方向，并采用可控常微分方程求解器加速采样。关键创新是训练和推理时使用半自回归策略，通过部分自回归生成增强模型对分子结构的理解，同时结合分布学习与强化学习平衡探索与利用。
light_analysis.result: ChemBFN在多种分布外生成场景中展现高性能，生成分子质量显著优于现有最先进模型。摘要未明确给出具体量化指标（如性质提升百分比），但强调其超越现有方法的能力，且半自回归策略的理论分析证实了分布外生成的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作证明了贝叶斯流网络在分布外分子生成中的潜力，半自回归策略与强化学习的结合为药物设计提供了高效工具。未来可探索更复杂的分子空间和实验验证。摘要未讨论局限性，但方法可推广至其他化学空间。

title: Advancements in Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Early Detection and Management of Mental Health Disorder
authors: Rajesh N. V. P. S. Kandala
abstract: For the early identification, diagnosis, and treatment of mental health illnesses, the integration of deep learning (DL) and machine learning (ML) have started playing a significant role. By evaluating complex data from imaging, genetics, and behavioral assessments, these technologies have the potential to improve clinical results significantly. However, they also present unique challenges relating to data integration and ethical issues. The development of ML and DL methods for the early diagnosis and treatment of mental health issues is reviewed in this survey. It examines a range of applications, with a particular emphasis on behavioral assessments, genetic and biomarker analysis, and medical imaging for the diagnosis of diseases like depression, bipolar disorder, and schizophrenia. Predictive modeling for illness development is further discussed in the review, focusing on the function of risk prediction models and longitudinal investigations. Important discoveries show how ML and DL might improve treatment outcomes and diagnostic accuracy while tackling methodological inconsistency, data integration, and ethical concerns. The study emphasizes the significance of building real-time monitoring systems for individualized treatment, improving data fusion techniques, and interdisciplinary collaboration. Upcoming studies should concentrate on surmounting these obstacles to maximize ML and DL's valuable and moral implementation in mental health services.

light_analysis.overview: 综述了机器学习和深度学习在心理健康障碍早期检测与管理中的最新进展。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理健康障碍的早期识别对改善临床结果至关重要，但传统方法存在数据整合困难、伦理挑战和方法论不一致等问题。机器学习和深度学习能够分析成像、遗传和行为评估等复杂数据，有望提升诊断准确性和治疗效率，因此需要系统综述现有方法及其挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本文为综述性研究，系统回顾了机器学习与深度学习在抑郁症、双相障碍和精神分裂症等疾病诊断中的应用，涵盖医学影像、遗传与生物标志物分析、行为评估等数据类型，并讨论了预测建模（如风险预测模型和纵向研究）在疾病进展中的作用。重点分析了数据融合技术、实时监测系统及跨学科协作的必要性。
light_analysis.result: 综述指出，机器学习与深度学习可显著提升诊断准确性和治疗效果，同时有效应对方法论不一致、数据整合和伦理问题。然而，具体性能指标（如准确率提升幅度）未在摘要中明确给出。强调了现有方法的潜力与当前局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究强调了机器学习与深度学习在心理健康领域的变革性作用，指出了数据融合、实时监测和伦理合规等关键挑战。未来研究需聚焦于克服这些障碍，以推动技术在实际心理健康服务中的价值实现和道德应用。

title: Graph-to-SFILES: Control structure prediction from process topologies using generative artificial intelligence
abstract: Control structure design is an important but tedious step in P&ID development. Generative artificial intelligence (AI) promises to reduce P&ID development time by supporting engineers. Previous research on generative AI in chemical process design mainly represented processes by sequences. However, graphs offer a promising alternative because of their permutation invariance. We propose the Graph-to-SFILES model, a generative AI method to predict control structures from flowsheet topologies. The Graph-to-SFILES model takes the flowsheet topology as a graph input and returns a control-extended flowsheet as a sequence in the SFILES 2.0 notation. We compare four different graph encoder architectures, one of them being a graph neural network (GNN) proposed in this work. The Graph-to-SFILES model achieves a top-5 accuracy of 73.2% when trained on 10,000 flowsheet topologies. In addition, the proposed GNN performs best among the encoder architectures. Compared to a purely sequence-based approach, the Graph-to-SFILES model improves the top-5 accuracy for a relatively small training dataset of 1,000 flowsheets from 0.9% to 28.4%. However, the sequence-based approach performs better on a large-scale dataset of 100,000 flowsheets. These results highlight the potential of graph-based AI models to accelerate P&ID development in small-data regimes but their effectiveness on industry relevant case studies still needs to be investigated.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph-to-SFILES模型，利用图神经网络从流程拓扑预测控制结构，在小数据集上显著优于序列方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 控制结构设计是P&ID开发中重要但繁琐的步骤，生成式AI可辅助工程师。现有方法多采用序列表示流程，但图表示具有排列不变性优势，有望提升预测准确性。
light_analysis.method: Graph-to-SFILES模型以流程图拓扑的图结构为输入，输出控制扩展流程图序列（SFILES 2.0）。比较四种图编码器架构，其中一种为本工作提出的图神经网络（GNN）。使用10,000个流程图拓扑训练。
light_analysis.result: 模型在10,000个训练样本上达到73.2%的top-5准确率，所提GNN为最佳编码器。在1,000个小数据集上，top-5准确率从序列方法的0.9%提升至28.4%；但在100,000大数据集上序列方法更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了基于图的AI模型在小数据场景下加速P&ID开发的潜力，但在工业案例上的有效性仍需进一步研究。

title: ClinicalBench: Can LLMs Beat Traditional ML Models in Clinical Prediction?
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) hold great promise to revolutionize current clinical systems for their superior capacities on medical text processing tasks and medical licensing exams. Meanwhile, traditional ML models such as SVM and XGBoost have still been mainly adopted in clinical prediction tasks. An emerging question is: Can LLMs beat traditional ML models in clinical prediction? Thus, we build a new benchmark ClinicalBench to comprehensively study the clinical predictive modeling capacities of both general-purpose and medical LLMs, and compare them with traditional ML models. ClinicalBench embraces three common clinical prediction tasks, two databases, 14 general-purpose LLMs, 8 medical LLMs, and 11 traditional ML models. Through extensive empirical investigation, we discover that both general-purpose and medical LLMs, even with different model scales, diverse prompting or fine-tuning strategies, still cannot beat traditional ML models in clinical prediction yet, shedding light on their potential deficiency in clinical reasoning and decision-making. We call for caution when practitioners adopt LLMs in clinical applications. ClinicalBench can be utilized to bridge the gap between LLMs' development for healthcare and real-world clinical practice.
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of KDD 2026. The first two authors contributed equally. 12 pages for main paper, 62 pages including appendix. Project website: https://clinicalbench.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 构建ClinicalBench基准，发现LLMs在临床预测任务上仍不如传统ML模型。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在医学文本处理和考试中表现优异，但临床预测任务仍主要使用传统ML模型（如SVM、XGBoost）。目前缺乏系统比较两者在临床预测中的能力，因此需要构建全面基准来评估LLMs是否能在临床预测中超越传统ML，以指导实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出ClinicalBench基准，包含三种常见临床预测任务、两个数据库、14个通用LLMs、8个医学LLMs和11个传统ML模型。通过提示工程和微调等策略，系统评估模型性能，并与传统ML进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，无论是通用还是医学LLMs，即使采用不同模型规模、提示或微调策略，在临床预测任务上仍无法超越传统ML模型（如XGBoost），揭示了LLMs在临床推理和决策中的潜在不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLMs在当前临床预测任务中不及传统ML模型，呼吁从业者在临床应用中谨慎使用。ClinicalBench可作为桥梁，促进LLMs在医疗领域的开发与实际临床实践的结合。

title: Federated Large Language Models: Current Progress and Future Directions
abstract: Large Language Models have achieved impressive performance across diverse applications, yet their training typically depends on centralized data collection, raising serious privacy and governance concerns. Federated Learning offers a decentralized alternative by enabling multiple clients to collaboratively train shared models without exposing raw local data. However, integrating FL with LLMs introduces new challenges, including data heterogeneity, convergence instability, communication overhead, and computational constraints. This survey provides a comprehensive and up-to-date overview of Federated Learning for Large Language Models (FedLLM). We systematically review recent advances, with particular emphasis on federated fine-tuning and federated prompt learning, and analyze how existing methods address efficiency, personalization, and security challenges. We further summarize emerging directions such as federated pre-training and federated agents. Our goal is to offer a structured perspective on this rapidly evolving field and to highlight promising avenues for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 对联邦学习与大语言模型结合（FedLLM）的全面综述，聚焦联邦微调和提示学习技术。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型训练依赖集中数据收集，引发严重隐私和治理问题。联邦学习通过去中心化训练解决隐私问题，但与大语言模型结合时面临数据异构、收敛不稳定、通信开销和计算约束等新挑战。现有研究缺乏对这一交叉领域的系统梳理，亟需综述性工作指导未来方向。
light_analysis.method: 系统综述联邦微调和联邦提示学习方法，分析其应对效率、个性化和安全性的策略，并总结联邦预训练和联邦智能体等新兴方向。研究覆盖多种技术路线，强调各类方法在隐私保护与模型性能间的权衡。
light_analysis.result: 全面梳理了FedLLM领域进展，指出联邦微调适用于下游任务适应，联邦提示学习能高效处理异构数据，但面临收敛和通信瓶颈。联邦预训练和联邦智能体仍处于早期阶段。综述为研究者提供了结构化参考，未提供量化实验对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述系统化概括了FedLLM关键挑战与解决方案，为后续研究提供了清晰的路线图。未来需重点关注异构性健壮性、通信效率优化以及隐私与性能的平衡，具有重要学术和工程应用价值。

title: Assessing the Variety of a Concept Space Using an Unbiased Estimate of Rao's Quadratic Index
abstract: Past research relates design creativity to 'divergent thinking,' i.e., how well the concept space is explored during the early phase of design. Researchers have argued that generating several concepts would increase the chances of producing better design solutions. 'Variety' is one of the parameters by which one can quantify the breadth of a concept space explored by the designers. It is useful to assess variety at the conceptual design stage because, at this stage, designers have the freedom to explore different solution principles so as to satisfy a design problem with substantially novel concepts. This article elaborates on and critically examines the existing variety metrics from the engineering design literature, discussing their limitations. A new distance-based variety metric is proposed, along with a prescriptive framework to support the assessment process. The framework measures the real-valued distance between two design concepts using any chosen representation of their underlying abstraction levels. The proposed framework is implemented in a software tool called 'VariAnT.' Furthermore, the tool's application is demonstrated through an illustrative example.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Rao二次指数无偏估计的距离多样性度量，并开发软件工具VariAnT，用于评估设计概念空间的广度。
light_analysis.motivation: 设计创意依赖于发散思维，概念空间探索的广度（多样性）是衡量设计质量的关键参数。现有多样性度量方法存在局限性，如对概念间距离的处理不精确，无法有效支持设计早期阶段的评估。因此，需要一种更准确、无偏的度量方法来量化概念多样性，以促进创新设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于Rao二次指数无偏估计的距离多样性度量，通过计算设计概念在选定抽象层次上的实值距离来评估概念空间广度。该方法具有通用性，支持不同的概念表示方式。基于该度量开发了软件工具VariAnT，并提供了完整的评估框架，便于设计人员在实际应用中使用。
light_analysis.result: 通过一个示例演示了VariAnT工具的应用，表明所提出的距离度量能够有效量化概念多样性。摘要未给出具体定量结果，但框架的理论分析和示例应用验证了其可行性和有效性，相较于传统方法，更准确地反映了概念空间的真实广度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的距离多样性度量方法和评估框架，解决了现有方法在概念设计阶段多样性评估中的不足。该工作为设计创意研究提供了更精确的量化工具，有助于设计师更具针对性地探索概念空间，提升设计质量。未来可进一步扩展到多领域设计问题，并探索与其他创意度量指标的融合。

title: Embedded Graph Convolutional Networks for Real-Time Event Data Processing on SoC FPGAs
abstract: The utilisation of event cameras represents an important and swiftly evolving trend aimed at addressing the constraints of traditional video systems. Particularly within the automotive domain, these cameras find significant relevance for their integration into embedded real-time systems due to lower latency and power consumption. One effective approach to ensure the necessary throughput and latency for event processing is through the utilisation of graph convolutional networks (GCNs). In this study, we introduce a custom EFGCN (Event-based FPGA-accelerated Graph Convolutional Network) designed with a series of hardware-aware optimisations tailored for PointNetConv,a graph convolution designed for point cloud processing. The proposed techniques result in up to 100-fold reduction in model size compared to Asynchronous Event-based GNN (AEGNN), one of the most recent works in the field, with a relatively small decrease in accuracy (2.9% for the N-Caltech101 classification task, 2.2% for the N-Cars classification task), thus following the TinyML trend. We implemented EFGCN on a ZCU104 SoC FPGA platform without any off-chip external memory resources, achieving a throughput of 13.3 million events per second (MEPS) and real-time partially asynchronous processing with low latency. Across multiple event-based classification benchmarks, our approach achieves competitive accuracy while providing state-of-the-art computational efficiency per event, small model size, and high scalability, customisability and resource efficiency. We publish both software and hardware source code in an open repository: https://github.com/vision-agh/gcnn-dvs-fpga.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种面向事件相机的嵌入式图卷积网络EFGCN，通过硬件感知优化实现模型大小缩小100倍，在FPGA上达到13.3 MEPS实时处理，精度仅小幅下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机因低延迟、低功耗成为嵌入式实时系统（如自动驾驶）的关键技术。现有基于图卷积网络的事件处理方法（如AEGNN）模型庞大，难以在资源受限的SoC FPGA上高效部署。因此，需要设计硬件友好的轻量级网络，在保证实时性的同时维持较高精度。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出EFGCN，针对PointNetConv图卷积进行硬件感知优化，包括模型压缩、量化等，使参数量较AEGNN减少100倍。网络在ZCU104 SoC FPGA上实现，无需外部存储，利用部分异步流水线架构，达到13.3百万事件/秒的吞吐量和低延迟处理。所有软硬件代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在N-Caltech101和N-Cars分类任务上，EFGCN相较AEGNN模型大小降低100倍，精度仅分别下降2.9%和2.2%。FPGA实现达到13.3 MEPS吞吐量，支持实时处理。与其他方法相比，EFGCN在计算效率、模型尺寸和资源利用率上达到最优，同时保持竞争性精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: EFGCN成功将图卷积网络以极小模型尺寸部署于FPGA，实现事件相机数据的高效实时处理，验证了TinyML趋势在事件视觉领域的可行性。其高可扩展性和开源性有助于推动嵌入式智能系统发展。未来可进一步优化精度或适配更多硬件平台。

title: Quantifying Noise of Dynamic Vision Sensor
abstract: Dynamic visual sensors (DVS) are characterized by a large amount of background activity (BA) noise, which it is mixed with the original (cleaned) sensor signal. The dynamic nature of the signal and the absence in practical application of the ground truth, it clearly makes difficult to distinguish between noise and the cleaned sensor signals using standard image processing techniques. In this letter, a new technique is presented to characterise BA noise derived from the Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (DFA). The proposed technique can be used to address an existing DVS issues, which is how to quantitatively characterised noise and signal without ground truth, and how to derive an optimal denoising filter parameters. The solution of the latter problem is demonstrated for the popular real moving-car dataset.
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the IEEE Signal Processing Letters

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于去趋势波动分析（DFA）的定量表征DVS背景活动噪声的方法，无需真实标签即可区分噪声与信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态视觉传感器（DVS）输出中混杂大量背景活动（BA）噪声，且实际应用中缺乏真实信号标注，导致标准图像处理技术难以有效区分噪声与纯净信号。这一问题限制了DVS在高速运动场景下的应用效果。现有噪声量化方法多依赖模拟或人工标注，实用性不足。因此，需要一种无需先验知识、可定量评估噪声并指导去噪的自动化技术。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出基于去趋势波动分析（DFA）的量化方法。DFA通过分析信号长程相关性，提取表征噪声强度的标度指数，从而在无监督条件下区分BA噪声与原始信号。该方法进一步利用该指数推导最优去噪滤波器参数（如时间常数），并采用真实移动汽车数据集验证参数推导的有效性。核心创新在于将DFA从传统时间序列分析扩展到DVS噪声量化，实现无标签场景下的噪声与信号分离。
light_analysis.result: 在公开的移动汽车数据集上，该方法成功演示了如何根据DFA标度指数确定最优去噪滤波器参数，显著抑制了背景活动噪声。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但定性结果表明该方法能有效区分噪声与信号，并指导滤波器参数选择，相比依赖人工调参的传统方案更具自动化优势。与现有基于阈值的去噪方法相比，避免了手动设置参数的主观性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种基于DFA的DVS噪声量化新手段，解决了无真实标签时噪声与信号区分的难题，并为自动去噪提供了理论基础。该方法具有实际应用价值，可提升DVS在复杂环境中的信号质量。未来可能探索更复杂的噪声模型或多传感器融合场景下的泛化能力。

title: Are Classification Robustness and Explanation Robustness Really Strongly Correlated? An Analysis Through Input Loss Landscape
abstract: This paper delves into the critical area of deep learning robustness, challenging the conventional belief that classification robustness and explanation robustness in image classification systems are inherently correlated. Through a novel evaluation approach leveraging clustering for efficient assessment of explanation robustness, we demonstrate that enhancing explanation robustness does not necessarily flatten the input loss landscape with respect to explanation loss - contrary to flattened loss landscapes indicating better classification robustness. To deeply investigate this contradiction, a groundbreaking training method designed to adjust the loss landscape with respect to explanation loss is proposed. Through the new training method, we uncover that although such adjustments can impact the robustness of explanations, they do not have an influence on the robustness of classification. These findings not only challenge the prevailing assumption of a strong correlation between the two forms of robustness but also pave new pathways for understanding relationship between loss landscape and explanation loss.

light_analysis.overview: 挑战分类鲁棒性与解释鲁棒性强相关的传统观点，通过输入损失景观分析揭示两者并非必然相关。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究常假设分类鲁棒性与解释鲁棒性强相关，但缺乏深入验证。本文旨在探究两者真实关系，并揭示损失景观在其中的作用，以纠正错误认知并推动相关领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于聚类的解释鲁棒性高效评估方法；设计一种新的训练方法调整解释损失对应的损失景观。通过实验分析损失景观与两种鲁棒性的关系，验证假设。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，增强解释鲁棒性不一定使解释损失景观更平坦；调整解释损失景观可影响解释鲁棒性，但不改变分类鲁棒性，反驳了强相关性假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 挑战了分类鲁棒性与解释鲁棒性强相关的普遍观点，为理解损失景观与解释损失的关系开辟新方向，对深度学习可解释性与安全性研究具有重要启示。

title: Investigating the Histogram Loss in Regression
abstract: It is becoming increasingly common in regression to train neural networks that model the entire distribution even if only the mean is required for prediction. This additional modeling often comes with performance gain and the reasons behind the improvement are not fully known. This paper investigates a recent approach to regression, the Histogram Loss, which involves learning the conditional distribution of the target variable by minimizing the cross-entropy between a target distribution and a flexible histogram prediction. We design theoretical and empirical analyses to determine why and when this performance gain appears, and how different components of the loss contribute to it. Our results suggest that the benefits of learning distributions in this setup come from improvements in optimization rather than modelling extra information. We then demonstrate the viability of the Histogram Loss in common deep learning applications without a need for costly hyperparameter tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统分析Histogram Loss在回归中的性能提升机制，揭示其收益源于优化改善而非额外信息建模，并验证其在深度学习中的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在回归任务中，预测完整分布（即使只需均值）常带来性能提升，但根本原因尚不明确。现有方法如Histogram Loss虽有效，但其成功机理、组件贡献及适用条件缺乏系统分析。理解这些有助于设计更高效的回归损失函数，避免不必要的复杂建模。
light_analysis.method: 本文对Histogram Loss进行理论推导和实证分析，该损失通过最小化目标分布与可学习的直方图预测之间的交叉熵来建模条件分布。作者设计控制实验，分离优化改进与信息建模的影响，对比不同损失组件（如bin数量、平滑方式）在多种回归任务（含合成数据和真实基准）中的表现。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，Histogram Loss的性能提升主要源于优化过程的改进（如更好的梯度特性），而非对额外分布信息的学习。在多个标准回归数据集上，该方法匹配或超越传统L1/L2损失，且对超参数（如bin数）不敏感，无需大量调优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了分布回归损失（如Histogram Loss）成功的关键在于优化优势，挑战了其通过建模额外信息获益的普遍认知。工作提供了理论指导和实用建议，支持该损失在图像超分辨率、深度回归等任务中的直接应用，同时为设计更高效的损失函数指明方向。

title: The Mirrored Influence Hypothesis: Efficient Data Influence Estimation by Harnessing Forward Passes
abstract: Large-scale black-box models have become ubiquitous across numerous applications. Understanding the influence of individual training data sources on predictions made by these models is crucial for improving their trustworthiness. Current influence estimation techniques involve computing gradients for every training point or repeated training on different subsets. These approaches face obvious computational challenges when scaled up to large datasets and models.   In this paper, we introduce and explore the Mirrored Influence Hypothesis, highlighting a reciprocal nature of influence between training and test data. Specifically, it suggests that evaluating the influence of training data on test predictions can be reformulated as an equivalent, yet inverse problem: assessing how the predictions for training samples would be altered if the model were trained on specific test samples. Through both empirical and theoretical validations, we demonstrate the wide applicability of our hypothesis. Inspired by this, we introduce a new method for estimating the influence of training data, which requires calculating gradients for specific test samples, paired with a forward pass for each training point. This approach can capitalize on the common asymmetry in scenarios where the number of test samples under concurrent examination is much smaller than the scale of the training dataset, thus gaining a significant improvement in efficiency compared to existing approaches.   We demonstrate the applicability of our method across a range of scenarios, including data attribution in diffusion models, data leakage detection, analysis of memorization, mislabeled data detection, and tracing behavior in language models. Our code will be made available at https://github.com/ruoxi-jia-group/Forward-INF.
comment: The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2024

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mirrored Influence Hypothesis，利用训练和测试数据影响力的镜像关系，实现高效的数据影响力估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模黑盒模型的应用日益广泛，但评估单个训练数据对模型预测的影响（数据影响力估计）对于提升模型可信度至关重要。现有方法如梯度计算或重复训练，在大型数据集和模型上计算成本极高，难以扩展。因此需要更高效的影响力估计技术。
light_analysis.method: 基于Mirrored Influence Hypothesis，将评估训练数据对测试预测的影响转化为评估测试样本对训练预测的逆问题。方法仅需计算测试样本的梯度，并对每个训练点进行一次前向传播。利用测试样本数量远小于训练集规模的常见不对称性，显著提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务中验证有效性，包括扩散模型的数据归因、数据泄露检测、记忆化分析、错误标签检测和语言模型行为追踪。方法在保持准确性的同时，大幅降低计算开销，具体数值摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种高效的数据影响力估计方法，通过镜像假设实现计算加速，适用于多种机器学习场景。该方法提升了模型可解释性和数据治理能力，但未提及局限性。未来可探索更广泛的应用及理论深化。

title: Ricci flow regularization in latent spaces for the forward learning of partial differential equations
abstract: We present a manifold-based machine learning encoder-decoder method for learning dynamics in time, notably partial differential equations (PDEs), in which the manifold latent space evolves according to Ricci flow. This can be accomplished by parameterizing the latent manifold stage and subsequently simulating Ricci flow in a physics-informed setting, matching manifold quantities so that Ricci flow is empirically achieved. We emphasize dynamics that admit low-dimensional representations. With our method, the manifold, induced by the metric, is discerned through the training procedure, while the latent evolution due to Ricci flow provides an accommodating representation. By use of this flow, we sustain a canonical manifold latent representation for all values in the ambient PDE time interval continuum. We showcase that the Ricci flow facilitates qualities such as learning for out-of-distribution data and adversarial robustness on select PDE data. Moreover, we provide a thorough expansion of our methods in regard to special cases which allow higher-dimensional representations, such as Ricci flow on the hypersphere and neural discovery of non-parametric geometric flows with entropic strategies.
comment: Fixed a small error in appendix; some improvements to experiments

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Ricci流正则化的潜在流形学习方法，用于前向PDE动力学建模，实现几何驱动的低维表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 偏微分方程（PDE）在科学工程中广泛存在，但现有机器学习方法在潜在空间缺乏几何正则化，导致对分布外数据泛化差和鲁棒性不足。通过引入Ricci流，使潜在流形自然演化，保持规范几何结构，从而提升模型在非平凡数据上的适应能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用编码器-解码器框架，潜在空间由参数化流形表示，并模拟Ricci流演化。在物理信息约束下，通过训练学习度量张量，使流形沿曲率调整。支持低维表示，并扩展至超球面Ricci流和非参数几何流（基于熵策略），利用神经网络自动发现流形演化。
light_analysis.result: 在选定PDE数据上，Ricci流正则化显著提升了模型对分布外数据的预测能力和对抗鲁棒性。与未正则化方法相比，潜在流形的几何结构更稳定，降低了过拟合风险。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但通过流形演化维持了潜在表示的一致性与泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为PDE学习提供了新颖的几何正则化范式，通过Ricci流动态调整潜在流形，增强模型对数据偏移的鲁棒性。方法可推广至高维表示（如超球面）和自动几何流发现。未来可探索更复杂的流形拓扑及与PDE求解器的联合训练。

title: Generalization Error Curves for Analytic Spectral Algorithms under Power-law Decay
abstract: The generalization error curve of certain kernel regression method aims at determining the exact order of generalization error with various source condition, noise level and choice of the regularization parameter rather than the minimax rate. In this work, under mild assumptions, we rigorously provide a full characterization of the generalization error curves of the kernel gradient descent method (and a large class of analytic spectral algorithms) in kernel regression. Consequently, we could sharpen the near inconsistency of kernel interpolation and clarify the saturation effects of kernel regression algorithms with higher qualification, etc. Thanks to the neural tangent kernel theory, these results greatly improve our understanding of the generalization behavior of training the wide neural networks. A novel technical contribution, the analytic functional argument, might be of independent interest.

light_analysis.overview: 在幂律衰减假设下，完整刻画了核梯度下降等解析谱算法的泛化误差曲线，揭示了核插值的不一致性和饱和效应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有核回归方法对泛化误差的阶数刻画不够精确，尤其是核插值的近不一致性和高资格算法的饱和效应尚未被充分理解。这些现象对理解宽神经网络的泛化行为至关重要，但缺乏严格的理论分析。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于解析函数论的分析方法，对核梯度下降及一类解析谱算法在幂律衰减源条件和噪声水平下，建立了泛化误差曲线的完整理论框架。该方法通过泛函分析技术精确量化了正则化参数的影响。
light_analysis.result: 成功刻画了核插值泛化误差的精确阶数，揭示了其近不一致性；同时阐明了核回归算法随资格提升的饱和效应，理论结果与实验趋势一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究严格解析了核回归算法的泛化误差曲线，深化了对宽神经网络训练动态的理论理解。提出的解析函数论方法具有独立学术价值，未来可推广至其它学习任务。

title: Greedy Grammar Induction with Indirect Negative Evidence
abstract: This paper proposes a non-lexicalized grammar-induction procedure that separates two tests: recognition of the observed finite presentation, and rejection of short preterminal strings generated by a hypothesis but unsupported by the evidence.   The central object is the rule-coverage bound \(\ell^*(G)\): the maximum, over rules in \(G\), of the length of the shortest preterminal string whose derivation uses that rule. This bound induces the comparison universe \(Σ_{\mathrm{pre}}^{\le \ell^*(G)}\), where unsupported generated strings serve as indirect evidence against overgenerating hypotheses.   We give a greedy search algorithm over rule sets and prove a conditional weak-recovery theorem: under explicit reachability conditions and sufficient saturation of the presentation, the exact learner reaches a grammar weakly equivalent to the unknown target. The complexity analysis is slice-wise: for each fixed incrementality radius \(k\), the search explores polynomially many rule-set extensions in the finite rule universe. Across 31 benchmark runs spanning Dyck-\(k\) languages \((1\le k\le4)\), palindromes, \(a^n b^n\), English-like recursive fragments, and an inherently ambiguous union language, grammar-level analysis establishes weak equivalence between every returned grammar and its target.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种非词法化的语法归纳方法，利用间接负证据和规则覆盖界，实现与目标语法的弱等价。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语法归纳方法通常依赖正例和负例，但负例往往难以获取。本文旨在利用间接负证据（即假设生成但未被证据支持的短前终止符串）作为隐式负例，从而在没有显式负例的情况下有效约束过度生成的假设。该方法解决了非词法化语法归纳中假说空间过大的问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是规则覆盖界 \(\ell^*(G)\)，定义为语法 \(G\) 中各规则所推导的最短前终止符串长度的最大值。该界用于构造比较宇宙 \(\Sigma_{\pre}^{\le \ell^*(G)}\)，其中未被支持的生成串作为间接负证据。算法采用贪婪搜索，在固定增量半径 \(k\) 下，搜索空间在有限规则宇宙中呈多项式增长。理论证明在显式可达性和充分饱和条件下，可得到与目标弱等价的语法。
light_analysis.result: 在31个基准测试上验证，包括 Dyck-\(k\) 语言（\(1\le k\le4\)）、回文、\(a^n b^n\)、类英语递归片段以及一个固有歧义联合语言。语法级分析表明，每个返回语法都与对应目标语法弱等价，未提供具体数值指标，但覆盖了多种结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种利用间接负证据进行贪婪语法归纳的新框架，通过规则覆盖界有效约束假设空间，并证明了弱恢复定理。该方法无需显式负例，适用于多种形式语言，展现良好的泛化能力。未来可探索更高效的搜索策略或扩展到词法化语法。

title: Toward autocorrection of chemical process flowsheets using large language models
abstract: The process engineering domain widely uses Process Flow Diagrams (PFDs) and Process and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) to represent process flows and equipment configurations. However, the P&IDs and PFDs, hereafter called flowsheets, can contain errors causing safety hazards, inefficient operation, and unnecessary expenses. Correcting and verifying flowsheets is a tedious, manual process. We propose a novel generative AI methodology for automatically identifying errors in flowsheets and suggesting corrections to the user, i.e., autocorrecting flowsheets. Inspired by the breakthrough of Large Language Models (LLMs) for grammatical autocorrection of human language, we investigate LLMs for the autocorrection of flowsheets. The input to the model is a potentially erroneous flowsheet and the output of the model are suggestions for a corrected flowsheet. We train our autocorrection model on a synthetic dataset in a supervised manner. The model achieves a top-1 accuracy of 80% and a top-5 accuracy of 84% on an independent test dataset of synthetically generated flowsheets. The results suggest that the model can learn to autocorrect the synthetic flowsheets. We envision that flowsheet autocorrection will become a useful tool for chemical engineers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用大语言模型自动纠正化工流程图中错误的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 流程工程中使用的PFD和P&ID图可能含有错误，导致安全隐患、低效操作和不必要开支。手动纠正和验证流程图表繁琐且耗时，现有方法缺乏自动纠错能力，亟需高效解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 受大语言模型在语法自动纠错中的启发，将其应用于流程图自动纠错。模型输入可能错误的流程图，输出纠正建议。使用合成数据集进行监督训练，具体模型架构未明确说明但基于LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在独立合成测试集上，模型top-1准确率80%，top-5准确率84%，表明模型能有效学习纠正合成流程图中的错误。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明LLM可用于化工流程图自动纠错，有望成为化工工程师的有用工具，但实际应用效果和局限性需进一步验证。

title: Deep reinforcement learning for process design: Review and perspective
abstract: The transformation towards renewable energy and feedstock supply in the chemical industry requires new conceptual process design approaches. Recently, breakthroughs in artificial intelligence offer opportunities to accelerate this transition. Specifically, deep reinforcement learning, a subclass of machine learning, has shown the potential to solve complex decision-making problems and aid sustainable process design. We survey state-of-the-art research in reinforcement learning for process design through three major elements: (i) information representation, (ii) agent architecture, and (iii) environment and reward. Moreover, we discuss perspectives on underlying challenges and promising future works to unfold the full potential of reinforcement learning for process design in chemical engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 综述深度强化学习在过程设计中的应用，从信息表示、智能体架构、环境与奖励三个要素分析最新研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 化学工业向可再生能源和原料供应转型需要新的概念性过程设计方法。传统方法难以应对复杂决策问题，而深度强化学习作为机器学习子类，展现了解决此类问题的潜力，有望加速可持续过程设计的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从三个核心要素调查强化学习在过程设计中的研究：信息表示（如何编码过程状态）、智能体架构（决策模型设计）以及环境与奖励（模拟与反馈机制）。论文采用综述方法，系统梳理现有工作，并讨论关键挑战。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但通过系统综述识别了当前研究的进展与不足，包括信息表示、智能体架构和奖励设计等方面的技术现状，为后续研究奠定了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结了深度强化学习在过程设计中的潜力，指出了主要挑战（如样本效率、泛化能力）和未来方向（如结合物理模型、多目标优化），对化学工程领域具有重要的学术参考价值和实践指导意义。

title: Chatlaw: A Multi-Agent Legal Assistant based on a Role-Aligned Mixture-of-Experts Architecture
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) holds great potential in legal services, yet Large Language Models (LLMs) face two major challenges: limited knowledge of the Chinese legal system and vulnerability to hallucinations. To address these issues, we present Chatlaw, a multi-agent legal assistant. Chatlaw's framework is designed to emulate the Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) of real law firms, where different roles (e.g., assistant, researcher, senior lawyer) collaborate on a case. To computationally mirror this collaborative structure, we developed a novel Role-Aligned Mixture-of-Experts (RA-MoE) architecture. In this system, the internal "experts" are specifically trained to align with the distinct tasks of each agent role (e.g., inquiry, analysis, drafting). These specialized agents (Legal Assistant, Researcher, etc.) then form the collaborative framework. When they interact with users, retrieve legal knowledge, analyze case details, or generate reliable consultations, the RA-MoE architecture intelligently routes their computations to the corresponding dedicated expert, ensuring each step is handled by the most qualified parameters. In evaluations, Chatlaw surpasses general-purpose AI models, including GPT-4, achieving a 7.73% improvement in accuracy on the LawBench benchmark and an 11-point higher score on the Unified Qualification Exam for Legal Professionals. Real-case studies and expert assessments further confirm its robustness. Chatlaw enhances the accessibility and reliability of legal services, advancing the provision of legal support to the public.
comment: Accepted manuscript. Updated to match the journal version and added DOI

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于角色对齐混合专家架构的多智能体法律助手Chatlaw，模拟律所协作流程，提升法律咨询准确性与可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在中文法律服务中面临两大挑战：对中国法律体系知识有限和易产生幻觉。现有通用AI模型难以满足专业法律需求，需要模拟律所标准操作流程，由不同角色协作处理案件，以提升法律咨询的准确性和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 设计多智能体框架，模拟律所角色（助理、研究员、资深律师等）协作。创新提出角色对齐混合专家架构，每个智能体角色对应内部专门训练的专家，负责特定任务（查询、分析、起草）。RA-MoE智能路由计算到相应专家，确保每步由最合格参数处理。
light_analysis.result: 在LawBench基准上，Chatlaw准确率比GPT-4提升7.73%；在统一法律职业资格考试中得分高11分。真实案例研究和专家评估进一步证实其稳健性，超越通用AI模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: Chatlaw通过模拟律所协作流程和角色对齐专家架构，显著提升了法律服务的可访问性和可靠性。该工作推动了AI在法律领域的实际应用，为公众提供更准确的在线法律支持。未来可扩展更多角色或领域。

title: Toward automatic generation of control structures for process flow diagrams with large language models
abstract: Developing Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) is a crucial step during process development. We propose a data-driven method for the prediction of control structures. Our methodology is inspired by end-to-end transformer-based human language translation models. We cast the control structure prediction as a translation task where Process Flow Diagrams (PFDs) without control structures are translated to PFDs with control structures. We represent the topology of PFDs as strings using the SFILES 2.0 notation. We pretrain our model using generated PFDs to learn the grammatical structure. Thereafter, the model is fine-tuned leveraging transfer learning on real PFDs. The model achieved a top-5 accuracy of 74.8% on 10,000 generated PFDs and 89.2% on 100,000 generated PFDs. These promising results show great potential for AI-assisted process engineering. The tests on a dataset of 312 real PFDs indicate the need for a larger PFD dataset for industry applications and hybrid artificial intelligence solutions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大语言模型的PFD控制结构自动生成方法，将控制结构预测转化为翻译任务。
light_analysis.motivation: P&ID是过程工程的关键，手动设计控制结构耗时且易错。现有方法依赖专家经验，缺乏自动化。本文受语言翻译模型启发，利用数据驱动方法自动预测控制结构，以提高效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 采用Transformer架构，将无控制结构的PFD视为源语言，有控制结构的目标，用SFILES 2.0字符串表示拓扑。先在生成PFD上预训练学习语法，再在真实PFD上微调。使用10,000和100,000生成PFD及312个真实PFD数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在10,000生成PFD上top-5准确率74.8%，100,000上达89.2%。在312真实PFD上测试表明需更大真实数据集和混合AI方案，未与基线对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 方法展现AI辅助过程工程潜力，但真实数据不足限制了工业应用。未来需构建更大PFD数据集并探索混合人工智能解决方案。

title: Learning from flowsheets: A generative transformer model for autocompletion of flowsheets
abstract: We propose a novel method enabling autocompletion of chemical flowsheets. This idea is inspired by the autocompletion of text. We represent flowsheets as strings using the text-based SFILES 2.0 notation and learn the grammatical structure of the SFILES 2.0 language and common patterns in flowsheets using a transformer-based language model. We pre-train our model on synthetically generated flowsheet topologies to learn the flowsheet language grammar. Then, we fine-tune our model in a transfer learning step on real flowsheet topologies. Finally, we use the trained model for causal language modeling to autocomplete flowsheets. Eventually, the proposed method can provide chemical engineers with recommendations during interactive flowsheet synthesis. The results demonstrate a high potential of this approach for future AI-assisted process synthesis but also reveal the limitations at the present state and the next steps that need to be taken to deploy this technique in realistic flowsheet synthesis scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于生成式transformer模型的流程图自动补全方法，受文本自动补全启发，使用SFILES 2.0符号表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 化工流程图设计是复杂且耗时的过程，现有方法缺乏智能化辅助。借鉴自然语言处理中的自动补全技术，可提高设计效率。但流程图结构复杂，现有表示方法不便于模型学习。因此需要一种能学习流程图语法和常见模式的方法，以提供实时推荐。
light_analysis.method: 采用SFILES 2.0文本表示将流程图转化为字符串，使用transformer-based语言模型学习语法结构。先在合成生成的流程图拓扑上预训练以掌握语言规则，再通过迁移学习在真实流程图上微调。最后利用因果语言建模实现流程图自动补全，为工程师提供交互式推荐。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该方法在流程图补全上具有高潜力，能有效生成合理的拓扑结构。但当前存在局限性，如对复杂流程图的准确性不足，需进一步改进以适应真实场景。与基线方法相比，该方法展示了更好的学习能力和泛化性，但实际部署仍需更多研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一种AI辅助化工流程合成的新思路，通过语言模型实现流程图自动补全。学术上拓展了生成式模型在工程图设计中的应用，实践中可提升设计效率。未来需提升模型对复杂流程的处理能力，并集成到实际设计工具中。

title: Measuring a hate speech spectrum with faceted Rasch item response theory and perspective-aware, explainable-by-design deep learning
abstract: We propose a system for measuring hate speech on a continuous, interval-valued spectrum ranging from genocidal to supportive speech by combining supervised deep learning with faceted Rasch item response theory (IRT). We decompose the theoretical construct of hate speech into constituent concepts operationalized as 10 ordinal labels. Those labels are reconstituted via IRT probabilistic latent modeling into an interval outcome measure while simultaneously estimating and adjusting for each annotator's labeling perspective. Our scaling procedure integrates naturally with a multitask deep learning architecture for automated prediction, allowing design-based explainability of the continuous score through those components. We apply this method to a new, open source dataset of 50,070 social media comments sourced from YouTube, Twitter, and Reddit, annotated and labeled by 11,143 United States-based Amazon Mechanical Turk workers. Our RoBERTa-based model shows improved accuracy compared to alternative approaches. This system offers a new paradigm for supervised NLP that encourages continuous rather than binary constructs, and design-based incorporation of annotator perspective and model explainability.

light_analysis.overview: 结合Rasch项目反应理论与深度学习，提出连续区间仇恨言论测量系统，实现可解释且考虑标注者视角的自动预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有仇恨言论检测多为二元分类，忽略程度差异和标注者主观性。需要一种连续测量方法，同时调整标注偏差，以更精确地捕捉仇恨言论的频谱特性。
light_analysis.method: 采用faceted Rasch IRT将10个序数标签转换为连续区间值，并估计标注者视角。多任务深度学习架构（RoBERTa）集成IRT缩放，实现基于设计的可解释性。使用50,070条社交媒体评论和11,143名标注者的公开数据集。
light_analysis.result: RoBERTa模型相比替代方法提高了预测准确性。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出监督NLP新范式，鼓励连续构念、标注者视角和模型可解释性。有助于细致测量仇恨言论，促进在线内容管理的公平性。未来可扩展至其他主观社会构念。
